Name: Crepier
Description:
Somos la marca peruana icónica de accesorios de moda y viaje, con más de 47 años en constante evolución. Establecidos en Lima, trabajamos para crear más y mejores experiencias a nuestros clientes a través de productos innovadores en nuestras categorías: Women, Men, Travel y DNA.

Nuestra identidad está marcada por el diseño, la calidad y el compromiso permanente por la excelencia. Esa misma pasión que nos llevó de ser una fábrica local, a convertirnos en una marca internacional, vive hoy en cada pieza que creamos.

Name: LinBerlin : Luxury Perfumes and Attar Brand
Description:
LinBerlin – Luxury Perfumes & Attars, Made Only for Fabric

LinBerlin is a luxury fragrance brand from India, offering fabric-only perfumes and attars — crafted not for skin, but exclusively for clothes. Rooted in global fragrance traditions and designed for real, everyday life, our mission is simple: scent the fabric, not the body.

We believe luxury should be both beautiful and wearable. That’s why we’ve built two distinct lines — Zayra, our everyday luxury range, and Luxi, our premium collection — so fragrance can be part of every outfit, from office wear to sherwanis.

Our perfumes are alcohol-based with long projection, while our attars are alcohol-free, deep, and long-lasting — both designed to stay on fabric, never on skin. We also explore innovative scent blends through AI by LinBerlin, using data-driven creativity to craft the unexpected.

At LinBerlin, we’re proud to make:

Fragrances that last on clothes — even in Indian weather

Attars and perfumes designed only for fabric

Thoughtful blends using real, high-grade ingredients

A mix of affordability and high-end exclusivity

Products made in controlled batches, with global intention

We don’t follow trends. We follow quality, craft, and the way fragrance makes people feel — especially when it lives in the memory of what you wore.

You wear the clothes. We scent the memory.

Name: Jackie Smith
Description:
We are a luxury fashion brand based in Buenos Aires. We design chic, hand-crafted accessories inspired by Buenos Aires and modern women everywhere.  Joy, creativity and an appreciation for life's little things are our hallmarks, from handbags and shoes to in-store experiences.
Jackie Smith was founded with a rebellious spirit and a naif objective: to design and build a fashion experience that reflected our commitment to, quite simply, making it beautiful.
Location: Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires, Capital Federal

Name: BURGA
Description: At BURGA, we’re not just creating products - we’re building a global movement. From a small project in Lithuania, we’ve grown to 2M+ customers, 7M+ products sold, and $200M in revenue. And we’re just getting started. Ready to be part of the journey? Explore opportunities: burga.com/careers

Name: Zero Lifestyle
Description:
At Zero Lifestyle, we embarked on a journey driven by a vision – a vision born in the mind of our founder, Daniyal Naeem, a true GenZ enthusiast. Recognizing the gap in Pakistan's audio and wearable accessories market. With a relentless passion for technology, fashion, and fitness, Daniyal embarked on a journey to bridge this gap, and Zero Lifestyle was born

The philosophy of Zero is “Start at zero and never stop" which propels us forward. With nothing but a vision at the start, Zero Lifestyle rapidly evolved into a powerhouse in the Pakistani fashion tech scene. We began our journey by offering cutting-edge smartwatches, catering to the needs of fashion enthusiasts, tech-savvy and fitness enthusiasts. Today, Zero Lifestyle stands tall as a leading Pakistani brand in the fashion tech segment, continually pushing the boundaries of what's possible.

ZeroLifestyle isn't just about selling products; it's about building a community of #ZStars, united by the values of hustle, passion, enthusiasm, and the relentless pursuit of excellence. Through our LinkedIn account, we offer an exclusive behind-the-scenes look at the hustle, passion, collaboration, and teamwork that drives our success

Name: VoyageEyewear
Description:
Discover the allure of VoyageEyewear, your go-to brand for stylish and irresistible sunglasses that won't break the bank. We specialize in crafting a diverse range of sunglasses that perfectly match your unique personality and fashion sense. Every pair is meticulously handmade with love, ensuring exceptional quality and attention to detail.

Embrace the VoyageEyewear experience, available on all leading e-commerce platforms, and explore our exclusive designs that have revolutionized the eyeglass and sunglasses industry. Our collection boasts an extensive selection of aviators, wayfarers, and trendy frames, each meticulously designed with versatile shades and hues. These sunglasses effortlessly complement any outfit, making them the perfect everyday accessory.

But VoyageEyewear offers more than just style. Our sunglasses provide a comfortable fit, exude a timeless charm, and feature durable designs that stand the test of time. With VoyageEyewear, you can expect sunglasses that not only enhance your fashion game but also deliver exceptional value.

Join the VoyageEyewear community today and embark on a journey of style, affordability, and unmatched quality.

Name: Rotex Bangladesh Ltd.
Description:
ROTEX is a leading manufacturer of recycled interlining. Our commitment to sustainability and eco-friendly practices is paramount. We are proud to be a leader in recycled interlining production and have implemented several measures that reduce waste, conserve natural resources and minimize the environmental impact of our operations. Our facilities use only renewable energy sources for power generation such as solar panels which helps us maintain an extremely low carbon footprint. 

Our vertically integrated production processes allow us to offer a wide range of woven, non-woven, fusible, and non-fusible interlinings that meet your exact specifications.  All of our base materials including coating powders have been certified Oeko-Tex Standard 100 Class 1, guaranteeing a safe and quality product. We strive for excellence in everything we do by building relationships based on trust and partnership through ethical practices. Our approach is comprehensive, with responsible best practices at the forefront of what we do daily.

BOLDLY INNOVATIVE

We are bold, we are fearless, we are fiercely imaginative. We don’t just step into unchartered territories, we leap right into them. Being bold propels us to go beyond the confines of the ordinary and embrace the extraordinary.   

Beginning its endeavors with its sister concern the Stylo Group in 1974, MJMS is now at the forefront of shoe manufacturing, thereby accelerating Pakistani footwear industry on the global stage. Our craftsmen are empowered by state-of-the-art equipment, high quality materials and International fashion consultants; to manifest imagination in the form of high fashion products, which instills the essence of luxury and quality in every thread and stitch worn by our consumers.

Name: Fit & Fresh Inc.
Description:
We are Fit + Fresh. We are for every woman who seeks more balance in her life. We get it. Some days you eat leafy greens and rock it at the gym. Other days you can’t resist a decadent donut and live in yoga pants. We know because we design all of our products by women, for women and their families. 

We established the fashion lunch category over 20 years ago and we've been a leader in the category ever since. We create colorful and stylish accessories that help women organize and balance life’s everyday activities with fun yet functional lunch bags for work and the kids, classic coolers for family road trips, and sleek fitness bags that make her never want to miss a workout! Today, you can find our products in over 30,000 retail doors nationwide and we have over 100,000 five star reviews of our products- essentially we're the Internet's favorite lunch bag and accessories!

Empowering women and their families to look and feel their best is what drives our small but mighty team in Providence, RI to do our best every single day. Because what you put into your body can help you power through your day, whatever that day looks like.

Building the number 1 fashion care brand in the world, for the world.

Name: Vivolo
Description:
The culture of beauty that characterizes the company’s «know-how» is preserved in the skillful art of leather crafting. 
It was 1977 when Luciano Vivolo had a pioneering intuition. He took a small stock of leather cuttings leftover from bags manufacturing and turned it into an international family business, collaborating with leading fashion houses and proposing new and creative solutions.
Today, Vivolo is driven by its first and second generations, and is a leader in the production of luxury leather accessories (labels, patches, straps, ...) for clothing, footwear, and leather goods. The company’s specialty is designing customized and innovative solutions with extreme care and precision. It offers a wide selection of exclusive materials of the highest quality, with a special attention to the environment, and state-of-the-art printing techniques to ensure excellent yields. From the creation of prototypes, all production steps are vertically integrated. A team of highly qualified professionals supports the customer at every stage of the development process.
Over the years, the most prestigious fashion companies have become Vivolo’s customers: Alexander McQueen, Ami Paris, Balenciaga, Bottega Veneta, Brunello Cucinelli, Burberry, Chanel, Citizens of Humanity, Dior, Dsquared, Fay, GDCS, Giorgio Armani, Golden Goose, Gucci, Jacob Cohën, Loewe, Louis Vuitton, Marc Jacobs, Massimo Dutti, Moncler, Moschino, Off-White, Palm Angels, Ralph Lauren, Saint Laurent, Sandro, Secrid, 7 For All Mankind, Stefano Ricci, Supreme, Tod’s, Tom Ford, Trussardi, Valentino, Versace, Zara, Zilli.
The mission is, therefore, to provide excellence. This is possible by following the entire production development.
With over 20,000 products expertly crafted in the showroom to inspire style research, Luciano Vivolo’s collections stand out for their craftsmanship and precision.
Location: San Lazzaro di Savena, Emilia Romagna

Name: Zee.Sy Jewellery
Description:
Welcome to Zeesy. The Vast Experience in Artificial Jewelery. It started 32 Years Ago, it was a family business which handed over to Zee,sy . In 2007 the first shop was opened in City of Lights Karachi then In 2014 when E-commerce started in Pakistan Zee,sy stepped into it. Over 12 years of experience and expertise in the manufacturing of artificial jewelry has made Zeesy one of the most exclusive traditional designer jewelry brands in the fashion industry.

Zeesy, the established feminine label known for versatile, graceful and classy jewelry with the ability to formulate creative vision while keeping its products parallel to the casual feel. Our brand aesthetic is to offer distinctive jewelry. We make it possible through our passion for the purest gemstones, luscious metals, sparkling color palettes, delightful bold pieces complemented with feminine classic design and clinical workmanship.

We are distinguished by our creative and exclusive designs, meticulous attention to details, and the unique handmade manufacturing technology that goes into crafting each and every piece.

To stay one step ahead of the rest, special measures are taken to ensure that quality and craftsmanship remain at the forefront of our manufacturing processes. Fashion conscious styling,Continuous quality inspections, and most importantly, well trained employees, all combine to celebrate and continue the timeless reflection of our Ethnic & Traditional Brand.

The brand caters to the masses with an affordable range of jewelry that is classy, chic and very trendy.

Zeesy Designer Jewelry has something for everyone, with charm bracelets, chunky rings, earrings, Mughal inspired maalas & gold chains and bridal sets. The historic Mughal-era inspired chain necklaces are our specialty.

Name: ISI Soles
Description:
Founded in 1999 by its CEO Vitor Mendes ISI Soles is today an expert and leader in the footwear component sector. Specialized in the production of injected outsoles with the most modern technology and diversified raw materials, ISI Soles seeks to provide a service of excellence guaranteeing versatility, quality and innovation in all products. 
Counting with more than 90 employees prepared with the most diverse skills ISI Soles provides everyday a service and a product the costumer can trust. We offer to all our clients a specialized design team for the development of products, 3D printing, prototyping, and sampling that allow the customization of any project. The outsoles are produced with high quality raw materials, such as TR, PVC, TPU, Neolite, leather, Micro, and our internally developed raw material the ISI Light for the production of light and ultralight soles. 
ISI Soles has also a department specialized in prefabricated soles and finishes where we perform the most diverse and complex finishing operations. 
In 2018 we became the first portuguese outsole producer to get the certification for a integrated management system by the ISO 9001 and ISO 14001. Since then we have a commitment with the environment introducing new more sustainable raw material and adapting our production process to provide a low carbon footprint of our products.   

Co-financed by Compete 2030, Portugal 2030 and European Union

Embrace a legacy of style and craftsmanship at Bagmaker, where we've been redefining the fashion export landscape for over three decades. Since our establishment in 1992, we have remained unwavering in our dedication to delivering high-quality garments and accessories that speak of artistry, innovation, and a global vision.

As a leading manufacturer and exporter, Bagmaker boasts an illustrious presence in the fashion industry, curating exclusive designs of handbags and ready-to-wear woven garments that embody sophistication and panache. Our distinctive identity is marked by a harmonious fusion of creativity, precision, and a deep understanding of evolving fashion trends.

At Bagmaker, we go beyond crafting products; we create experiences that resonate with fashion enthusiasts across the globe. Every stitch we sew, every detail we meticulously design, tells a story of passion and perfection.

Join us in celebrating our journey of over three decades, where excellence has been our hallmark and style our essence. Explore the world of Bagmaker, where elegance meets innovation, and discover the epitome of fashion sophistication.

#Bagmaker #FashionExports #CraftingExcellence #StyleInnovation

Name: LEM INDUSTRIES
Description:
LEM INDUSTRIES è il risultato di tenacia, sacrificio, lungimiranza. Grazie alla determinazione del suo Amministratore Unico Daniele Gualdani, la Holding ha saputo cogliere le esigenze del mercato e trasformarle in opportunità, puntando sull’innovazione e sulla crescita sostenibile.

Una realtà che ha fatto dell’innovazione tecnologica, della valorizzazione e della protezione del potenziale delle persone, i propri capisaldi. Un Gruppo che pone al centro delle sue attività le necessità dei clienti e che si sviluppa e cresce grazie anche allo studio e al monitoraggio dei trend di mercato.

Oggi, il core business di LEM INDUSTRIES si compone di numerose Aziende operanti in diversi ambiti dell’ampio e variegato settore delle lavorazioni e finiture degli accessori destinati ai grandi brand della moda e del lusso; mentre, gli investimenti diversificati della Holding l’hanno portata ad affermarsi nei campi della green economy e dell’innovazione tecnologica per l’industria.

Ogni azienda che compone la Holding ha una propria storia, una propria sede - dislocandosi dalla Toscana all’Emilia, fino ad arrivare al Sudafrica - ma un obiettivo comune: offrire servizi e prodotti di qualità e riconoscibili.

Name: Punihani International
Description:
Punihani International, established in 1985, is one of India’s oldest and leading manufacturers and exporters of leather garments, bags, and accessories from India. Since its inception in 1985, the company has been supplying to some of the best–known European retailers and brands.

Punihani International owns three factories in and around New Delhi. The factories are compliant with the BSCI code of conduct as well as with SMETA (Sedex Members Ethical Trade Audit). The leather qualities used are as per REACH standards. The company currently has a workforce of over 500 employees and a total production area of approximately 90,000 sq.ft. The third production unit based in Gurgaon is a green factory certified by “GRIHA” (Green Rating for Integrated Habitat Assessment) a non-government agency, approved by the Ministry of Environment, Government of India. This factory is the first of its kind in the leather sector.

The company has received several awards for “Best Exports Performance in Leather Garments” and “National Productivity and Innovation” from the Council For Leather Exports and the Ministry of Commerce. We have also been awarded with the first position for “Best Leather Goods Design- Hand Bags” by the Council For Leather Exports in India, which is very much in tandem with our business philosophy of keeping up with the times by being equally focused on design and development.

Punihani International prides itself on the quality of relationship that it builds with its customers. Developing a deep understanding of the client’s brand and business is critical to success. Delivering excellent products with world-class service is our aim.

Name: Goldenlady Company
Description:
Golden Lady Company nasce nel 1966 a Castiglione delle Stiviere (MN), dal genio imprenditoriale di Nerino Grassi e della moglie Erminia. Il sogno e l’ambizione era quello di realizzare i migliori collant da donna.

Grazie ad importanti investimenti sia in campo tecnologico che di ricerca e sviluppo, alla qualità dei propri prodotti e ai prezzi competitivi, l’azienda crebbe rapidamente negli anni. Il Gruppo conquistò in breve tempo il mercato europeo ed entrò con successo in Russia e nei Paesi dell’Est Europa anche grazie ad un approccio votato all’affermazione dell’identità italiana nel mondo e ad un brillante processo di acquisizione dei migliori marchi nazionali ed internazionali della calzetteria, tra cui Omsa, SiSi, Filodoro, Philippe Matignon.

Golden Lady Company è oggi un gruppo multibrand internazionale, leader e protagonista a livello mondiale nel design, nella produzione e nella distribuzione di calzetteria, underwear e abbigliamento. Il Gruppo vanta inoltre una Divisione all’avanguardia dedicata alla ricerca, alla produzione e alla commercializzazione di fili performanti e hightech.

Golden Lady Company was established in 1966 at Castiglione delle Stiviere (MN) thanks to the business acumen of Nerino Grassi and his wife Erminia. Their dream and ambition was to make the very best quality women’s tights.
Thanks to major investments in technology and research and development, and also to the quality of its products and competitive prices, the company enjoyed rapid growth over the years.
In only a short time, the Group took the lead position in the European market and also launched successfully into those of the Russia and Eastern Europe thanks to an approach dedicated to asserting Italian identity throughout the world and to a brilliant process of acquisition of leading national and international hosiery brands, including Omsa, SiSi, Filodoro, Philippe Matignon.
Today, the Golden Lady Company is an international multi-brand group, a leader and a protagonist

Name: Saudi Leaders l "قادة السعودية"
Description:
Honorary Board of Directors – Role & Responsibilities

As a member of the Honorary Board of Directors for The Arabian Leaders Magazine from London, your role is primarily advisory, strategic, and ambassadorial, playing a key part in shaping the magazine’s influence, particularly in Saudi Arabia and the broader Middle East.

Your Role and Responsibilities

1. Strategic Advisory & Thought Leadership

Provide high-level insights and recommendations for the magazine’s expansion strategy.

Support initiatives that enhance the magazine’s reputation and global influence.

Offer expertise in media, business, leadership, and relevant industries.


2. Expanding Influence & Advocacy

Represent The Arabian Leaders Magazine from London at industry events, government forums, and high-profile gatherings.

Act as a brand ambassador, fostering relationships with key stakeholders, sponsors, and decision-makers.

Assist in identifying and attracting influential figures to contribute to the magazine’s editorial and events.


3. Leadership in Saudi Arabia Expansion

Help drive the magazine’s Saudi Arabia Growth Agenda (detailed below).

Collaborate with Saudi business leaders, policymakers, and media to establish a strong presence.

Honorary Board of Directors members will play a key role in awards, events, and strategic partnerships.


4. Special Projects & High-Profile Engagements

Participate in high-impact initiatives, including leadership awards and editorial campaigns.

Contribute to key decision-making on strategic partnerships and expansion plans.

Join exclusive forums that discuss major leadership and business trends in the region.



---

Financial Compensation

Honorary Board of Directors positions are voluntary and not salaried.

The role offers exclusive privileges such as VIP access to major events, networking with top executives, and high-profile media exposure.

Members will be highlighted as key figures in The Arabian Leaders Magazine from London and its regionals

Name: Kabir Leathers
Description:
28 years ago, Kabir Leathers was born with a promise to deliver exceptional products. With almost three decades of manufacturing beautiful leather accessories for the global market, Kabir Leathers has come to be known for its innovation, research & development.

Every thing we produce at Kabir is of the highest quality because of our keen attention to detail. We endeavour to pay close attention to every single element of the product and exercise extreme caution during the manufacturing process. 
We are know for our extensive Research & Development department which constantly churns out innovative product ideas that take shape in our specialised sampling department.

At Kabir Leathers, we have two state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities located in Manesar, Haryana.  

LEATHER: A cutting-edge manufacturing set up producing leather bags & accessories for the global market. With an extensive R&D team, sampling department, global sourcing solutions and efficient production, we endeavour to create high quality products for international brands. 

NON-LEATHER: We also have a modern manufacturing unit specialising in producing bags from sustainable materials like raffia and canvas. Our state-of-the-art setup ensures that all bags are crafted with precision and attention to detail, for a product that is not only stylish but also environmentally friendly.

Name: Püralab
Description:
Personal | Ürban | Rare | Accessories

Hence the concept of Ürban Spirituality: a link between spirituality/soul and the urban/underground scene of the cities. A place of confrontation where art, culture, aesthetics and fashion find their maximum expression.

In a bulimic world that continues to produce and spill information, images, and collections, Püra wants to create a reality that is timeless, an aesthetic that lasts over the years and is always current. Choosing to wear Püra means identifying with a community that embodies the brand's identity.

Püra wants to be sustainable. The first way to be so is to create products that can last over time and not be overwhelmed by the continuous superfluous turnover of today's fashion.

The means by which to achieve one's own vision are the essentiality and technicality of the products made unique by a clear aesthetic connotation and a recognisable "sign".

Technique, Quality and Innovation are the cornerstones in the development of projects to create a product capable of lasting over time. All starts from a handcrafted metal mesh capable of giving life to minimalist accessories.

Pura is more than an accessory: it creates an aesthetic, a symbol and a community.

Telling stories is never easy,
unless they are spontaneous.
Pure it is.
It's in the name.

Name: South Australian Fashion Industry Association
Description:
The South Australian Fashion Industry Association (SAFIA) Inc. is a not-for-profit collective industry body bringing all aspects of the South Australian fashion industry together.

SAFIA has been formed to provide a representative voice for anyone involved in the production, design and manufacturing of apparel in South Australia. This includes textiles, fashion, clothing, lingerie, sportwear, uniforms, footwear and accessories. According to Deloites, the industry contributes $218 million to the state’s economy, excluding retail.  

Membership is also open to those operating in fashion related industries such as fashion stylists, modelling agencies and fashion photographers. 

Representing all sectors of the fashion industry, the organisation’s charter is to advocate for opportunities and promote the growth of the industry. One of its first priorities is to help address the current skills shortage and training requirements. 

For the first time, people and businesses working in the sector will have the opportunity to be represented to governments and others with a  strong voice that reflects the interests and concerns of its members. 

For more information contact hello@safia.au

Name: Imperial Leather Design
Description:
Profesionales de patronaje industrial y diseño gráfico destinados a la marroquinería y a cualquier artículos de piel.
En Patronista de Bolsos, te ayudamos a que la parte técnica de tu colección de moda sea impecable, respetando siempre tu diseño original y creando patrones que se ajusten perfectamente a tu idea.

Nuestra Historia en Ubrique

Desde que nacemos en Ubrique, llevamos la marroquinería en la sangre. Crecemos viendo a nuestros padres, abuelos y familiares transformar la piel en artículos de lujo. En nuestra tierra, Ubrique, se trabaja con marcas internacionales reconocidas como Louis Vuitton, Gucci, Hermes, Chanel, Chloe, Loewe y Carolina Herrera, entre otras. Con más de 80 años de tradición familiar, hemos decidido llevar el patronaje de bolsos a cualquier hogar y/o empresa.


Nuestra Misión

Nos marcamos una meta: hacer realidad las ideas de cualquier persona que quiera crear un bolso exclusivo. Trabajamos tanto con particulares, produciendo un bolso único, como con emprendedores que buscan lanzar su primera colección y con empresas que desean producir en masa.


Nuestra Carrera Profesional

Somos un estudio de desarrollo con más de 40 años de experiencia en el sector. Estamos en continuo aprendizaje manteniéndonos siempre al día con la última tecnología en software de diseño y patronaje.
Durante estos años, nos hemos enriquecido con la experiencia de nuestros clientes, aprendiendo que la combinación de un gran diseño con una alta capacidad técnica es lo que diferencia una artículo bueno de uno perfecto.

Name: Maison Baluchon
Description:
When Nathalie relocated in Haute-Marne, she discovered an authentic and rich area.

Forests, lakes, cultural heritage were the source of her inspiration to create a universe representing this authenticity.

With Toma, they decided to create a brand of fashion accessories that reflects this spirit. The patterns and the style mirror this desire but not solely. The importance equally lies in the conception of each piece, based on local know-how. Seamstresses, local craftsmen, artisans, all contribute to this common good.

From season to season, the brand travels through France, Europe, Asia, flirting with prestigious stores that believe in our philosophy.

Name: Intermedia Time Srl
Description:
Intermedia Time produce orologi personalizzabili per eventi aziendali dal 1991 e si occupa della vendita orologi online o diretta. Gli orologi creati possono essere prodotti specificatamente come regali aziendali di Natale o per eventi.

La nostra continua ricerca nel creare orologi come accessori moda e promuovere lo stile italiano, è la chiave di successo della diffusione del nostro prodotto.

Intermedia Time  concretizza idee creative per raggiungere i consumatori nel mercato di riferimento con la produzione ad hoc e la vendita di orologi personalizzati tramutabili in regali aziendali o idee regalo per eventi e aziende.

Dalla progettazione in 3D alla prototipazione a cura del nostro centro stile interno, Intermedia Time si presenta come un’azienda con servizio completo in grado di scegliere per ogni cliente l’orologio più adatto.

La produzione ha un ruolo primario: investiamo risorse continuamente  per  mantenere  all’avanguardia le tecnologie produttive, condizione essenziale per raggiungere il migliore rapporto qualità prezzo.

La nostra esperienza ventennale nella gestione delle problematiche e delle criticità derivanti dalla gestione di fornitori esteri e trasporti internazionali ci rende un valido  partner  per la realizzazione della produzione di orologi sia in Cina che in Svizzera.

Al suo interno possiede un reparto per il controllo di  qualità ed un centro assistenza in grado di offrire al cliente un prodotto finito con un elevato standard qualitativo.

Name: Begs & Bags
Description:
Begs & Bags was launched in 2021, with 2 books and the fashion collection AzoreanHood, which are connected. 

The books Begs & Friends, one for children (3-8 years old) and other for young people and educators (9-99 years old), tell the same story and aim to stimulate conversations about Ocean conservation, in schools and within families. It tells about the sperm whale Begs, who discovers the marine plastic pollution issue and collects plastic, with which she designs the AzoreanHood. 

From the book’s fiction, the AzoreanHood fashion collection becomes reality. It is handmade in the Azores Islands, by an atelier which is a solidarity economy project, with the SEAQUAL YARN, containing Upcycled Marine Plastic.

Name: Kua Nasi
Description:
Kua Nasi is a women-led fashion and lifestyle brand that empowers skilled, often marginalised women artisans, the majority of whom are based in rural parts of Kenya, through handcrafted accessories and home décor. 

Our Products: Every piece we create, whether it's an all sisal bag, or a leather and beaded piece of jewellery or a unique afro-modern home design piece made of a blend of natural materials, is designed and crafted with care and made to matter. Each piece intentionally carries the artisan's unique mark, her time, skill, and quiet strength. No two pieces, identical as they may appear, are never exactly the same; each tells a unique story, holds presence, and celebrates the dexterous art of craftsmanship.

Our Impact: Since launching, we've collaborated with 60+ artisans (9% of whom are men), creating over 100 unique pieces, and reached customers across Kenya and Europe. By combining traditional craftsmanship skills with modern design (with our designers at Wallonie Design and TexLab Liege), we create timeless designs crafted to matter. This approach ensures our artisans earn fair wages, gain visibility for their work, and preserve cultural crafts while strategically shaping our contribution to the artistic evolution.

What makes US unique: We combine timeless design, deliberate care, artistic expression, and social impact. Our products are not mass-produced; instead, they reflect a model that values decency and dignity in job creation, excellence in production and operations, and ethics and sustainability in our approach.

Our Mission & Vision: Looking ahead, we aim to expand our collections, reach new markets across Europe, Africa and the rest of the world, and create programs that further empower women artisans through education, funding, and skill development.

Crafted with care: Every piece, made to matter.

Hello there! Step into a space where we celebrate the spirit of bold individuals. Welcome to a brand that embraces and uplifts the essence of authenticity. It's a celebration of continual self-reinvention and an unwavering commitment to perpetual growth.

Our brand is dedicated to those who have been told they are too much – too bright, too loud, too unconventional, and simply too extraordinary for the ordinary. It's for those trailblazers who defy norms, charting their unique courses and illuminating paths for those who follow.

Our product line not only complements the beauty and travel sectors but is geared towards the next generation of shoppers. We pride ourselves on ethical practices and contribute to carbon offset programs, aligning with the value-driven shopping trends of Millennials and Gen Z. 

Vision
Our vision is to redefine the travel accessory market by bridging the gap between luxury and affordability, all while maintaining a commitment to quality, ethics, and environmental responsibility.

Our products are trendy, high quality, fresh, and manufactured under fair trade principles. Our goal at SONNATI is to exceed the expectations of every customer by offering a variety of products that will suit numerous tastes as well as outstanding customer service. SONNATI is the pioneer of handmade luxury bags and shoes combining kilim and leather to create trendy accessories and shoes in the North-American, European and Asian markets.

We are flexible and adaptable, and we are able to respond quickly to changing customer needs by creating new, on-trend products.

Our products are handcrafted under SONNATI license. Beware of duplicity and fake products.

Creare integrazione reale e dar vita ad un nuovo tessuto sociale, inserendo in quello già esistente i fili di tradizioni diverse, per apportare idee innovative e un boost di energie all’interno della comunità.

LA NOSTRA MISSION
Potenziare i percorsi di formazione, tirocinio e inserimento lavorativo in ambito tessile, rivolti a  persone migranti a rischio di marginalità sociale.
Sviluppare le attività produttive del laboratorio sartoriale, che comprendono sia le lavorazioni in conto terzi e le commesse dall'esterno che la creazione di prodotti a marchio CouLture Migrante.

Name: The Wallet Company
Description:
WHAT WE DO:
We make luxury affordable and accessible by handcrafting minimal yet deceptively functional wallets using the finest, responsibly made vegetable tanned leathers from all the famous tanneries around the world. 



WHY WE DO IT:
Many of us do not see the problem for what it is just because, we are so used to it that it seamlessly blends into our lifestyle in a way that we don't even realize it as a problem. We say, that is how things are - haven't  we all said that at some point in our lives?

TWC is a conscious effort at solving the fat wallet problem. What could be a better testament of the inefficiencies of unnecessarily bulky wallets than "Wallet Sciatica"- A medical term for the condition caused by fat wallets. It is a Wallet-induced chronic sciatic nerve constriction inducing gluteal and ipsilateral lower extremity pain, tingling, and burning sensation. To put it simply, sitting with a fat wallet in your back pocket is bad for you.

We started with the WHY and literally started subtracting to add meaning to our products. Questions like;

Why do we need a fat wallet? Is a bifold design the best solution to carry cards and cash? With the market flooded with P2P payments and documents storage, issuance and verification services, do we really need a wallet that has 6 or 8 or 10 card slots forcing you to carry the cards you never have to use? Why do we carry so much trash along with cash in our bifold wallets? Is it because we want to or is it simply because we just forget it is there? Does it really have to be this way?




HOW WE DO IT
We believe in a design philosophy where form enables function through a design approach which isn't motivated by aesthetics and good looks, instead, the one that serves the bigger purpose of being functional while looking, feeling, and being minimal enough to be comfortably carried in your front pocket.

We conceptualize, design, prototype, test and finally manufacture and launch. The entire process is handled inhouse

Name: Frustum Designs
Description:
Welcome to Frustum Designs - Elevating Craftsmanship, Inspiring Elegance

At Frustum Designs, we are the collaborative effort of Michael, a seasoned mechanical engineer, and Camila, a skilled business administrator, united by a shared passion for creating exquisite accessories. Our journey began in 2016, fueled by the encouragement of friends and family who recognized the exceptional quality of our handmade products.

Frustum Designs specializes in crafting timeless pieces that blend sophistication with natural beauty. Our signature offerings include beautiful leather and clay earrings, meticulously handcrafted with precision and care. Each piece tells a unique story, representing the culmination of years of passion, dedication, and creative expertise. We also offer a range of uniquely crafted wood products, including keepsake boxes. Each wooden creation reflects our commitment to quality materials and craftsmanship. These items are designed to stand out, making a statement while providing practical functionality.

A Turning Point in 2023:
In 2023, we transformed our dream into a reality, officially launching Frustum Designs and making our first sale outside our immediate circle. This marked a significant milestone, validating our commitment to delivering high-quality craftsmanship that stands the test of time.

Our Vision:
At Frustum Designs, we envision a world where every accessory is a piece of wearable art, reflecting individuality and enduring elegance. Our commitment to quality materials, craftsmanship, and attention to detail sets us apart, ensuring each creation becomes a cherished companion for life.

Join Our Journey:
We invite you to join us on this exciting venture, where every piece we create is infused with passion, precision, and a touch of artistry. Explore the elegance of our handmade accessories, where dreams become tangible, and craftsmanship meets fulfillment.

Thank you for being part of the Frustum Designs story.

Name: WoolTribe
Description:
At WoolTribe, our process is our purpose. We are on a relentless mission to revolutionize the world of fashion accessories by crafting 'Luxe for People Who Give a F*ck'. Our products not only redefine luxury but also embody conscious living and compassionate choices.

We take pride in creating products that stand as a testament to our values. From the very inception of our designs, we painstakingly build each piece from the land up, ensuring a supply chain thoughtfully curated with purpose that puts the welfare of land, animals, and people at the top of the priority list.

Our focus extends far beyond the products we craft; we are the pioneers of responsible luxury. By using 100% American fiber and fostering small geographic supply chains, we ensure that each creation not only meets the highest standards of craftsmanship but also leaves a net positive impact on the environment and society.

As creators, we embody innovation, artistic expression, and beauty. Our freedom of self-expression is contagious, inspiring our tribe of conscientious consumers, our “rebels,” to embrace their unique greatness, finding joy and purpose in their personal style.

We delve deep into research, guided by a holistic approach that allows us to challenge old problems in new ways. We provide fact-based fashion, empowering members of our fearless, creative tribe to make informed choices that align with their values.

And as responsible Rebels, we fearlessly disrupt the status quo, unafraid to expose what isn't working and reframe it in our own damn way. Our candid and defiant approach encourages others to break free from conformity and find their voices.

Name: Fitoori Banjaaran
Description:
Fitoori Banjaaran is a travel inspired and handicraft driven family business. Headquartered in the historical town of Meerut in North India, Fitoori Banjaaran operates from multiple  key locations, viz. Delhi, Pune and Goa via a network of offices and partners. 

The brand is a culmination of art, culture and craft experienced through and inspired by tales of travel. We are bringing our perception of the world to people across multiple ethnicities. We are also looking to inspire others to travel and have adventures and discoveries of their own.

Founded as a family business with an aim to serve as a melting pot of traditional crafts and modern designs in 2019, the business has expanded to include a wide range of product categories and craft forms. Creatively led by the artistic Co-founders and Creative Directors Aditi and Atisi, Fitoori Banjaaran is now home to 10+ product categories and multiple collections. 

Our unique designs, and constant search for newer ways to bring out old art forms set us apart. We believe that beauty transcends beyond borders.

Our success is only possible owing to our passionate and committed female and male artisans from various parts of the country, representing 10+ art forms, and 1000+ years of heritage combined. Their talent and traditions are our strength. We at Fitoori Banjaaran are continuously inspired by our heritage, creativity and sense of community. 

We set ambitious paths to excellence by continuously pushing the boundaries, challenging our limits and renewing ourselves to ensure the long-term development of our artisans and the art forms they represent. 

We strive to ensure that our products and the way they are made have positive impact on our entire ecosystem and on our host communities. 

Check out our products at https://fitooribanjaaran.in/

Please write to us at connect@fitooribanjaaran.com for any queries or partnership requests.

Name: Frather
Description:
Frather deriva do latim "Frater — irmão/irmandade" e carrega em sua essência o sentido de fraternidade para aqueles que vestem sua própria personalidade sem hipocrisia e sem tolerância aos triviais. Uma marca criada para diferenciar os autênticos dos rasos.

Inspirado no significado de seu próprio nome — "o amigo dos cavalos, o amante da guerra” — o fundador resgatou o arquétipo desse animal majestoso para moldar a essência da marca. O cavalo, símbolo eterno de elegância, postura, respeito, força, sociabilidade e agressividade, sempre esteve ao lado do homem: em guerras, nas viagens, no transporte e como fiel companheiro. Ele é o verdadeiro amigo da humanidade.

E é justamente esse espírito que Frather imprime em cada camisa: luxo com responsabilidade ambiental e postura com personalidade. Cada peça costura seu instinto e valor moral. As camisas são confeccionadas de forma artesanal por ateliês & alfaiatarias parceiras no Brasil que representam a seriedade da marca. É uma obra de arte com toda autoridade.

Name: RICAMI LAURA SRL
Description:
Founded in 1990, Ricami Laura is an Italian family business dedicated to haute couture and luxury embroidery. 

Since its creation, the collaboration with the designer Gianfranco Ferré has enabled the company to constantly push the limits of innovation in haute couture embroidery.
The result of this sharing of ideas and know-how can be seen in all of the designer's fashion shows. 
The "fashion architect" did not believe in barriers in the creative process and this philosophy, which drives one to excel, is still very much alive in the workshops.

This is how Ricami Laura became the place where the designer's inspiration took shape. The strokes of his pen were transformed into embroidery, applications, superimpositions to recreate the first effects, to give them life.
Ferré had such a strong attachment to the studio that he called it "his embroidery workshop".

Today, strengthened by this legacy, Ricami Laura collaborates with the greatest Maisons de couture. 

The embroideries are still made with traditional machines, by hand, which gives us the freedom to respond to all requests. (patchwork, application of fabrics, cords, special stitches ...) 
In addition, Ricami Laura also works with electronic embroidery machines in order to offer solutions adapted to your needs.

From research to production, we accompany you throughout the process.

Name: Terasu - Natural Handmade Soaps & Bath Salts
Description:
In the lush embrace of Kerala's vibrant landscapes, where the scents of exotic spices waft through the air and tropical melodies enchant the senses, a profound connection blossomed between a child and her grandmother. In the sun-kissed afternoons of the 1990s, the child was captivated by her grandmother's gentle wisdom, skillfully blending nature's treasures to create bath time elixirs.

With each herb and oil, a magical alchemy unfolded, revealing the transformative touch of nature. From the earth's bounty emerged cleansing rituals that nurtured both body and spirit, leaving lasting imprints of love on the child's heart.

Years later, fueled by a deep respect for the earth and a desire to share nature's healing touch, the memories of her grandmother's herbal wisdom lingered like fragrant whispers. Thus began a creative journey—a quest to infuse Kerala's lush beauty into every aspect of life.

Introducing Terasu—a celebration of nature's boundless splendor. Each handmade soap is a love letter to the earth, meticulously curated with organic treasures sourced from local artisans. Aromatic herbs, nourishing oils, and botanical wonders—all selected with precision to bestow upon the skin the purest essence of nature's abundance.

Terasu, rooted in legacy and nurtured by love, stands as a beacon of ethical luxury in a world craving authenticity. Guided by the timeless wisdom of Kerala's embrace and the cherished legacy of a grandmother's care, it aims to illuminate the path towards sustainable skincare rituals.

As Terasu thrives, it intricately weaves Kerala's beauty into the fabric of daily life, with each soap bar carrying the essence of childhood wonder and the promise of natural grace. In every lather, it whispers of the enchantment found in the ordinary—a tribute to the extraordinary beauty of the world we call home.  #OrganicBeauty #HandcraftedSoaps #SustainableSkincare #NatureInspired

Name: Smateria
Description:
Smateria is a women-owned and operated business founded in 2006 by Jennifer Morellato and Elisa Lion, who both shared passions for creativity, business and sustainability. Elisa is our creator and maker, always searching for ways to transform materials with a creative twist. She met Jennifer, who was looking to start a business that empowers Cambodians through their work. After prototyping their first bags, they took the ethipreneurial plunge to transform their ideas into a thriving ethical brand dedicated to creativity, positivity and style…..Smateria was born.

Smateria means to transform a material and give it new life. Our originality lies within the unconventional materials that we use. At Smateria we take inspiration from our urban and local surroundings and create bags and accessories made from recycled, upcycled and repurposed materials. All items are 100% ethically made in Cambodia with an Italian flair, using high quality and durable materials.

At Smateria we strongly believe in building and supporting a community. Produced in-house from start to finish, all our products are carefully handmade by an amazing team of Khmer artisans. Since the inception of the company we are continuing to scale our impact worldwide, standing up for human values and continuing to build our amazing community.

Name: Pol & Rosa
Description:
Fondée en 2016, la marque Pol & Rosa édite des collections d’accessoires et linge de maison en lin. Les mots clés : simplicité et authenticité, pour les hommes et les femmes en quête de naturel et de fraîcheur dans leur quotidien.

L’authenticité est l’ADN de la marque Pol & Rosa.

Les lins sont français, cultivés et façonnés en France, s’il vous plaît!

Pol & Rosa présente des accessoires sans fantaisie ni ostentation. Attaché à la simplicité des courbes et l’éclat des teintes, les créations Pol & Rosa suivent des lignes équilibrées et sophistiquées.

Les produits sont fabriqués pièce par pièce pour une qualité française. Tous les accessoires sont imaginés à Bordeaux par Adélaïde, la créatrice et réalisés à l’Atelier dans le Nord de la France, perpétuant une tradition et un savoir-faire uniques.
Pourquoi Pol & Rosa ?
C’est la marque d’une rencontre d’un filateur de lin (arrière grand père des créateurs) et d’une de ses brillantes confectionneuses. Ensemble, ils forment un harmonieux duo, complémentaire de pragmatisme et d’inspiration artistique. Un siècle plus tard, c’est leurs arrières petits enfants qui décident de retravailler cette matière historique : le lin un lien indémodable, intergénérationnel.

Pourquoi le lin ?
« Sans y faire attention, je baigne dans le lin depuis toujours, c’est naturellement que j’ai décidé d’en faire profiter autour de moi ». Quand on a connu le confort des draps en lin, on ne fait plus marche arrière, c’est pour la vie. Pour les accessoires, sa résistance et son toucher, en font une matière d’excellence, incontournable.

Le lin est synonyme de liberté, d’authenticité. Le lin est enivrant, surprenant, intrépide, noble, … oui cette matière a du caractère, du mordant!

Name: 21Fools
Description:
21FOOLS.   

#ChooseGoodness

21Fools Design & Entertainment Pvt Ltd is a Modern Indian Sustainable lifestyle brand that creates designer products working with farmers, rural craftspersons & artisans from the villages of India. 

In 2014, from a small workshop in Sanganer, Rajasthan, our craftspersons community, introduced Plantable Paper which has now become one of the best innovations in the sustainable paper industry of India. The rural community we work with has inspired us with their firm diligence and dedication, which has helped us work with over 500+ establishments & encouraged over 5 million customers to grow a plant in their homes from our Plantable products. 

Along with our sustainable stationery line, we have expanded into creating Sustainable Lifestyle Products from cork cloth, recycled PET bottles, Canvas, Recycled Cotton & Reclaimed wood. Currently, we are developing Home, Office Desk and Travel Organisers that include - Backpacks, Laptop Sleeves & Bags, Duffle, Cross Body and dozens of home decor products.  

We’ve also found ways to make Indian festivals a lot more environmentally sound and innovative with our Festival Collection products including firecrackers look-alike that grow themselves into plants, Plantable Rakhis & Herbal Gulal.

Clients - Google, Meta, Linkedin, Pepsi, HUL, Colpal, BMW, Mercedes, Volkswagon, Reliance, Flipkart etc.

Name: My Secret Soul
Description:
Discover My Secret Soul, an eco-friendly fashion brand blending Italian minimalist design with sustainability. We redefine luxury, offering high-quality, environmentally conscious garments for those who value style and ethics equally.

At My Secret Soul, each piece reflects our commitment to innovation and ecological responsibility. Our product range, including stylish t-shirts and comfortable sweatshirts, combines comfort, durability, and contemporary aesthetics with sustainable practices. We use low-impact, high-quality materials to minimize our environmental footprint and ensure the longevity of our garments. Our commitment extends to using vegan, water-based inks and adopting an on-demand production model to reduce waste and enhance ethical manufacturing.

Certified by standards like OCS (Organic Content Standard), GRS (Global Recycled Standard), and Oeko-Tex for chemical safety, we guarantee our products uphold the highest environmental and ethical standards.

Join us at My Secret Soul as we champion sustainable fashion. Our clothing not only looks good and feels great but also supports a more sustainable and fair fashion industry. Explore our collections and be part of the movement dressing the world in responsible elegance.

Welcome to our world where creativity meets eyewear:

The name PORTRAIT means that eyewear is more than just an accessory – it frames our face and shapes our self-portrait. In this sense, eyewear not only emphasizes your style, but also tells your story of self-expression.

And last but not least, PORTRAIT believes in promoting creativity and bringing like-minded people together. The team of passionate and enthusiastic individuals behind the brand is a perfect example of this vision.

On behalf of the PORTRAIT team, we invite you to experience the passion and craftsmanship in every detail that defines an original PORTRAIT design.

Name: Funyi
Description:
Funyi es una Empresa B Certificada comprometida con el triple impacto, que nace desde la convicción de que una nueva economía es posible. Nos especializamos en diseñar y desarrollar indumentaria para clientes corporativos, adaptándonos a sus necesidades y ofreciendo soluciones sostenibles que generen un cambio real. Utilizamos materias primas recicladas para la creación de productos de alta calidad, reduciendo el impacto ambiental que la industria textil genera año tras año. Además, contamos con una línea propia de moda sustentable en nuestro e-commerce, dirigida a consumidores conscientes que valoran la responsabilidad ambiental.

Nuestro compromiso va más allá de la producción: trabajamos de la mano con cooperativas de trabajo y talleres productivos de diversas ONG’s, capacitando y apoyando el desarrollo de poblaciones vulnerables, lo que contribuye a la generación de empleo digno. Creemos en la importancia de tender puentes para que el consumo consciente y el trabajo ético se encuentren al servicio de la moda y del cuidado del planeta. En Funyi, apostamos por un modelo de comercio justo en el que valores, ética y compromiso social son pilares fundamentales para construir soluciones colectivas sin dejar de lado las necesidades individuales.

¿Te sumas a la comunidad Funyi?

Name: Andrei Srl
Description:
Dal 1956 a Firenze come produttore artigiano di accessori per pelletteria e bigiotteria.
Nel 1978 l’azienda si sposta a Scandicci, con la realizzazione del primo impianto galvanico automatico. Nel 1988 viene implementata nella produzione aziendale la prima macchina a controllo numerico. Anno dopo anno la crescita non si arresta: grazie all’ampliamento progressivo dei reparti aziendali, all’innovazione continua dei macchinari e alla volontà di rispondere professionalmente all’evoluzione del settore, Andrei Srl è oggi tra i leader nazionali del proprio settore di mercato.

Name: Cireon
Description: We have all found ourselves helpless on a Sunday evening or a few minutes before an appointment in front of a pair of worn-out shoes, an old cloth and a box of shoe polish, finding the task difficult, dirty and not knowing where to start ... As a result, we put off the task and many of us are dissatisfied with the condition of our shoes on a daily basis and their lifespan. However, we know that properly maintaining our shoes allows them to last over time . At Cireon, we defend slow fashion, we prefer quality  to quantity  and believe that leather shoes (shoes or sneakers) are a durable and repairable product, which can survive the seasons and fashion cycles  if they are well cared for. To make professional leather shoe care accessible and easy for everyone, we have come up with an innovative shoe polisher that allows you to clean, nourish and polish effortlessly, ideally, quickly and cleanly . Our shoe polisher works with capsules that allow you to dose and apply quality colored products without getting dirty. They are made from bio-sourced polymers and are reusable ︎.

Name: MetaDesign.ba

META Design is bh. accessory design brand. It strives to harmonize two opposite aesthetic preferences, traditional and modern, and it places traditional techniques and crafts in the context of the modern age and the modern subject.

Créé à Lille en 2017 par Anaïs Poulle, ENAIS est une marque d’accessoires féminins. Elle s’engage à créer des headbands unis et à motifs facile et confortables à porter pour le bien de ses clientes. Des collections capsules constituées de foulards et de chouchous viennent compléter la gamme d’accessoires pour cheveux.



Des accessoires bohèmes pour les occasions et au quotidien

L’ensemble des créations : headbands (bandeaux), foulards, chouchous, s’adaptent aux différentes tailles de têtes. Conçues pour durer et se transmettre, sa taille unique permet d’être porté par les enfants, les adolescentes et les adultes.

Afin d’adopter une démarche plus respectueuse de l’environnement, j’utilise les chutes de tissus pour confectionner des foulards, des chouchous ou encore des porte-clefs.

Name: attaché x
Description:
At attaché x, we redefine the intersection of business elegance, technology, and sustainability. Our suite of premium business solutions integrates multifunctional business accessories, next-generation digital security with digital product passports, and forward-thinking consulting services—tech-enabling businesses for lean and scalable operations, increased resilience and continued technology compliance.
Our Core Offerings:
 High quality Business Accesories – Crafted for discerning professionals, our patent-pending multi-mode briefcase combines sophisticated design, superior craftsmanship, and sustainable innovation. Featuring high quality responsibly sourced genuine leather and cutting-edge engineering, attaché x offers the ultimate fusion of versatility and refinement.
 OwnerLock Digital Product Passport – A state-of-the-art digital security platform, OwnerLock ensures product authentication, ownership verification, and regulatory compliance. Designed to align with EU Digital Product Passport regulations, our platform leverages cloud technology and planned blockchain integration, providing unparalleled traceability and fraud prevention for luxury goods and beyond.

Name: SAUVE
Description:
Brand Story:
SAUVE is a fashion brand that’s created with a vision to bring elegance, quality, and well-being into everyday life through thoughtfully designed products. Our products are crafted with a commitment to timeless style, quality craftsmanship, and a sense of well-being lifestyle. We believe that everyone should have the opportunity to elevate their style effortlessly, without sacrificing quality. SAUVE is more than just fashion—it’s a statement that elegance can be both approachable and refined, while supporting an upstanding lifestyle. We design for those who value style, confidence, and understated luxury, offering products that stand the test of time.


Mission:
"To craft elegant, high-quality accessories that empower individuals to express their unique style with confidence, while promoting a sense of well-being and remaining accessible to a wide audience."


Values:
1. Elegance for Everyday: We design with a focus on elegance that enhances daily life, creating products that feel luxurious yet practical.

2. Quality First: Every SAUVE product is made with the highest standards of craftsmanship, ensuring durability and timeless appeal.

3. Accessible Sophistication: While rooted in luxury, we believe style should be accessible to a wide range of individuals, blending refinement with affordability.

4. Inclusivity: We embrace diversity, designing versatile products that resonate with people from all walks of life.

5. Empowering Confidence: The products are designed to help individuals express themselves confidently, with products that elevate their personal style.

Name: Cim Italy
Description:
We are an Italian manufacturing company with over 40 years of experience in the fashion industry.
We design, produce, and customize accessories for the fashion and luxury sectors, working across apparel, footwear, and leather goods.

Rooted in craftsmanship and driven by a constant spirit of innovation, we work every day on the creation and application of studded trims, heat-applied embellishments, eyelets, rivets, and sew-on or heat-set crystals.

Alongside our in-house style department—working closely with leading international brands—our artisans and seamstresses continuously explore new materials and techniques.

What we deliver is not simply a product that brings designers’ visions to life, but a company model that places people at its core: their talent, sensibility, and professional expertise.

A long-term approach designed to endure and to foster an increasingly responsible and virtuous supply chain.

Name: Emilio Cavallini | Stilnovo S.R.L.
Description:
Creativity and cutting edge technologies are the two assets of Stilnovo, a company which was founded in 1970 and produces and distributes hosiery and seamless garments worldwide.

Emilio Cavallini is the founder and the intuitive mind behind the company. He has made Stilnovo into one of the most competitive companies in its field. The Cavallini style  has become known as innovative and ahead of fashion trends.

Throughout the creation of a collection, Emilio Cavallini's thought is to make hosiery no longer a simple intimate garment but an accessory which complements and makes a simple and personal outfit special. 
Every season Stilnovo upgrades his products to bring an edge to women all around the world. Since the beginning Stilnovo has upgraded hosiery to a new level and turned wearing tights into a rewarding experience.

The items produced are: ladies tights, over the knee, knee-highs, socks and seamless garments, and the line is divided into crochets, fishnets, jacquards, devoré, printed and metallic.

In its 40 years of hosiery experience, Stilnovo has also channeled its know-how in bodywear, producing for the first seamless garments. Highly automated machines allow Stilnovo to work with micro fiber and also natural fiber such as: cotton, pure wool, viscose, silk and cashmere.

All the production phases knitting, dying, ironing, printing, finishing and packing, take place in San Miniato Basso (near Florence-Italy).

Name: Meow Glam
Description:
At Meow Glam, we believe in the power of self-expression through style. Each of our meticulously crafted pieces tells a unique story, blending intricate designs with a touch of whimsy to create accessories that resonate with the modern trendsetter.
From enchanting hair clips and chic hair bands to statement bracelets, body chains, anklets, earrings, wrist chains, thigh chains, necklaces, rings, hand chains, and beyond, Meow Glam offers a diverse array of accessories to elevate your look from ordinary to extraordinary.
Embrace your individuality and let your style roar with Meow Glam. With worldwide delivery, we're here to adorn fashionistas around the globe with our purr-fectly curated collection of accessories.

Name: töhl
Description:
Welcome to töhl – Crafted Elegance with an Indian Soul

Our journey began with a simple yet profound vision: to create leather accessories that are not just products, but a celebration of artistry, thoughtful functionality, and meticulous attention to detail.

OUR PROMISE:
In a world that is constantly evolving, töhl remains steadfast in its promise to deliver unparalleled craftsmanship, sustainability, and an exceptional customer experience. We strive to create accessories that not only meet the demands of modern life but also connect you to a deeper sense of tradition and quality.

OUR PHILOSOPHY:
"Craft Once, Cherish Forever" encapsulates our ethos. We believe in creating pieces that stand the test of time, both in style and durability. Each product is thoughtfully designed to offer functionality that complements modern life, making them as practical as they are beautiful. Our products are meant to be cherished, carrying the stories of their owners and the legacy of the artisans who crafted them.

These original creations are paired with a growing portfolio of curated products from select makers across the globe. Don't just get high. Get ukiyohi.

Description: Inwa Bags Group is a Chinese manufacturing company based in Semarang, Indonesia, specializing in the production of high-quality bags. With its headquarters located in China, the company serves as a trusted manufacturing partner to several global brands, including Samsonite, Tommy Hilfiger, Huawei, Yonex, Xiaomi, and BMW. Combining advanced production capabilities with international quality standards, Inwa Bags Group continues to deliver excellence and innovation in the global bag manufacturing industry.

Name: M.R. LABELS (P) LTD.
Description:
Founded in 2005 in New Delhi, M.R. ABELS (P) Ltd. is a leading manufacturer and exporter af branding, packaging and premium garment trims solutions. Our portfolio includes hang tags, woven labels, printed stickers, paper bags, metal logos, and more.
Guided by founder Mahipal Singh, with 19- years of industry expertise, we partner with established fashion brands and emerging labels across India and overseas delivering reliable. high quality, and fully customized solutions.
Backed by strong production capabilities, strict quality control. and a design led approach, we offer end to end support tailored to each brand’s vision.
Trusted by Industry. Crafted with Precision. Powered by Family.

Name: EAM Lucidatura
Description:
EAM nasce nel  2000 come azienda artigianale di lucidatura degli accessori metallici per l’industria della moda. Grazie al know how generato in 20 anni di lavorazioni manuali e agli investimenti in tecnologia, siamo oggi una piccola impresa d’eccellenza nel nostro settore.

La nostra originaria tensione all’innovazione e al miglioramento continuo è oggi la nostra missione:  portare la lucidatura metalli sempre un passo oltre verso l'eccellenza. 
Nel 2022 abbiamo iniziato un percorso di industrializzazione con la messa in funzione di un impianto di vibratura 4.0 e siamo stati tra le prime aziende della filiera della moda ad investire in tecnologia DryLyte - per l’elettrolucidatura a secco dell’acciaio.

Oltre alla lucidatura delle superfici metalliche, offriamo ai nostri clienti servizi di consulenza per lo sviluppo di processi e di nuove lavorazioni. L’attenzione al cliente, alle sue aspettative e la capacità di seguire, in modo scrupoloso, ogni fase del processo di lavorazione sono il nostro valore aggiunto.

Name: DOTAN VISION S.R.L
Description:
25 años trabajando en el rubro, un equipo de personas apasionadas y una misión: ser la vanguardia del diseño y la calidad en el mercado óptico argentino.

Así nace en 2019 DOTAN VISION, en la Ciudad de Buenos Aires, que llegando al mercado en el escenario de Marzo 2020 logra un crecimiento rápido y destacado, estando presentes en el 90% del territorio argentino, ubicándonos en las mejores ópticas del país.

Diseñamos, producimos y distribuimos marcas exclusivas, fusionando la creatividad argentina con la excelencia de la fabricación italiana y oriental. Nuestra fortaleza radica en la atención personalizada y el cuidado al detalle, tanto en nuestros productos como en el servicio y herramientas que ofrecemos a nuestros clientes.
Con nuestras marcas, ofrecemos armazones ópticos, gafas de sol y clip-on para distintos nichos del mercado, así como para satisfacer las necesidades de todo tipo de usuario: VALDEZ, BOLIVIA, 47 STREET, MARIA DEL CERRO, ADRIANA COSTANTINI y GOD.

Es nuestro equipo de más de 20 personas el que da forma a DOTAN VISION y su dedicación, pasión y talento las que impulsan nuestro crecimiento continuo.

Buscamos talento dinámico y apasionado que quiera crecer en un entorno creativo. Únete a nosotros y forma parte de un proyecto excepcional.

Name: VICTORIA BRUSH
Description: Style, elegance, tradition and quality! The "Excellence Shoe Care" collection by Victoria Brush is born. A collection of stylish and quality accessories necessary for the care and maintenance of footwear. In addition to the brushes, which Victoria has been producing since 1920, the "Excellence Shoe Care" line offers a wide range of products for the care of leather, suede and fabric inserts: greasing and polishing creams for smooth leather in a wide range of colors, waterproofing and brightening spray for nubuck and suede leather, shampoo with Marseille soap scent for cleaning fabric sneakers inserts, menthol sanitizing deodorant, for every type of shoe. Excellence Shoe Care supplies its products also in practical packages specially designed for every type of footwear: from sneakers to francesine, from boots to brogues, "Excellence Shoe Care" has the right kit for the care of your footwear. Inside each pack there are also instructions for the correct use of the products contained. "Excellence Shoe Care" also proposes shoetrees, in scented cedar wood which, in addition to deodorising the shoe and absorbing its moisture, maintain over time the original shape of the shoe. To wear shoes effortlessly, "Excellence Shoe Care" recommends the use of wooden shoehorns in the various sizes available. Finally, "Excellence Shoe Care", on request, is able to customize all its products with the Customer's logo.

Name: Fashion Factory International
Description:
Fashion Factory has been a stalwart in exporting leather garments, woven garments, and other related goods and accessories from over 35 years, being established in 1985. We can now proudly declare that our name has established a robust trust with all our customers, employees and stakeholders. We can say that we are providers of the best service and quality in everything we do.

We, at the Fashion Factory have developed products which are convenient, comfortable, trendy and of the highest quality in the leather industry. This would explain why we are the best in the leather industry.

We have over 36 years of expertise added to our portfolio now, and we continue to expand our market. Fashion Factory is growing today, continuing to help our loyal customers get the best quality leather items by working out of our manufacturing units in Delhi and Bangalore. We truly owe all our success to our dearest customers, loyal employees and trusted suppliers.

Name: Stash
Description:
Stash is the world's first multi-chain NFT necklace with proof-of-ownership technology. 

Stash supports 2 blockchains - Ethereum and Tezos. It's integrated with 10 popular wallets, including Metamask, Rainbow, and TrustWallet.

We are taking the best design experience from the wearable electronics industry and merging it with the most effective gamification approach from the WEB 3.0 space. 

Our big idea is to become the new type of fashion wearable electronics that may perfectly fit any outfit.

Name: Arch

Description:
At Bolsa Red, we transform waste into design, innovation, and sustainability from Patagonia. 

Founded by two passionate advocates for design and sustainability, we are a triple-impact company that recovers 100% of the materials we use to create functional, high-quality accessories aligned with the circular economy. 

Each of our products is a symbol of more conscious and responsible consumption.

We collaborate with textile cooperatives and protected workshops to ensure an ethical, transparent, and sustainable value chain. 

We offer tailored solutions for businesses looking to integrate responsible practices into their operations while continuing to inspire individuals every day with stylish, eco-friendly products.

Sustainability, social impact, and innovative design: that's Bolsa Red.

Name: Princesse Monique
Description: Princesse Monique is a high fashion costume jewelry brand entirely designed and manufactured in Toulouse. Its founder, Nadia, is a textile engineer by training. Her experiences within large luxury fashion houses gave her the necessary know-how to get started. She wanted to create her brand in order to be in line with her values: sustainable, responsible and transparent fashion. For this, she uses resistant and hypoallergenic materials: stainless steel and fine stones. She also pays particular attention to the origin of the components.

Name: MARAMRA
Description:
More than a product, Maramra is a movement.

Maramra team recognise that thyroid-related diseases are rarely only physical. One of their most common root causes is chronic stress — the kind generated by the overwhelming expectations, multitasking, and constant emotional labor expected from women in modern society. And that stress is often internalized, silently, until the body speaks.

Maramra believes that no woman should have to reach the point of illness or surgery in order to feel seen, nurtured, and supported.

That’s why the core mission of this platform is not just to support recovery — but to help prevent thyroid conditions by focusing on awareness, education, and emotional resilience. This includes working on awakening and strengthening women, helping them reconnect with their intuition, their bodies, and their boundaries.

Our team understand that women living with thyroid conditions often face:
	•	anxiety and hormonal imbalances
	•	emotional exhaustion and insecurity
	•	fear of judgment or reduced self-worth
	•	lack of visibility, understanding, and community support

That’s why mental and emotional health are core pillars of the Maramra platform.
It’s not just a shop — it’s a space of gentle rebellion against burnout culture, and a sanctuary where women are reminded of their worth, softness, and strength.
Location: Sarajevo, Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina

At DEDROCK, we don't just create clothes; we craft wearable art that resonates with the spirit of the universe. Our passion for design extends beyond fashion, encompassing a wide array of lifestyle products. From trendy streetwear and cozy sweatshirts to oversized tees and hoodies, we've curated a collection that reflects the cosmic essence of our brand.

Beyond Threads - Design Skins:
But we don't stop at apparel. DEDROCK extends its artistic touch to the tech realm, offering mesmerizing design skins for laptops and mobile devices. Transform your gadgets into cosmic canvases, showcasing your unique style wherever you go. Our design skins seamlessly blend technology and artistry, making a statement that goes beyond the screen.

Elevate your phone game with our thoughtfully crafted design phone covers. DEDROCK's collection embraces creativity and innovation, ensuring your phone not only stays protected but also becomes an extension of your personality. Expect a range of designs that cater to diverse tastes, from the subtly elegant to the boldly cosmic.

The Future of Creativity:
At DEDROCK, we're not just about the present; we're committed to shaping the future of creative expression. Stay tuned for upcoming releases that promise to redefine the boundaries of art and design. Our vision extends beyond fashion, and we're excited to bring you even more avenues to express your cosmic flair.

Join us on this journey through the universe of design. Follow our LinkedIn page to stay updated on the latest trends, product launches, and behind-the-scenes glimpses into the creative process. DEDROCK - The Universe awaits you; let's embark on this cosmic adventure together! 

#DEDROCK #TheUniverse #FashionBeyondBoundaries #DesignRevolution #CosmicCreativity

Name: Everywear Bangladesh Ltd.
Description:
Struggling to find a reliable platform to source high-quality garments from Bangladesh — like you can easily do with Alibaba or TEMU from China?

You're not alone. Fashion and clothing buyers across the world face the same frustrating reality: despite Bangladesh being one of the top apparel exporters globally, there's no centralized marketplace to explore, customize, and order garments at scale. You're forced to rely on scattered contacts, inconsistent suppliers, or agents with no transparency or long-term commitment.

This lack of structure leads to poor quality control, communication gaps, and missed delivery deadlines — costing you time, money, and trust with your own customers.

That’s why we built Everywear Bangladesh Ltd. — the country’s first dedicated sourcing platform for international fashion and clothing buyers. Whether you run a boutique in Europe, an eCommerce store in Africa, or a retail chain in the Middle East, we make garment sourcing from Bangladesh as simple and seamless as possible.

From ready-for-export stock to fully customized private label orders, we offer:

Premium, export-quality garments in knit and woven categories

Low minimum order quantities (starting at just 300 pcs)

Full support from fabric selection to packaging

Fast, reliable worldwide delivery

Transparent communication, vetted suppliers, and competitive pricing

We’ve helped buyers from 36+ countries — from solo brand owners to enterprise retail groups — access the best of Bangladesh’s manufacturing power. Our trusted clients even include local industry leaders like Bkash and Startech.

Our mission? To make Bangladesh the next global garment sourcing marketplace.

If you're ready to grow your clothing business with reliable, scalable sourcing from Dhaka’s top factories — let's connect today.

 Dhaka, Bangladesh
 Sourcing made global: www.everywearbd.com

Name: 3T Transfers technologies for textile
Description:
Have you ever felt afraid to take the first step and turn your dream into a realistic goal
Have you asked yourself: What if it doesn't work?
But...what if it works?
We made the first steps 27 years ago. And it definitely worked! We founded Transfers Technologies for Textile (3T) - where textile innovation meets sustainability.
 3T is more than just a company. It is a 2-generational family business committed to leaving a legacy. We wanted to shape the future of heat transfer technology with a deep sense of sustainability.
Starting a business in the 90s took work. But we didn't give up.
With hard work and strong will, we have become a leading heat transfer manufacturer in Eastern Europe. We achieved a global presence and have offices in China, Vietnam, and Lithuania.
What sets us apart:
People-Centered: We prioritize ethical manufacturing teamwork and foster long-term relationships with our partners. We build trust through person-to-person advertising, love, and warm gestures despite the digital age.  Innovation: Our innovative, high-tech solutions go beyond meeting customer needs. We aim to exceed them. Our heat transfers are functional and delightful to see, smell, feel, and wear.  Sustainability: 3T's mission is to make a positive impact. 80% of our products were made in collaboration with eco-conscious businesses. All our products are certificated to be human-ecological and baby-friendly.
 At 3T, we're not creating just products. We are constantly working to make our planet safer for future generations. 
Our Target is your success!
