Name: DRZL
Description:
"Celebrating the legacy of heirlooms with opulent design."

Hello, world! 

We are DRZL Accessories, a designer brand from India crafting luxurious fashion accessories, primarily handbags, and decorative gifts. We're here to sprinkle a touch of modern elegance onto India's rich artistic heritage, making every occasion, big or small, feel a little more special, one beautifully handcrafted piece at a time.

At DRZL, our creative wellspring is always overflowing with ideas to bring you collections that are both timeless and contemporary. Each piece is designed with deep care and attention to detail, ensuring it’s not just stunning but also a joy to own and use.

About Our Founder

DRZL is the vision of Rimjhim Chaufla, who embarked on this journey driven by a lifelong passion for design and the incredible skill of Indian artisans. Her dream is to share the beauty of handcrafted luxury fashion accessories with the world.

Rimjhim's background as an industrial designer, with a thesis focused on handbags, ignited her entrepreneurial spirit. Witnessing the dedication and artistry of craftspeople in India inspired her to create a brand that celebrates their talent while offering a fresh perspective on luxury accessories, particularly handbags.

Today, Rimjhim leads a passionate team dedicated to re-imagining age-old techniques for the modern individual, creating pieces that are both rooted in tradition and perfectly suited for today's world.

We believe that every accessory tells a story, and we invite you to be a part of ours. Explore the world of DRZL, where every droplet is a statement.

A range of timelessly designed eyewear to protect the eyes from blue light emitted by screens (which causes fatigue, redness, and headaches) and from the sun. Because protecting our eyes is just as important as protecting our skin, at every moment of the day! 

Raya is on a mission to make eye protection an effortless and stylish part of everyone's routine. Because in a world where we dress to impress, why should our eyes be left behind?

Name: The Stitchify
Description:
The Stitchify – Your Trusted Stitching Partner

At The Stitchify, we believe every stitch tells a story. As a modern tailoring studio rooted in Pakistan’s rich fashion traditions, we specialize in custom and bulk stitching solutions that cater to individuals, boutiques, and brands worldwide. Whether you’re looking for a one-of-a-kind outfit or a large-scale production partner, we bring precision, creativity, and reliability to every project.

Our expertise covers a wide spectrum of women’s wear, including:

Pakistani Dresses – Elegant stitching with a perfect blend of tradition and trend.

Brand Collections – Partnering with fashion brands to create signature pieces.

Ethnic & Fusion Wear – Traditional craftsmanship fused with modern cuts.

Casual & Semi-Formal Attire – Everyday comfort with stylish finishing.

Formal & Party Wear – Detailed, refined stitching for standout looks.

Wedding & Bridal Outfits – Bespoke creations stitched with finesse for life’s most special moments.

With 15+ years of tailoring expertise, The Stitchify is more than just a stitching service—it’s a partner in your fashion journey. We take pride in:
 Neat, clean, and professional finishing.
 Trend-driven designs that reflect elegance and individuality.
 End-to-end solutions for custom tailoring and bulk manufacturing.
 Serving both local clients and the overseas Pakistani diaspora with equal dedication.

Whether you’re a brand seeking bulk stitching production with consistency, or an individual wanting a custom-stitched outfit that fits like a dream, The Stitchify ensures craftsmanship that matches global standards while keeping the essence of Pakistani fashion alive.

Your vision, our craftsmanship – together, we stitch perfection.

Description:
Rémy Jewellery is the eponymous brand of Sarah Rémy, where modern jewelry merges with the essence of wearable sculpture, elevating the body as a work of art beyond mere adornment.

The brand's inaugural collections, Ora and Able, bring this vision to life:

Ora Collection: Enveloping the body like a precious second skin, Ora hugs every curve, transforming the skin into fluid waves of silver or gold. Each piece seamlessly merges with the wearer's natural form, creating a harmonious blend between the jewellery and the body.

Able Collection: Capable, Imaginable, Unshakeable, Achievable—Able honors the quiet strength that drives us to chase our dreams and conquer life's challenges. Each piece is a symbol of resilience, a talisman of inner power.

Crafted with care in Paris, each creation at Rémy Jewellery marries the ancient craft of metal casting with innovative 3D techniques. The result is an intimate extension of the self, designed to resonate deeply with those who wear it.

Name: 450 Srl
Description:
Fondata nel 2014, 450 è una realtà imprenditoriale nata dal know-how di quattro visionari che si propone come riferimento stilistico per il mondo della moda e dell'occhialeria. 

Profonda cultura tecnologica, continua sperimentazione, creatività e ricerca sotto il segno del migliore design, hanno fatto di 450 un’azienda di successo nel panorama europeo con una mission definita: diventare interlocutore privilegiato per coloro che cercano prodotti unici nello stile, personalizzabili e ad alto contenuto di design. 

La scelta del nome non è stata casuale ma vuole sottolineare l'importante e il fondamentale rapporto con il territorio italiano. 450 indica, infatti, i chilometri che separano le due sedi aziendali - quella legale e amministrativa di Asti e quella produttiva e logistica di Cordignano, in provincia di Treviso  accomunate dalla  ferma volontà di creare prodotti Made in Italy. 

--

Established in 2014, 450 is a company created from the know-how of four visionaries, which exists as a point of reference for the world of style and fashion eyewear. 

A solid basis in technological culture, constant experimentation and creativity and research in the name of better design have made 450 a successful company on the European scene with a defined mission: to become a privileged partner for those looking for products that are unique in style, customizable and with a high design content. 

The choice of the name is not accidental, but intended rather to emphasize the important and essential relationship with the Italian landscape. In actual fact, 450 refers to the number of kilometres separating the two business premises the legal and administrative base in Asti and the production and logistics site in Cordignano in the province of Treviso and it wants to express a strong desire to create Made in Italy products.

Description:
You & Vee was born from a simple vision: to craft high-quality, user-friendly products that last long. We meticulously design our bags and wallets to blend timeless elegance with functionality. At the core of our collection lies leather, allowing us to highlight its inherent, natural qualities.

Each You & Vee creation is a testament to artisanal craftsmanship; hand-crafted, cut, sewn,and packaged in our workshop by artisans with decades of experience. Our journey began in the pursuit of a minimalist bag that blends style with functionality, and we're delighted to offer you just that.

Name: SHAFAQ HABIB- House of Jewellery
Description:
Shafaq Habib is a Pakistani Jewellery designer that established her label in 1981 in New York City. She started her career at Lord & Taylor on 5th Avenue under the label, ‘Pearls Galore.’ At the time she hand made every piece of Pearl Jewellery herself. She re-launched herself in Pakistan in the 1990’s focusing on Jewellery for today’s South Asian women. She now heads a Jewellery Design house that employs craftsmen from all over Pakistan, utilizing the specialized skills of artisans from all areas of the country. Working closely with the artisans the brand creates unique 22K Gold and Diamond jewellery that exhibit modern design aesthetics while remaining loyal to the beauty of ancient Indian and Islamic jewellery making forms.
Shafaq travels all over the world looking for unique pearls, gemstones and inspiration from different cultures and art forms to fuse with her own ethnic tastes. Her designs capture her travels and research as she fuses European, Far eastern, Arabic, Persian, Turkish, Central Asian art with traditional South Asian Jewellery forms.

Nous proposons une réponse à l’évolution et aux besoins d’un nouveau mode de vie et d’une mobilité en plein changement ainsi que des solutions concrètes pour celles et ceux  pour qui la mobilité est un enjeu au quotidien. Description:
At Eledevé, we're passionate about crafting contemporary handmade accessories that capture Colombia's essence. Since 2018, our mission has been to blend ancestral techniques with modern design, showcasing Colombia's rich biodiversity and beauty. Our range embodies our heritage and the dedication of skilled artisans, offering a canvas of cultural richness.

Beyond being accessories, our products bridge tradition and modernity, celebrating timeless beauty merged with today's trends. From scarves reflecting landscapes to bags echoing local vibrancy, each piece encapsulates Colombia's spirit. By choosing Eledevé, you embrace not just an accessory but Colombia's art, culture, and heritage intricately woven into every creation.

We're continually evolving our collection, exploring new designs and techniques. Committed to making a positive impact on Colombian communities and culture, we strive for innovation while honoring our artistic legacy and empowering local artisans. Together, with your support, Eledevé stands as a testament to Colombia's captivating narrative.

Name: LucyOnTheRoad
Description:
Expanding Horizons: From New Ways of Working to New Ways of Wearing! 

After years dedicated to New Ways of Working as a corporate trainer and consultant, I’ve decided to bring a creative, fun twist to my professional journey with Lucy On The Road – my second venture, where New Ways of Wearing comes also on stage!

At Lucy On The Road, we craft handmade, sustainable accessories that reflect the unique bond between dogs and their owners. Think matching waist bags, reversible jackets, stylish bandanas, and cozy blankets – all designed with love and a touch of humor.

 Why this new direction?
Inspired by Lucy, my loyal four-legged companion, I wanted to merge my love for design, eco-conscious values, and animal welfare with my entrepreneurial spirit. This project combines my background in events, textiles, and coaching with a passion for creating joy through thoughtful, stylish products.

 Our Mission:
To celebrate everyday moments with pets while making sustainability and design accessible, one piece at a time.

 A perfect balance:
Lucy On The Road is not just a brand – it’s a natural extension of my career. While I continue to empower professionals with New Ways of Working, Lucy On The Road adds creativity and fun to my professional palette with New Ways of Wearing.

Ready to connect, collaborate, or simply talk about pets and style? Let’s make it happen! 

#Entrepreneurship #NewWaysOfWorking #NewWaysOfWearing #Sustainability #LucyOnTheRoad #MadeInBelgium

All items are developed and made with great care and attention to every single detail and are recognized for the high quality of the materials used and the work performed. Inspired by the latest trends within the sector and new technologies, we work in close collaboration with our clients in order to create customized articles strictly Made In Italy and unique in their kind!

 

FabrizioBaldini: High end fashion accessories and custom jewellery made with our hands, with our minds and with our hearts!

After 10 years at Dior, whose creator wanted to make women not only more beautiful but also happier, I imagined Petites Reines to also make them more free."

The project was born in several stages: initially a female professional network to encourage women to forge links, then a podcast to inspire them in their projects.

And finally in 2021, a design and lifestyle brand, Petites Reines, the third part of this trilogy.

Name: Georgetta
Description:
Pourquoi Georgetta ?

Georgetta, c’est un univers qui réunit deux cultures : d’un côté, le savoir-faire hérité par ma grand-mère lituanienne et de l’autre côté l’élégance à la française. Le nom de la marque s’est imposé naturellement, Jurgita se traduit Georgette en français. Le mélange des deux prénoms a donné vie à la marque française Georgetta.

Quelle est notre mission ?

A travers de mes créations, je souhaite participer à l’économie responsable et locale en faisant rayonner les sacs Made in France ainsi que le Savoir-Faire Artisanal. J’ai construit la marque Georgetta, poussée par ma passion pour le crochet et mon envie de transmettre des valeurs fortes : la qualité, le savoir-faire, l'authenticité et la modernité.

Notre ADN

Un sac crocheté à la main au design raffiné pour vous accompagner partout et longtemps !

Georgetta, c'est une véritable rencontre entre la créativité et un savoir-faire de précision.

About Us:

At Wig Bangladesh, we specialize in crafting premium-quality, 100% human hair wigs that provide non-surgical hair solutions for individuals facing hair loss. Established with a vision to enhance confidence and well-being, our company has quickly grown into a leading name in the hair industry, offering innovative products that combine style, comfort, and natural appearance.

Our product range includes wigs for both men and women, with designs that cater to diverse needs, from full-head wigs to lace front systems. Each piece is meticulously crafted by skilled artisans using the finest materials, ensuring a natural look and a comfortable fit.

Why Choose Wig Bangladesh?

Premium Quality: Our wigs are made from 100% human hair, ensuring a natural look and feel.
Affordability: We leverage local resources and expertise, allowing us to offer competitive pricing without compromising on quality.
Durability: With proper care, our wigs can be used for a minimum of 12 months, offering long-lasting solutions.
Diverse Collection: From our exclusive Bio-Lace and LED Wig models to our popular Q6 and Australia models, we have something for everyone.
Global Reach: We proudly supply our wigs to various countries, maintaining high standards of quality and customer satisfaction.
Our Mission:

To provide the best non-surgical hair solutions at an affordable price, empowering individuals to regain their confidence and embrace their natural beauty.

Our Vision:
To become the most trusted name in the global wig industry by continuously innovating and delivering exceptional products that meet the needs of our diverse clientele.

Name: GALVALUX S.R.L.
Description:
Siamo nati nel 1973 per garantire trattamenti galvanici al settore dell’occhiale, finiture di qualità e fioritura dei colori sui metalli, fino ad allora prerogativa unica delle plastiche, con introduzioni innovative quali smalti, lacche, incisioni laser, transfer. Negli anni ‘90 abbiamo cominciato a differenziare le nostre lavorazioni, aprendoci a continua ricerca e innovazione. Così, quando l’occhialeria ha conosciuto la crisi più profonda, abbiamo tenuto duro, puntando tutto sui nostri dipendenti e sulla capacità di rimetterci continuamente in gioco, investendo in quelle che per noi erano nuove opportunità lavorative. Il risultato è stata una produzione diversificata, trasferendo la nostra specializzazione nei particolari micro dell’occhialeria alla minuteria e agli accessori metallici delle pelletterie, fino alle sfilate dell’haute couture internazionale.

Nel 2010 abbiamo creato un centro di ricerca e sviluppo, che è anche laboratorio di certificazione di qualità: l’alta moda pretende che ogni suo dettaglio, fibbia, borchia o cerniera, sia analizzato e certificato. Noi rispondiamo garantendo altissimi standard qualitativi, anche nei dettagli verniciati. Abbiamo occupato una nostra nicchia di mercato, grazie alla qualità legata a professionalità ed esperienza dei nostri dipendenti e collaboratori, cresciuti negli anni al nostro fianco. Un legame che cerchiamo di fortificare, restituendo alle famiglie e al territorio il sostegno nei servizi alla comunità. Infine per noi è fondamentale la sostenibilità ambientale: da anni investiamo in energie alternative, cogenerazione, impianti di depurazione delle acque con trattamenti a ciclo chiuso, scarichi zero per la galvanica, recuperatori di calore d’aria.

Extensive Product Range
Our product range fully caters for the needs of both small and large retailers and brand owners alike comprising of woven and printed labels, woven badges, care labels, branded and promotional swing tags, garment accessories, packaging and barcoding. Our ground breaking labelling and security technologies are also able to provide an unrivalled level of protection to our customers' brand by assisting to combat counterfeiting and grey market activity.

International Presence
We have manufacturing and customer service facilities located in all major apparel, footwear and accessory manufacturing centres. Our international locations include Australia, China, Hong Kong, India, New Zealand and the United Kingdom.

eCommerce
Our industry leading eCommerce system is designed to reduce cost, improve efficiency and streamline supply chain management and will fully protect the integrity and accuracy of critical business data. The order entry process is very simple meaning suppliers and vendors can spend their valuable time on tasks other than ordering apparel labelling and accessories.

Name: The Weavers Shop By Raavi | Clothing Brand | Handloom | Made In India | Manufacturer
Description:
Welcome to The Weavers Shop by Raavi where timeless tradition is reimagined through sustainable elegance.
Every piece in our collection reflects a commitment to ethical craftsmanship and enduring style. From luxurious hand woven sarees  with heritage-rich techniques to delicately hand-embroidered unstitched suits and sarees crafted by skilled artisans, we honour India’s artistic legacy while embracing mindful fashion choices. Our curated 925 sterling silver jewellery and accessories further elevate the experience consciously created to last, not just for a season, but for generations. Step into a world where every thread tells a story, and fashion stands for more than just style it stands for values.

Fashion meets Tradition
At Weavers Shop by Raavi, we harmonize our country’s original and expressive traditions with a heightened sense of craftsmanship for modern aesthetics. Our founder, Ms.Raavi is determined to break the limits of traditionalism, thereby creating substantially evolved impressions that align with the tastes of the current generation for an enchanting showcase of rich colors and pastel shades.

The Experience
As your fingers trace the weaves of our exquisite sarees, suit sets, and pure silver jewellery, you’ll feel the heartbeat of India’s diverse cultures stitched into every thread.
At The Weavers Shop by Raavi, we offer more than just garments — we offer experiences. Each fold, each drape, whispers a story of heritage, care, and the love poured in by our master artisans from across the country. Infused with soul and created with intention, our pieces promise comfort, elegance, and timeless beauty.

Thread along with us as we craft not just fashion, but memories — for those who wish to shine eternally as captivating silhouettes, adorned in ingenuity and heartfelt embellishments.

.

Story behind The Weaver Shop
Our Vision
My vision for The Weavers Shop by Raavi is rooted in the spirit of Make in India  to empower regional weaving clusters and make.

Name: OBI PELLE
Description:
Obi Pelle aims to bring a new wave in the world of contemporary fashion filled with products that are both exquisite and minimalistic that last a lifetime. We work tirelessly to bring you designs that are effortless and straightforward, nothing more and nothing less, but at the same time stand apart in the fashion fraternity. Obi Pelle ensures remarkable precision and symmetry in every stitch of leather, giving you the feeling that this isn’t just another product, but an asset. We strive to manufacture a product with the look, feel, and texture of something magnificent.

Name: VOSTEX Fashion
Description:
Family owned since 1926 & dedicated to the fine craft of weaving, VOSTEX is a leading European manufacturer & worldwide exporter, with extensive experience in designing and producing top quality trims, specifically for the “fashion industry”. 

Our product range includes: gross grain, herringbone, satin, tubular, tapes and elastics, rigid tapes for belts and bags, ribbons, cords, laces, knitted rib fabrics for cuffs, collars, sweater hems and trims for garments; generally made of fine quality OEKOTEX Certified synthetic yarns (polyester, rayon, polypropylene, nylon, viscose and other), as well as of natural (cotton) yarns, in many different designs & color combinations, single colored or with lurex.

Moreover, we also produce on “customers’ special demand” with main priority, to meet your individual needs by providing the best quality at the best price. The continuous renewal of our machinery and infrastructure contributes to adding new production capabilities of our factory.

Each new season our Collections are presented in our “VOSTEX Look Books”, including products for casual to bespoke fashion projects that incorporate the latest international trends.

Since 2000 we have been participating in many International Trade Shows, such as Premiere Vision in Paris and New York, Moda In & Linea Pelle in Milan, Munich Fabric Start, London Textile Fair, etc.

Our network of sales representatives / distributors in Spain, Italy, France, the Netherlands, Germany & the US, in close cooperation with our specialized personnel in our headquarters in Athens – Greece, are always available to discuss about meeting your quality standards and requirements, on your next fashion project.

Description:
At Favrick, we bring together the timeless elegance of Indian ethnic wear and the refined sophistication of German aesthetics to create fashion that celebrates cultural fusion and individuality. Rooted in tradition and inspired by modernity, our mission is to redefine ethnic fashion for the global citizen.

We believe in more than just clothing — we believe in storytelling through design. Each Favrick piece is thoughtfully curated, crafted with premium fabrics, and designed to reflect the vibrant spirit of both Indian heritage and European minimalism.

Whether it's festive wear, everyday elegance, or statement styles, we offer a collection that empowers confidence and celebrates diversity. Our commitment to quality, sustainability, and craftsmanship ensures a fashion experience that’s as ethical as it is exceptional.

Favrick is not just a brand — it’s a movement towards global harmony in fashion, where tradition meets innovation, and style knows no borders.

 Inspired by Culture. Designed for Today.

Name: Line Πlanet
Description:
Our will and idea in this critical and fluid time, together with our people, we created with love, a Greek brand "line planet", oriented to the values of sustainable and ethical fashion. 
When we talk about sustainability, there are a few things that really manage to inspire us. And the reason is that these are rare values: ethics, responsibility, conscience, and solidarity. The same applies to fashion, the second most polluting industry. 
In recent years, significant efforts have been made by both designers and emerging fashion brands, who strive for a greener and more ethical fashion. 
As a Greek Brand, we claim a more sustainable future for everyone through our actions, and these are... 
We source the fabrics from Greek companies, supporting the local economy, and they are natural (friendly to the environment).
In this category, we integrate certified cotton, tencel, rayon, linen, and viscose. The third pillar of our collection is regenerated textile products.
We create pieces with timelessness.
Our production is limited with the aim of avoiding stock ending up in the environment and in the form of waste.
For sewing, we work with small family businesses in Greece, they rely on the local community and the passion of these people.
We have a zero-waste policy: We take exactly as much fabric as we need for the rack of our clothes and use the scraps creatively for other things. Our packaging is sustainable and made from natural materials.

Italy: Homi-Milan

Name: Rebirth Studios
Description:
Nearly all companies have touch-points with textiles, whether via a product or in an interaction with employees, suppliers, customers or general operations.
It is time to reuse our resources, so why waste anything?
Textile upcycling refers to the process of taking discarded or used textiles and transforming them into new, more valuable products. This can include repurposing clothing, surplus fabrics, and other materials into new fashion, garments, accessories or industrial and household items. The goal is to reduce textile waste by finding new uses for clothes and other textiles that would otherwise be discarded while creating unique and sustainable products.

Name: Faiza Button And Zipper Ltd.

Bangladesh’s apparel sector is a major industry leader and is growing rapidly every year. Availability of skilled workforce in abundance that delivers quality product on time has been one of the motivating and satisfying factors for every investor. About 80% of Bangladesh’s export earnings come from the apparel industry. Faiza Button And zipper Ltd (FIZ), is a modern, industrious, and innovative manufacturing enterprise set up with latest high-tech accessories production facilities at Tongi, Gazipur, which is about 8 km away from Dhaka Hazarat Shahajahalal International Airport, enjoying convenient transportation facility. FIZ is backed up with technical assistance and cooperation from foreign associates specially from China & Taiwan, to comfortably produce various types of quality consistent accessories required for the apparel industry of Bangladesh. The product range covers all types of Metal accessories, Zippers and other trims used for the manufacture of different types of garments. To cope up with the growing demand of Retailers, Buying Houses and Factories, FIZ’s manufacturing set up at Tongi can develop new moulds and deliver finished products at short notice.

La ricerca continua degli accostamenti di design coniugata all'esperienza nel campo dell'alta moda (frutto di collaborazioni con importanti case di moda) hanno resa Svetlana un autentico punto di riferimento per aziende e atelier di haute couture.
Smeralda Moda si rivolge a professionisti affermati, ma anche a chi vuole approcciarsi al mondo della sartoria ètoile, di alto spessore con la possibilità di effettuare corsi dal ricamo tradizionale a quello luneville.
Alcuni dei corsi svolti: corso per la produzione di bottoni e mosaici in porcellana; corso di ricamo per alta moda; corso per la produzione di bambole di porcellana.
Ai nostri corsi insegniamo non solo ad essere creativi, ma anche ad essere in grado di vendere le proprie creazioni, conoscere il cliente, gestire i processi produttivi nel campo della moda.
Hai bisogno di un'idea innovativa per un ricamo? Vuoi produrre in serie ma non sai cosa proporre? Vuoi formare il tuo personale? Smeralda Moda ti fornisce il giusto input.

Name: Obe Italia
Description:
OBE is a worldwide leader for the production and the sales of precision metal parts.

Thanks to the experience and the competence of its employees OBE decided to invest some years ago in the injection and sintering process known as Metal Injection Moulding (MIM).

This innovative process enabled OBE to realize precise and very strong stainless steel and titanium components. 

At the same time it allowed a cost reduction by keeping intact the high quality of the final product.

This MIM technology can be applied to many segments: automotive, aerospace, medical, optical, watch, fashion, electronics are just a few examples.

Name: Lesca Lunetier
Description:
L'entreprise familiale fêtera ses 60 ans en 2024. 
Créée par Joel Lesca, elle fait travailler depuis des décennies des artisans de plusieurs pays européens, notamment en France et en Italie. S'inspirant des techniques de fabrication à la main, les lunettes LESCA sont rivetées et façonnées en respectant un cahier des charges précis.  La marque familiale a toujours privilégié un style affirmé inspiré des années 50-60 en créant des lunettes tout en épaisseur faisant ressortir les matières.
Lesca développe depuis quelques années une gamme en édition limitée : la collection upcycling fabriquée à partir de plaques anciennes d'acétate. Cette démarche écoresponsable est couplée d'une volonté de développer le circuit court. Fabrication dans le Jura, distribution à partir du siège à Aix en Provence - France.
Les collections upcycling et iconique sont présentes sur l'e-shop : https://lescalunetier.com/

Fort de son succès à l'international, la marque est désormais présente sur 4 continents avec une implantation significative au Japon et en Corée. Elle poursuit néanmoins son développement auprès de partenaires revendeurs soigneusement sélectionnés.

Les montures LESCA sont distribuées majoritairement chez des revendeurs sélectifs (opticiens créateurs indépendants mais également dans de Grands Magasins type le Bon Marché Rive Gauche à Paris, ou ISETAN au Japon.

Name: ConserFashion
Description:
Pourquoi ConserFashion  ? 

 Chaque année, l'industrie de la mode émet environ 1,2 milliard de tonnes de gaz à effet de serre (GES), soit environ 2 % des émissions mondiales. 

 Mon pays, Madagascar , est devenu une "décharge" pour les ballots de vêtements de friperie des pays du Nord et reçoit bien plus de vêtements  que sa population n'en a besoin.

 Travaillant moi-même dans l'environnement, nous sommes parfois connus pour être négligents quant aux vêtements que nous mettons, surtout lorsque nous travaillons sur le terrain 

 Et enfin, depuis deux ans, je me fais remarquée par mes tenues "colorées" à chaque conférence internationale sur la conservation. Pourtant, autour de moi, je vois souvent des participants avec des costumes sombres ou des tenues qui rendaient totalement impossible de deviner leurs pays d'origine.

Et si nous changions les normes ? Et si nous agissions comme des ambassadeurs élégants de nos pays lors des COP  congrès de l'UICN, des forums sur la conservation, etc. 

 ConserFashion est une marque de vêtements et d'accessoires qui promeut le recyclage et la récupération des chutes de tissus des entreprises textiles et qui donne une seconde vie et de la créativité aux vêtements de seconde main. 

 10% de chaque achat est reversé à un projet de reforestation communautaire  à Andasibe et d'autres projets sont en cours de réalisation. 

ConserFashion habille les leaders de la conservation et les passionnés de la nature à l'échelle internationale, tout en racontant leurs parcours, leurs voyages  et leurs histoires, en tant que champions de l'environnement .

C'est une marque qui rend hommage à la nature  en nous habillant différemment, en étant stylés et élégants, mais en restant éco-responsables. 
 
Suivez la page pour être au courant de nos créations et de nos nouveaux catalogues  ! 

#Manjabe4Nature

Name: Fluxus Eyewear
Description:
Today’s eyewear sector is an extractive industry, not a creative industry. The main players don’t see the role of eyewear as that of creating value for brands, but extracting value from brands. Your brand is a mine, and they buy the licence to mine it.

The results are clear for all to see: one pair of sunglasses looks very much like another pair of sunglasses, regardless of the logo on the side.

We created Fluxus to change this. The way we see it, brands help consumers discover and express hidden personas within themselves. Consumers may buy products, of course, but what they’re really “buying into” is someone they want to be.

Eyewear can play a critical role in this. Try to remember the first time you tried on a pair of sunglasses: you looked like a film star, didn’t you?

Il Calzaturificio Re Marcello è un'Azienda specializzata nella produzione di calzature artigianali di alta qualità, leader in Italia per il settore donna. 

Fondato nel 1938 a Vigevano (PV), città storicamente nota come uno dei principali centri della calzatura in Italia, si distingue per la produzione di scarpe di alta qualità, realizzate con maestria artigianale e attenzione ai dettagli.

Inizialmente nota come Invitta e focalizzata sulla produzione di calzature per bambini, l'azienda ha successivamente adottato il nome Re Marcello negli anni Sessanta, orientando sempre più la propria attività sulla produzione di calzature femminili.

Nel luglio 2019 il celebre designer di calzature di lusso Manolo Blahnik ha acquisito il Calzaturificio Re Marcello, consolidando una collaborazione iniziata negli anni Novanta, durante la quale l'azienda italiana ha prodotto calzature per il marchio Blahnik. 

L'acquisizione ha integrato le competenze e la sapienza di artigiani altamente qualificati nel gruppo Blahnik, con l'obiettivo di preservare e sviluppare l'arte della produzione di calzature per le future generazioni.

Name: BELT BAG
Description:
Belt Bag, based in Pregnana Milanese in the Humana People To People head-quarter, is the brand of Occhio del Riciclone social cooperative, a non-profit company part of Humana People to People Italia.

BRAND
Each Belt Bag product is a unique piece in its shape and color, made in Italy at Pregnana Milanese laboratory which includes the design and production area. The lines, with an essential and refined design, are made with pre and post-consumer recovered materials (seat belts, leftover fabrics, deadstocks, and used cloths). Its intent is to do social and ethical business through  the systematization of the practice of reuse as a new production paradigm for healthy recycling, low environmental impact and ethical fashion production made in Italy. 

CREATION PROCESS
The creation process of each line begins with the study of the recovered material, and the design and the realization of the prototypes, and ends with the refinement and quality control. The attention to every seam, the skimming from defects, the study of materials : each phase is important and contributes to create a unique product. 

MATERIAL DONATION
All materials are donated by the prestigious Italian companies of fabrics and imitation leather. The fabrics are often combinated with the seat belts, an identifying element of the brand, recovered from demolition companies, sanitized and reused. Belt Bag items are made by designer/makers specialized in the design and production of handmade items. Each item is produced following an accurate stylistic procedure that allows us to have unique and refined bags down to the smallest details.

Name: Nishorama
Description:
Nishorama is a name born from connecting the names of four family members. The journey began with the mum and dad in Jaipur, creating beautiful cloth painted in celestial colors, block printed with designs on carved wood, almost like hand-printing our culture on a sheath you can wear.

The journey from Jaipur to Mumbai was embarked upon with nothing but a huge bag of these block-printed kurtas, one hand gripping the bag, the other holding the train handle, jousting with hustle. Both grips were tight so none were lost.

Door-to-door visits paid off. After almost a decade, they converted into customer visits to the first wholesale office in Dadar. This office was a warm sight, busy with the cutting, stitching, and correcting of garments made with the huge rolls of cloth printed back in Jaipur. Door-to-door visits also paid off in educating the two lovely children, the founders of Nishorama.

@Ramnekchhipa was always meant for business. Everyone saw it in him. With his idea of shifting from wholesale to retail and franchise, at the age of 20, he had a goal: to make it the next big thing in the global market. Because our culture provided quality, and the beauty wasn’t even a point of discussion. In the fast-paced, mass-produced city of Mumbai, strings needed to be drawn to take a moment and appreciate the slow-fashioned, handmade, feather-like clothing.

It did solve issues, you see. Cotton, linen, Chikankari, and other materials solved the heat problems. A promise to stitch every garment according to the sizing of our customers helped solve the problem where we still think that we are meant to fit clothes, not the other way around.

The prints, colors, and styles from Indian to Indo-western to modern solved the problem of our culture fading away as generations moved on.

We want to create an India where you see jhumkas and jeans and where men freely wear kurtas without i

Name: ROMBO SRL
Description:
Rombo srl è una nota azienda riminese che opera da oltre dieci anni nel settore dell’eyewear. 

Nasce nel 2013 dall’intuizione di Angelo Di Stefano, titolare e socio unico dell’azienda, con il suo primo brand Saraghina, ispirato al pesce del Mare Adriatico per definizione, la Sardina: un pesce semplice, essenziale, vero e con molta sostanza, esattamente come l’occhiale che rappresenta e a cui si ispira anche il suo inconfondibile pack. 
Colore e leggerezza sono il segno distintivo del brand Saraghina, nato con l’iconico modello Gilda, proposto in sessanta colori e cinquanta tipologie di lenti differenti. 
Oggi Saraghina Eyewear vanta una collezione di oltre mille modelli, con materiali che spaziano dal nylon super leggero, ad alta resistenza, al metallo ultra light.

Nel corso degli anni l'azienda ha lanciato nuovi brand e collaborazioni importanti. 

E' il 2019 quando Rombo acquisisce la licenza Esclusiva per la produzione di occhiali del noto rocker italiano Vasco Rossi. Una linea di eyewear dedicata a tutti coloro che non amano gli schemi e le definizioni, rock nell’anima e semplicemente se stessi.

Il 2022 è stato l’anno di Chips Eyewear: una collezione di occhiali da sole e da lettura premontati, anch’ essi dallo stile spiritoso e accattivante, presentati all’interno di confezioni coloratissime che ricordano il classico sacchetto di patatine. 

Nel 2023, dalla passione di Angelo Di Stefano per il design automobilistico degli anni ‘70, nasce il brand 356. Una linea dal design ricercato: ogni modello è prodotto in edizione limitata, con una numerazione laserata  che conferisce all’ occhiale unicità ed esclusività.

Name: True Beauty Knitting
Description:
True Beauty Knitting has officially joined the Jin Hong Group. Backed by the Group’s extensive resources, True Beauty is now positioned as a specialized footwear manufacturer. 

With integrated operations across China and Vietnam, the company benefits from a powerful cost advantage and cross-border production synergy.

Jin Hong Group is an integrated industrial and trading company specializing in home slippers, socks, and beanies with operations in China, Vietnam, and Cambodia. 

The group owns multiple factories, including a sock office in Shanghai, home slipper offices and factories in Jiangsu, China, and several factories in Vietnam and Cambodia. 

Key factories include Vietnam Jinmei Co., Ltd, established in 2025 with a 3,000 square meter building and an estimated annual output of 3 million pairs, and Vietnam Jin Hong Shoes Co., Ltd, with a new factory under construction aiming for 30 million pairs annually. 

The China factory, founded in 2016, has a turnover of around $5.8 million and an output of 4.5 million pairs. 

The company has comprehensive in-house processes such as embroidery, lamination, printing, and outsole production, ensuring stable delivery, quality, and price. 

Jin Hong Group serves major co-brands including Target, Aldi, Lidl, and others with total annual production of slippers reaching up to 13 million pairs by 2026. 

The company emphasizes young management, stable long-term cooperation, and is expanding its presence in the US market while maintaining existing customers in China.

My blog isn't just about fashion and lifestyle; it's a journey into my love for fragrance and bakhoor, a dive into skincare rituals, and a guide on how to feel better and more open-minded by embracing the best from cultures worldwide.

Name: 2M Decori spa
Description:
2M Decori spa is a leader in the design and production of metal components of Italian taste in the eyewear, clothing, footwear, costume jewelry and jewelry sectors.

We deal with materials such as: 
- Brass
- steel 
- Zamak
- Plexi
- Acetate
- Corian
- wood
- leather

The company was founded in 1997 as a spin-off of 2M srl, leader in the production of glasses since 1963: today 2M Decori sells its products in Europe, USA and South America. Following the evolution of the market and constantly trying to be at the forefront with strategy and technology, the company successfully meets the needs of customers in various sectors that require precision, control, reliability and high-level aesthetics.
2M Decori is able to transform any idea into a product developed ad hoc and customized in every aspect.

Today, 100% of the production starts from the customer's idea, which is then fully developed and managed internally along each stage of the production chain: design and creation of the mold, die casting process, tumbling, polishing and electroplating procedures.

Our services: 
- Die-casting: processing of metal alloys with low melting point
- Mill-turning: with the use of mill-turning machines to process plastic materials and metals of various kinds
- Coining and blanking: we use presses up to 400 tons
- Milling: with the use of numerical control machines with 3, 4 and 5 axes
- Cleaning: we use an automatic cleaning plant with six stations and four working units
- Electroplating: flash, thickness, nickel-free manual and automated
- Painting and enameling: manual and robotic

Our certifications: 
- ISO 14001 which sets the requirements for the environmental management system
- ISO 9001:2015 (2001) for safety in the workplace
- "Workplace Condition Assessment (WCA): Achievement Award" (2021) from Intertek as it complies with workplace condition assessment requirements

Name: Khan Accessories & Packaging Co. Ltd. (KAPCO)

KAPCO established since 1988 and operating business over 32 years in the Industry with consistently well reputation. 
We offer you the most comprehensive ranges of apparel Trims & Packaging products and services that meet global quality standards.

•	Sewing Thread: Oeko-Tex and RCS certified (Staple Spun, Corespun, Recycled and Textured Polyester) 
•	Corrugated Boxes: FSC Certified (Auto & Manual)
•	Poly Bags: RCS Certified and Shirt’s Accessories 

We are located in the capital nearest industrial RMG hub – BSCIC Tongi, Gazipur, Bangladesh. Our Sewing Thread is standardized by Oeko-Tex (Appendix 6, Class 1) and Recycle Claim Standard by BV. Our corrugated boxes and duplex paper boards are certified by FSC and poly bags is also Recycle Claim Standardized by CERES that satisfy all the quality standard parameters of global buyers. We have most modern UGOLINI-Italy machineries for sewing thread dyeing and strong supplying base with Fengshu, Derons, Dystar, Huntsman, Wacker, Elkay and our 100% dyeing water is going through the bio-logical treatment process with having 20m3 ETP capacity. 

Our extensive experience in the industry has been helping us to acquire knowledge and information to design products and services that best suits of our valuable clients. We offer flexibility, competitiveness and fastest lead time to facilitate the requirement of RMG Industry. We are approved by David Howard, Lidl, DVC and continuously supplying to H&M, Next, Zara, Primark, Aldi, Matalan, Best Seller through the approval of our valuable clients.

Our team is consisting of a number of young-energetic and talented future leaders who believe in working closely with our clients for understanding the needs to design services accordingly and align us as a strategic supply partner, helping us in realizing our vision ‘To be the supplier of choice for the total solution of garment trims & packaging.

Description:
The Pilgrim story begins in the cultured and centuries-old city of Århus, Denmark during the summer of 1983, when designer Annemette Markvad translated her great love for minimalism, art, music, and people into a collection of handmade jewellery she sold at music festivals throughout Scandinavia and Germany.

Today, this family tradition of hand & heart made jewellery continues in Canada by a team of passionate Montrealers who share Annemette’s vision and values.

Name: Lizzie Fortunato Jewels
Description:
Lizzie Fortunato is a New York City-based accessories brand founded by twin sisters Elizabeth and Kathryn Fortunato in 2008. Based in Soho, NYC, our passionate 14-person team has grown the business to one of the most recognized costume jewelry brands. Lizzie Fortunato sells to ~75 wholesale accounts including Nordstrom, Neiman Marcus, Saks Direct, Intermix, Shopbop, Moda Operandi, and a range of high-end domestic and international boutiques.

Lizzie Fortunato collections include hand-crafted statement jewelry, 14-karat fine jewelry, belts, scarves, and other accessories. As we’ve expanded our offerings, we’ve remained intentional about producing only what we can sell. Given the limited, recycled, and remotely sourced nature of many of our materials, once a piece sells out, it’s typically gone for good. We consider our creations coveted “art objects” to be displayed and enjoyed even when they’re not being worn.

Our collections are designed to tell a story and to transport the wearer. Travels to Morocco, India, Japan, Italy, Mexico, and beyond — as well as fine art and architecture — have inspired our pieces, and we strive to champion artisanal craftsmanship through our designs.

It is the sum of materials and time that go into our pieces that makes them luxurious. We employ a team of 14 in our Soho, NY studio, as well as a large network of skilled makers — metalsmiths, embroiderers, polishers, enamelers, stone setters, belt makers, and more — across New York City. 

We also rely on a small but mighty team of expert jewelry-makers to carefully assemble our pieces, many of whom are women, and moms, who are able to work for us from home in order to look after kids and family. We take immense pride in our uniquely local, piecemeal, and intentional production approach.

We pride ourselves in dressing women who follow their own paths, not trends — trailblazers, adventurers, collectors, artists, innovators, intellectuals, and dreamers, who dress to tell a story.

Leather Patches: Ideal for adding a premium touch to apparel and accessories.
DTF (Direct to Film) Patches: Sharp, vibrant, and perfect for intricate designs with high color accuracy.
PVC Patches: Waterproof, flexible, and ideal for outdoor or rugged use.
Sublimation Patches: Full-color and photo-realistic designs with exceptional detail.
We cater to a diverse range of needs, including custom patches for flags, hospital logos, restaurant uniforms, and various other sectors. Whether it's T-shirts, caps, jackets, bags, or uniforms, we deliver top-notch quality with precision and creativity.
With years of experience in the industry, we pride ourselves on providing exceptional service, quick turnaround times, and competitive pricing. Our goal is to help brands, teams, and organizations stand out with personalized, high-quality patches that make a lasting impression.
Let us bring your vision to life with custom patches that truly represent your identity and values.

A Bonor Botões é uma empresa brasileira que atua na fabricação e venda de botões de diversos materiais, como metal, poliéster, naturais e injetados. Fundada em 1966, a empresa tem como objetivo oferecer produtos de qualidade e durabilidade aos seus clientes, atendendo às necessidades e exigências do mercado.

Com sede em São Paulo e uma equipe de profissionais altamente qualificados, a Bonor Botões investe constantemente em tecnologia e inovação para garantir a excelência em seus produtos. Além disso, a empresa busca manter um relacionamento próximo e transparente com seus clientes, fornecedores e colaboradores, buscando sempre a satisfação e fidelização dos mesmos.

A empresa atende clientes de diversos segmentos, como moda, calçados, bolsas, acessórios e artesanato, entre outros, e está sempre pronta para atender às demandas específicas de cada um. Name: Primicia Equipaje
Description:
Fundada en 1925 por José Kasitzky, Primicia inició sus actividades a una escala modesta de fabricación doméstica. José y sus hijos, David y León, encararon desde el principio su labor con un enfoque en la investigación y superación constantes. 

Hoy seguimos el viaje de nuestra familia, basando la relación con quienes nos eligen sobre tres pilares:

1 en el Respeto, ofreciéndoles una garantía de producto como ningún otro competidor puede hacerlo

2 en la Innovación, ya que todos los años planificamos y desarrollamos nuevos diseños, incorporando nuevas tecnologías y materiales que mejoran sustancialmente toda la oferta de Primicia

3 en la Comunicación, cuidando de forma integrada nuestra imagen, packaging y presencia en puntos de venta y participando activamente en las redes sociales con influencers, sorteos y acciones que nos acercan y nos mantienen vigentes.

Nos define el propósito de acompañar a los consumidores con productos sólidos y confiables para viajar, pasear, trabajar, estudiar, guardar, admirar y tener. Así es como confirmamos que La Vida es un Viaje, y este es el más importante para nosotros.

The Just Fashion EU Project is funded by the European Union. Views and opinions expressed are however those of the author(s) only and do not necessarily reflect those of the European Research Executive Agency (REA). Neither the European Union nor the REA can be held responsible for them.

At Tex Metal Accessories, we take pride in on-time delivery, exceptional customer support, and our dedication to continuous improvement. We also provide free training and assistance in fixing metal garment accessories on ready-made products — reinforcing our mission to support local garment factories and foster industry collaboration.

With years of experience, we serve both local and international markets, offering cost-effective, Oeko-Tex certified, and innovative solutions that combine quality, durability, and design flexibility.

Our mission is to build long-term, mutually beneficial relationships with our clients while contributing to the growth and sustainability of the global fashion and textile industry.

Name: SKIMP
Description:
SKIMP c'est avant tout une histoire d'aventures et de voyages. 
Créée en 2009, la marque d'accessoires lyonnaise s'amuse à réinventer les objets du quotidiens pour les rendre fun, ingénieux et décalés.
Des ceintures en plastiques aux sacs à mains en mousse type néoprène, en passant par une gamme de bagagerie en bâche étanche, SKIMP mise sur l'originalité, le tout dans un style coloré affirmé.

Name: e.m.company srl
Description:
E.M. Company was founded in 1996 in Monte San Giusto in the heart of Marche’s footwear industry. The founders Enio Ruani and Marco Franchellucci first specialized in the marketing of tools and small items needed for the shoe manufacturing process, and then they expanded the business by creating the first fashion accessories.
In the course of time, the two partners got involved by investing in creativity, quality and innovation. This has allowed the company to grow and serve, in addition to the footwear market, also leather goods and clothing, becoming a reference partner for both large brands and small artisan companies.
The company is present in all the districts operating in the fashion sector thanks to the structured and well-coordinated sales network, with sales representatives active both in Italy and abroad. Customers have the opportunity to observe the full range of products within the showroom and  more easily through the website www.emcompany.it.

Name: Waycap S.P.A.
Description:
Waycap S.P.A. is the leading company for Luxury Made in Italy design and headwear production.
Serving a wide range of customers we provide design services, prototypes development and internal production both in our Italian Factory and in our production sites in Far East and mediterranean area.

Description:
ahlemod online store, by offering goods such as men's and women's clothes and attractive and diverse accessories, handicrafts, decorative and home accessories, tries to introduce and supply quality products and offer reasonable prices considering the authenticity of Iranian goods and It supports the producers of the country's fashion and clothing industry.

ahlemod online store, taking into account the tastes of the audience and analyzing their needs through surveys, has made it possible to accept the products of manufacturers and artists in line with its goals of developing businesses in various production sectors. Name: SHED RAIN
Description:
SHED RAIN has been the world’s leading designer, engineer, and producer of umbrellas and rainwear since 1947. We combine decades of craftsmanship and ingenuity with sophisticated style to keep you protected from the elements, no matter the weather.
 
The headquarters of our three-generation, family-owned business is located in Portland, OR, along with our complimentary brands: Rain Essentials, Canopi, and GOGO. With roots in manufacturing, experience with weather (thanks, Portland!), global collaborations, and hearts for innovation, we guarantee products to keep you protected, rain or shine. We stand by our products that last a lifetime.
 
In the 75 years since our inception, the whole world has changed. Change is inevitable, but a few things are for certain: rain, our company’s passion and dedication to quality and clever innovation, and that there’s not an umbrella in the world quite like a SHED RAIN.
 
To learn more about SHED RAIN, visit www.shedrain.com

Name: ACM Dettagli di moda
Description: ACM dal 1982 fornisce il mondo della moda con dettagli unici, ricercati e personalizzati, garantendo lavorazioni di prestigio e innovative. Ogni singolo prodotto è il risultato dell’attenzione che poniamo in ciascuna fase del nostro processo produttivo: dal prototipo, pensato mettendo al primo posto la salute del consumatore, alla produzione con macchinari di ultima generazione, che consentono lavorazioni pregiate e personalizzazioni d’avanguardia, riducendo al minimo l’impatto sull’ambiente e rispettando le più stringenti normative in materia eco-tossicologica.

Créateur de lunettes pour toute la famille depuis plus de 25 ans.

Name: LEONA ANELIA
Description:
Taking its meaning from “my own strength and courage”, LEONA ANELIA dedicates its heart to making the basic needs of daily life functional, aesthetic and sustainable. With the motto of "Get Good", it supports continuous development and innovation by using technical fabrics and functional designs that help develop both personality and talents. The beginning of products inspired by science and sports was a classic backpack. Then, business bags, pouches, card holders, hats and other basic accessories takes their place in the product range with the aim of constantly improving the potential of the users.
  Whether you’re going from the office to the gym or from meeting to travel there’s a bag in our collection that’s perfect match with journey ahead.

  Anlamını “kendi gücüm ve cesaretim”den alan LEONA ANELIA, kalbini günlük hayatın temel ihtiyaçlarını işlevsel, estetik ve sürdürülebilir kılmaya adamıştır. "Get Good" mottosu ile hem kişiliği hem de yetenekleri geliştirmeyi odağına almaktadır. Ürünlerinde kullandığı  teknik kumaşlar ve fonksiyonel tasarımlar sürdürülebilir gelişimi ve yeniliği destekler. 
  İlhamını bilim ve spordan alan ürünlerin başlangıcını klasik bir sırt çantası oluşturuyor. Ardından ürün gamına laptop kılıfı, kese, kartlık ve şapka diğer temel aksesuarlara da yer vererek kullanıcıların potansiyellerini sürekli geliştirmeyi ve iyileştirmeyi hedefliyor.

İster ofisten spor salonuna, ister toplantıdan geziye gidiyor olun, koleksiyonda yolculukla mükemmel uyum sağlayan bir çanta ve konsepti tamamlayan ürünleri bulabilirsiniz.


E-mail: leonaanelia@outlook.com

Name: DiamArt
Description:
Micro Diamonds for your Creations
DiamArt makes surfaces with the most precious of stones - the diamond - helping brands and designers to create unique products using this exquisite material

Unlike glass crystals or glitter, we add true preciousness, using an unprecedented technique for applying diamond and thereby increasing the actual and the perceived value of your products.

Thanks to our special process which combines artistic craftsmanship and technology, our diamond surfaces have a certified carat density.

DiamArt surfaces are available in sheets and glass tiles, allowing designers to choose the shapes they need for micro diamond decorations and inserts.

Name: RETOUR DE PLAGE
Description:
Par un beau jour de marché, sur l’île d’Oléron, RETOUR DE PLAGE est né. Créateur de bijoux artisanaux, notre nom résonne comme une invitation à s’évader au rythme des vagues et des marées.
Fait main, conçu maison. Colliers de perles en pierres, boucles d’oreilles en métal et verre, ou encore bracelets en céramique… Notre production repose sur des techniques de fabrication, d’assemblage et de composition de milliers de composants sourcés par nos soins. 
Oléron est notre source d’inspiration, la localisation de notre atelier et le berceau de nos créations. 
Notre PME est très attachée à son territoire et au maintien de sa production locale. Nos processus de production repose sur des techniques manuelles. 
Et, si l’aventure a commencé  dans la cabane emblématique de Saint-Trojan-les-Bains, elle se poursuit en préservant notre savoir-faire au travers nos 13 boutiques réparties sur la côte ouest, notre atelier principal implanté sur l'île d’Oléron et notre e-shop. 
Retrouvez nos bijoux dans nos implantations à Saint-Trojan-les-Bains, Saint-Pierre-d’Oléron, La Rochelle, Saint-Martin de Ré, Royan, Arcachon, Les Sables-d’Olonne, Noirmoutier-en-l’Ile, Vannes, Saint-Malo, Quimper, Bayonne, Guérande et sur notre e-commerce.

Name: Louis Salon
Description:
The Louis Unisex Salon is an exclusive Global Circle of Beauty Talents.

Louis Salon  is a American international chain of hairdressing salons founded in the California USA in 1990 by Peter Louis. Louis Salon has become the authority for discerning people around the world to rely on to have their Beauty needs met. In all our Members and Partners, we look for Excellence across the board, passion for their work, and genuine desire to give the “gift of Beauty”.



4000 Salons in 90 cities in the World passed the demanding Louis Unisex Salon accreditation process and are now forming the exclusive global Circle of the Louis Unisex Salon. Anywhere in the world, you are assured to experience the same premium quality service in a select environment, with a personal that speaks English if you desire to.

Benefits of Hair & Beauty Industry Business

The hair & beauty salon business is rarely the first option consider when they start evaluating any business. But, when they learn more, they find that hair & beauty industry is like no other.



Hair & beauty is an industry that is



All Cash business.

One time investment

Low Manpower cost, low operating cost.

Recession proof

(how hard recession hit,

People can’t stop haircuts/ colour etc)

365 days revenue

Negligible seasonality - 12 month business

Is a fundamental service, a basic necessity to all.

Is about making people look and feel good about themselves.

Name: RAFFIA CONNECTION
Description:
L'entreprise s’est fait connaître au départ en produisant des paniers en rabane (tissage de raphia).
Puis en 2010 le crochet est arrivé.
Aujourd’hui, avec plus de 1200 artisans à nos côtés, nous sommes l’un des principaux fabricants à façon du secteur.
Notre expertise dans le domaine du raphia crocheté est reconnue dans le milieu de la mode.
Nous avons besoin de vous , nous nous engageons en faveur de l’égalité des chances. Toutes les candidatures sont examinées sans distinction de sexe, de genre, d’origine, d’âge, de handicap ou de toute autre caractéristique personnelle. Nous encourageons aussi bien les femmes que les hommes à postuler à ce poste. Seules les compétences, la motivation et l’adéquation au profil recherché guideront notre choix.

Name: Ki ET LA
Description:
Founded in 2010 by Anne-Charlotte Le Grand and David Angibaud, KI ET LA is a French company specializing in the design and manufacturing of fashion accessories for children and adults. The brand is renowned for its trendy and comfortable sunglasses and hats.

KI ET LA is a rapidly growing company, distributed in nearly 40 countries, with a prestigious clientele in the fashion and childcare industries. Among our clients are Jacadi, Bonpoint, Cyrillus, Galeries Lafayette, Printemps, Beaba, and La Redoute.

The company has made significant investments in research and development to create innovative products that meet customer needs. KI ET LA products are designed with high-quality materials and comply with European safety standards.

Furthermore, KI ET LA is committed to ethical and ecological practices by prioritizing sustainable materials, environmentally friendly packaging, and eco-responsible production methods.

The team at KI ET LA consists of talented, passionate, and dedicated professionals who are committed to the company's future. They work together to keep the brand at the forefront of innovation by offering products that are increasingly performance-driven, practical, and aesthetically pleasing.

KI ET LA is a rapidly expanding company with strong growth potential, aiming to become a major player in the market of fashion accessories for children and adults.

ITALIAN TRADITION IN GREEN SOLUTIONS

With only one industrial facility in Italy's Veneto region and all the Teams under one roof, Panama Trimmings combines experience with innovation and artisan skills with the most modern equipment.

Doing things right is our key word, always.

Proud to be a reliable partner.

Name: Moaconcept
Description:
Moaconcept is an Italian Sneaker Benefit Company.  
Our brand culture is rooted in inclusion and dialogue, believing that the true power of change, collective and individual, lies in the power of small daily gestures and the importance of the role each person plays in this journey toward a better society.

We design our products with passion. We donate part of our annual profits to promote environmental responsability and social recovery. Our aim is giving back to society part of what it has given us.

We believe that in confrontation with others lies the key to improvement, both personal and collective. Our collections are born from the synthesis of the perception of our surroundings and our deepest emotions, in a perpetual movement of exchange that marks the breath/ essence of our company.

We do it with love and perseverance, proud to be an independent and self-funded company. We curate our ideas and produce our collections, meeting international labor standards. Our products are made with an increasing focus on socially responsible processes with the intention of creating sustainable value in the future, balancing private interests and collective well-being.

Name: Swaine
Description:
Swaine is a manufacturer and supplier of luxury British leather goods, umbrellas and hats. The company was first established in 1750 as a whip maker. Since then, the group has produced many iconic products, such as the Poets hat worn by Indiana Jones, the James Bond Attaché case and the bulletproof umbrellas seen in the recent film 'Kingsman' staring Colin Firth. 

2022 is an exciting year for Swaine, so now is an exciting time to join and play a role in the growth and development of this historic company.

Description: Africa'Diamond is an Ivorian start-up specializing in bags made from African loincloths of various origins. We promote African cultural values through our original, traditional-modern creations. Our commitment also aims to promote our know-how and cultural heritage, and thus contribute to the development of our country. Our creations are made in Côte d'Ivoire, handmade and machine-finished, always with a special artisanal touch, to delight our local and expatriate customers with choice, quality products.

Eittem encompasses a singular vision, patient intention, and rigorous standards of excellence to create fine objects made to hold and be held.

Name: F.B.M.A. SRL - Fabbrica Bottoni Metallici Artistici
Description:
F.B.M.A. srl è un'azienda presente sul mercato internazionale dal 1987. Produciamo bottoni, accessori e bijoux, principalmente in ottone, ma anche in altri metalli a seconda delle richieste e necessità del cliente.
La nostra produzione spazia dai classici bottoni blazer e camiceria fino alla moda casual, dalla cerimonia al pret a porter, dal bottone gioiello a modelli sportivi e agli accessori come bracciali, charmes, collane, fibbie e gemelli.
Produciamo inoltre numerosi bottoni e accessori per divise, sia militari sia civili (compagnie aeree, comuni, enti locali, istituzioni) e abbiamo ampia conoscenza del settore stampi, regolamenti, capitolati, gare, etc.
Tutti i nostri prodotti sono rigorosamente Made in Italy, realizzati all'interno della nostra sede in provincia di Novara, con enorme cura per i dettagli e svariate lavorazioni di tipo artigianale.
I nostri principali punti di forza sono la personalizzazione e le lavorazioni di pregio (smaltatura, strass, diamantatura, incisioni e rilievi).
Abbiamo lavorato e lavoriamo con molti tra i più prestigiosi marchi della moda mondiale: Gucci, Dior, Chanel, Giorgio Armani, Dolce & Gabbana, Brioni, Brunello Cucinelli e con moltissimi comuni italiani, enti provinciali e regionali, compagnie aeree, reparti militari italiani ed esteri.
Lavoriamo a stretto contatto con il cliente in fase di design e progettazione dei modelli personalizzati, lavorando sia su disegno fornito dal cliente, sia sviluppando internamente i nuovi modelli.

VISION
Sempre alla ricerca di nuovi materiali, forme e tipi di lavorazione innovative ed al passo con le esigenze del settore.
F.B.M.A. sta adottando policy sempre più green ed attente all'ambiente. La pineta all'interno dell'azienda è frutto di una partnership con il Parco del Ticino. Utilizziamo metalli e leghe a basso contenuto di piombo, le galvaniche sono realizzate con prodotti anallergici nichel free e gli smalti rispettano i più avanzati standard qualitativi per evitare danni ambientali.

Name: VALOR AFRICA Brand
Description:
Valor Africa brand- is a clothing brand in Kenya that deals with  fashion accessories made by local designers in Africa. 
Objective /Mission 
The main aim is to build a strong African culture brand and to improve fashion industry in Africa under one platform.

Vision 
To help designers build market and sell their work 
To give Our consumers one platform to get all African products 
To support talents and skills through fashion industry I.e models, artists, influencers. 
To awaken our continent to be competitive to the world of production rather than buying. 
To help consumers meet their designers and help designers reach their targeted fashion clients. 
To encourage people to start appreciating African products.

When it started: 
it started in 2020 during the pandemic. The main objective was to get a wider market from social platforms , and  we specified to African products. 


PRODUCTS 

Hoodies,t-shirts , polo shirts, capes , bags, sweatshirts, sweatpants, body suits, pants and shoes .

dekoGraphics creates applications that are exclusive, innovative, simple to use and drive uniqueness for brands with big ideas. We help creative people to apply their visions onto textiles. Our clients either choose us to create a change to solve problems or to find inspiring opportunities to evolve their brand. With more than 100 million transfers per year we refine textiles all over the world. Marchillsocks est une marque lifestyle qui vous propose un produit 100 % Made in France, unisexe, de qualité et avec un grand savoir - faire. 

Marchill s'inspire de la Californie de 70's, de la beach culture, de la mode, du sport de la famille.  Nos produits ont des références musicales et culturelles pour toutes les générations.

Name: Gentleman Store RS
Description:
ODELO NE ČINI ČOVEKA, ALI GA DETALJI OPLEMENJUJU.
Gentleman Store predstavlja brendiranu mušku modu u svim segmentima luksuznog muškog aksesoara. Brend se bazira na ponudi unikatnih artikala visokog kvaliteta, ručne izrade ili malih serija. U okviru ponude objedinjen je kompletan aksesoar sa kojim jedan muškarac bez obzira na godine, zanimanje ili interesovanje može da se poistoveti.

Koncept Gentleman Store upotpunjava ponudu mnogih eminentnih šoping molova, kao i najvećih svetskih aerodroma, uspešno ispunjavajući želje i zahteve muškaraca istančanog ukusa. Isti predstavlja mesto gde odelo ne čini coveka, ali ga detalji oplemenjuju. U okviru ponude nude se i personalizovani nesvakidašnji pokloni, ručne izrade, sa ciljem da onaj ko ih poželi, u samom startu zna da neće dobiti proizvod masovne produkcije, već da je svaki naš proizvod posebno i smišljeno biran.

“U okviru ponude, pored unikatnih artikala, zastupamo i brendove Tony Bellucci, Cacharel, Pierre Cardin, Toni Sabatini.”
Trebali bi da vam kažemo nešto o našem nastanku, ali ako to uradimo na način koji rade drugi ne biste znali našu priču, a ona je suština sledećeg koncepta.
Od ideje do realizacije...
Glavno pitanje koje je pokretalo ideju je bilo „ŠTA SVE JEDNOG MUŠKARCA ČINI DŽENTLMENOM?“.

Nismo se u našoj ideji bavili manirima, poznavanjem pića i hrane… to se smatra početnim ulaganjem, ali smo se zato posvetili onim detaljima koji jednog savremenom muškarca, koji drži do sebe, oplemenjuje i čini ga još srećnijim.

Otuda ideja da se baziramo na ponudi koja ima za cilj artikle visogog kvaliteta, najčešće ručne izrade, unikatne, ili rađene u  malim serijama, sa ciljem da onaj ko ih poželi, u samom startu zna da neće dobiti proizvod masovne produkcije već da je svako od naših artikala posebno i smišljeno biran.

Posle dugih priča i razmišljanja, nastao je koncept koji objedinjuje kompletan aksesoar s kojim jedan muškarac bez obzira na godine, zanimanje ili interesovanje, može da se poistoveti.

Name: SLOYA
Description:

Conçus à Besançon, les collections SLOYA sont variées et sans cesse renouvelées afin de satisfaire sa clientèle.

Grâce à un réel savoir-faire et une forte passion pour les pierres, la marque propose des bijoux fabriqués à la main dont les matériaux sont précieusement sélectionnés à travers le monde. 

Aujourd’hui, les bijoux SLOYA sont distribués sur le site www.sloya.fr et auprès de nombreux points de vente permettant d’accroître activement la performance et la visibilité de la société.
 
Passionnés et engagés, les deux créateurs de la marque ont à coeur de proposer des bijoux authentiques : « La nature est notre source d’inspiration et nous permet de réaliser de nouvelles collections pour toujours vous satisfaire »

Grâce à des partenaires de confiance, chacune de nos collections montre une qualité de fabrication irréprochable. Cette étape importante exige un processus précis, une expertise et de véritables savoir-faire.

Colliers, bracelets, boucles d’oreilles, bagues et parures, fabriqués en petites séries, à destination des femmes distinguées, raffinées et singulières.

Chaque bijou, fabriqué à la main dans les règles de l’art, est un écho de l’ambition de SLOYA.

L'équipe SLOYA

Name: VENEROSO Srl
Description:
La VENEROSO GIOIELLI fondata da Giuseppe Veneroso negli anni ’70 è oggi diretta dal figlio Diego.
L’azienda negli anni è cresciuta trasformandosi in una solida realtà della gioielleria vicentina.

Attenzione alle tendenze del mercato, ricerca di forme e linee sempre più attuali unite ad una maestria artigianale e ad una qualità impareggiabili, hanno da sempre caratterizzato i gioielli Veneroso.
La valorizzazione di ogni singola competenza, la crescita individuale delle maestranze e lo scambio di esperienze rendono ricca di una vitalità creativa l’aria che si respira nei laboratori e negli uffici della VENEROSO GIOIELLI.

Questo clima fertile dove si incontrano inventiva e sapiente manualità dà vita ogni giorno a splendide parure composte da raffinatissimi gioielli di un’eleganza femminile incomparabile.

Gioielli che nascono dall’alchemica precisione delle leghe d’oro, dalle sapienti lavorazioni dei metalli e dalle preziose finiture manuali delle superfici che unite ad una scelta accurata di perle e pietre naturali preziose e semipreziose danno vita a creazioni davvero uniche.

Name: Ellen Paulssen
Description:
· Hüte von Hand gearbeitet ·  - im wahrsten Sinne des Wortes.

Jedes Modell wird einzeln in traditioneller Handwerkskunst von Hand gezogen, gedämpft, modelliert und genäht. Sorgfalt und Genauigkeit sind die Basis für gleich bleibende Qualität. Klare Formen sind die Handschrift von Ellen Paulssen. Liebe zum Detail setzt Akzente, hohe Funktionalität ist uns wichtig.

„Mir geht´s Hut...“, dies ist wohl der passende Gedanke unseres Lebens, geschäftlich, wie aber auch privat. Wir sind Hutmacher von Herzen, und das von Anfang an. Inspiriert von den täglichen Eindrücken unserer Heimatstadt Aachen und der Orte, die wir bereisen, entsteht das Gefühl für unsere Kollektionen. Unser Anspruch an Hüte und Mützen ist, dass sie kleidsam, bequem, praktisch, behaglich sind. Sie entsprechen dem Lebensgefühl der modernen Frau. Ein modisches Accessoire, welches den persönlichen Stil des Trägers unterstreicht. Unsere Modelle verstauben nicht als Dekoration, sondern begegnen Ihnen täglich im Straßenbild.

Name: SanjaStories
Description:
Sanja Stories is a unique buying experience that makes YOU part of the garment-making journey. 

To minimise waste, maintain high quality and ensure ethical practices, our production doesn’t start until we sign 200 customers. This is where YOU come in to make the magic happen. 

Choose to pay in full or spread the cost with manageable monthly payments.

Then sit back, relax and watch the story of your jeans unfold from seed to seam and everything in between over 5 months. 

Sounds slow? Well, this is slow fashion and good things are always worth the wait.

Name: Aneway studio
Description:
Aneway Studio is an operational bridge between international brands and the Italian manufacturing supply chain.
Based in the heart of Scandicci’s leather goods district, we offer strategic consulting and technical-creative support to transform ideas into products of excellence.
Our strength lies in the synergy between commercial and creative expertise, deep knowledge of the territory, and the ability to build authentic relationships with suppliers and artisans.
What we do:
• Strategic consulting and trend analysis
• Research and selection of materials (leathers, hardware, fabrics)
• Product development and pattern making
• Prototype and sample supervision
• Production process optimization
• Quality control and cost analysis
Our approach:
We work side by side with design and product teams, facilitating communication between brands and suppliers, reducing inefficiencies, and ensuring a smooth and sustainable workflow.
Our mission:
To translate creativity into tangible results, enhance Italian artisanal know-how, and build relationships based on trust and quality.

Name: ESSEDUE s.r.l.
Description:
Siamo un’azienda dinamica e specializzata nella produzione di accessori unici e specifici, dai cartellini alle etichette e tutto ciò che hai in mente per arricchire i tuoi capi d’abbigliamento.
Abbiamo un’ampia gamma di idee e soluzioni, che mostrano il nostro impegno nel soddisfare le esigenze di ogni nostro cliente.
La nostra esperienza ultra ventennale, la passione per ciò che facciamo e la cura che mettiamo in ogni prodotto sono le nostre migliori credenziali.

Da oltre vent'anni, ci dedichiamo con passione a creare accessori moda che vanno ben oltre la semplice descrizione dell'abbigliamento. Il nostro obiettivo principale è valorizzare il brand attraverso manufatti straordinari.

Il cartellino, l'etichetta e il packaging non sono solo accessori; sono un elemento coeso che si integra perfettamente con l'ufficio stile del nostro partner e con l'anima stessa dell'accessorio moda.

La filosofia del Made in Italy e l’utilizzo di materiali
eco compatibili, unite all’esperienza e alla passione
per il progetto, garantiscono un’attenzione superiore ai dettagli.

La nostra forza risiede nella perfetta fusione tra tradizione e innovazione, creando collezioni di Cartellini, etichette tessute, etichette pelle, patch e packaging che sono veri e propri simboli fashion, curati in ogni dettaglio.

In un mercato in evoluzione, ci differenziamo per la dedizione ai dettagli.

Il nostro team fornisce servizi di sviluppo grafico personalizzato per la creazione di soluzioni visive per il prodotto e il capo d’abbigliamento.
Collaboriamo a stretto contatto con clienti e stilisti
supportandoli nelle scelte di personalizzazione del prodotto e del capo e delle relative soluzioni per l’etichettatura e la
vendita.
I nostri servizi spaziano dalla modifica di file esistenti alla
creazione di una brand identity completa per il prodotto, fino alle necessità di rebranding aziendale in occasione del lancio di una nuova linea di articoli.

Name: Auzmena Trading LLC

Name: Mundia BV
Description:
Wij zijn dé private label company voor aantoonbare succesvolle toeleveranciers in Europa voor textiel, (toilet)tassen en andere diverse productgroepen.
We hebben jarenlange ervaring in wat we doen. Daarom doen wij niets liever dan onze klanten helpen om een idee naar een succesvol verkopend product te brengen. Wij specialiseren ons in de volgende productgroepen:

Baby Kleding, Textiel en Accessoires
Make-Up Accessoires
Tassen en toilettassen

Wij leveren product- of concept ontwikkeling, geheel naar de wens van de klant. Tijdens het proces houden wij rekening met verschillende factoren zoals prijs en kwaliteit. Door deze factoren goed in de gaten te houden kunnen wij samen een product op de markt zetten tegen een goede prijs en kwaliteit verhouding. Dankzij ons in-house design team zijn we altijd op de hoogte van de laatste trends.

MVO
Wij voelen wij ons verantwoordelijk voor onze leefomgeving. Daarom voeren wij al een groot aantal jaren een actief beleid in het kader van Maatschappelijk Verantwoord Ondernemen (MVO)
 
Wij zijn een handelsonderneming die goederen betrekken van fabrikanten in landen als, China en Pakistan en enkele andere landen. Wij hechten er belang aan dat de internationaal geldende normen en waarden worden gerespecteerd.
