Name: Mützenmafia
Description:
Hallo, wir sind Mützenmafia!
Ein Ethical Fair Fashion Brand mit Sitz in Graz, Österreich.
All unsere Produkte werden mit viel Liebe und ausgesuchten Materialien regional (Österreich & Slowenien) gefertigt. 

Im Mittelpunkt unserer Arbeit liegt die ressourcenschonende Herstellung unserer Produkte sowie die Wertschätzung unserer Mitarbeiterinnen. Wir beziehen unsere Rohstoffe von kontrollierten Herstellern, soweit es geht regional und nachhaltig, achten bei unseren Werbe- und Drucksorten auf recycelte Materialien und verschicken unsere Pakete CO2 neutral.

Der Kerngedanke des Unternehmens liegt in der Unterstützung unserer heimischen Wirtschaft, der Herstellung ohne Ausbeutung an Arbeitskraft, der Minimierung unseres ökologischen Fußabdrucks sowie der Erhaltung unseres Kulturguts – der Handarbeit.

Name: PRETTY SIMPLE
Description:
Meet Pretty Simple! A woman owned fashion accessory brand based out of Minnesota, founded on the resolute belief that what’s on the inside – the heart and unique spirit of a woman – are distinctively beautiful. Their products are simply a means for that to shine outward into the world. 

Leah, the founder of Pretty Simple, is both a cancer-survivor and mom to a type 1 diabetic daughter. She has learned that strength, struggle and fight are beautiful in their own ways. Pretty Simple’s CURE mittens tell that story and show the world the wonder of determination and inner perseverance. Supporting causes that seek solutions to type 1 diabetes is a large part of 
Pretty Simple’s “why”.

Pretty Simple’s 3 Sisters Collection of bags was inspired by the bond shared between Leah and her 2 sisters and is marked with three signature studs. These bags remind women of the incredible connection to their own sisters, whether through blood or by choice. 

Pretty Simple celebrates the beauty found inside by offering a high-quality line of accessories, made infinitely more beautiful by those who wear them.

Name: MaLeeMa
Description:
Maleema – Fashion with a Purpose, Sustainability at its Core 

At Maleema, we believe fashion isn't just about looking good—it’s about doing good. Our journey began with a simple but powerful vision: to transform agricultural waste into timeless, handcrafted, and eco-friendly fashion essentials.

Our Founder & CEO – Srinthyapriya, is a passionate fashion designer and sustainability advocate. She saw an opportunity to bridge the gap between style and sustainability. With a deep understanding of textiles, craftsmanship, and responsible production, she set out to create a brand that elevates fashion and supports artisans and the planet.

 Sustainability First, Always!

Zero-Plastic Policy – Because fashion should never harm the planet.

Ethically Sourced Materials – Our designs use banana fiber, bamboo, and hemp, turning waste into wearable elegance.

Handcrafted Luxury – Every piece tells a story of craftsmanship, culture, and care.

 B2C – Sustainable Fashion for Conscious Consumers
Discover our range of eco-luxury fashion designed for those who value style and sustainability:
Clothing – Shirts, T-shirts, scarves, and handkerchiefs made from natural fabrics
Handbags & Clutches – Crafted from banana fiber & recycled cork fabric
Home Essentials – Tablr runners, Yogamat, penstands, baskets,......

 B2B – Ethical Sourcing for Brands & Businesses
We collaborate with sustainable fashion brands, corporate partners, and retailers to provide:
Custom-designed eco-friendly packaging
Handwoven fabrics & sustainable textiles
Corporate gifting solutions & bulk orders

Join the Movement

At Maleema, we’re not just creating products—we’re shaping the future of sustainable fashion. Whether you’re a conscious consumer or a business looking for ethical alternatives, let’s redefine fashion together.

Each piece is hand-painted in our Stockholm studio, where artistry and attention to detail transform every item into a unique work of art. Crafted in Europe with premium materials, SBY allows each customer to create accessories that reflect their individual style and identity.

Our brand is built on the idea that luxury should be personal, accessible, and sustainably produced. From choosing colors to final detailing, every step in the process is designed to let customers make their mark on each product, merging with a global perspective on style.

With SBY, customization is more than a service—it’s an experience, offering customers the opportunity to carry a part of their story in every piece.

Name: Shoppinlove
Description:
+1mln followers Facebook.com/shoppinlove        

Shoppinlove, calzature create e realizzate artigianalmente!
Realizziamo le nostre calzature a mano dal primo all'ultimo paio. La ricerca della perfezione nelle forme, la creatività negli stili e l'esperienza nelle lavorazioni più antiche rendono i nostri modelli unici, per comfort e design. 
I prodotti artigianali sono unici: ogni nostra creazione viene realizzata da artigiani esperti, che si occupano di ogni singolo dettaglio rendendo unico ogni singolo paio di scarpe!
La cura dei dettagli nella produzione artigianale fa la differenza sia per la qualità, affidabilità e durabilità, sia per l’estetica del prodotto finito.
Tutto il processo di lavorazione viene eseguito con occhio critico nei minimi particolari: dalla scelta dei materiali alla produzione!
Curiamo ogni fase della produzione:
dalla selezione della materia prima alle prime bozze su carta, dal taglio della pelle alla creazione della forma, dalla cucitura delle suole alla fase di fissaggio e lucidatura.
Un lungo e meticoloso processo per offrirvi un prodotto creativo di altissima qualità.
La qualità dei materiali e la meticolosa cura dei dettagli, fanno delle nostre calzature, creazioni sofisticate dall'anima autentica e innovativa.
Lavoriamo da sempre nell’unico modus operandi che conosciamo, ovvero, impiegando mani, testa e cuore... per ottenere un prodotto unico ed originale!
Ogni creazione racchiude in sé il valore inestimabile della tradizione artigiana italiana!

Description:
Virtually Wearable is a Glasgow-based digital fashion studio creating production-ready 3D garments and product twins for brands, museums and archives, real-time/gaming, and artist collaborations. We turn tech packs, sketches, or archival pieces into accurate, pattern-true assets that drop straight into your workflow—CLO3D → Substance → Blender/Unreal—for e-commerce, marketing, exhibitions, and interactive use.

-For fashion & lifestyle brands:

Concept-to-3D and tech-pack conversion

Fit-aware simulation and fabric behaviour

PBR materials, trims, and fabric libraries

Look-dev lighting, stills, and 360 turntables

Clean retopo/UVs, naming, export standards

Real-time assets for AR, web, and apps

-For museums & archives:

Conservation-aware digitisation of garments and textile objects

Pattern-true reconstruction and material study

Display-ready visuals for galleries, learning, and outreach

Lightweight educational assets and interactive experiences

-For real-time & games:

Optimised meshes, UV atlasing, and LODs

Tiling/masked materials, shader setup

Engine-ready exports for Unreal/Unity

Performance budgets met without losing fidelity

-Artist collaborations:

Bespoke digital garments and interactive pieces

Experimental shaders, motion/installation assets

Exhibition-ready deliverables for galleries and festivals

Accuracy you can trust • Production-ready files • Clear hand-offs • On-brief, on time.

Glasgow-based; working globally with remote-friendly pipelines.

Typical deliverables:
FBX/GLB with tidy topology and UVs; texture sets (PBR); turntables/stills; engine-ready assets with documentation.

Portfolio: www.virtuallywearable.com/portfolio2025

Name: Vieux-Garçon
Description:
A l’heure où la valorisation de l’image de soi et la différenciation font partie des tendances actuelles, nous souhaitons offrir à chacun une façon de se distinguer.

Vieux Garçon surfe sur la tendance vintage dans notre société contemporaine et revisite ainsi un accessoire prisé dans le passé tout en l’adaptant au goût du jour.

La pochette de costume est un accessoire élégant typiquement masculin mais le pliage de celui-ci n’est pas affaire aisée.

Vieux Garçon saisit alors cet inconvénient comme une opportunité pour proposer un accessoire alliant fonctionnalité, élégance et singularité.

Des emplacements sont ajoutées à l'arrière de nos pochettes afin de pouvoir y loger des cartes de visites, cartes de crédits ou tout autre objet du quotidien.

Nos pochettes sont ingénieusement conçues. Nous éradiquons la corvée de pliage pour laisser place à une pochette déjà pliée et assemblée à la main par nos couturières.

Ici pas de fashion victime, Vieux Garçon s’adresse à une clientèle masculine particulièrement sensible à la sophistication et ayant un désir d’indépendance.

Chaque homme incarne alors le Vieux Garçon tel que nous le considérons : un homme qui s’affranchit d’un ordre et de codes établis en adoptant un style vestimentaire distinctif et exclusif.

Description:
Brand Story

As the word "Alchemy" suggests, there is a seemingly magical process in the conception, transformation and creation of jewellery - from a raw gemstone to a finished, flawless ornament. We believe that this process is interwoven into every piece crafted at the Alchemy Studio. 

Tying in the richness of India's regal past to an uber-stylish present, we bring to you, unique pieces envisioned in a fusion of raw uncut diamonds, vibrant gem stones, engraved stones and freshwater pearls set using ancient techniques and geometric constructions dating back to the 18th century in 14 carat gold and sterling silver that seek to address every taste and sensibility.

Bridging the gap between luxury and accessibility, the versatile collection of the Alchemy Studio is a perfect balance of old-world charm and contemporary everyday wear - a testament to today’s dynamic and confident woman. 

Our hope is that every piece of jewellery chosen is able to serve as a powerful expression of personal style.

Name: Micromet S.r.l.
Description:
Micromet è un’azienda italiana ubicata ad Arezzo che da diversi anni è attiva nella realizzazione di bigiotteria e di accessori destinati ai più grandi brand del lusso. Dal 2011, anno in cui è nata, è rapidamente cresciuta grazie alla specifica cultura aziendale orientata all’efficienza e all’innovazione che ha permesso di raggiungere un’eccellente qualità del prodotto, soddisfacendo così le richieste dei clienti più esigenti.

Micromet è specializzata nella realizzazione di bigiotteria e minuterie metalliche per prodotti di alta moda, dalla pelletteria, alla calzatura, all’abbigliamento con processi di microfusione a cera persa.
Pur avendo una grande competenza artigianale, l’azienda offre soluzioni tecniche d’avanguardia per rispondere sempre meglio a quelle esigenze di flessibilità e versatilità che la produzione richiede, con continua attenzione ai costi e ai tempi di realizzazione.

L’Azienda è in grado di gestire programmi e volumi pari a circa due milioni di pezzi l’anno.
Sia per le nostre realizzazioni che per i servizi che affidiamo ai nostri partner, garantiamo sempre il più alto livello qualitativo, forti di un controllo qualità interno volto a verificare ogni fase della produzione, dalla progettazione fino al montaggio finale.
L’obiettivo della nostra Azienda è quello di trovare le soluzioni per soddisfare al meglio le esigenze dei Clienti, con rapidità, economicità e qualità.

Name: Arise Kollections Uganda LTD
Description:
Arise Kollections Limited (formerly Sseko Uganda) is a Ugandan based Youth led leather and textile value addition company. The company utilizes tanned leather from beef industry hides to manufacture high quality leather products like leather bags, sandals, accessories, jewelry, and apparel. 

The former manufacturing Arm of Sseko Designs LLC gained independence after the merger of Sseko LLC and Noonday Collections and aims to help create educational, economical and career opportunities for Ugandan women through leather addition. Through the handmade products, the women learn different skills and today more than 300 full time jobs have been created. (These women and young girls have moved on creating opportunities for themselves and their families/communities). 


On top of manufacturing high end quality bags, the company also runs a Gap Year Program that skills up youth during their Senior Six vacation. In the Uganda Education system, high school students wait idly for 10 months before they enroll into institutions of higher learning. We run a Gap year program where we train these youth life skills, hands on skill and career guidance to shape their decisions. More than 250 youths have gained life and entrepreneur skills plus university scholarships to pursue their career dreams. 

Arise’s mission is to empower Ugandan women through employment and educational opportunities while simultaneously creating beautiful and functional products that enable our customers to participate and feel connected to that empowerment process.

Name: Breag
Description:
At BREAG, we recycle rejected bras from manufacturers in Pakistan and second-hand bras into stylish bags. Through BREAG, we empower underprivileged women in Pakistan by providing fair pay as they craft these bags. The proceeds from BREAG sales are used to purchase biopsy needles for disadvantaged women in Pakistan who cannot afford them, thus supporting poor women in their fight against breast cancer. 
These bags - designed by Dutch bag designers Leontine Hagoort and Ilse Veening - are more than accessories; they represent a statement and a rallying cry for breast health awareness. And, aim to initiate conversations about breast self-examination as an act of empowerment and self-care. Last, but not least, they stand as a tribute to cancer warriors.

Bij BREAG recyclen we afgekeurde beha's van fabrikanten in Pakistan en tweedehands beha's tot stijlvolle tassen. De tassen worden gemaakt door achtergestelde vrouwen, die hiervoor een eerlijk loon verdienen. De opbrengsten van de verkoop van BREAG worden gebruikt om biopsienaalden te kopen voor vrouwen in Pakistan die deze niet zelf kunnen bekostigen. Zo steunt BREAG deze vrouwen in hun strijd tegen borstkanker.

Deze tassen - ontworpen door Nederlandse tassenontwerpers Leontine Hagoort en Ilse Veening - zijn meer dan accessoires; ze vertegenwoordigen een statement en een oproep tot bewustwording van borstgezondheid. Ze hebben als doel gesprekken op gang te brengen over het belang van zelfonderzoek van je borsten als een vorm van zelfzorg en self-empowerment. En, tenslotte, dienen ze als eerbetoon aan alle kankerstrijders.

Name: Generation Generous
Description:
Generation Generous* is a radically generous lifestyle brand with one simple mission: every bag sold to generously benefit our planet and people.

Our first Generous Bag, a remake of the traditional paper grocery bag, was made entirely from 25 discarded recycled 50cl plastic bottles, which would otherwise end up in landfill or our oceans. It is exclusively ethically sourced, whilst with its purchase we are enabled to provide a child with access to a basic life need like CLEAN drinking WATER, nutritious FOOD, safe SHELTER, better HEALTH or EMPOWERMENT through education. By including a standard set donation into its cost we support carefully selected on-going projects around the world working to improve lives.

Our positive impact is and will be through practising and encouraging actions for recycling plastic waste, supporting fair labour and trade and giving people in need.

Name: MAOS Creations (Pvt) Ltd
Description:

By creating viable business opportunities within the handicraft sector, the initiative aims to uplift individuals from non productive earning sources, offering a pathway to prosperity and financial stability.
Beyond its local impact, MAOS Creation envisions elevating Sri Lanka's global standing. Through the international showcase of the nation's unique products, the initiative to strives to attract global recognition and appreciation. This not only benefits individual craftsmen but also contributes to the overall economic development of the country.

Name: Five Forty The Label
Description:
Five Forty The Label is an Austrian accessories brand, sustainably sourced and thoughtfully produced in Italy.

The Brand was established in 2021 by Victoria and Julia. Two best friends who share their passion for fashion and high-quality products. The brand takes its name from the founder's birthday. The combination of their birth dates emphasizes their friendship and the strong identity behind the brand. In essence, Five Forty means made with love.

To ensure quality standards, our collections are produced in a local manufactory in northern Italy, which is run over generations by the same family. Our manufacturing teams put a lot of care, passion, and knowledge into every piece produced.

Name: Maese Place
Description:
En Maese Place honramos el arte atemporal de la artesanía.
Creamos piezas exclusivas y de alta calidad que celebran la tradición, el oficio y la belleza de lo hecho a mano. Nuestra esencia nace del respeto por la herencia cultural y el impulso constante por descubrir, reinterpretar y preservar saberes que han pasado de generación en generación.

En un mundo dominado por la producción en masa, defendemos el valor de la creación lenta, la autenticidad y la elegancia que solo lo artesanal puede ofrecer. Cada pieza es una obra de arte, forjada con paciencia, cuidado y dedicación.

Quienes se acercan a Maese Place no solo buscan productos: buscan permanencia, belleza con propósito y un vínculo real con el origen de lo que eligen. Valoran el detalle, la historia y el carácter irrepetible de lo auténtico.

Name: Sappartout Group
Description: The Sappartout Group is a company that has made a name for itself in the clothing market by transforming the art of dressing into an innovative experience, unrivalled comfort and an identity rooted in African culture. Owner of the renowned Sappartout brand, the company transcends conventional shoe and clothing production by promoting a philosophy that celebrates not only the aesthetics and functionality of its products, but also the values of authenticity and dynamism present in fashion on the African continent. - History and Founding of the Sappartout Group Founded with the vision of connecting Africa's cultural heritage with contemporary global trends, the Sappartout Group began its journey with the firm intention of offering more than just footwear, clothing and accessories - the idea was to provide a unique experience, where each pair of shoes and each garment and accessory carried with it a piece of Africa's rich history, creativity and innovative spirit. From the outset, the brand sought to stand out in a highly competitive market, focusing on the excellence of the materials used, attention to detail in design and communication that valued African identity. The inspiration for the development of the products came from the cultural diversity and vibrant energy of the continent's streets and festivals. This influence is reflected both in the choice of colours and prints and in the way the models are designed to meet the needs of modern consumers without losing the link to traditional roots. Over the years, the Sappartout Group has consolidated its position as a benchmark for innovation, quality and style, establishing strategic partnerships and expanding its presence in international markets. At the centre of the company's success is a clear mission: to revolutionise the concept of dressing well, combining sophisticated design, extreme comfort and durability, while celebrating African culture.

Name: WAIWAI RIO
Description:
Waiwai Rio is a company based out of 121 R. Maria Quitéria - Sala 103 - Ipanema, Rio de Janeiro, Brazil.

Its essence is carioca, with bossa that comes from the foot in the sand and such. Its magnetism, essentially tropical. The focus is the roots. No wonder its name derives from the indigenous languages of Brazil. It's about Brazil.

Waiwai Rio was born in 2015 by the hands of designer Leo Neves – a handcrafted bag brand that extols the charms of its homeland with a fun twist. He himself is an eternal boy from Rio, a born esthete who strengthened this verve with a strong work as a stylist, in addition to years of design assistance for strong names in the Rio scene.

Adept at slow fashion, Waiwai favors national production. 

Its precious manufacturing processes culminate in design accessories that are the translation of a contemporary Brazil, mixing rustic raw materials with cutting-edge ones. 

The result are pieces of wood and straw with interferences of leather, silk, acrylic and metal.

Name: Lumuk
Description:
At Lumuk, we believe in the magic of small happiness - the kind that fits into a tote, arrives in a handwritten note, or sits quietly on your desk as a reminder to pause.

We’re a slow fashion and lifestyle brand rooted in thoughtful design, ethical practices, and the quiet power of everyday joy. What started as a journal and a tote has grown into a small-batch label making Pinterest-worthy totes, affirmation mirrors, and charming stationery , each piece blending form, feeling, and function.

We work with care, not haste; supporting local artisans, embracing fair pay, and keeping our processes transparent and intentional. From personalized packaging to products born from real customer feedback, everything we create is community-shaped and design-led.

 Our values
* Small-batch & sustainable
* Ethical, fair-pay production
* Handmade with heart (not haste)
* Rooted in community & real stories

We’re always open to  corporate gifting inquiries, creative collaborations, and thoughtful partnerships.

At Vifa, our core mission is to empower our business partners. Through our highly efficient customization manufacturing solution, we are committed to enhancing product innovation and supply chain capabilities, driving competitiveness in the ever-evolving fashion landscape.

Join hands with Vifa and experience a seamless blend of quality, innovation, and collaboration that defines the future of fashion accessory wholesaling.

Our product expertise includes drawstrings, woven labels, printed labels, elastic tapes, buttons, lace trims, pom-poms, gam tapes, and other customized accessories tailored to meet the requirements of knitwear, outerwear, denim, kids wear, sportswear, and fashion brands.

Backed by advanced machinery, skilled craftsmanship, and a strong quality-control system, we ensure that every accessory meets international standards for durability, design, and sustainability. Our team works closely with buyers, merchandisers, and sourcing leaders to deliver on-time solutions with competitive pricing and reliable service.

At Trims Terminal, we believe in building long-term partnerships by delivering value, consistency, and trust—one accessory at a time.

Description:

Our vision is to bring the soul of sustainability back to fashion, support livelihoods, reduce the carbon footprint, and inspire others to change, one sari at a time.

Name: KOKU Concept
Description:
KOKU Concept - a true lifestyle concept brand providing high-quality fashion and interior accessories, all handmade with love and care in Athens, Greece. 

The founders, the Kokkou sisters, were always fascinated by creativity and design from a young age, and pursued their passions at University: Maria studied Printed Textile Design both at Central Saint Martins and later at the Royal College of Art, and Ilena received her degrees in Product Design Development for the Fashion Industry & Accessories Design, as well as a diploma in Fashion Footwear from the London College of Fashion.
OUR VISION
The two sisters joined forces, with their personalities and experiences perfectly complementing each other, and with both sharing the same vision: to create practical everyday products that bring life and vibrancy to our homes and that everyone can carry around the city, on holiday or down to the beach. Inspired by growing up in Greece, they wanted fashionable and practical products to match their everyday life.

FASHION & INTERIORS OUR PASSION
The fashion accessories followed with their first Paris Fashion Week preview of the Spring Summer 2012 collection. Their interior and fashion collections are sold year after year in selected boutiques and department stores around the world, including USA, UK, France, Japan and the United Arab Emirates. Maria and Ilena decided on the name Koku Concept because it fusestogether everything that they love – fashion, accessories and interiors – into a true lifestyle concept brand, unique in its own category. Through Koku Concept, the sisters create special, clever and high-quality fashion and lifestyle accessories which have a humorous and playful personality and can easily both suit and reflect the character of their owners during different moments of their everyday lives.

A Burggo nasceu de uma vontade de crescer e criar. De ajudar as pessoas a se expressarem da maneira que quiserem. 

Através dos nossos produtos nós ajudamos nas transformações de estilo e de autoestima de milhões de pessoas. Hoje a Burggo é uma das maiores empresas de acessórios do Brasil.

Nossa missão é criar todos os dias, conceitos incríveis que se conectam com pessoas de todos os tipos.

Entre os nossos valores estão o respeito, a tradição e inovação. Através deles crescemos e aprendemos todos os dias, sempre buscando melhorar e trazer a melhor experiência possível.

Nossa missão é entregar soluções inovadoras, para que nossos clientes possam se expressar e se sentir representados através de seus próprios estilos.

Acreditamos que o respeito e a educação são indispensáveis nas relações humanas, não toleramos nenhum tipo de preconceito e discriminação de qualquer forma.

We help small and emerging watch brands grow — from zero to a fully realized product. Over the years, we’ve supported brands that started from scratch, as well as those that have been operating for 1-2 years but struggled with generic designs or supply chain issues.

At FOKSY, we make brand growth tangible. Our advantages include:

Low MOQ, high design value: Many of our designs start from just 50 pieces, making it easier for micro-brands to launch or test new collections.

Exclusive European patented designs: Every design is carefully curated and protected, ensuring your products stand out in the market.

Proven sales performance: Our designs are not only distinctive but also highly popular in international markets.

Unlike typical factories or trading companies, we act as a long-term manufacturing partner for watch brands, helping you turn creative ideas into manufacturable, scalable, and market-ready products.

Whether you are launching your first watch or revitalizing an existing line, FOKSY’s mission is simple: to make your brand growth faster, your designs unique, and your market impact stronger.

Let’s build thoughtful, beautiful products — together.

Name: Compass Greentech
Description:
Compass Greentech Limited was founded in 1984 and has been focused on the textile and clothing industry, providing one-stop accessory and packaging products for apparel brands and garment manufacturers. Currently, there are 5 manufacturing sites in China and Vietnam with a factory area of 68,000 square meters and employing approximately 1,500 people.  We have 10 sales representatives and merchandising offices located in different countries and regions around the globe.

We provide customers with comprehensive services from creative design, high hit-rate sampling, lean production manufacturing, warehousing and logistics to retail management. Our one-stop product range covers woven labels, printed labels, heat transfer labels, embroidered patches, buttons, tapes and cords, hangtags, stickers, woven bags, packaging boxes, fashion accessories, RFID application solutions and many other categories. Our customers are located all over the world, and we have provided products and services to over 300 apparel brands and more than 3,000 clothing manufacturers.

We uphold the sustainable development concept of reducing, reusing, recycling, and replacing, injecting sustainable development elements into product design, production materials, production processes, and production environments. and minimizing environmental impact, We provide customers with a full range of sustainable product and service solutions, including products with certifications such as FSC, FAMA, GOTS, GRS, SMETA, OEKO-TEX 100. At the same time, we also collaborate with many customers to promote digitization in the design, manufacturing, display, promotion, and sales processes, and making us a leading enterprise in digital application in the industry.

Empowering brands, elevating clothing, and becoming one of the most trusted partners for customers is a continuous pursuit of Compass members.  We hope to work closely with our partners in promoting the sustainable development of the fashion industry.

Name: Fashion Research and Development Space
Description:
Fashion Research and Development Space (FRnDS) is a pioneering company at the forefront of the fashion industry, dedicated to innovation and excellence in design. With a comprehensive approach to the fashion lifecycle, FRnDS specializes in six key areas :

1.  Sampling - FRnDS creates high-quality prototypes that serve as the initial step in bringing fashion concepts to life, ensuring designs are both practical and stylish before mass production.

2.  Finishes - The Company excels in providing a variety of finishing techniques, from basic to advanced, which add value and distinction to each garment, enhancing durability and aesthetic appeal.

3.  Forecasting  - With a keen eye on market trends and consumer behavior, FRnDS offers forecasting services that help clients stay ahead of the curve, ensuring their collections are timely, relevant, and desirable.

4.  Design - At the heart of FRnDS is a design philosophy that marries creativity with functionality. The design team works tirelessly to produce innovative and trend-setting pieces that resonate with consumers.

5.  Research & Development (R&D) - The R&D department is the engine of innovation at FRnDS, constantly exploring new materials, techniques, and technologies to revolutionize the fashion industry.

6.  Embellishments - Recognizing the importance of details, FRnDS provides an array of embellishments that add a unique touch to garments, setting them apart in a competitive market.

Together, these six pillars support FRnDS's mission to deliver exceptional fashion experiences, driving the industry forward through continuous innovation and a commitment to excellence.

 Qualified Design & Sales Teams: Our Barcelona team is composed of highly skilled designers and sales specialists, who work closely with clients to develop exclusive, trend-driven collections that captivate today’s fashion-forward consumer.

Name: Street Stitches
Description:
Street Stitches | Stitching Style, Crafting Culture

Welcome to Street Stitches, where street fashion isn’t just a trend—it’s a lifestyle. We’re not your average clothing brand; we’re a movement. At the intersection of bold design and urban culture, we deliver more than just clothing. We create statements.

Our collection is a perfect fusion of raw street style with modern flair. Whether it’s our effortlessly cool T-shirts, cozy yet edgy hoodies, rugged jeans, or statement-making jackets, each piece is designed to reflect the rhythm of the streets—fast, fearless, and always evolving.

What We Offer:

T-Shirts & Hoodies: Crafted for those who value comfort without sacrificing style. Every stitch tells a story.
Jackets & Jeans: Built to last, with attitude to match. From casual days to late-night vibes, we’ve got you covered.
Accessories: Elevate your look with caps, beanies, belts, and more, because the details matter.
Sustainable Streetwear: We’re not just here to make clothes; we’re here to make a difference. With high-quality materials and ethical production, our pieces are built to last and made with care.
At Street Stitches, every collection is an expression of freedom, creativity, and the art of self-expression. Our mission? To empower the trendsetters, the innovators, and the rule-breakers who don’t just follow fashion—they define it.

Ready to level up your wardrobe? Step into the world of Street Stitches and wear your style, your way.

Name: Art'Mossa
Description:
ArtMossa est une marque d'articles de décoration et d'accessoires en tissus, créés et confectionnés au Sénégal, par des talents de chez nous et composés en partie ou totalement de matières locales. Cette entreprise qui tient son nom du Sérère "A mossa" signifiant "c'est beau"; est le fruit :
- d'une passion pour l'artisanat
- d'un défi: un label de qualité made in Sénégal
- d'un combat: celui du consommer local et du faire connaître nos talents au delà de nos frontières
- d'un rêve: créer de la richesse, de l'emploi et des opportunités là où nous sommes et nous irons.

Nous l'assumons cette folie ou plutôt ambition saine et réfléchie de concevoir, produire et commercialiser des oeuvres qui répondent à des standards de qualité irréprochables, tant en terme de finition que d'esthétique. Voici notre défi!

Nous nous réjouissons à chaque commande passée auprès d'un artisan tisserand à Colobane, d'un couturier à Saly ou à Reubeuss, auprès des femmes tisseuses d'objet de vanerie à LamLam ou encore des maliennes vendeuses de perles ou autres pièces d'art. C'est une satisfaction de créer des opportunités de création de richesses et de mettre en valeur tant de trésors. Voici notre motivation!

Nous rêvons de voir ces créations côtoyer ou tutoyer  les objets de décoration et accessoires de mode venus du monde entier ou encore ces articles vendus à travers les vitrines de grandes enseignes mondiales, à l'étranger. Voici notre ambition en 2023!

Name: ROBERTO POGGIALI di Gloria Poggiali
Description:
Roberto, founder in 1971 of the Florentine brand that bears his name, after 50 years of experience in the goldsmith sector, decides to accept the challenge of his daughter Gloria in bringing the various goldsmith craftsmen also to the service of fashion accessories.

It is Gloria who, driven by the desire to innovate and the passion for bijoux and fashion accessories, creates collections exclusively Made in Florence with a contemporary design and using the most sought after materials in the sector.

She creates collections aimed at a young audience and always in step with trends, where quality standards and attention to detail, as usual for artisan jewelry, never fail.

To date, Roberto Poggiali combines the creation of precious jewelery collections, bijoux lines and accessories (for shoes, bags, belts and furniture items) created by unusual combinations of precious and non-precious, alternative and unconventional materials, such as leather, wood, rhodoid, marble and glass.

Through a perfect combination of traditional and technological methods, the company felt ready to take on another new challenge; that of offering a service for third parties in order to respond in a unique and original way to the different requests of other brands in the sector and to the commissions of its customers, making the professionalism available, derived from fifty years of experience in the sector.

This is how the technique of goldsmith craftsmen evolves their soul to new technologies, infusing an authentic message into the precious product such as: “you can look to the future without losing the concreteness of the tradition acquired over the years of experience of our craftsmen, legacy very important to hand down and keep ”.

Name: The Green Sling
Description:
The Green Sling is the solution to a common problem faced by runners and active individuals: what to do with that extra layer or gear you don’t want to leave behind. Whether you're hitting the pavement or working out, The Green Sling offers a practical and stylish way to carry your essentials without the bounce or bulk.

Designed with sustainability in mind, The Green Sling is made from upcycled leggings, helping keep elastane out of landfills and reducing race-day garment waste. With one spacious compartment for an extra layer and an additional secure compartment for your personal items, the Green Sling provides a minimalist yet functional solution for active lifestyles.

At The Green Sling, we are committed to reducing waste and promoting circularity. We actively seek partnerships with brands to repurpose their old or damaged leggings inventory, turning waste into valuable products. By collaborating with us, brands can responsibly repurpose their unsellable or excess stock, helping reduce landfill waste and support a more sustainable future.

Launched in October 2024, The Green Sling is proudly manufactured in Houston, Texas. Experience the perfect balance of convenience, comfort, and eco-conscious design.

Somos una marca que con el tiempo hemos adquirido
una identidad clara. Somos autenticidad, cuidamos la calidad y el detalle de cada material.

Somos artesanía en movimiento. Nuestros diseños son fabricados 100% MADE IN SPAIN. Existe una amplia lista de razones que hacen de DALVI la marca que es hoy, capaz de innovar sin traicionar nunca su identidad, donde PASADO y FUTURO se unen para crear una marca ATEMPORAL.

Promovemos el compromiso hacia nuevas formas de ver y entender la moda. La base de nuestros accesorios es la creatividad. Imaginamos y creamos distintas líneas, texturas y patrones para elevar un complemento común dotándolo de personalidad y originalidad.

Es importante para nosotros la durabilidad, ya que la calidad es el único camino para conseguir un producto que perdure en el tiempo.

Our accessories are proudly produced in Brazil through artisanal processes that combine technology, skilled craftsmanship, and attention to every detail. Each piece is handcrafted in up to 8 production stages, ensuring a polished finish, ergonomic design, and lasting strength.

Name: INSÉRIF
Description:
A name for most is their defining feature, a sense of identity, the first thing they learn to write. For millennia, people have etched their names onto walls, desks, and belongings to feel connection, individuality, and ownership. At INSÉRIF, our
mission is to provide that same sense of ownership over luxury.

What began with bespoke personalised lifestyle apparel and accessories naturally evolved when our founder, Liam, set out to create something more meaningful. When his wife searched for luxury, personalized accessories and found the market lacking, Liam saw an opportunity - to raise the bar on quality, design, and craftsmanship in the world of bespoke accessories.

From the words insert and serif, INSÉRIF was born. We take bespoke, hand-printed personalisation and blend it with sophisticated design, high quality materials and a timeless aesthetic.

Since our launch, INSÉRIF has grown from a personal gesture to a global brand, proudly featured in VOGUE, GQ, and carried by those who understand that true luxury lies in the details.

Name: Via Lorenzo
Description:
Depuis 2000, Via Lorenzo est une entreprise à taille humaine qui fabrique et propose différents accessoires de mode comme des chapeaux, des foulards ou des gants pour nos partenaires, aussi bien en France qu’à l’international.

A la clientèle d’origine, essentiellement basée des grossistes et centrales textile, Via Lorenzo s’étend sur une collection plus haut de gamme destinée aux chapelleries.

Pour faire face à la problématique de la taille unique dans les chapeaux importés, Via Lorenzo introduit, en 2012, la première collection de chapeaux réglables en France. C’est un succès fulgurant qui propulse rapidement la société comme un acteur majeur dans la profession. Fort de ce succès, Via Lorenzo améliora le système de réglage existant.

Collection Anti-UV, nouveaux matériaux imperméables, Magic clips, Via Lorenzo vous invite à partager les dernières innovations et tendances du marché.

Name: Future District
Description: At Future District, Eyewear & Fragrances Solutions, we redefine the way businesses dabble into the eyewear and fragrance sectors in search of significantly greater revenues. We specialize in providing comprehensive end-to-end solutions tailored to the unique needs of fashion brands, boutique retailers, and large corporations alike. With an unwavering commitment to excellence, innovation, and personalized service, we seamlessly integrate consultancy, manufacturing, and delivery to elevate your brand's essence.

Name: FOR PEOPLE WHO CARE
Description:
FOR PEOPLE WHO CARE steht für eine neue Art, Dinge zu machen: regional, fair und mit echter Wertschätzung für Mensch, Umwelt und Material.

Wir sind ein Tiroler Unternehmen, das nachhaltige Taschen, Rucksäcke und Accessoires herstellt – von Hand und mit Verantwortung. Unsere Produkte sind vegan, plastikfrei und fair gefertigt, direkt in unserer Werkstatt in Wattens (Tirol).

Was uns antreibt, ist der Wunsch, die Textilindustrie zu verändern.
Wir wollen zeigen, dass hochwertige, alltagstaugliche Produkte nicht auf Kosten anderer entstehen müssen, sondern im Gegenteil: Mehr Wert schaffen, wo andere nur Preis sehen.

Unsere Materialien stammen aus verantwortungsvollen Quellen, unsere Designs sind zeitlos, und unsere Produktion schafft Arbeitsplätze in der Region.
So entsteht Qualität, die bleibt und eine Marke, die Haltung zeigt.

 Unsere Schwerpunkte:
	•	Nachhaltige Taschen & Accessoires
	•	Produktion in Tirol
	•	Vegane & plastikfreie Materialien
	•	Design für Hotellerie & Unternehmen
	•	Faire, regionale Wertschöpfung

Name: OHIRI
Description:
O H I R I / ɔːhiːriː , n. , from the Bete (Côte d’Ivoire) :

ESTABLISHED IN 2012, WITH ITS BASE SPREAD ACROSS PARIS AND ABIDJAN, OHIRI IS A CREATIVE STUDIO THAT EXISTS TO BE A BRIDGE BETWEEN ANCIENT ARTS AND CRAFTS AND THE CONTEMPORARY LANDSCAPE.

We seek a whole and comprehensive understanding of the aesthetics & symbolism of body ornamentation made by ancient cultures. 

Led by creative director Akébéhi Kpolo, OHIRI reinterprets these codes for today, using jewellery as a platform not only for adornment but for object art. 

Over time, we want to take our bridging practice beyond the cultural histories of the African continent into other sites of interest at the intersection of ancient art/crafts & fine jewellery.

Name: Shovon Gallery
Description:
Welcome to Shovon Gallery! Your one-stop-shop for unique, Handcrafted products that will add a touch of beauty and elegance to your life. We specialize in creating handmade Handicrafts, including Artificial Floral Jewelry Sets, Antique Jewelry Sets, Nikka Pens, Embroidery Hoop Art, and many more. Each item is carefully crafted with love and attention to detail, ensuring that our customers receive only the highest quality products.

Our artificial Floral Jewelry Sets are perfect for adding a touch of elegance to any occasion. Whether you're attending a wedding, a formal event, or simply looking for a way to elevate your everyday look, our Floral Jewelry sets are the perfect choice. Each set is carefully crafted with love and attention to detail, ensuring that every piece is unique and beautiful. Whether you're looking for a statement piece for a special occasion or a subtle piece for everyday wear, we have something for you.

Our Antique Jewelry Sets are steeped in history, tradition, and culture. These sets are often handcrafted with intricate designs and details that reflect the craftsmanship of a bygone era.

We also offer Nikka Pens, which are perfect for anyone who loves to write in style. Each pen is carefully crafted with attention to detail, ensuring that they are not only beautiful but also functional and practical. Our pens are perfect for gifting or for adding a touch of sophistication to your own writing routine.

Finally, our Embroidery Hoop Art is the perfect way to add a touch of creativity and artistry to your home decor. Each piece is handcrafted with love, and is sure to add a unique and personal touch to any room.

At Shovon Gallery, we are dedicated to providing our customers with beautiful, high-quality products that they will love and cherish for years to come. Thank you for visiting our page, and we look forward to sharing our beautiful products with you!

Description:
Siamo distributori di microfibre, salpa, carte veline e carte speciali per il packaging, suede per rinforzo e microsuede per fodere. In sintesi, di tutto ciò che serve ad una pelletteria o ad un calzaturificio ai fini produttivi. 

Disponiamo di un Reparto Accoppiatura, dotato di calandre moderne per lavorare vari materiali e applicare soluzioni termoplastiche, e di un Reparto Cartotecnica capace di realizzare risme di carta a registro dai formati personalizzati e articoli sostenibili (come buste, tubolari e materiali in cellulosa) per favorire il passaggio dalla plastica alla carta. 
Un laboratorio interno garantisce il controllo qualità costante dei prodotti.

L’attenzione alla sostenibilità è al centro del nostro lavoro, con lo sviluppo della linea Organeah, che raccoglie tutti i prodotti con una forte vocazione a minimizzare l’impatto ambientale.

La nostra mail: dicart@dicart.it

Name: Resera
Description:
Resera is an ethical jewelry brand that employs and empowers women survivors overcoming homelessness, domestic violence, incarceration, and addiction. Beyond stable employment and living wages, we help provide transitional housing, career and life counseling, financial training, and community events for our employees, whom we affectionately call "Makers." Our goal is that each Maker will "graduate" into a home and job of her own within 12-24 months. 

We also take our environmental impact seriously. We handcraft each piece in our Nashville studio using an advanced form of manufacturing that allows us to melt and pour 100% recycled sterling silver. This process gives us total control of our supply chain, cutting out questionable suppliers and unethical labor practices. 

We want our customers to smile every time they put on their jewelry. That's why we design our pieces to evoke stories, emotions, and ideals that can be worn proudly throughout the day and gifted for any occasion. 

Find out more at:
https://resera.com
Instagram: @_resera
Facebook: @reserajewelry

Name: SafyarnCraft

SafyarnCraft is a hijabi-owned crochet brand based in Lagos, specializing in the creation of exquisite and luxurious bags for all occasions. With over 150 bags crafted to perfection, SafyarnCraft has earned multiple awards, including Entrepreneur of the Year, Best Crafter, and Student Entrepreneur of the Year.

Beyond creating beautiful bags, we’re passionate about giving back. We offer training to young girls and engage in community service, helping others not only appreciate the art of crocheting but also learn how to make a living from it.

Our Mission: We elevate our customers’ style, elegance, and confidence, empowering them to walk into any room knowing they own the spotlight.

Our Vision: To craft high-quality, unique bags with meticulously detailed stitches, setting a new standard for luxury crochet accessories.

At SafyarnCraft, there’s something for everyone. Experience excellence—give us a try today!

Name: Bavoom Fábrica
Description:
A Bavoom Fábrica é uma empresa especializada em acessórios têxteis, com ampla experiência no mercado. Somos a maior fábrica do segmento no Estado do Ceará e temos atuação em todo o Brasil. 

Temos forte operação no mercado private label, levando acessórios de alta qualidade para marcas nos mais diversos segmentos. Fabricamos bonés, viseiras, bucket hats, mochilas e bolsas em geral. 

Nosso objetivo é revolucionar a fabricação de acessórios têxteis, atuando em todas as frentes das necessidades dos nossos clientes. Oferecemos atendimento presencial em Fortaleza/CE e/ou online, por meio da nossa equipe comercial.

+ de 180 mil bonés/ano 
+ de 30 mil mochilas e bolsas/ano 
and counting...

Name: Nichole By Haguanna
Description:
Founded in 2010 in Lagos Nigeria, Nichole by Haguanna (NH) is a 100% African brand known for bespoke luxury, handcrafted unique bags and  accessories.


The love for style and creativity,  sprinkled with passion is the heart of what makes NH beat to its own drum. With collections that span all seasons, ages, and  gender the NH brand stands tall and proud in Africa. Nichole by Haguanna is known for its utilisation of specialised materials to create bags, purses, straps and accessories of all shapes and sizes, ensuring all her customers are happy. Nichole by Haguanna’s ‘back to front’ weaving of materials by hand, to create the famous ‘Nora’ Straps and Handles has opened the NH clientele to a whole new world of styling. 


NH constantly tries to outdo itself and has started to educate the African market in the areas of upcycling leftover material for other uses as well as getting involved in  children empowerment through training. Additionally, by opening herself up to collaboration, NH has been able to travel  the continent with a ‘bags-eye-view!’ to future trends and opportunities.

Name: Intreccio Vivo
Description:
Intreccio Vivo è un’azienda giovane che recupera un’arte antica e valorizza le competenze della migliore manifattura italiana, interloquendo con aziende e brand di moda, arredo e design, interessate a sviluppare prodotti e soluzioni che abbiano delle componenti intrecciate.

Lavoriamo materie prime naturali, con metodi antichi e processi ecologici. Midollino, vimini, giunco e bambù si intrecciano all’occorrenza con corda e pelle provenienti da realtà artigianali limitrofe, e sviluppiamo soluzioni che dalla prototipazione arrivano alla realizzazione del prodotto intrecciato.

Name: Marko Bardelli
Description:
Welcome to Marko Bardelli, where luxury and accessibility come together. With over 30 years of expertise, we design high-quality leather accessories that embody timeless elegance and modern style.

Our products are crafted by skilled artisans using the finest leathers sourced from around the globe. Each piece reflects meticulous attention to detail, ensuring a perfect balance of durability and sophistication.

Whether you’re dressing for a formal occasion or enhancing your everyday look, Marko Bardelli’s leather belts are the ideal complement to your personal style.

As we expand into North America, we are committed to making luxury accessible. We deliver exceptional value through products that never compromise on quality or craftsmanship. From the moment you explore our collection to the day you unwrap your order, we strive to provide a superior experience.

Discover the legacy of Marko Bardelli, and let us be part of your style journey.

Name: Capsule Collective International
Description:
Welcome to Capsule Collective Footwear, where big ideas about footwear were born in a tiny cubicle on 37th Street in NYC back in 2018. Picture this: a cramped space, questionable office lighting, and awkward bruh culture at the communal WeWork beer tap.

Capsule Collective is the brainchild of our founder, Marina Levine, who, tired of the footwear drama and costs associated with big sourcing companies, decided to kick off something bold. She teamed up with Max Footwear Factory Group, shoe manufacturer partner in crime, to bring true footwear expertise to the table.
From design to export, from branding to merchandising, from creating blingy stilettos to leading in sustainable sneaker development, Marina has been there, done that. And guess what? Her deep hands-on experience benefits everyone in the footwear game—wholesale customers, retail customers, and even the hardworking folks in the factory base who need a fair trade advocate. We know private label shoe manufacturers better than anyone else.

Since our humble beginnings in that WeWork cubicle, Capsule Collective has evolved into a small-but-mighty team helping you navigate often opaque waters as related to wholesale shoes suppliers. We've sprinkled our footwear expertise on brands ranging from the colossal to the not-so-huge. So, whether you're a fashion giant or a boutique brand, value big box retail or salon floor, join us on this shoemaking adventure, where we take our work seriously but not ourselves. Cheers to happy feet and even happier shoe stories!

Name: Boulbar
Description:
Boulbar c'est l'accessoire echo-responsable avec une histoire. 

C’est avant tout la fusion de l’art avec l’engagement d’un mode de vie plus responsable. C’est aussi travailler avec des matières naturelles, confortables pour les transformer en produit de qualité. 

Chaque écharpe Boulbar est pensée comme un tableau, un tableau qui devient tissu, et un tissu qui vient vous envelopper, vous réconforter mais aussi
pimenter votre look.

Name: LLORCA
Description:
LLORCA est marque française de vêtements et d'accessoires techniques uniques, où esthétisme et fonctionnalité se rencontrent pour atteindre l'excellence. 
Fondée à Saint-Ouen, notre marque se distingue par son engagement envers l'artisanat de qualité et le respect de l'environnement. Chez LLORCA, chaque pièce est conçue et fabriquée à la main par des artisans passionnés, garantissant non seulement une qualité irréprochable mais aussi une touche personnelle qui rend nos produits uniques.

Nous sommes fiers d'utiliser exclusivement des tissus upcyclés, une démarche écoresponsable visant à réduire le gaspillage textile. L'upcycling consiste à transformer des matériaux ou produits en fin de vie en nouveaux produits de qualité ou d'utilité supérieure. Cette approche nous permet de donner une seconde vie aux tissus, tout en créant des vêtements et accessoires à la fois esthétiques et fonctionnels.

Chez LLORCA, nous croyons que l'esthétisme et la fonctionnalité doivent aller de pair. C'est pourquoi nous mettons un point d'honneur à ce que chaque création soit aussi agréable à regarder qu'à utiliser. Nos collections reflètent cette philosophie, offrant aux amateurs de mode et de technicité des pièces qui ne font aucun compromis sur le style ou la performance.

Name: Chantal
Description:
Chantal es una marca 100% vintage, vendemos mercadería única y sin uso. 

Los productos que vendemos fueron guardados por más de 20 años, por lo tanto, su stock es super limitado.

Todas las cosas pertenecían a una marca familiar llamada "Chanthal", se dedicaba a la venta mayorista unos 25 años atrás. En 2021 decidimos revivir esta hermosa marca y terminar de vender todos los productos que quedaron almacenados. 

Honrando el nombre hemos decidido llamarnos "Chantal".

Send us a DM to discuss something unique, comfortable and spectacular for your feet.

Click the three dots after the message button to visit our store on IG.

Name: The GreenHyde
Description:
At GreenHyde, we believe luxury is defined by intention, innovation, and respect for the planet. We craft premium, plant-based alternatives from Banana, Tomato, Cactus, and Eucalyptus. Our materials blend elegance, durability, and eco-conscious craftsmanship to offer products that feel as good as they look.

 Gifting with Purpose
Our handcrafted corporate gifts are designed to leave more than a lasting impression — they embody a commitment to elegance, responsibility, and positive change.

 Soulful Creations, Inspired by Nature
GreenHyde goes beyond fashion, blending spirituality and sustainability. From meditation accessories to wellness essentials, our pieces are thoughtfully designed to inspire balance, mindfulness, and connection to nature.

 Sustainability Without Compromise
We’re not stopping at leather alternatives. Soon, we’ll introduce sustainable fabrics, ensuring every detail — from the outer material to the inner lining — supports our vision of a more sustainable, compassionate world.

GreenHyde isn’t just about products — also it’s a movement. A movement toward a future where luxury uplifts the planet, honor animals, and nurtures the soul.

 GreenHyde: Because true luxury feels good — inside and out.

Name: Ultra Limited
Description:
Ultra Limited è un brand italiano di eyewear che porta l’eccellenza dell’artigianalità Made in Italy nel mondo dell'ottica.

Creiamo montature uniche e irripetibili, realizzate a mano attraverso la stratificazione di acetati pregiati e combinazioni cromatiche esclusive, impossibili da replicare.
Ogni modello richiede oltre 40 giorni di lavorazione artigianale, un processo che unisce maestria tecnica, ricerca estetica e una visione creativa che rende ogni occhiale un pezzo unico. Le nostre palette colore si rinnovano costantemente, dando vita a pattern e sfumature che nascono una sola volta: nessuna serie, nessuna copia, nessun doppione.

La nostra missione: valorizzare l’unicità in un mondo sempre più standardizzato. Vogliamo offrire a chi ci sceglie, un eyewear che non rappresenti solo uno stile ma la propria identità, un accessorio che esiste una sola volta, proprio come chi lo indossa.

--

Ultra Limited is an Italian eyewear brand that brings the excellence of Made in Italy craftsmanship to the world of optical design.

We create unique and unrepeatable frames, handmade through the layering of fine acetates and exclusive colour combinations that cannot be reproduced.
Each model requires over 40 days of craftsmanship, a process that combines technical mastery, aesthetic research and a creative vision that transforms each pair of glasses into a unique piece.
Our colour palettes are constantly evolving, giving life to patterns and shades that exist only once: no series, no copies, no duplicates.

Our mission: to celebrate uniqueness in an increasingly standardised world.
We want to offer those who choose us eyewear that expresses not only a style, but an identity, an accessory that exists only once, just like the person who wears it.

Name: Feel Ink

Name: Supra Apparel and Fashions Pvt Ltd
Description:
Supra Apparel and Fashions Pvt Ltd is a premium fashion gear manufacturing company based in Bangalore. We specialize in crafting a range of high-quality products including laptop backpacks, ladies bags, pouches, gifting products for the corporate sector, BTS backpacks for kids, pet accessories, and delivery bags for logistics and food delivery sectors.

Despite being founded in the challenging year of 2020, Supra emerged as a resilient player in the fashion gear manufacturing industry. With over 40 years of experience, we bring unparalleled expertise to the table. Our proficiency lies in sourcing, setting up robust supply chains, and manufacturing high-quality products right here in Bangalore.

We are proud to collaborate with some of the top companies in the country, including industry giants like Flipkart and Jockey (Page Industries Limited). Additionally, we support numerous startups, contributing to their success by providing top-notch fashion gear solutions.

At Supra, we are committed to delivering excellence in every product. Our dedication to quality and design shines through in every stylish laptop backpack or innovative pet accessory we create.

If you're interested in exploring the world of fashion gear with Supra Apparel and Fashions Pvt Ltd, feel free to contact us at +91 96325 39463 or email sukesh@thescubes.com. We'd love to discuss how our products can be tailored to meet your unique needs. Thank you for considering Supra Apparel and Fashions Pvt Ltd, where style meets resilience and quality.

Name: Bonding
Description:
Hoy en día estamos atravesando una problemática mundial: La contaminación por plásticos. Año a año terminan en el océano alrededor de 8 millones de toneladas de este material, afectando directamente al ecosistema marino y por consiguiente a nosotros. 

A raíz de este problema, fundamos BOND, un "vínculo" con el medio ambiente, ofreciendo una nueva generación en diseño sustentable.  Bajo nuestro lema, "Yo abro los ojos", te queremos mostrar una nueva forma de ver el mundo porque entre todos, el cambio es posible. 

Creemos firmemente que una economía circular y una sociedad sin desperdicios es posible ya que el desperdicio es tal cuando no se aprovecha. Por eso estamos construyendo lo que creemos es El futuro de la fabricación.

Seamos el cambio. Sumate a nuestra iniciativa para que juntos trabajemos en un futuro más sostenible.

Name: EOE Eyewear
Description:
EOE was born on a bright and snowy spring day in 2010, during a snowmobile ride in the small village of Ammarnäs in Swedish Lapland. The crisp air and the scenery over the snow covered mountains gave Erik and Emilia Lindmark an idea; to create a collection of eyewear that combined the elegance and simplicity of Scandinavian design with the barren beauty of the nature in Swedish Lapland. The heritage from the Swedish north is reflected both in the names and colors of the eyewear, not least in the details and materials brought from the wild and beautiful nature.

We were first on the market with launching a collection of sustainable eyewear, without any phthalates that normally is used in the production of glasses. Today, EOE is the leading sustainable eyewear brand in Scandinavia, and all eyewear is sustainably produced and completely recyclable and biodegradable.

Our eyewear is designed in Swedish Lapland and then carefully handmade in the Italian Alps. The ambition is to one day be able to both design and produce every piece in the north of Sweden, where the idea of EOE once was born. Until then, the Swedish mountains are replaced with the Alps, and the work from EOE headquarters focuses primarily on making the rest of the production even greener. But for that matter, never to compromise with neither design nor quality of the eyewear.

Name: Bottega Chilometri Zero (Palmisle s.r.l.)
Description:
Bottega Chilometri Zero, an Italian fashion brand established in 2006, is located in Pove del Grappa, 5 km from Bassano del Grappa.
With the passage of time, it has risen as a nexus for the "zero-mile" supply chain, harmoniously uniting globally-inspired clothing with local production. 

Our clothing company emphasizes local production and high-quality fabrics. We operate under three distinct brands: Madsøn, dedicated to our men's line; 4.10, focusing on our women's line; and Madsøn Kids, catering to our children's collection.

In our collections, you will encounter the values of our "zero- mile" supply chain: sustainability in recycled fabrics and low environmental impact production methods, which use low water consumption dyeing techniques and certified eco-friendly colours.

For us, being a sustainable company isn't just an end goal, but first and foremost, a tangible and shared value. Since 2006, we have proudly embarked on this journey of research and innovation.

Name: High Level Fashion
Description:
As the leading African athleisure brand, our vision is to become a global fashion leader, committed to empowering individuals and making a positive impact.

High Level Fashion embodies elegance, believing fashion is an expression of identity, confidence, and aspiration. We empower individuals to embrace their unique style, reflecting our values of aspiration, ambition, excellence, empowerment, and creativity.

"High Level", Africa’s premier athleisure brand is more than just a brand. It’s a lifestyle for trailblazers, achievers, and visionaries who dare to make a meaningful impact. When you wear "High Level", you embrace the mindset to achieve, inspire, and elevate.

We are dedicated to quality and using environmentally friendly materials. Our garments are beautiful, durable, and comfortable. 

Join us to elevate your everyday style the High Level way. 

High Level – Elevate Your Style, Elevate Your Life…

Name: Lunettes Grasset
Description:
Capter les tendances, proposer un portefeuille de griffes appréciées des consommateurs.

Nous partageons avec nos équipes l’ADN de Lunettes Grasset Associés autour de deux valeurs essentielles :

La première est historique : LUNETIER ! Nous sommes lunetiers depuis 4 générations, nous créons et proposons chaque année plus de 1000 modèles à nos clients opticiens en France et à l’International.

La seconde est plus contemporaine : MARKETEUR ! Depuis plus de 25 ans, nous cultivons l’idée que la lunette est aussi un accessoire de mode et qu’à ce titre elle est perçue par les consommateurs comme un élément essentiel de la panoplie des Marques grand public.

Notre portefeuille de marque comprend : Eden Park, IKKS, Seiko, New Balance, Agnès B et Bensimon.

Description: I&S was founded in 2004 in Rignano sull'Arno, near Florence, in the heart of Tuscany. We are specialised in acrylic processing for fashion and luxury world. We realise everyday windows displays, visual tools and fashion accessories for the main international brands.

Name: Maga Develop
Description:
En nuestra fábrica tradicional de Elche elaboramos artesanalmente y bajo los más exigentes estándares de calidad espardeñas, zuecos de madera y calzado de construcción Strobel. 
Nos caracterizamos por ofrecer un servicio nacional e internacional personalizado a grandes firmas de moda. Nos adaptamos a tus necesidades y desarrollamos tus colecciones desde cero. 
Fabricamos en España y enviamos nuestro calzado artesano a todo el mundo.
Trabajamos con enfoques sostenibles a través de métodos responsables, que se traduce en productos
que reflejan nuestros valores éticos y responsabilidad empresarial. 
Nuestros zapatos están hechos y cosidos a mano para aumentar la durabilidad y el confort, así como para minimizar el uso de maquinaria industrial y garantizar la sostenibilidad.


In our traditional factory in Elche we handcraft espadrilles, wooden clogs and Strobel construction footwear under the most demanding quality standards.
We are known for offering a personalized national and international service to large fashion brands. We adapt to your needs and develop your collections from scratch.
We manufacture in Spain and send our artisan footwear all over the world.
We work with sustainable approaches through responsible methods, which translates into products
that reflect our ethical values and corporate responsibility.
Our shoes are made and sewn by hand to increase durability and comfort, as well as to minimize the use of industrial machinery and ensure sustainability.

Name: Milano Bags
Description:
Somos una marca internacional que se produce en el Perú. Contamos con una trayectoria de 25 años dedicados a la industria de la moda en artículos de cuero.
Hoy, la marca cuenta con puntos de venta dentro y fuera del Perú, incluyendo la tienda de ventas online. Sus productos se ofrecen en tiendas y boutiques de distintos países como: Bolivia, Canadá, Costa Rica, Ecuador, EE.UU., varias islas del Caribe y otros países de Europa y África.
Contamos con colecciones de zapatos, carteras y accesorios elaborados en cuero natural. Contamos una historia en cada colección que lanzamos. El resultado: productos sofisticados de calidad y cualidades internacionales que se mantienen a la vanguardia de la tendencia de la moda internacional.

Name: Jordache Enterprises, Inc.
Description: Welcome to Jordache

Name: De Grimm
Description:
Créée en 1945 à Bordeaux par Marguerite Massip, De Grimm incarne l’héritage d’une maroquinerie artisanale transmise sur quatre générations. Ancrée dans la tradition et l’excellence, la maison a su évoluer tout en restant fidèle à ses racines bordelaises.

Nos valeurs et notre héritage

L’art de vivre bordelais, les rituels de transmission féminine et la précision des gestes sont au cœur de notre identité :

	•	L’art de vivre bordelais : Inspirée par l’élégance et l’excellence de Bordeaux, De Grimm s’inscrit dans la tradition de cette région renommée pour son raffinement. Nos créations reflètent l’épicurisme et le bon goût bordelais, alliant patrimoine et innovation pour offrir des pièces intemporelles qui incarnent un style de vie distingué.

	•	Les rituels de transmission : Depuis ses origines, De Grimm valorise la transmission familiale, un héritage qui a toujours trouvé un écho particulier dans la relation mère-fille. Aujourd’hui dirigée par Fabienne Massip, la maison perpétue cette tradition, où la passation d’un sac De Grimm, de mère en fille, symbolise plus qu’un simple accessoire, mais un véritable lien générationnel. Cet héritage familial renforce également l’engagement de la marque pour la défense des savoir-faire d’excellence et l’entreprenariat au féminin.

	•	Les gestes d’artisan : Depuis 2016, Olivier Massip, compagnon du devoir en maroquinerie de luxe avec plus de 35 ans d’expérience, a mené la maison De Grimm vers une nouvelle ère d’excellence artisanale. Sous son impulsion, l’atelier de Bordeaux s’est affirmé comme un lieu de création où chaque pièce est réalisée avec une minutie exemplaire, dans le respect des techniques traditionnelles.

Aujourd’hui, De Grimm continue de croître en honorant ses racines bordelaises et en créant des pièces iconiques qui allient tradition et authenticité.

Name: Clan srl
Description:
Clan has been producing quality technical clothing for more than thirty years.

Founded in 1992 in Castiglione delle Stiviere by the Brunello family, over time Clan has specialized in beachwear and the production of outdoor sports clothing, made with high-performance materials.

Today Clan designs and produces the collections of some of the best brands in the sector, such as Navigare, Scuola Nautica Italiana, Zeybra, Who*s Who Milano and Oxyde, and collaborates with several brands known throughout the world, including Diesel, Kappa, Puma , Gallo, Pompea, Golden Point, Zara, El Corte Ingles.

Name: Jexlin Designs
Description:
Introducing Jexlin Designs: Redefining Genderfluid Streetwear Accessories

At Jexlin Designs, we believe that self-expression knows no boundaries, and fashion should reflect the diverse identities that make us who we are. We're not just a startup – we're a movement that empowers individuals to embrace their unique styles with confidence. Welcome to a world where gender fluidity meets streetwear in the most exquisite way.

Name: ETHICAREI

Made in Dignity.
An ethical verified supplier’s network for fashion.
Doing well by doing good.

Name: jYANN
Description:
Rooted in Marrakech, jYANN is an eco-chic brand dedicated to regenerating the ancient craft of wool felting. Prioritizing excellence and sustainability, the brand creates handcrafted hats and bags that embody simplicity. 

Committed to preserving artisan skills, jYANN ensures the transmission of these techniques to new generations. Using only locally sourced materials, including wool from the Atlas Mountains and organic olive soap, jYANN seamlessly blends tradition with innovation, offering timeless pieces that respect the past while looking to the future.
