Name: GRAFF
Description:
GRAFF is a social enterprise founded by postgraduate students. We manufacture a sustainable material made from textile waste for applications in the fashion industry.

We aim to absorb the textile waste produced by fast-fashion brands. We aim to stop using plastic within the fashion industry. We commit to being "Net Zero". We are redesigning fashion!

Name: FVL Srl
Description:
Our story begins with the visual and tactile experience of a fabric. 
We started working with that part of the trousers that doesn’t really represent fashion, but it certainly contributes to the identity of a piece of clothing: the internal waistband is “the detail” which is essential to understand the history and the character of a product.
The Packaging division takes its steps from here, from the belief that the brand is expressed in the details, in everything that is part of it. From 2004 to today our team has grown enriching itself with prestigious partnerships and collaborations in the luxury goods world.

Today, the manufacturing division and the FVL packaging division are based on the same desire: make a brand recognizable through a band, a hanger, a shopping bag.
In FVL the uniqueness of our solutions are the result of a continuous exchange between design curiosity and technical ability, between Italian style and a cosmopolitan vision. 
At the same time, we look for the best result between quality and cost optimization in everything we create.
FVL has embarked on the path towards product and process sustainability, thanks to his ethical and conscious choices, to the certification of raw materials, to the control of the production chain.

Our certifications:
- GOTS
- ISO 9001:2015
- ISO 14001:2015

Name: Nannini Eyewear Group
Description:
Since 1954, NANNINI designs, produces and distributes sunglasses and eyewear frames both from cellulose acetate and from injected, and reading glasses.

Initially specialized in the production of motorcycle goggles, the company soon began to establish itself in the Italian and international eyewear market, proving its strong entrepreneurial spirit. 

In 2008, a new corporate structure reshaped the company's future, leading to a true evolution of the business. With a constant eye on its roots and on the tradition of Italian expertise, the new managerial setup relaunched Nannini's corporate strategy, placing the creative process and production integration at the centre of its project.
The management of an entirely in-house, Made in Italy production has consolidated the company's creative and productive know-how year after year, resulting from passion, craftsmanship, and attention to detail.

Today, Nannini owns four proprietary brands (Giorgio Nannini, Common Ground, Onirico e Nannini Eyecare), for which it internally handles creative design, technical planning, and production. The company also has a production atelier dedicated to the design and creation of private label collections.

Name: Masoani Designers
Description:
Masoani is a luxury manufacturing house specializing in Haute Couture and Luxury Ready-to-Wear garments. We partner with global fashion brands and design houses to deliver the finest craftsmanship through intricate embroidery, delicate fabrics, and world-class tailoring.

Led by seasoned professionals with extensive experience in the high fashion and luxury apparel industry, Masoani is built on a foundation of quality, precision, and artistic excellence. Our team of expert seamstresses and artisans transforms creative visions into reality — ensuring that every piece reflects elegance, sophistication, and technical perfection.

From concept to creation, we tailor each design your way, combining creativity with flawless execution. At Masoani, we don’t just manufacture garments — we bring your imagination to life.

Name: Elda Trade Srl
Description:
The contemporary interpretation of Italian craftsmanship to create timeless classics. Elda Trade has been producing genuine leather bags for over 35 years, which it markets on an international scale. Its brands, including Gianni Conti, are known and appreciated around the world thanks to its extensive distribution network.
 
Thanks to its factories, it’s able to give high quality standards while maintaining a competitive price, a crucial point in manufacturing for third parties.
 
The interpretation of trends and Italian design characterize each product, with a timeless style..
 
Flexibility, local partners and quality are the distinctive elements of Elda Trade which made it known all over the world.

Name: BOND EYEWEAR
Description:
Hoy en día estamos atravesando una problemática mundial: La contaminación por plásticos. Año a año terminan en el océano alrededor de 8 millones de toneladas de este material, afectando directamente al ecosistema marino y por consiguiente a nosotros. 

A raíz de este problema, fundamos BOND, un "vínculo" con el medio ambiente, ofreciendo una nueva generación en diseño sustentable.  Bajo nuestro lema, "Yo abro los ojos", te queremos mostrar una nueva forma de ver el mundo porque entre todos, el cambio es posible. 

Creemos firmemente que una economía circular y una sociedad sin desperdicios es posible ya que el desperdicio es tal cuando no se aprovecha. Por eso estamos construyendo lo que creemos es El futuro de la fabricación.

Seamos el cambio. Sumate a nuestra iniciativa para que juntos trabajemos en un futuro más sostenible.

Name: Gondolina
Description: Gondolina is a brand that wants to transmit elegance, fashionable, classy and happiness to the rest of the world, through a unique pair of shoes, thought for women who want to be comfortable but elegant at the same time, having great walks in your city, or just enjoying your coffee or brunch at a beautiful spot.

Name: Mainetti Vietnam
Description:
Mainetti Vietnam is a member of Mainetti Group, a multinational company providing retail solutions in hangers, printing, and packaging. Our aim is to become the supplier of choice for retailers, brand owners, and consumers.

Having operated in Vietnam since 2003, we are servicing customers both nationally and internationally. Our owned 30,000 sqm facility located in Long Thanh Industrial Zone, Dong Nai, manufacturing half a million pieces of hangers and more than hundred million pieces of polybag annually to the garment factories who have global footprint. We are developing business based on passion and innovative solution to our customers in the environmentally friendly manners. We believe in social responsibility and proactively take the role to support local community.

Name: Lambarelli italia
Description: LAMBARELLI è una casa di moda italiana attiva nel settore dell’abbigliamento esclusivo di alta moda e articoli di lusso, in particolare borse, occhiali, orologi, scarpe, profumi e gioielli. Opera anche nell’arredamento di alta gamma. L’azienda fu fondata nel 1897 dalla famiglia Lambarelli.

Name: ByteX
Description:
"ByteX - Bring out your best"

ByteX là một thương hiệu đặc biệt về những sản phẩm thời trang mang thương hiệu Việt chất lượng.

Với hơn 20 năm trong ngành sản xuất may mặc , thời trang cho những nhãn hiệu lớn , năm nay chúng tôi tự tin để xây dựng một hãng thời trang cho riêng mình với những nét rất riêng mà chỉ tìm thấy ở ByteX.

Với sử mệnh mang lại những sản phẩm tốt, chất lượng, nâng tầm vóc dáng của khách hàng . ByteX đi từ khâu thiết kế, chọn vải, và nhuộm vải, cắt may, wash đóng gói đều được thực hiện trong nhà máy sản xuất đạt tiêu chuẩn và có uy tín và bởi những bàn tay khéo léo với cái tâm mang đến những sản phẩm được gắn nhãn “Tự hào sản xuất tại Việt Nam”.

Đến với ByteX không khó để tìm thấy những gam màu độc đáo, đa dạng, dù là streetstyle bụi bặm, cá tính hay thanh lịch, trẻ trung.

Tại ByteX , chúng tôi có rất nhiều sản phẩm đa dạng và phong phú về kiểu dáng để bạn dễ dàng lựa chọn và đặc biệt chúng phù hợp với tất cả mọi người. Vì vậy, chúng tôi chắc chắn rằng sản phẩm của chúng tôi sẽ là một sự lựa chọn tốt cho bạn, gia đình và những người than yêu của bạn.
Location: Binh Hung Hoa A Ward, Ho Chi Minh City

Name: SNOB Milano
Description:
Founded in 2014 by the century Sordelli manufacturer in partnership with the milanese Gubo design firm.

Today SNOB Milano is the leader of eyewear market with clip-on thanks to the certified 100% made in Italy production and the  exclusive collaboration with ZEISS Sunlens

If you are looking for cheap things, we aren't the right contact, here we put design, quality, service on top of our goals.

Name: Glory Apparel Inc.
Description:
We are your one stop on-demand knitwear solution, proudly made in NYC!

At the Venue | Glory Apparel is a global one-stop solution spaces for on-demand knitwear services specializing in fully-fashioned knitwear. We provide full package services which includes expert technical advice, design development services, yarn sourcing and full production support for the global fashion industry. 

Establishing a knitwear process at the heart of the fashion industry, we collaborate closely with designers to create masterpieces together. We offer on-demand services to both emerging and established designers, enabling them to have their knitwear collections produced locally and domestically. Going beyond production, we offer low minimum order quantities and ensure speedy delivery within 96 hours.

Our current headquarter is located in Chelsea, Manhattan - the heart of New York City and the Fashion Capital of the World. We are a proud member of the “Made in NYC” alliance, as well as an honored recipient of the CFDA FMI Grant Fund in 2023 and 2024. We welcome anyone who is enthusiastic about knitwear and would love to collaborate with those who have a specific sweater vision in mind!

Name: TEXCART S.R.L.
Description:
From more than 25 years in “signing” garments of the most important Italian and international brands. This is Texcart, the company I created in 1993 and that today continues to hold a primary
role in the fashion industry, throughout competence, passion, creativity and teamwork. 
Constantly following the fashion is a fun game which charms you and commits you to exhaustion.
But this is also the job that I love and I am doing it with all my hearth.
This passion allows me to transmit the stylists and the whole staff the great research and creativity of Texcart. I wish to thank all my collaborators for helping me bringing Texcart around the world.

Claudio Lazzaretti

Name: I.P. Valdarno International S.p.a.,
Description:
I.p. Valdarno International s.p.a. tannery started its activity in 1996, specializing in vegetable tanning with vacchetta fatliquoring. As far as this tanning method is concerned, we use different cuts of the raw hide, such as shoulder and sides, as well as baby calves, which are suitable for producing high quality wallets, bags, luggage, belts and shoes. 
The Fiesole trademark, created in 2012, identifies our chrome-tanned leathers. As for this tanning method, great attention is paid to the selection of raw hides in order to offer a polished and refined product, able to meet the demand of the fashion world. 
All our products offer quality standards well above the average and are certified according to TUV AUSTRIA CERT GMBH (EN ISO 9001, EN ISO 14001, EN ISO 50001, OHSAS 18001, SA 8000).

Name: Cheetah Stories SA
Description:
At Cheetah Stories, we design vegan high heels with unprecedented comfort – created for heel lovers who want to wear them every day, without compromise.

Designed in Switzerland. Handmade in Italy.
Our shoes are crafted by skilled Italian artisans, blending Swiss precision with the heritage of Italian shoemaking.

The secret lies in our inspiration: the soft cushioning of a cheetah’s paw. Just like the cheetah moves with both grace and power, our heels – affectionately called Cheeletos – combine beauty, elegance, and exceptional comfort.

Our debut collection offers timeless, retro-inspired designs in nine colours – from classic tones to bold statements – so every pair fits seamlessly with your mood, outfit, and occasion.

Cheeletos are not just high heels. They are beautiful, elegant, and just a little dangerous – much like the women who dare to wear them.

We believe in fashion that doesn’t harm:

100% vegan, PETA-Approved materials – even down to the glue

Ethical production with respect for people, animals, and the planet

A design philosophy that unites sustainability with luxury

We love them. And we hope you will too.

Name: Gianni Santini
Description:
Commercio e riciclo di materiali plastici morbidi in shore A
Realizzazione di campionari di Fondi per calzature Uomo,donna e bambino e tacchi per il settore donna.

Name: Bamboleira
Description:
We are Bamboleira, a Colombian brand of fashion jewelry and accessories, inspired by the legacy of ancient traditions, combined with a desire to care for the environment and support for the talent of our country.

We feel identified with the mastery of handmade work, working as a team with indigenous and artisan communities.

Name: Bigalli hats
Description: Founded in 1926 from Ezio Bigalli’s visionary dream, our family business has grown through four generations, mastering the art of crafting exceptional headwear. We specialize in wool felt hats, Paja Toquilla straw (Panama) hats, and other premium materials, delivering timeless elegance and unparalleled quality. Serving discerning clients across the globe, we blend tradition with innovation to create unique pieces that reflect each wearer’s personal style. Join us on our journey as we continue to transform dreams into reality—one exquisite hat at a time.

Name: Jak Group Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Founded in 2004, JAK Group has been a prominent manufacturer and exporter of leather goods since then.

Located in Sector 37, Gurgaon, we operate two dedicated production units for belts, wallets, and bags, with a monthly output exceeding 800,000 belts, 300,000 wallets, 50,000 bags, and 150,000 caps.

Our commitment to design, precision, and technology has established JAK Group as a benchmark in crafting leather accessories for leading brands worldwide.

Commitment, Creativity and Professionalism have made JAK Group a point of reference in manufacturing leather accessories for renowned brands all over the world.

At JAK Group, our goal is to set the benchmark for excellence in the leather industry. Through continuous research and development, we strive to create products that not only meet but exceed the expectations of our customers.

Explore opportunities to collaborate with JAK Group and learn more about our products and services. Reach out to us for any inquiries.

Name: Mohair&Angora
Description:
Reborn in Homeland.
A Luxurious Mohair Collection from its origins, homeland. Mohair is a silky fiber made from the hair of “Angora Goat” which derives its name from the ancient Turkish province of “Angora” (today’s Ankara/Turkey) where it originally comes from.

Just Like a Diamond
The shiniest natural fiber in use today… Mohair has been known for centuries, as “the diamond fiber” for its lustre, warmth, strength and durability; while it had also been regarded as “Sultans of Fibers” since it used to be the prized reserve of Sultans….

Passion with Craftsmanship
Fuses passion of a new-born brand with 55 years craftsmanship of a family owned knitting company.

Tradition in Luxury
Harmonious combination of tradition and luxury.
Blends the incredible characteristics and heritage of “mohair” with contemporary Turkish design and aesthetic.

Name: Sam Gautama International
Description: Sam Gautama International is a company engaged in fashion and property. In the scope of fashion SGI in charge of Hyena Bags, Hybrand and Tamhs. Also in field of property PT SGI in charge of Interia Studio and Property Developer

Name: Tasselli Cashmere
Description:
It is from the Umbrian tradition of textile manufacturing that the artisan excellence of Tasselli Cashmere was born in 1970.
Top quality raw materials, consistency of texture, accuracy of the decreased stitches and selvages, garments checked one by one, and the choice of innovative details to enhance the expression of the innate personality of cashmere.
Style solutions that are the result of a research and attention to new trends, always in keeping with times and never obvious. Simple and clean lines, the outcome of which is an elegant fit.
A patrimony of experience that – in addition to the traditional distribution channels – feeds on the direct relationship with over five thousand private customers, being thus enriched by dynamism and innovation.
The possibility of choosing among over two hundred colours, the tailor-made service, the efficiency of delivery are just some of the services that characterize Tasselli Cashmere as to become the example for and the guarantor of a new and contemporary tailoring.

Name: Akshay Kala Junction Pvt Ltd
Description: At Akshay, we passionately honor India's cultural heritage through exquisite, handcrafted jewelry, epitomized by our unique terracotta earrings. Our dedication to preserving tradition is paralleled by our commitment to product innovation. We transition from local craft markets to global recognition, advocating for artisans and celebrating cultural richness, striving to weave a narrative of culture, creativity, and community.

Name: Meo Buttons
Description: Meo Buttons

Name: CORECOLOUR
Description:
centre of attention with #corecolour 

Level Up Your Everyday Tech Accessories Now.

We are an e-commerce fashion brand headquartered in Melbourne, with presence in Adelaide, Seattle and Japan, providing premium quality and uniquely designed tech accessories for customers pursuing an elegant and effortless lifestyle. 

At CORECOLOUR, we believe that colours are a form of communication, a language of dreams, a power that enables us to transform the ordinary into something remarkable. With our devotion to detail, we strive to go beyond boundaries, fusing the latest fashion trend with innovative tech and design to create world-leading products that are both highly durable and aesthetically pleasing. 

Our talented and hard-working teams around the world share the same ambition of continuing to evolve and refine our design and development from time to time.

Name: dastgah_morvarid_rouhi

فروش و تحویل انواع دستگاه های مروارید ، پرس ، لیزر ، قیچی برقی و پانچ در سایز های مختلف

Name: LCA di F. Natali & C. Snc
Description:
Basico, tailormade o uniqque , comunque LCA . 
Nata a ﬁne anni 70 come oﬃcina specializzata in meccanica di precisione, progettando e costruendo macchine ed attrezzature per la lavorazione delle chiusure lampo, con il tempo ha cambiato pelle, trasformandosi in un’azienda che crea prodotti e progetti di qualità artigianale . Dal progetto meccanico al progetto di stile, dagli ingranaggi, ai processi creativi una crescita unita da passione, curiosità e ricerca, che ne fanno un punto di riferimento nella propria nicchia di settore.

Name: Sodini Bijoux Srl
Description:
Sodini is an Italian brand specialising in the design and creation of fashion jewellery. The company was founded by Italo Sodini in Lucca back in 1967 in the midst of the beautiful natural scenery of the Tuscan hills. Its headquarters are still located in Lucca, nurtured by a natural, constant relationship with the amazing surroundings.


Since 2015, the second generation has been at the company's helm with Federico Sodini evolving and updating Italo’s original mission, which relies on a heritage of over 55 years of experience. Federico keeps innovating the industry through design, research, and skilful craftsmanship in the name of a perfect combination of tradition and creativity. 


A strong personality, shape, and colour are the distinctive features of a design that has had no equals for over 50 years. They are the keynotes of Sodini’s signature style, and so is its heart. Because it is with our heart that we create every single product, and it is with our heart that we mark it with our unique, unmistakable style details.

Name: Hawai Italia S.r.l.
Description:
Hawai Italia S.r.l. nasce nel 1964 a Verona come azienda produttrice di articoli di bigiotteria. In breve tempo, esigenze di mercato diverse spingono l’azienda ad una revisione degli obiettivi, orientandola verso la sua attuale specializzazione, la creazione e produzione di minuterie metalliche e plastiche d’avanguardia tecnicamente ed esteticamente per il settore calzaturiero, delle confezioni, della pelletteria e pet.

A distanza di pochi anni Hawai Italia può vantare una posizione di successo tra le aziende leader del proprio settore grazie ad una sviluppata rete commerciale presente a livello mondiale: Italia, Austria, Belgio, Bielorussia, Brasile, Bulgaria, Canada, Cina, Colombia, Croazia, Danimarca, Estonia, Finlandia, Francia, Germania, India, Indonesia, Irlanda, Israele, Lettonia, Libano, Marocco, Messico, Olanda, Polonia, Portogallo, Regno Unito, Repubblica Ceca, Romania, Russia, Slovacchia, Slovenia, Spagna, Svezia, Svizzera, Stati Uniti, Tunisia, Turchia, Ungheria, Venezuela.

Il successo aziendale è da attribuire ad una pluralità di fattori: i prodotti offerti che si distinguono per innovazione ed affidabilità, l’estrema attenzione data alla ricerca e sviluppo di soluzioni d’avanguardia, la capacità di realizzare internamente minuterie diverse per tipologia produttiva. Sono queste le caratteristiche che hanno permesso all’azienda di rispondere positivamente anche alle richieste dei suoi clienti più esigenti.

Ancestro es una permanente búsqueda por aportar, conocer y crear un tejido entre personas y objetos a partir de historias, historias para reconocer nuestros valores ancestrales, historias para dejar huella en una propuesta nueva.

Soucieuse de conserver une démarche locale et responsable, les capuche de pluie sont réalisé en région parisienne.

Jeune, dynamique avec un fort potentiel d'expansion, Capuche Paris accompagne, depuis bientôt 5 ans, les femmes pour faciliter leur quotidien en leur proposant des accessoires tendances et pratiques. Aujourd'hui la marque est présente dans une centaine de points de vente en France et à l'étranger: grands magasins (Le Bon Marché, La Samaritaine, La Fondation Louis Vuitton, etc), corners, et des boutiques.

Name: Le Cashmere
Description:
Le Cashmere is a leading manufacturer of high quality Cashmere knitwear and accessories. The family business started as an artisan based supplier of Cashmere yarn to the local market in 1883.
The family started manufacturing garments in 1954 and began supplying Premium Cashmere to Private label customers around the globe.
The Company is proud of its reputation in establishing strong reliable relationships with its clients. As the manufacturer Le Cashmere has always offered outstanding price and value.
The company is looking to the future through investing in new capacity, which will further improve its flexibility and ability to respond to the demands of the 21st century market.

Production
Le Cashmere has its own production units in Scotland, United Kingdom with a team of over 45 people on our ‘Made in UK’ luxury labels.

Le Cashmere also employs over 275 people in its own knitwear and woven SEDEX approved factories in Kashmir where we uniquely maintain over 250 looms for handmade production.

Le Cashmere has its heritage factory employing over 175 people in Chinese controlled Kashmir .

In all our factories we use the finest local yarn. Le Cashmere can offer light through to heavy weight cashmere in different gauges according to the seasonal demand. Uniquely we can offer more than 600 Colour choices. Our team maintain the highest QC standards.

Design
Le Cashmere has its own Design studio in New York, London and Antwerp where our highly qualified design teams are based.

Our designers travel the world to ensure our clients are shown exciting and exclusive new creations throughout the year.

Name: Sherrie Morgan Design
Description:
Sherrie Morgan Design is an Australian business located in Melbourne handcrafting unique scarves, headscarves and headwraps, which are lovingly created from original artwork, as well as from other Australian Artists and upcycling unwanted fabrics. 

After completing a Masters of Business Administration in 2021 Sherrie was faced with a situation where standing up for her human rights cost her 'income' and corporate job. With this, there was a realisation of redirection rather than rejected, which opened up the opportunity of a new beginning; an opportunity to forge a new path and make HER dreams come true, rather than helping someone else achieve theirs!

Sherrie has spent years collecting quirky, vibrant and colourful accessories, in particular, large square scarves and turned them into headscarves with bows or knots. Wearing a headscarf, makes her feel empowered, unique and ultimately 'HERSELF'. Friends, family, colleagues and strangers, often pay compliments and she's pretty sure a 'cat ears' headband even scored her last job! What a boost of encouragement!

'Sherrie Morgan Design' hopes to increase YOUR happiness, YOUR smiles and YOUR positivity through unique and bespoke designs. And, sincerely wants your life to be enriched with playful colour that will serve to empower you, boost your confidence and put a smile on your face even during the darkest of days.

We look forward to creating an individual piece for you and seeing you embrace your individuality, your way :-) 

Let art be your voice.

Let colour be your tone.

Let your style be in your hair!

Name: Axis srl di Forti Carlo
Description:
Since 1996, Axis Italy has been dedicated to merging artisan tradition and innovation in the world of high-fashion hats. Founded on passion and commitment to excellence, our journey is one of crafting distinctive, high-quality headwear.

As a young and innovative company, Axis Italy embodies the dream of its founder, Carlo Forti. His expertise in the industry and lifelong dedication to hats ensure success for every entrepreneur in the field.

We take pride in our Italian artisan heritage. Nestled in Monte Vidon Corrado, in the heart of the Marche region, we combine traditional artisan techniques with modern innovations to create hats that epitomize timeless elegance.

Philosophy

Our philosophy is rooted in attention to detail, quality materials, and an unyielding pursuit of perfection. Each hat encapsulates the essence of craftsmanship, celebrating the uniqueness of every creation.

Values

We are committed to offering products that not only meet expectations but exceed them. Quality, attention to detail, and respect for Italian artisan tradition are at the core of everything we create.

Mission

We continue to innovate in the fashion world, crafting hats that not only complement an outfit but become its distinctive element. We collaborate with our clients to craft unique hats that exude style and personality.

Axis is more than just a hat brand. We are a community of artisans and fashion enthusiasts who share a passion for creating wearable works of art.

Partnership

We value the creativity of those who see headwear and related accessories as distinctive elements. Through meticulous technical and stylistic research and careful craftsmanship, we specialize in producing hats for men, hats for women, and complementary accessories with exclusive designs. We work with leading fashion and clothing brands, creating personalized samples. 

From concept to finished product, Axis Italy is the ideal partner for successful hat production for your brand.

Nous vous assurons une maîtrise à 360 degrés sur vos exigences en termes de création, qualité, sécurité et cahier des charges.
 
Engagé socialement et écologiquement, certifié ICS depuis 2022, notre Atelier répond aux enjeux sociétaux et environnementaux. Du choix de matières éco-labellisées Oeko-Tex, LWG ou GOTS, à l'analyse du Cycle de Vie pour élaborer le bilan Carbone, en passant par les garanties de réparabilité, notre Atelier assure un accompagnement pour une expérience MADE IN FRANCE sûre et responsable.

Name: STRATO EYEWEAR
Description:
We are high-quality eyewear manufacturers based in the province of Belluno, Italy. 

STRATO is a small family-run company with over 30 years of experience in the manufacturing of eyewear collections made of different materials and through different manufacturing techniques.
Indeed, what we're good at and our strength is the fact that we master many different techniques and this makes it easier for us to combine them as well.
Our range of products goes from high-quality acetate frames, frames and components made of different metals and alloys (stainless steel, nickel silver, aluminum, brass, bronze), to combination frames and inlays in leather, wood, stone, etc. We also make injection-moulded frames or components which we also make the moulds for right inside our facilities.
Another characteristic of our company is the ability of being flexible and dynamic, but still remaining well organized.

We avoid outsourcing as much as possible, in order have a better hold of each step of the production and a better quality control on the final product. Quality indeed is our main goal and usually also the first thing our customers appreciate about working with us. They especially appreciate the fact that once the order is placed they are free to focus on other aspects of their job, because they trust us and know they're not going to have to spend their time doing another QC check after receiving their orders.

We collaborate with the big brands and groups, and most of all we like to collaborate with the small, design- and quality-oriented independent brands that appreciate the quality of our products and trust our expertise for developing their concepts.

Should you be interested in getting to know us better or for further information, please do not hesitate to get in contact with us.

Name: Kolovrat.
Description:
We create scarves based on visualised stories radiating life-affirming energies of Love, Hope, Faith, Reproductivity and Self-Healing involving cosmically aligned energies our world of Earth is made of, and bring them to all silk scarves lovers of the world of fashion and grace.

These essential accessories of any contemporary woman’s wardrobe will beautifully complement any modern outfit: they can be worn as head-foulards or around your neck, they will embrace your shoulders while gracefully sliding in glowing folders over your chest, or they complete your sophisticated look as striking yet enigmatic tops or where ever your fantasy would place them on/with/around You. 

Crafted with finest mulberry silk twill of 14 memes and carefully hand-rolled  by the skilful artisans, these accessories will not only serve your modern fashionista visions but tell you most fascinating stories with their inspiring imagery of legendary symbols coming both from our ancient and contemporary histories and more.

Kolovrat is the word for the one of the most ancient symbols first found from the archaeological diggings along the river Dnieper of Ukraine and associated with the most ancient era of humans' history of the Eurasian continent known as Trypillia-Cucuteni culture which is dating back some says into 10-8 millenniums BC where in some ones double these numbers up. 

The word Kolovrat consists of two parts "kolo" and "vrat" which mean "a circle' and "rotor"; the symbol Kolovrat means Eternal Life Rotation of our Universe in constant development toward light, harmony and happiness. 

By the fact that all these qualities have been usually associated with the Sun, Kolovrat built its strong association with the Sun as the deity of worship. 
Kolovrat shares its similar meaning with another World known words for the Sun from another cultures: such as Yarilo, Ra, Helios, Sol, Surya, Inti and others.

Description:
MANAWA Es una acepción de origen maorí, la lengua de una etnia de Nueva Zelanda que utiliza los tatuajes para expresar su identidad y herencia cultural. Cada una de las líneas que dibujan en sus rostros se definen con este término, que significa 'corazón'. 
MANAWA Son piezas artesanales, especiales y con historia. Existen palabras extrañas e, incluso, intraducibles, que siempre han ejercido una magnética fascinación sobre el ser humano; y cada uno de los modelos de MANAWA está bautizado con una de estas palabras. De este modo, a parte de ofrecer un producto, MANAWA da la oportunidad al cliente de descubrir algo nuevo, un plus de pequeñas historias resumidas en un puñado de letras

 Nos engagements :

Name: Evohq Luxury
Description:
Welcome to Evohq, your premier destination for exquisite leather craftsmanship. At Evohq, we specialize in producing high-quality shoes, belts, and bags that combine timeless elegance with modern functionality. Our commitment to excellence and passion for leather work drive us to create products that stand the test of time, ensuring you have a trusted companion for every step of the way.

Our motto, "Your sole companion every step of the way," encapsulates our dedication to providing exceptional products that enhance your everyday life. Whether you're seeking the perfect pair of shoes, a durable and stylish belt, or a versatile bag, Evohq delivers unmatched quality and style.

Our Services

At Evohq, we offer a comprehensive range of services typical of a premier leather work producer:

Custom Shoe Production: Tailored footwear crafted to meet your specific needs, ensuring perfect fit and unmatched comfort.

Belt Manufacturing: Stylish and durable belts designed to complement any wardrobe.

Bag Creation: Versatile and elegant bags suitable for any occasion, made with precision and care.

Repairs and Restorations: Expert repair and restoration services to bring your favorite leather items back to life.

Design Consultation: Personalized design consultation to help you create bespoke leather goods that reflect your unique style.

At Evohq, we believe in the power of craftsmanship and the importance of attention to detail. Each of our products is meticulously crafted by skilled artisans using the finest materials, ensuring durability, comfort, and aesthetic appeal. Our designs are inspired by a blend of tradition and innovation, resulting in pieces that are both classic and contemporary.

Join us on our journey to redefine leather craftsmanship and experience the Evohq difference. With Evohq, you're not just buying a product; you're investing in a legacy of quality and style.

OKAPA redefines the concept of the water bottle & what it can be—merging innovation, performance, and design to create an elevated hydration experience. Built with a modular structure, it prioritizes extreme hygiene, allowing for effortless disassembly and deep, accessible cleaning.

Crafted from premium medical-grade materials, OKAPA upholds extreme health standards, ensuring perfect taste integrity with every sip (learn more about our materials on okapa.com). Engineered for longevity and peak performance, it stands apart in a world saturated with disposable, low-quality alternatives. 

More than just functional, OKAPA is fashion-forward—its bold, smart design commands attention. As a brand, OKAPA represents a new era of creativity, introducing eight distinct product characters, each with its own story, visual identity, and attitude.

OKAPA isn’t just another water bottle. It’s a statement of superiority—because standing out demands excellence.

Crafted for those who demand the best—we do not compromise in the details.

Name: SGM Suolificio S.r.l.
Description: L’azienda SGM dal 1978, anno di fondazione da parte del Sig. Angelo Sgariglia, si dedica della produzione e commercializzazione di suole ed articoli per calzature. Il successivo cambio generazionale oltre a confermare e consolidare il ruolo di leader sul mercato, ha anche favorito la trasformazione del processo produttivo, coniugando la totale industrializzazione con gli elevati standard qualitativi tipici del lavoro artigianale, che l’hanno sempre contraddistinta. L’utilizzo di impianti hi-tech continuamente aggiornati ai più attuali standard tecnologici, la qualità del prodotto realizzato, e non ultima la distribuzione del prodotto stesso, che ha avuto sempre nella puntualità motivo di vanto per l’azienda, sono solo alcuni dei punti di forza, che portano il servizio offerto dalla SGM a livelli di assoluta eccellenza.

Name: LANDA Handbags
Description:
At LANDA, every handbag tells a story of craftsmanship, heritage, and timeless design. Our journey began in Argentina, where founder Silvana Landa grew up watching her Italian grandfather craft leather in his cobbler’s workshop. A skilled artisan, he built his business from scratch after emigrating from Italy, passing down a deep appreciation for quality materials and meticulous craftsmanship.

Inspired by this legacy, Silvana envisioned a collection of handbags that blend functionality, elegance, and superior craftsmanship. Designed for modern women who navigate busy lives, LANDA handbags offer spacious interiors, thoughtful details, and premium materials, ensuring both practicality and refined style.

From Ireland to the world, our designs embody a commitment to quality, ethical production, and timeless appeal. More than an accessory, each piece is crafted to be a lasting companion, accompanying you on every journey.

Your world in your hands.

Name: Chouette Sauvageonne
Description: Chouette Sauvageonne creates limited-edition bags and accessories for women who choose presence over noise.  Each piece is crafted in Italy from exceptional rescued leather, designed to carry both life and meaning.  Inspired by the wisdom of the owl, the courage of queens, and the spirit of Sapere Aude (dare to know), we make objects that endure.  With every bag, we honour tradition, whisper defiance, support owl rescue — and give space for individuality to define luxury on its own terms.

Name: BDEBRUNO
Description:
Del rescate a la inspiración: La historia de B de Bruno, una marca con corazón y compromiso.

Un cachorro con apenas horas de vida es arrojado a un contenedor de basura, y una estudiante universitaria, con los pocos recursos económicos típicos de la edad, no puede mirar para otro lado y decide hacerse cargo de él.

La necesidad agudiza el ingenio, por lo que un día decide ponerse a crear, sin esperar en momento alguno que ese arrebato se convirtiera en lo que es hoy.

Es así como surge B de Bruno, una marca que no olvida sus orígenes ni pierde la perspectiva, una marca creada por y para ellos, una marca sostenible y solidaria, que tiene como prioridad la seguridad y comodidad de nuestros compis de vida.

Una marca que intenta ajustarse todo lo posible a la personalidad de cada uno de ellos, sus necesidades, y los gustos de sus familias.

Una marca para Bruno, nuestro motor. Una marca para todos vosotros, que con vuestro cariño y confianza nos habéis traído hasta aquí.

Name: Grupo Clement
Description:
CLEMENT es un grupo especializado en el desarrollo y fabricación de componentes para calzado, con más de 50 años de experiencia en el sector.

Nuestro enfoque combina diseño, técnica y personalización, cubriendo tres divisiones principales:

 CORDONES CLEMENT – Fabricación y diseño de cordones personalizados para todo tipo de calzado: técnicos, laminados, sublimados o clásicos.

 ADORNOS CLEMENT – Desarrollo de herrajes, piezas en zamak y detalles plásticos, pensados para sumar valor visual y funcional a la pieza final.

 FORNITURAS CLEMENT – Cintas, cremalleras, velcro, elásticos y acabados. Soluciones adaptadas a cada marca, con atención al detalle y proceso.

Ofrecemos soluciones flexibles para fabricantes, diseñadores y marcas que buscan personalización, criterio estético y respuesta industrial.

 Desde Elche, para colecciones de aquí y de fuera.

Name: One Gold Srl
Description:
One Gold Srl nasce nell’anno 2000 da un’esperienza ventennale nel settore orafo-argentiero. L’azienda, specializzata nella lavorazione di metalli preziosi e non, produce su commissione del cliente, accessori metallici e bigiotteria per il settore del lusso, prestando una meticolosa attenzione a tutte le fasi di realizzazione dei prodotti semilavorati e finiti e garantendo un’integrazione dell’intera filiera produttiva.

La One Gold conta ad oggi ha trentacinque dipendenti suddivisi tra operai specializzati, tecnici di progettazione ed addetti amministrativi e commerciali, collocati all’interno delle due sedi operative di Arezzo. Negli anni che seguono la sua fondazione, l’azienda ha attivato una politica di investimenti continua su nuove tecnologie all’avanguardia, infrastrutture IT, formazione del personale, organizzazione interna e processi di produzione che l’hanno portata a realizzare articoli di altissima qualità e stringere importanti collaborazioni con le più importanti Maison della moda Italiana e Internazionale.

Ricerca continua e formazione del personale, tecnologie di ultima generazione, efficienza ed efficacia dei processo produttivi, elevati standard di qualità dei prodotti, sostenibilità ed etica del lavoro. Sono questi i principi cardine su cui poggia One Gold Srl, la quale, a conferma della volontà di promuovere pratiche responsabili da un punto di vista etico, sociale ed ambientale nel settore della lavorazione dei metalli preziosi, ha ottenuto nel 2021 la Certificazione Responsible Jewellery Council (RJC), ulteriore importante traguardo realizzato nel percorso di crescita intrapreso.

Description:
Decz Clothing | Stylish, Sustainable Fashion from Sri Lanka
Overview:
Decz Clothing is a Colombo-based fashion brand dedicated to creating stylish, high-quality apparel with a strong focus on sustainability and local craftsmanship. Each collection blends contemporary aesthetics with eco-conscious materials—ranging from upcycled fabrics to organic cotton—designed to elevate everyday wear.

What Sets Us Apart:

Locally Crafted: All garments are ethically made in Sri Lanka using skilled local artisans.

Sustainability First: We handpick responsible fabrics and minimize waste through mindful production practices.

Versatile & Trend-Driven: Our designs effortlessly transition from streetwear to semi-formal looks—perfect for customers who demand both comfort and style.

Products & Collections:
We offer clothing for both men and women, including seasonal lines, limited-edition pieces, and customizable options. Our collections typically include shirts, dresses, trousers, and accessories, each thoughtfully designed and responsibly produced.

Vision & Values:
Our mission is to redefine modern fashion by merging creativity, social responsibility, and local pride. We strive to champion transparency, ethical sourcing, and fair labor as core values across the entire supply chain.

Join Us on Our Journey:
As we grow, we are always looking to collaborate with like-minded partners—from fabric suppliers and ethical retailers to sustainable fashion advocates. Let’s create fashion that looks good and does good.

 Global sales & client relations

With over a decade of excellence, Abikeiyaileke continues to position African craftsmanship on the world stage — where culture meets global elegance.

Description: Filippo Trotta is a brand of sneakers for men and women, founded in 2021 in Apulia, south of Italy, renowned for its artisanal excellence, exclusive design, and exceptional comfort. The manufacturing process is rooted in traditional craftsmanship: each pair of sneakers is hand-assembled, ensuring meticulous attention to detail and long-lasting quality. Our sneakers combine modern style and versatility with the tradition of Italian craftsmanship, offering collections designed for those who love to stand out without sacrificing maximum comfort. Our customers especially appreciate the exceptional fit, made possible by the use of top-quality materials and a design focused on foot wellness in any situation, from work to everyday life. Among our most iconic offerings are the Special Edition models, adorned with hand-painted designs. Each piece becomes a unique work of art, celebrating the harmony between fashion and art. Filippo Trotta is also committed to environmental sustainability. We adopt low-impact production processes to reduce our ecological footprint without ever compromising on quality. This commitment reflects our vision of a more responsible future, balancing innovation with respect for the environment. Choosing Filippo Trotta means wearing the best of Made in Italy: style, comfort, and craftsmanship, deeply rooted in the traditions of Puglia and with an eye toward a more sustainable tomorrow.

Visit our website to view new collections.

Tradition Textiles wholesales to shops, galleries and museums throughout Australia, USA, Canada and New Zealand. Many of our wholesale customers have stocked our scarves, throws and clothing for many years and we appreciate their support. We are pleased to meet our wholesale customers in person at trade fairs in Sydney, Melbourne and New York. As we do our own production in India we are happy to discuss custom projects that our wholesale customers might have.

In 2017 Tradition Textiles opened a retail store in Paddington, Sydney where we expanded our range of products to include other textiles we love that are difficult to wholesale, as well as having our new Tradition collections that we produce each season. In the shop there is an emphasis on the hand crafted like hand woven pashminas, tribal rugs and embroidered curtains. We are able to share the story of each product with our customers.

In the world of Fosca's Batik, luxury is not only in the exquisite finishes and high-quality materials but in the unique experience offered: each accessory is a journey through creativity.

Name: LAU.sk
Description:
Vitajte v LAU, mieste, kde sa starostlivosť o seba stretáva s luxusným hodvábom.

Aký problém riešia naše produkty?

Náš produkt je založený na hodvábe, exkluzívnej látke, ktorá nielenže rieši problémy s pokožkou, vráskami a vlasmi, ale aj prináša pohodlie počas spánku. Jeho jemnosť zabezpečuje, že sa pokožka v noci neotláča, antistatické vlastnosti zaisťujú, že vlasy nie sú elektrizované, a jeho hebkosť zabraňuje krepovateniu vlasov. Okrem toho hodváb obsahuje aminokyseliny, ktoré sa starajú o zdravie pokožky. Preto sa naše produkty hodia pre každého, kto chce viac, aj keď spí. Prečo by ste nevyužili čas spánku na starostlivosť o seba?

Prečo si vybrať nás?

Rozhodnutie investovať do nás znamená viac ako len nákup. Sme slovenská značka, ktorá si zakladá na ručnej výrobe na Slovensku a dôslednom sledovaní kvality. Všetko šijeme s láskou a starostlivosťou, pričom sa snažíme prispôsobiť každý produkt presne podľa potrieb našich zákazníkov. Pri nás nie ste len klientom, ste súčasťou rodiny LAU.

Kto sme?

Sme značka, ktorá vzišla z krásnej Oravy, so silnou túžbou vytvárať niečo výnimočné pre ženy. Naša vášeň je starať sa o vaše vlasy a pokožku a prinášať vám do vašich domovov kúsok luxusu každú noc.

Name: Alhena Bijoux
Description:
Créatrice de bijoux pour femme, je crée avec soin dans mon atelier chaque boucle d’oreille, créole, bague, collier et bracelet à la main.
Je puise au quotidien mon inspiration à travers mes voyages ainsi que des différentes cultures que j’ai pu y découvrir.

La passion de créer des bijoux m’est venue lors de ce tour du monde. 

J’ai appris plusieurs techniques de bijouterie en Asie et peaufiné mon apprentissage à Paris en suivant une formation de bijouterie fantaisie.
C’est alors que j’ai alors décidé de fonder la marque Alhena Bijoux. Découvrez des bijoux minimalistes, fins, colorés et délicats.

J’utilise pour mes créations des matériaux de qualité et naturels tel que le plaqué or, de l’argent 925 ainsi que des pierres fines comme le quartz rose, le lapis lazuli, perle d’eau douce ainsi que la pierre de lune pour leur ajouter une touche colorée.

Minutieuse et soucieuse du détail je passe beaucoup de temps à l’imagination ainsi qu’à la réalisation de mes créations.

Je prends le temps de chercher les pièces parfaites qui sauront vous plaire. Je vous propose également des bijoux à personnaliser, couleur, gravure à la main, taille : laissez libre cours à votre imagination et à vos envies.

Je pense, fabrique, teste les bijoux sur moi-même pour évaluer leur résistance, prend en photo, emballe et envoie-le(s) bijou(x) que vous avez choisi(s) Vous les recevrez dans un joli pochon 100% coton Alhena Bijoux.

Name: LLOYD ROBINSON CLOTHING LTD
Description:
Lloyd Robinson Clothing is a brand for people passionate about the things they wear. A lot of clothes are made using the same template with some changes but that is not what we want to do. You will not find something off the rank in our selection of bold fashion lines.
We want to find people who want to stand out from the rest and to wear something that can not be found anywhere else. We want your flamboyant personality to be expressed by our range.
We had to be creative to be able to bring a product that has passion and care. This is a labour of love. This brand started from the titular Lloyd Robinson the owner and creator of this clothing company.
He started off creating custom designs for himself to wear as he felt that what could be found on the high street was good but wasn’t quite right. With his striking and ornate appearance has made him one of the most recognisable faces of the city of Birmingham's nightlife scene.
The Lloyd Robinson Clothing includes shirts, double breasted suits and a speciality in faux fur coats for both male and female. All clothing is manufactured locally in Birmingham where he personally checks for quality.
This all started with one man passion for fashion, where it has grown into one of the UK’s up and coming brands. We are not the only ones who think so either as Lloyd Robinson himself has appeared multiple times on the BBC.

Name: Nishi Art
Description:
Nishi Arts, a leading provider of innovative heat transfer printing solutions since 2002. I'm reaching out to introduce our cutting-edge products and services that can enhance the quality and appeal of your manufactured goods.

At Nishi Arts, we specialize in heat transfer printing technologies that enable manufacturers like you to elevate the aesthetics and functionality of your products. We have the expertise and resources to meet your needs.

Our heat transfer printing process offers several advantages:

High-Quality Printing: Our advanced printing technology ensures crisp, high-resolution images and designs, enhancing the visual appeal of your products.
Durability: Our heat transfer prints are resistant to fading, cracking, and peeling, ensuring long-lasting durability even in challenging environments.
Versatility: From intricate designs to bold graphics, our heat transfer printing solutions offer versatility to accommodate a wide range of customization options.
Efficiency: With our streamlined printing process, we can accommodate both small and large-scale production runs with quick turnaround times, helping you meet deadlines and market demands effectively.
Environmental Friendliness: We are committed to sustainability and offer eco-friendly printing options that minimize environmental impact without compromising on quality.
We understand that each manufacturing operation is unique, which is why we work closely with our clients to tailor our solutions to their specific requirements. Whether you're looking to add branding elements, product information, or decorative accents to your items, we have the expertise to bring your vision to life.

At Bambuco, we redefine style by crafting trendy accessories from recycled plastic, championing the cause of eco-conscious fashion. Our commitment extends beyond creating stylish products; it's about making a positive impact on our planet.

Currently, in the exciting stage of construction, Bambuco is an emerging entrepreneurial venture. We are in the early phases, focused on understanding the market and developing products that align with our vision of sustainability. As we embark on this journey, your support and enthusiasm mean the world to us.

Join Bambuco in the journey towards a renewed lifestyle. We're not just a brand; we're a movement towards conscious consumption. Together, let's renew your style and renew the Earth.

Open to Sustainable Innovation: 

Bambuco: Embrace Fashion. Embrace Sustainability. Renew the World.

Name: Trama Textiles
Description:
Trama Textiles is a Guatemalan NGO non-profit cooperative dedicated to empowering indigenous women through the art of traditional backstrap weaving. Founded in 1988 and based in Quetzaltenango, Trama works with over 150 artisans from 17 weaving groups across five regions in the western highlands of Guatemala.

Our mission is to provide fair wages and sustainable opportunities for women to preserve their cultural heritage, support their families, and achieve financial independence. Each handmade product tells a story of resilience, tradition, and creativity, showcasing vibrant designs inspired by Mayan culture.

At Trama Textiles, we’re more than a cooperative—we’re a movement to promote economic empowerment, cultural preservation, and gender equity. Whether through our unique handwoven products or our weaving workshops, we invite you to support and celebrate the incredible talent of Guatemala’s women artisans. Together, we can weave a brighter future.

Explore more: www.tramatextiles.org

Name: SASINE
Description: Sasine is the first entirely handcrafted slow fashion brand born from inspiration to Sardinia and traditional pibiones weaving, with which houses in the Sardinian hinterland have been decorated for centuries. Pibiones weaving is a traditional grain weaving technique typical of Sardinia, made through the use of a hand loom and with which rugs and bedspreads were and still are produced. The word pibiones in Sardinian means grapes, and is the name given to the small rings of yarn (the grains) that protrude from the surface of the fabric, forming a pattern. Sasine is the encounter with a centuries-old, rough and handcrafted tradition and the desire to make it chic, bold and still relevant.

Name: Lupi Group
Description:
Lupi Group è un'azienda italiana con sede nelle Marche, a Morrovalle nel distretto artigianale per eccellenza.
L’azienda, specializzata nella produzione di ogni tipo di borsa in pelle di alta qualità per grandi marchi della moda, viene fondata nel 1979 dalla famiglia Lupi la quale da sempre vanta un'esperienza artigianale nella realizzazione di borse e accessori e coniuga l’importante tradizione per la lavorazione della pelle alle più moderne tecniche di produzione.
I servizi offerti da Lupi Group si articolano su più reparti produttivi.
Dal Reparto Tecnico dotato di software specializzati in grado di sviluppare qualsiasi tipologia di cartamodello e prototipo di accessorio, all’Ufficio Prodotto sempre attento alla ricerca e selezione di materiali della migliore qualità da produttori Italiani.
Il Reparto Taglio è nelle mani dei nostri maestri artigiani i quali uniscono la loro conoscenza alle più moderne tecnologie dedicate.
I Reparti Preparazione e Assemblaggio lavorano in simbiosi, unendo l’attenta performance dell’avanzamento in linea del prodotto, alle mani delle operatrici più esperte, le quali riescono ad organizzare e garantire uno standard produttivo altissimo.
Fiore all’occhiello della nostra azienda è il Reparto Controllo e Qualità gestito dalle più severe e attente maestranze, figure preziose per il processo produttivo, le quali durante tutte le fasi lavorative seguono attentamente le procedure di controllo e fanno sì che tutto il personale sia allineato agli standard richiesti.
Lo scopo è quello di ridurre al minimo le percentuali di errore, riuscendo così a risolvere velocemente le criticità e a garantire la consegna nelle tempistiche pianificate.
Il metodo Lupi Group permette a tutte le sezioni produttive di lavorare in sinergia, grazie allo studio e alla pianificazione dei processi di avanzamento durante ogni fase. La nostra esperienza, la conoscenza del settore, ci permettono di raggiungere i più alti standard di qualità e puntualità.

Name: CHICBERLIN
Description:
Te cuento algo…
Yo soy Nitzia. Tengo 61 años y, si te soy sincera, estoy empezando otra vez.
En 2011 lancé Chicberlin, mi marca de tejidos hechos a mano. Tejía gorros, bufandas, mantas… pero también tejía paz, conversaciones, pequeños momentos en las ferias de Madrid y Segovia.
Luego vino la pandemia y todo se paró. Como muchas cosas en la vida.
Pero no me rendí. Porque cuando algo se hace con amor, siempre encuentra un nuevo camino.
Hoy ese camino se llama Lanaterapia.
No es solo aprender a tejer. Es reconectar contigo, bajar el ritmo, regalarte un espacio solo para ti.
Si estás en ese momento en el que te dices: “necesito algo solo mío”…
Este espacio es para ti.


Hace unos años cree CHICBERLIN, un proyecto multidisciplinar que agrupa el diseño y creación de mis propias prendas, la organización de talleres de PUNTO Y GANCHILLO. 

Con el tiempo me he ido metiendo cada vez más en el “mundo knitters” y descubriendo los beneficios de “TEJER”; por eso quiero proponeros Los Talleres de Punto y Ganchillo.

Requiere ritmo, requiere agilidad mental y, a su vez, exige que nuestras manos estén activas en todo momento.

Tejer a mano es hoy un fenómeno social, del que podemos obtener grandes beneficios para nuestra salud física y mental, y que muchos etiquetan YA como “lanaterapia”.
Beneficios:
1.	Ejercitamos los dos hemisferios cerebrales
2.	Reducimos el estrés
3.	Mejoramos nuestro estado anímico
4.	Ampliamos la motricidad manual
5.	Aumentamos nuestra autoestima
Dirigido A: 
Grandes, pequeños, jóvenes, ancianos, hombres, mujeres, niños y niñas. Es especialmente beneficioso en niños con problemas de conducta o motrices y personas con estrés.

Name: Higher Calling Bracelets
Description:
Hi! I'm Regina. As a graphic designer and avid reader, I’ve always loved the power of typography and words to move, motivate, uplift, empower and comfort. As an artist, I’ve transferred this passion into wearable art that functions as a daily reminder, mantra, inspiration or support that is unique to the wearer.

I loved the idea of wearing a meaningful phrase but wanted to create a more grown-up, stylish and sophisticated version of those fun little word bracelets made from plastic white beads--something with higher quality materials and elevated words and phrases. That’s why I created Higher Calling Bracelets, where I create message/word/phrase bracelets in all sterling silver (14K gold-filled accents available) and authentic gemstones. Each bracelet is hand strung and assembled. This is an important part of the process, because with every bead, I add pure presence, joy, and the intention to circle your wrist with love.

Name: PETWA
Description:
Acessórios premium para pets e humanos.

Sobre a marca:

Nunca posse, mas companhia. Nunca abaixo, mas ao lado. Nunca adorno, sempre afeto. Se a conexão entre o mundo animal e o humano nunca esteve tão próxima, é natural que esse universo ganhe novas páginas. É essa a premissa da Petwa, marca que nasce para criar um novo conceito de moda no universo pet. Se estimação é o sentimento de apreço que se tem em relação a algo ou alguém, nosso propósito é olhar para os bichos na mais alta estima e ressignificar a relação entre humanos e animais, agora de forma horizontal. É sobre experiências, sobre pet lifestyle, sobre tangibilizar essa relação através dos nossos produtos. Acima de tudo, é sobre estilo e conforto. Não à toa, o delta, símbolo da marca, representa mudança e fluidez.

Fruto da gestação de uma vida, a Petwa nasce da percepção de Letícia Sewald, sua fundadora, de que a beleza reside nas características originais desses companheiros. O resultado são criações focadas numa linguagem minimalista, no entanto sofisticada e atemporal de peças que maximizam os traços naturais dos pets.

Vivemos para trazer moda, tecnologia e inovação para esse universo, mas também para repensar o consumo, com foco em matérias primas certificadas e métodos transparentes que asseguram nosso DNA consciente. Afinal, o desejo de recompensar os animais de estimação não pode vir às custas do planeta.

Para nós, cuidar de um pet é reverenciá-lo em suas diferenças e na sua maneira de se expressar. É ver beleza na sua estética real, respeitando e celebrando a sua forma, o seu cheiro, o seu jeito, a sua liberdade. É instinto.

BEM VINDO AO MUNDO PETWA

Name: Praccessorii
Description:
Praccessorii the brand label of RAVE launched in 2017 though RAVE (the mother brand)has been in existence for over 15 years. RAVE has built a loyal and enviable clientele across India, North America, Canada and the Middle East. The brain child of a successful doctor, who after running a very successful path lab for over 30 years, decided that she wanted to explore her artistic side. And what a journey it has been – from the state-of-the-art path lab to the small artisan workshops hidden in the narrow lanes of Jaipur, Jodhpur & Bikaner to the open salt desserts of the Rann of Kutch to Ahmedabad, Jamnagar & Bhuj regions.

In these travels Venoo ji (as she is fondly called by all of her clients) identified and has nurtured artisans of all genre to create designs so unique and beautiful that it stuns the viewer. She has, in the Praccessorii portfolio, jewels (precious as well as prêt wear)  crafted with precision and passion, stoles & party bags that literally ‘steel” your heart, wedding & festival gifts that are traditional and trendy at the same time. Praccessorii is  proud to be visible on the shelves of Jaypore, Myntra, Pernia, Elahe and more recently Tata Cliq and Nykaa, they will still offer you personalized service, designing items as per your unique requirement and need.
 
Praccessorii offers you a unique opportunity to draw upon the cultural and artisan heritage of India and marry it with the style of the 21st century, thus create and accentuate your own unique style – Praccessorii is as unique, as beautiful and as stunning as the modern Indian women!

Name: Zoulette
Description:
Zoulette's inception in 2020 was driven by a profound vision centered on the empowerment of women. This vision, inspired by the founder's resilient French mother, sought to capture, transform, and fortify the essence and newfound esteem of women. The meticulous curation process, spanning from days to months and eventually years, aimed to shape the epitome of what the brand envisioned.

Launched on April 20th, 2020, Zoulette stands as a poignant tribute to the founder's beloved mother—a paragon of strength, resilience, and hard work. Beyond being a mere name, Zoulette embodies the ideals the brand wishes for its wearers to emulate. The brand's very nomenclature pays homage to the founder's hero, a significant role model who fueled her relentless work and sacrifices to ensure that her child never lacked.

In the year 2023, Zoulette takes its place on the global stage, extending its embrace to individuals worldwide, irrespective of roles or backgrounds. It goes beyond traditional boundaries, reaching mothers, wives, husbands, brothers, students, young entrepreneurs, and seasoned professionals alike. Zoulette emerges as a catalyst for change, standing as a beacon for those who may feel undervalued or grapple with low self-esteem.

More than a brand, Zoulette positions itself as a force—a force dedicated to uplifting, instilling confidence, and reshaping realities across all spectrums. It strives to be inclusive, embracing every shape, color, and size. Zoulette, therefore, transcends the realm of fashion to become a transformative influence, fostering positive change in the lives of its wearers and beyond.

May we introduce Digi-Partner: 

A no-compromise retro-gen digital wristwatch for secure, everyday use, and offline asset storage. Featuring a monochrome LCD display with electroluminescent backlight, radium keypad, and extreme battery life. Supports a variety of assets, including Bitcoin, with a wireless NFC link for transferring assets from your phone. Date, time, calculator, and a pet-NFT, care and maintain it daily. Name: PERO’S
Description:
PERO’S est une marque de vêtements qui incarne l’esprit de responsabilité, l’élégance et un style intemporel, tout en célébrant l’identité africaine. Née de l’idée que la mode doit non seulement sublimer l’apparence, mais aussi refléter les valeurs profondes et les racines culturelles de ceux qui la portent, PERO’S puise son inspiration chez les hommes et les femmes qui mènent leur vie avec détermination, intégrité, et un sens fort de l’appartenance.

L’histoire de PERO’S commence par une vision : créer des vêtements qui honorent les traditions africaines tout en répondant aux besoins des professionnels modernes — ceux qui avancent avec assurance dans leur carrière tout en restant connectés à leurs racines. Chaque pièce de la collection PERO’S est un mariage subtil entre des coupes classiques et des motifs ou textiles africains, offrant un style qui allie authenticité et modernité. Ces tenues sont conçues pour être portées aussi bien dans les environnements professionnels que lors des occasions spéciales, permettant de s’affirmer avec élégance.

Plus qu’une simple marque, PERO’S est un mouvement pour ceux qui souhaitent affirmer leur identité africaine tout en ayant un impact positif à travers leurs choix vestimentaires. Les tissus, soigneusement sélectionnés, mettent en avant le savoir-faire artisanal africain, tout en garantissant qualité et durabilité. La marque privilégie des vêtements durables et intemporels, encourageant une consommation responsable et valorisant les talents locaux, créant ainsi une alternative significative à la mode éphémère.

À travers PERO’S, la mission est claire : habiller les hommes et les femmes qui veulent non seulement se distinguer par leur style, mais aussi affirmer leur fierté africaine et leur engagement pour un avenir responsable. PERO’S se veut le reflet d’une Afrique moderne et dynamique, qui embrasse ses traditions tout en s’ouvrant au monde.

Name: ESKAE
Description:
Deeply rooted in the creation of art and using this channel as a form of expression, Eskae strives for an ethereal and luxurious experience to share with you.

Our products are visionary statement pieces that combine elements of the fantastical and eccentric that leave an everlasting impression. Our pieces aim to deconstruct and construct a world that you can write the rules for, one through which you can distort or expand reality.

The terrain of morality tales, childhood lessons, and myths is ripe domain for boundary-pushing perversions to seed in this world.

As art often inspires art, our pieces are an extension of the soul of the artist. Intertwining the essence of imagination with reality, we bring to you EsKae, by Drishti Verma, a world where you relocate fantasies and don an artistry.

____

At GreenWarrior, we don’t follow trends; we forge transformation blending artistry with ethics to craft style that speaks to the soul and serves the Earth.

This is more than sustainable fashion.

Be bold. Be aware. Be a Green Warrior.

Name: 1974 Leather Co
Description: 1974 leather goods will be loved for their indie-spirited ways. They are sturdy and strong. Modern, yet vintage infused. Where stories have seeped in, dwelling in each piece of full-grain, Italian leather before it’s even made into the heirloom it will become. Where quality over quantity reigns. Name: D'ALMEIDA HATS
Description:
D’ALMEIDA HATS is a bespoke label that champions creativity and self expression. Handmade to order, our hats marry old world artisanship, sartorial prowess, and a modern-day thirst for adventure.  

Collaboration is at the heart of our custom service. We work intimately with you through the journey of creation to bring your vision to life. Select from the most sophisticated range of options to craft a truly unique piece.
Stefanie and Jose Almeida’s philosophical minds, unbridled optimism and creative spirit are at the heart of D’ALMEIDA. The eponymous label is first and foremost a labor of love. The brand’s inception was sparked through a mutual curiosity and an expedition into Jose’s ancestry. Delving further into his family’s deep Northern Portugal roots birthed an intimate relationship with the region’s renowned craftmanship.

The entrepreneurial duo sought to create more than a product. Stefanie and Jose have created an experience where clients can express their inner selves through style to claim their own patch of the world. With help from some of the world’s best artisans, D’ALMEIDA hats empower the wearer to set sail and take on all that life has to offer.

Name: layauplife
Description:
laya is a circular design brand created by MJ’s Event Services, extending the life of flooring once used in exhibitions and events.

Born from MJ’s long-standing commitment to sustainability and innovation, laya represents the next evolution of that mission, taking flooring that once defined temporary spaces and transforming them into products designed for everyday use.

What began as a flooring solution for some of the UK’s biggest events has evolved into a design brand with purpose. Each product, from sunglasses to tote bags, is crafted from used event carpet, flooring that would otherwise go to waste. Through thoughtful design and collaboration, flooring is given a new chapter: a second story that connects craftsmanship, sustainability, and style.

At laya, circularity isn’t a concept; it’s a commitment. Every product demonstrates how waste can become resource, and how design can drive meaningful change. By turning what was once overlooked into something functional and beautiful, we redefine how flooring lives beyond the event space.

Our work builds on MJ’s belief that sustainability is not about perfection; it’s about progress, creativity, and responsibility. Together, MJ’s and laya close the loop between the event industry and design, proving that innovation can be both practical and inspiring.

From event floors to lifestyle essentials, our journey is about impact that lasts, not just in products, but in the mindset we inspire.

Circular by design, stylish by nature.

Name: Ydos Dorybės
Description:
Ydos Dorybės (YD) “Vices Virtues” is a creative project founded in 2023, dedicated to exploring and transforming the complex spectrum of human emotions through art and self-discovery.

At YD, we dissolve the dichotomy between “good” and “bad” human traits, inspired by Carl Jung’s theory of the shadow. We believe that embracing and expressing all parts of ourselves—especially the aspects we tend to repress—brings vitality and wholeness to our psyche. Our work centers on translating powerful emotions into handcrafted jewelry, especially through our signature Face-Ring Workshops.

The Face-Ring Workshop:

An intuitive and transformative experience where participants channel and mold their emotions—whether anger, joy, or sorrow—into a unique, personalized face-ring. The workshop encourages healthy emotional expression, self-reflection, and the creation of a tangible, wearable reminder of one’s journey. It’s a space to transform your inner world into art, all while learning the artistry behind jewelry making.

We are currently curating workshops in Vilnius and Kaunas, offering a creative and meaningful way to engage with your emotions and connect with like-minded individuals.

“Ydos Dorybės isn’t just about aesthetics. It’s a meaningful connection to oneself, a creative process that empowers people to understand and integrate their full spectrum of emotions.”

— Deimantė Litvinaitė, YD Creator & Crafter

Explore your shadow. Transform your emotions. Wear your story.

For our most recent updates, follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ydos_dorybes

Name: STASHAROO
Description:
STASHAROO: Urban Style Meets Cannabis Culture

Born from the dynamic graffiti culture of the NYC 80s street scene, STASHAROO is redefining cannabis accessories. Our high-performance range includes smell-proof bags and cases, humidity-controlled jars, sleek grinders, and more, designed for discreet use, portability, and lifestyle integration.

Our smell-proof bags, featuring multi-layered carbon technology, contain all odors, ensuring stress-free transportation and storage. The array of products aims to enhance the cannabis experience and to seamlessly blend it into daily life.

Our founder's journey, from being a part of NYC's iconic graffiti collective CMD to working with fashion mavens like Isaac Mizrahi and Donna Karan, has imbued STASHAROO with a unique blend of urban artistry and quality craftsmanship. The brand aspires to destigmatize cannabis use, advocating discretion and style.

As the shift towards cannabis normalization progresses, STASHAROO envisions leading the cannabis lifestyle market with world-class accessories and design excellence. Committed to our roots, we aim to foster economic growth in our home of Washington Heights while preserving its rich artistic heritage.


With normalization and legalization expanding nationally, STASHAROO seeks to destigmatize cannabis use through world-class accessories that keep supplies odor-free. The brand plans to grow its product catalog while upholding its commitment to premium quality and discreet urban style. As pioneers of the cannabis lifestyle space, STASHAROO strives to empower enthusiasts to incorporate cannabis into everyday life.


Join STASHAROO, and be a part of this urban revolution!

Name: Convert Art
Description:
Convert Art is the first upcycling company in Greece and manufactures handmade handbags, jewelery, accessories and other every day use products, made exclusively from used inner tubes, tires, airplane lifejackets, advertising banner, electrical materials, wood, aluminum etc.
The company began in 2012 when the creator Marina Griponisioti found herself in a car garage. There were many fallen tires there, so she thought to experiment with one of them. She borrowed the garage tools and made her first belt. In the same period, she began to process an old portable speaker, the parts of which turned out as a colorful and fantastic jewel.

This was how it started, by collecting inner tubes, tires and electrical equipment and at present Convert Art has 60 different types of products over 400 different designs.

Convert Art products have been exhibited at various exhibitions and markets:
 Papastratos StartUp Awards (2017)
 Athens Safary Start Up (2017)
 Athens Fashion Trade Show (2016)
 Modern Creations (2016)
 The Fashion Room service (2015)
 Pleiadon Gi (2014 solo exhibition)
 Greek Design = Good Design (2013)
 Mirtali Art Hotel (solo exhibition 2013)
 The Meet Market (2013)
In December 2013, the collection of jewelry made of electrical materials and handmade inner tube bags won an award at the Greek Design = Good Design contest, while in 2016 the Convert Art collection of polymorphic bags was awarded with the Top Design Award for 2016. In December of the same year, Convert Art was selected to participate in the European Final of the StartUp Europe Awards in Brussels.

Up to now, Convert Art has over 35 points of sale in Greece, Cyprus and abroad.

Within the first five years, it has reused more than 20 tons of inner tubes, giving them life again, while protecting the environment from the pollution.

Name: Dustlane Motorcycle Bags

Noi di Dustlane condividiamo da anni la passione per il mondo dei motori e conosciamo le qualità estetiche e funzionali di un prodotto necessarie per essere apprezzate dai bikers di tutto il mondo.

Creiamo prodotti versatili per vivere quotidinamente emozioni uniche, per chi come noi usa la moto ogni giorno.
Per questo le nostre borse da moto in pelle conciata al vegetale sono ispirate dall ́eleganza di chi ama il concetto artigianale di prodotti unici e dalla flessibilità di chi vive il contemporaneo.

Le borse laterali da moto Dustlane, uniche al mondo con aggancio rapido senza supporti fissi, incarnano lo spirito vintage tipico delle Modern Classic. Una nuova linea di prodotti realizzati artigianalmente in Italia con i piú pregiati materiali, eleganti e tecnologici allo stesso tempo. Le borse da moto in pelle Dustlane integrano al loro design elegante e ricercato l´innovativo sistema di aggancio rapido Quick Lock System, brevettato per garantire sicurezza ed affidabilitá sulla moto e pensato per posizionare in maniera facile e veloce tutte le borse da moto laterali Dustlane.

Name: Fabrefine
Description:
We are an ethical & sustainable brand, who believes in wearing the change you want to see. We breathe new life into old fabrics, by creating colorful & quirky lifestyle & fashion accessories made from recycled denims, which are locally sourced. We strongly believe that the fast fashion industry depletes the earth’s resources, and leverages slave labour to pass on a “cheap” cost to the end consumer. 



At FabRefine, all our artisans are fairly compensated, and our aim is to change the preconceived notions the society holds for used materials. We’re all for creating a community for like-minded people, who care about the Earth, and are trying to reduce their fashion footprint. We have made it a central part of our mission to approach fashion in an ethical and transparent way, considering both the people and the planet.

Name: BoQche collection
Description:
At Boqche, we are proud to be a sustainable brand that offers accessible luxury with a deep appreciation for culture. Drawing inspiration from my own heritage, we have created a fashion brand that seamlessly blends tradition and contemporary design.

Our passion lies in collecting exquisite, high-quality antique scarves from diverse women around the world. Each scarf carries a unique story and embodies the artistry and craftsmanship of its origin. We carefully curate these scarves, preserving their beauty and history, and transform them into stunning bags.

By repurposing these timeless textiles, we embrace sustainability and promote a circular fashion ethos. Our commitment to ethical practices extends beyond the materials we use. We collaborate with local artisans and craftsmen, supporting their livelihoods and preserving traditional techniques.

Boqche's collection represents the perfect fusion of heritage and innovation. Our bags, meticulously crafted with attention to detail, exhibit the finest quality and showcase the intricate patterns and motifs of the scarves. Every piece we create tells a captivating tale, reflecting the rich cultural heritage from which it emerged.

We believe that luxury should be accessible, enabling everyone to experience the joy of owning a uniquely designed bag that carries the essence of generations. With Boqche, you can embrace sustainability, indulge in luxury, and celebrate the beauty of cultural diversity.

Join us in our journey to redefine sustainable luxury, one exquisite bag at a time. Experience the fusion of cultures and become a part of a global community that appreciates heritage, quality, and conscious fashion. Welcome to the world of Boqche.
