Name: GUTWERK
Description:
GUTWERK bags & accessories are handmade in Austria.
We create unique products from vegan apple leather and recycled materials, always with the aim of perfectly harmonizing aesthetics and functionality.

WE TURN EVERYTHING upside down
Sometimes you have to head in the opposite direction in order to end up doing the right thing. From the materials over manufacturing to our distribution, none of this is "common".

VEGAN AND SUSTAINABLE MATERIALS
One of our most important principles is to do no harm. This does not include humans only but also animals and our environment. Therefore, we only use vegan apple leather, recycled cotton, recycled PET and dead-stock materials. 

MADE JUST FOR YOU
Our made-to-order manufacturing approach enables us to avoid tons of waste since every product is made individually on demand.

HANDCRAFTED - REGIONAL & FAIR
We produce exclusively in Austria via a constantly growing network of small independent ateliers. In this way we contribute to reviving regional craftsmanship and can ensure that production is carried out responsibly and fairly.

Name: Estúdio Blocks
Description:
Acessórios e objetos contemporâneos feitos de um jeitinho futurista, desde 2017. Materializados com biopolímero através de impressão 3D, finalizados à mão. 

É através da impressão 3D que nossas peças nascem na forma física. Esse processo se chama manufatura aditiva. Ele acontece a partir de um extrusor, que deposita camadas subsequentes da matéria-prima aquecida, formando a peça. Um jeitinho um tanto quanto futurista, com possibilidades mais sustentáveis de produzir, além de descentralizar produções e permitir que marcas pequenas, mais conscientes e locais, coloquem no mundo suas criações de forma independente.

Nossa matéria-prima é o PLA, um biopolímero produzido a partir da polimerização do ácido lático, obtido pela fermentação de açúcares presentes em vegetais como milho e cana-de-açúcar. Diferente dos plásticos comuns e outros materiais provenientes do petróleo, o PLA é um material feito de fonte renovável, com uma obtenção de impacto ambiental reduzido.
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Iselin Jewelry
Description:
Raw and edgy, yet elegant and timeless fine designer jewelry. Hand made in Norway by designer Iselin Strømsvåg. 

As the brand name may reveal, the creation of the Iselin jewelry pieces is a very personal process for the designer. All designs are hand made in the Iselin studio in Kristiansand, Norway.

THE INSPIRATION

Iselin Strømsvåg was born and now lives in the south of Norway close to the sea. The sea, and nature itself is such a core part of the culture in the coast of southern Norway. She grew up with a very close and personal connection to the sea, a place to always find calmness, strength and a sense of home. 

Nature is an unending source of inspiration, but especially the sun, light, and the sea.

THE JEWELRY

Every piece of jewelry is hand made in Studio Iselin in Norway. The materials used are Sterling Silver (925), Pure Silver (999) (recycled) and 18 Karat Gold plating. Most of the pieces are fully or partially hand carved from silver clay, which gives them that truly organic and rough look that is a signature for Iselin's designs. You can easily recognize an Iselin piece from its unique texture and the balance between the rough and the fine. Modern, but at the same time made to always be current and timeless.

THE CONCIOUS CHOICES

All pieces are made to order, and by doing so we have close to zero waste (both in materials and in finished products). This choice is also to be a part of the movement against fast fashion. 

THE BACKGROUND
Iselin is a trained Clothing Designer (Fashion school: ESMOD Oslo) and Social Anthropologist. She has been working with jewelry for 15 years prior to starting Iselin, then with her jewelry brand Dreams of Norway. After a pause from the jewelry business for a few years, she started her new brand Iselin in the beginning of 2022.

Description:
FATRA is a pioneering company in creative waste solutions, dedicated to transforming the fashion industry's approach to design, production, and consumption. Located in Staten Island, New York, but operating on a global scale, FATRA focuses on reintroducing overstock materials into the production chain, providing a sustainable alternative to using virgin materials. This innovative approach not only recirculates raw materials but also aims to eliminate waste and minimize the use of valuable resources, thereby promoting a circular economy within the fashion sector.

FATRA offers a diverse range of services, including product development, consulting, educational programming, and fashion, interior, and set design. By viewing waste as a design flaw and recognizing the potential to recapture value, FATRA is committed to accelerating the shift towards treating waste as a valuable resource. Our mission is to reshape the industry's mindset, encouraging sustainable practices and fostering a more circular, resource-efficient future in fashion and beyond.

Name: Laino Industry S.r.l.
Description: Tradizione, know-how, attenzione alle tendenze e ricercatezza stilistica sono i capisaldi che, sin dall’inizio della sua storia, caratterizzano la Laino Industry Srl. Una storia che comincia a Napoli nel 1928, quando grazie alle idee e alla sapiente mano di Vincenzo Laino il brand vede la luce in un piccolo laboratorio artigianale specializzato nella realizzazione di selle per cavalli su misura e portalibri in pelle. Il successo e l’apprezzamento della clientela non tardano ad arrivare e il passaggio da bottega a azienda strutturata è tanto meritato quanto inevitabile: nel 1980 aumentano gli spazi e le maestranze e viene inaugurato lo stabilimento al centro di Napoli, emblema di una crescita lampante pur con la precisa volontà di non distaccarsi mai dai canoni dell’antica tradizione napoletana del cucito a mano. Nel corso degli anni, la qualità dei prodotti realizzati viene sempre più apprezzata da pubblico e addetti ai lavori: è il 1990 la data di inizio della produzione conto terzi per brand nazionali e internazionali, tra cui spiccano Luisa Spagnoli, Cavalli Class, Scervino Street, Iceberg, Liu Jo, Fornarina, Elie Saab, Marina Rinaldi, Pinko. Produrre accessori moda di altissimo design, lasciando che il pubblico ne apprezzi l’aspetto e i materiali di estrema qualità come Swarovski e le pelli di prima scelta, è l’obiettivo che ogni giorno spinge Laino Industry a reinventare l’approccio creativo con un solo obiettivo: la bellezza.

Name: CASHFANA
Description:
We are Maria and Esther, sisters from the Costa Brava region in Spain. After a life-changing trip to Bangladesh and Nepal we settled on the idea of starting a project that would bring handmade high-quality goods sourced from the most remote places on earth. This project is called CASHFANA.

We both grew up and studied law in university, with a special emphasis on how we can use our talents to help those who were less fortunate. For this reason, when we started traveling more often together, we would search for ways that might be able to help the local communities that we encountered on our travels. Soon we realized that selling the beautiful artisanal products that many of these communities made, could really help the families by providing them additional income. After all, if you give a man a fish, you feed him for a day. If you teach a man to fish… you all know how the saying goes.

CASHFANA is a treasure chest of memories in form of jewelry and accessories from different corners of the world. Each piece is a window into their people that we are passionate about sharing with you. Every time you buy at CASHFANA you will be supporting an artisan. From local to you.

One of us now lives in Los Angeles and the other in Barcelona.

I invested in a new Cricut and Sublimation machine to pass the time and started creating again. It was the best decision I've ever made. Some types of work carried out are painted boxes, mugs, tshirt shirts, stainless traveling mugs. I have changed my brand a lot during these 2 years. I started selling repurchased clothes and now I am making my own products. I'm so proud of how far Infinity has come and how far we still have to go!

Some pieces are assembled with fabric glue, while others are knitted and folded with threads of different sizes and colors.

Based in Eswatini, Gon Accessories proudly sources 100% local materials, turning waste into wearable art. The studio operates from Princess Nolwazi Dlamini's home, where she transforms old denim jeans, zippers, African printed fabrics (tisheshe), thorns from dry trees (emanyeva), bottle caps from taverns, plastic bags (Khondze Khaya), and indigenous grass (Lukwane) into stunning accessories.

Name: Blankspot
Description:
Si me hubieran dicho hace unos años que acabaría dedicándome a esto, no lo habría creído. Pero, si miro atrás, en realidad Blankspot siempre ha estado ahí, incluso cuando ni siquiera tenía nombre.

Soy Blank y desde niña me han fascinado los accesorios. Nada me gustaba más que ir con mi madre a comprar abalorios y pasar horas diseñando pulseras y collares, convencida de que eran lo más top del mundo.

Cada verano, en el pueblo donde veraneaba, se organizaba un mercadillo para que los niños vendieran lo que quisieran. Mientras otros llevaban bizcochos o juguetes que tenían por casa, yo preparaba accesorios durante todo el verano para llegar al mercadillo con mi mesa llena de creaciones. Ahí, sin saberlo, nació Blankspot.

Años después, durante la cuarentena, redescubrí mi pasión. Me hice unos pendientes sin pensarlo mucho y, de repente, sentí la misma emoción de cuando era niña. Empecé a hacer más para mí, para mis hermanas, para mis amigas… y todas me decían lo mismo: 'Tienes que venderlos'.

Así que le di vueltas, pensé un nombre, creé una colección, quedé con amigas para hacer fotos y lancé la cuenta de Instagram. Un año después, creé la web, y Blankspot empezó a viajar por toda España.

Durante la universidad fue una montaña rusa. Había meses en los que le dedicaba todo mi tiempo y otros en los que apenas podía tocarlo. Pero nunca lo abandoné. Hasta que, en junio de 2024, me gradué y llegó la gran pregunta: "¿Y ahora qué?" No me veía en otro trabajo que no fuera este, así que aposté por mi sueño.

Porque Blankspot no son solo joyas. Es el accesorio que transforma un look básico en algo especial. Ese detalle que te hace sentir segura y lista para comerte el mundo. Cuando llevas unos Blankspot, sientes el mismo empoderamiento que cuando sales de casa con un outfit que te encanta y sabes que hoy será un gran día.

En choisissant Poema, chaque femme adopte une démarche écoresponsable et participe à un mouvement de mode qui valorise notre planète.

Découvrez plus sur notre univers écoresponsable en visitant le blog de Poema Paris, où nous partageons des conseils, des inspirations et des histoires inspirantes sur la mode durable.

Name: Squïd Studios
Description:
Tackling climate change is a classic game theory problem. At squïd studios we want to inspire others to help shift our economy towards a sustainable and fair future, by showcasing a business model consisting of selling recycled jewellery, fashion and accessoires, as well as organising educational events like repair sessions, upcycling workshops and discussion rounds. Follow us on instagram and check out our website to make sure you don't miss the next event!

We make jewellery, fashion and accessories out of old and discarded materials e.g. fabrics from old curtains, deadstock fabric, old and broken jewellery, production waste from all kinds of processes, and strive to set an example as a sustainable brand. With a circular economy mindset, we prioritise minimising waste, promoting repairs, and only utilise truly recycled materials (not greenwashed ones).
We also put an emphasis on diversity, inclusion and want to challenge society's narrow-minded ideas of beauty. 

We want to urge everyone to act responsibly, inform themselves and always be critical of bold sustainability claims, especially when supply chain transparency is limited.

Name: Hepco
Description:
Since Carl Hepting & Co.KG was founded 95 years ago, HEPCO crafts genuine leather products for the B2B market. Ever since, the company has a very international orientation. Having exported in more than 80 different countries we are aware of different tastes and what timeless fashion truly means. 
Still, Germany is not just our historical anchor but also our location of choice.

Both, our relatively small size, and our location in Marbach am Neckar, in the center of Europe, are big advantages for our clients. 
It allows us to deliver several hundreds of belts per week without long and uncertain shipping times, yet keeping up the quality of our crafts on the high level of an experienced manufactory rich of crafting tradition. 

As a producer coming from a craftsman background we are able to modify any belt delivery to the wishes of the costumer rather than having him to fully adapt articles as they are.

Furthermore, sustainability plays a big role in our quality management. Only using selected leathers we are convinced of, HEPCO offers belts made of full-grain leather, nappa, calf as well as several kinds of fair leather, like vegetable tanned full-grain leather which contain less chemicals.

We are currently the only producer offering Rhababerleder(Rhubarbleather) - belts. These are only tanned by an special extract of rhubarb making them very skin friendly, soft and environment preserving.

If you are ever close to Marbach, feel free to visit our production site and see yourself how we produce stylish belts being modern and classical at the same time.

Description:
Fabricant et créateur de textile d'affaires depuis plus de 50 ans, RDD Textiles imagine vos textiles personnalisés pour que vous puissiez souligner votre singularité. 

Aujourd'hui, nous continuons d'écrire notre histoire avec des pièces authentiques, inspirés par l'unicité de votre projet. 

𝙇'𝙝𝙞𝙨𝙩𝙤𝙞𝙧𝙚 𝙙'𝙪𝙣𝙚 𝙥𝙖𝙨𝙨𝙞𝙤𝙣
RDD Textiles, c'est avant tout une passion pour le tissage français. Passionné depuis son plus jeune âge, René-Denis Dabbène a transmis cette amour du fil de génération en génération. C'est donc au travers d'un savoir-faire historique et d'une passion familiale que nous sommes devenus le partenaire de confiance des associations, fédérations sportives, institutions et des enseignes de la haute couture.

𝙐𝙣 𝙨𝙖𝙫𝙤𝙞𝙧 𝙛𝙖𝙞𝙧𝙚 𝟭𝟬𝟬% 𝙛𝙧𝙖𝙣𝙘̧𝙖𝙞𝙨 𝙚𝙩 𝙞𝙩𝙖𝙡𝙞𝙚𝙣
Le respect du tissage français est pour nous une évidence depuis le premier jour. Nous avons donc déployé notre propre atelier de confection pour avoir la maîtrise complète de chaque étape de fabrication (design, tissage, impression, confection et expédition).  De la soie naturelle aux fibres synthétiques, nous sélectionnons minutieusement nos matières et mettons tout notre savoir-faire issu de la pure tradition Lyonnaise au service de vos créations. 

𝙋𝙖𝙧𝙩𝙚𝙣𝙖𝙞𝙧𝙚 𝙙𝙚 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩𝙞𝙡𝙚 𝙙'𝙖𝙛𝙛𝙖𝙞𝙧𝙚𝙨
Présent sur l'ensemble des continents, RDD Textiles repousse les frontières françaises pour mettre son expertise au service des institutions présentes dans le monde entier. Pour conserver une fabrication française/italienne et limiter notre empreinte écologique, nous tenons à maintenir un circuit court.

Name: Ffin Eyewear
Description:
Ffin is a multi-award winning new independent eyewear brand designed by artist and jewellery designer Anna Lewis.

These limited edition range of sunglasses are designed in Wales and handmade in Italy from the best Italian acetate.

ETHOS:
Ffin is a new independent eyewear brand designed with love in Wales and made by hand with care in Italy. Founded in 2022. "Ffin" translates to border, boundary, or frontier in Welsh. The brand focuses on defining lines, whether real or imaginary, visible, tangible, or invisible. Ffin is for the adventurous, the outsiders, the creative souls walking their own path in the world. It's eyewear for individuals who skirt the rules of the status quo.

FOUNDER:
Ffin is founded and designed by Anna Lewis. With a successful career in jewellery design. Anna brings her considered attention to detail to eyewear. "It feels like a natural progression for me to design eyewear from jewellery," says Anna. She aims to provide individual confidence for her clients through her unique eyewear designs.

MATERIAL/PROCESS:
The collection defines the brand's ethos of line and point of difference. The frames are made to an optical standard and can be fitted with prescription lenses. They are unisex, using the best bio-based Italian acetate, and the anti reflective sun lenses are made with a 40% plant-based material. Ffin prioritises eco-friendly practices, with all packaging recycled to minimise environmental impact.

INSPIRATION:
Everything stems from the obsession over lines—where they fold, intersect, curve, and dissect. Ffin finds inspiration in the urban landscape, gritty architecture, borders marked on the road, and the interaction of the body with space. Ffin frames are designed to let wearers "wear the world."

Name: DUNZ
Description:
Dunz tells a story of the veil that stood the test of time. 

Tagelmust is what nomad tribes of north Africa used to call it. Tagelmust was worn as a veil by men of the desert. Men who roamed as free spirits, enigmatic, veiled riders who controlled commerce and trade between Black Africa, Europe, and the Middle East for a thousand years.

Tagelmust protected them from natures hardships. Helped them navigate this unforgiving land with calm, and certainty. 

At Dunz, we celebrate this lifestyle. We work to restore this lifestyle, in the middle of a hustle full culture. We are the voice of wisdom in the ever-stretching horizons of life, freedom from the never-ending pursuits of life, and resilience against the ongoing struggles of life.

Our veil is a symbol of a lifestyle, an identity rooted in history and steadily building a prosperous, balanced future.

The idea is to produce luxury accessories with a made in Italy design, dedicated to quality leather goods. Today, thanks to the support of our loyal customers and an excellent, ever-growing team, it has been possible to bring the vision of our brand to a global level.

Andrea Morante offers a variety of luxury accessories, produced with the best leathers worked by expert craftsmen. Each leather and accessory is rigorously checked before and after production.

The young entrepreneur's goal is to expand more and more in the world, thanks to the elegance of his productions, providing those who wear his luxury accessories with a real philosophy of life that aims for success in personal and professional life.

Name: EMA-BIA
Description:
Fashion & Design - Silk Bags and Accessories 
EMA-BIA  accessories are fully handmade in Italy as per the typical artisanal tradition of the high-quality silk sector.
Every items ok kit collections is one of a kind and exclusive, hand-made and studied according to the Italian taste and creativity. It is made with 100% silk, chamois and selected leathers.
The tradition of craftsmanship of the Varese area and in the working of leathers goods encounters the world renown craftsmanship of Como for the working of silk, with the precise aim of offering a one-of-a-kind product and enhance the patrimony and tradition of Italian local craftsmanship.
The silk, leather and chamois are hand cut; likewise, the setting of rivets, the warm lining, the gluing of the reinforcements and final stitches are also all performed by hand. The meticulous care for details is a guarantee of the authenticity and quality of each product.
Accessories created with top of the range quality and the wish to introduce the Italian craftsmanship to the world and thus create a real link and a sense of proximity which touches all cultures, unites tastes and history stimulated us to enter the global market.

Name: Acquasparta Firenze
Description:
Named after Matteo d’Acquasparta, who brought peace to the warring factions of medieval Tuscany, the Brand was founded in Florence, in 2008, and specializes in the production of high-quality sneakers, entirely designed and made in Italy. 

In 2022 the Brand was taken over by Elena Mercantini, who’s vision to revitalize it focusses on a product of elegance and comfort, for everyday use in business or leisure, across genders and freeing sneakers from their conventional image as a streetwear item. The feel, construction and materials are typical of higher luxury shoes and reflect the craftsmanship, acquired over generations, by artisans in Italy’s most prominent shoemaking district. 

The traditional approach to manufacturing, together with the choice of direct online distribution, converge in a mix of contemporary customs and Italian technical prowess: technology and tradition at their utmost.

Heel Shields are High Heel Protectors.

When left uncovered, heels will sink into grass or quickly become damaged by mud, bricks, cobblestones etc. 

Heel shields : 
Prevent heels from sinking into the grass.
Prevent heels from getting damaged.
Prevent embarrassing slips and falls.

The shields work by increasing the surface area of the heel. This increased surface area makes it easy to walk on any surface - grass, bricks, pebbles, sidewalks, wooden decks(the list just goes on)

Increasing the surface area on the bottom of the heel will also significantly reduce any discomfort or pain caused by walking for a longer time in stilettos

We believe that making garments is not a process of cutting and sewing but it involves a lot of critical issues from the very beginning to end like the selection of factory site, construction of compliant factory building, selection of modern machinery, recruitment policy for recruiting the right people health, security, and social aspect of employees, quality assurance, buyer’s satisfaction, environmental issues, and a lot more. Considering the present global socio-economic situation, we have established a very balanced factory catering to the need of our buyers in terms of providing quality products and addressing the health, security, and the social aspect of labor which is one of the paramount concerns at present. We believe our working force is our assets and our main concern is to develop the skill of our working force.

In addition to our focus on quality, we also prioritize sustainability in our manufacturing processes. We make conscious efforts to reduce waste, optimize energy usage, and utilize eco-friendly materials wherever possible. By embracing sustainable practices, we contribute to a greener and more sustainable fashion industry.

Moreover, we understand the importance of timely delivery in the fast-paced fashion industry. Our dedicated customer service team ensures that all our clients' queries and concerns are addressed promptly and to their satisfaction.

Experience the difference of working with a reputed manufacturer that values excellence, quality, and sustainability. Contact us today to discuss your requirements and let us collaborate to bring your vision to life.

Name: Tohe social enterprise
Description:
Tohe is a Vietnamese social enterprise founded in 2006.  Tohe helps disadvantaged children (children with autism, children with disabilities,...) to access quality education through providing weekly art education programs/classes. 
 
The artworks selected from these classes are used to design unique gifts (such as: accessories, fashions, kid toys). 5% of sales are paid to those children as royalties.
 
Besides the available products, Tohe provides gift design and manufacturing services upon customers’ requirements.
 
In addition, Tohe also organizes annual art exhibitions to help raise awareness about autism. For other children (particularly children in urban areas), Tohe is well known as an organizer of numerous creative events, where they can learn creatively through playing with different materials.

Cuore artigiano e sguardo al futuro 

Una realtà storica con quarant'anni di esperienza: questa è Pelletterie Leather Style, azienda specializzata nella produzione e montaggio di portafogli e articoli di piccola pelletteria per le grandi griffe della moda. 
L'attività nasce nel 1978 con Alessandro Carpi, che ha trasmesso passione e know how alle figlie e alla moglie, che attualmente guidano la ditta. Pur mantenendo un metodo di lavorazione artigianale, l'azienda ha la forza e le competenze di una solida realtà e si è dotata di tecnologie innovative che permettono di produrre con tempestività le diverse richieste dei clienti. 
Professionalità, intraprendenza e un'ottima organizzazione interna, chiudono il cerchio di questa consolidata azienda. 



An artisan heart that looks to the future

A time-honoured company with forty years of experience: this is Pelletterie Leather Style, a company specialized in the production and assembly of wallets and small leather goods for famous fashion brands. The bussiness was founded in 1978 by Alessandro Carpi, who transmitted his passion and expertise to his wife and daughters, who currently run the company. Even though the company has  maintained its artisan workmanship, it has the strength and competences of a solid company and is equipped with innovative technologies that  have made it possible to produce varied  client requests in a timely manner. 
Professionalism, resourcefulness and a good internal organisation complete the circle of this consolidated company.

Description:
Rex Club 

For several years, we have been offering our range of Rex Club headwear to sports teams and businesses across the United Kingdom.

Our focus has always been to supply caps and hats to the British market, delivered by a British company.

We offer our customers two distinct production programs:

The UK program offers low order quantities with fast turn arounds; we use our extensive stock range of custom caps and complete the embroidery in house.

The overseas program offers a fully customisable service, using the moulds and styles we designed for our UK range but with all the extras our customers can conceive.

By providing two distinct services, we can accommodate our grassroots sports clubs, university teams, small businesses – through to the sports teams you watch in stadiums across the country or on your TV’s.

We have never compromised on quality, and that is why when you see your favourite cricketer wearing a Rex Club cap – that is exactly what you’ll be able to buy in the club shop.

Start creating your own bespoke headwear today and join our club.

Rex Club – For The Players For The Fans.

Name: Nussa
Description:
Todo comenzó en 2019, cuando hice un Erasmus en Milán. Fue allí donde descubrí el fascinante mundo de la moda y los accesorios. Me enamoré del proceso creativo y de la posibilidad de expresarse a través de la moda.

Al regresar a España, me enfrentaba al reto del TFG, y decidí crear la identidad visual de mi propia marca de accesorios. En aquel momento, diseñaba piezas en 3D, muy distintas de lo que hago hoy.

Dos años después de entregar ese proyecto, me encontraba trabajando como social media manager, pasando el 80% de mi tiempo frente a una pantalla. Entonces, sentí la necesidad de desconectar del mundo digital y volver a crear joyas.

En 2023, nació Nussa. Más que un espacio creativo, es una fuente de inspiración. Cada pieza es única e irrepetible, nacida de la contemplación de la naturaleza, la belleza, el arte y la vida.

Cuando decidí lanzar Nussa, no solo quería crear accesorios, sino también experimentar y desarrollar mi propia identidad visual. Me sumergí en el diseño de la web, las sesiones fotográficas y la estrategia de redes sociales, uniendo todas las disciplinas que había estudiado para dar vida a este proyecto.

Aquí, nuestras musas no son las clásicas Euterpe, Clío o Polimnia. Son Sandra, Lucía, Pablo… Personas como tú y como yo, jóvenes que inspiran la cultura contemporánea. Son amantes de la finura y la perfección.

En Nussa encontrarás piezas distintivas y de calidad, diseñadas para resaltar tu personalidad y estilo. Queremos que tú también seas un rayo de inspiración para el mundo de hoy.

Name: MAISON ALEXANDRE UPCYCLING
Description:
Ma passion pour la mode et la créativité m'a motivé à créer Maison Alexandre Upcycling, une marque de vêtements de luxe upcyclés. Je suis inspiré par la beauté de la haute couture et je suis déterminé à rendre cette élégance accessible à tous, tout en contribuant à la durabilité de l'industrie de la mode. 

 Après avoir travaillé dans le domaine de la gestion d'entreprise , j'ai ressenti le besoin de réaliser mon rêve d'enfance de rejoindre le monde de la mode. J'ai suivi une formation en stylisme modélisme, puis j'ai ouvert ma première boutique de prêt-à-porter en 2017. Bien que cette aventure se soit terminée en 2020 en raison des défis rencontrés, j'ai acquis de précieuses expériences et j'ai pu collaborer avec des professionnels renommés de l'industrie. 

 Mon entreprise se concentre sur la création de vêtements de luxe à partir de matériaux upcyclés, ce qui signifie que j'utilise des chutes de tissus provenant de maisons de haute couture pour concevoir des pièces uniques et élégantes. Je m'engage à offrir une mode éthique et durable, tout en mettant l'accent sur l'accessibilité et la diversité des tailles. Je travaille avec passion pour créer des vêtements qui célèbrent la beauté de chaque individu. 

  Je vous invite à me contacter pour découvrir l'univers de Maison Alexandre Upcycling et discuter de collaborations, de commandes personnalisées ou de toute autre opportunité de travailler ensemble. Vous pouvez me joindre via mon site web, où vous trouverez également des exemples de mes créations et des informations complémentaires sur ma marque. Rejoignez-moi dans cette aventure de la mode durable et accessible !

Name: udiri
Description:
At Udiri, we transform natural materials into timeless objects of connection. We merge craft, culture and sustainability to create pieces that carry stories of resilience, renewal and heritage.

Empowering hands: Our collective of refugee and displaced women artisans shapes every object—rolling paper into beads, hammering brass into curves and weaving fibers into form. Each piece is a bond between maker and wearer, honouring both the craftsperson and the craft itself.

Heritage & innovation: Inspired by Igbo motifs like Nkeko, Dóya, Aya and Njikota, our designs bridge ancestral narratives and contemporary aesthetics. We celebrate cultural depth while innovating with techniques that turn humble materials into modern heirlooms.

Sustainably made: We honour the Earth by choosing materials such as recycled paper, ethically sourced brass and natural fibers. Patience and precision—ndidi—guide our process. We craft slowly and mindfully, believing that time is an ingredient in every object’s soul.

Carrying connection: Every Udiri piece is more than an accessory—it’s a story you can carry, share and live with. By choosing Udiri, you support artisans rebuilding their lives, help preserve cultural heritage and join a community committed to conscious, elegant living.

Welcome to Udiri—a world where craft becomes connection, and resilience is woven into every thread.

Name: NI EN MORE
Description:
NiEnMore is a non-profit social innovation project and clothing brand, that merges political activism, fashion and art.
We believe in the transformative impact of economically empowered women.

We also make beautiful,  one of a kind garments with extraordinary prints 

Why
Women are the backbones of a community, an economy, a country.

Cd. Juarez, Mexico, has been known for the systematic murders of women. Although the victims come from all levels of society, the majority are women who live in contexts of vulnerability due to their socio-economic condition, race and origin


Our purpose is to change the circumstances for a group of women in Cd Juarez that were once amongst the most vulnerable, through creating jobs with dignity, income that is sustainable and fair, and skills that can contribute to long term financial independence. 

Long term, we want to create opportunities for the daughters of these women, because, as research has shown, if you educate a girl then you educate a whole nation.

And we want to make beautiful garments that make people feel genuinely happy, knowing that their purchases contribute to change

If you wish to give us a donation you can do it via paypal or using the button below. Thank you!

BOARD MEMBERS

Name: SAC x AMI
Description:
Herzlich Willkommen bei SAC X AMI 

Die edlen Lederpolster, die Form und Glanz deiner Designer-Handtasche bewahren. In der Funktionalität sind die Taschenpolster vergleichbar mit einem Schuhspanner für den Lederschnürer. 

Die Polster bieten deiner geliebten Tasche Schutz, Stabilisation und sorgen dafür, dass sie ihren Wert erhalten. Verabschiede dich von Rissen, Beulen und Verformungen im Leder. 

Die Taschenpolster sind in drei geometrischen Formen erhältlich und
bestehen im Kern aus einem mittelfesten Schaumstoff. Dieser erlaubt es, dem Taschenpolster flexibel genug zu sein, um in die Tasche eingelegt zu werden, und gleichzeitig stabil genug zu sein, um der Tasche Stabilisation zu geben. Ummantelt werden die Taschenpolster von edlem italienischem Kalbsleder. 

Jedes Produkt wurde in mühevoller Handarbeit in einer Ledermanufaktur in Italien hergestellt und zeichnet sich so als Unikat aus. Der klassische Look verzichtet auf verspieltes Design und überzeugt durch seine zeitlose Eleganz.

Our Company is build on the circular economy model by using harvested rainwater only.. All our Natural dyes are sourced organic if possible and we grow our own crops for seed saving and dye supply.
All our used dye matter and excess cardboard is composted in our wormery, to be turned into rich compost to be used in growing our dye plants again. All our waste water is filtered through specially engineered plant filters, before being discharged one drop at a time into an evergreen woodland, the filter in the chain.

Name: Bayria Eyewear
Description:
Bayria Eyewear was founded in 2018 by Attilio Daniele, who brings over forty years of expertise in the eyewear industry. The brand pays tribute to the city of Bari—once called Bayria and known as the “gateway to the East”—where Art Nouveau blends with Baroque and Oriental influences. This fusion of tradition and avant-garde shapes Bayria’s collections, which reimagine Apulian Art Nouveau in a contemporary way: clean lines, distinctive details, artisanal craftsmanship, and modern technology come together in frames that are sophisticated and unique.

For Bayria, eyewear is more than an accessory: it defines the face and reflects personality. Each collection is designed to be both distinctive and easy to wear. Art is the creative fil rouge: from the first collection inspired by Bari—featuring stylized mosaics of the Basilica of Saint Nicholas—to the special edition dedicated to Lucio Fontana, winner of the 2020 Graziella Pagni Design Award. Every series draws inspiration from figures and places that shaped the history of painting, sculpture, cinema, fashion, poetry, and architecture, creating an aesthetic universe that looks to the future while rooted in elegance and quality.

Alongside style and innovation, Bayria is deeply committed to sustainability. All frames are produced in Italy in workshops that ensure ethical practices and respect for the local territory. The cellulose acetate used is 80% virgin, requires fewer solvents in production, and is built to last. Bayria Eyewear is therefore a project that combines design, innovation, and environmental responsibility, offering a product that is high-quality, original, and expressive.

trainata da un irrefrenabile desiderio di esplorare le variegate dimensioni dello stile, del design e dei colori.
Nasce nel centro di Milano, dalla passione, dall’energia,
dall’allegria e dall’esperienza pluriennale del nostro team composto da giovani brillanti che creano collezioni sempre di moda, ricche di creatività e stile. Creatività e stile Made in Italy coniugata con le più innovative tecnologie internazionali. Un team di professionisti, tra stilisti e grafici nel nostro ufficio stile, concretizza e sviluppa idee creative, innovative e commerciali facendole diventare vere e proprie
“visions” tangibili. Il processo produttivo nella sua completezza parte dallo studio grafico e stilistico di una
collezione, passando per la realizzazione di prototipi e campionature, per arrivare alla produzione e terminando l’intera catena con l’importazione e la consegna della stessa. L’azienda si occupa inoltre di fare da “service” tra le varie fasi della filiera produttiva, fornendo alle aziende di settore il potere di avvalersi delle nostre capacità a 360° o in parte a
seconda delle diverse esigenze Dalla nostra esperienza è nata Ne.On! Milano la linea di borse, zaini e accessori dallo stile urbano e lo spirito active, tessuti hi tech foto riflettenti e eco compatibili

We love what we do and hope you feel the same magic wearing our product as we experience making it.

 To create our jewellery, the only metal we use is stainless steel. Most pendants are made using natural whelks or polymer clay. One of the brand's identities are the beads that we use both in our costume jewellery and fashion accessories. Whether to create necklaces, bracelets, embroidery on pillows or bags. #Perfume #Fragrance #LuxuryScents #PerfumeLovers #ArtOfPerfumery

Name: Siena Vida
Description:
Siena Vida was founded by Vanessa Pichelli in 2020. She launched Siena Vida with the goal of transforming a hair accessories market that resulted in too much environmental harm and not enough product durability. A pioneer who has committed to the planting of a new tree for every new order, she continues to focus on listening to what people want and bringing trend-setting styles to life.

Sustainability
At Siena Vida, we appreciate that all life on Earth is impacted by the way we live our lives and the choices we make. That’s why we’re using all the resources we have - our business, our voice and our imagination - to do something about it. 

Limiting our impact is not good enough for us - we strive to make a positive impact on the Earth and that’s why we plant a tree for every single order; with no minimum order value required. It’s our way of empowering you to join us on our mission to make a positive, long-lasting impact on the environment.

Locally Sourced Fabric
As a business, one of the most direct ways in which we can limit our ecological impact is by responsibility producing high-quality, long-lasting products sourced from sustainable materials and practices. Making the best product matters significantly for saving the planet from harmful consumerism practices. 

That is why all of our sustainable fabrics are sourced from local, women-led businesses - we are driven to foster a strong community and a healthier environment.

Name: KORI
Description:
Jadis stigmatisé, le “Koko Dunda”, est un tissu teinté selon un savoir-faire propre au Burkina Faso, C’est aujourd’hui une fierté nationale, initialement porté par des personnes démunies ou réservé à la confection des tenues de travail ; le “Koko” comme on le nomme chez KORI signe un retour en force en 2016 grâce à célèbre créateur Burkinabé. 

Il s’agit d’un pagne traditionnel Burkinabé, il est aujourd’hui considéré comme un symbole fort de la mode burkinabé et a une importance historique, culturelle, sociale et économique pour le pays. Il incarne le savoir-faire, le talent et la créativité des acteurs de son secteur. Une incroyable ascension pour ce textile confectionné dans la ville de Bobo Dioulasso au Burkina Faso.

KORI est une marque de streetwear fondé en 2022, la marque décide de se démarquer et de proposer des tenues et des collabs uniques... KORI propose des articles streetwear avec une nouvelle touche, mélangeant des formes classiques avec des styles décontractés et amples. De plus, chaque pièce est faites sur mesure avec une qualité haut de gamme, offrant un luxe à tout notre précieux clients.

Le Koko Dunda est un textile traditionnel burkinabè, dont la technique de teinture consiste à plier le tissu en forme d’éventail pour créer des motifs. 

KORI IS NOT ONLY ABOUT FASHION BUT LOVE.

FashionBing: Your Style, Your Story

Name: IRIDE DE PORTU
Description:
Iride, the designer and founder of the brand, of half-Italian and half-Greek descent, studied Fashion Design at Central Saint Martins in London and at the Istituto Marangoni in Milan. 
Upon returning to Athens, Iride completed her studies in Handmade Shoe Design under the supervision of Apostolos Kouloumasis.

In 2015, Iride launched her very own eponymous line of shoes and handbags and set up an alternative atelier and showroom in the neighborhood of Psyri, a bustling and artistic hub at the center of Athens.

Her multicultural background, characterized by a refined Greek aesthetic, a vivid Italian-girl style along with an innovative perspective she gained during her extended stay in London, all resulted and translated into a premium brand designed to appeal to the most hip crowd all over the world.

Iride believes that both shoes and accessories deserve equal attention and hold a power of their own. Exquisite fabrics and luxurious leathers are transformed by her talented touch into all day backpacks, elegant clutches and distinctive shoulder bags that stand out for their mixed material design and striking, eye-catching details. 

Individually handcrafted in Athens by Iride herself or produced ethicaly in small family businesses in Greece or Italy, from the finest leathers and fabrics of Greece, Italy and Spain, to ensure both comfort and cutting edge style, the brand’s creations are transformed into works of art.

Description:

Our mission is to promote fair trade certificates for the preservation of cultural heritage. We specialize in facilitating collaborations between fashion brands and artisan communities, empowering them to shape industry practices. 

As an agency dedicated to connecting these groups, DCC prevents cultural appropriation in the B2B field. This approach enables fashion brands to design socially impactful products, recognizing fashion as a tool for positive social change. Our initiative strives to create a sustainable, culturally enriched fashion ecosystem. 

Heritage preservation is a key focus, achieved through blockchain-based certification.

Lo stesso concetto di collaborazione suggerisce la fusione armonica di più settori, con uno stile di vita creativo, che porta ad una nuova visione d’insieme, ad una nuova realtà.

Name: Aza Ecotique
Description:
Aza Ecotique was born from a Saturday morning conversation. A simple idea sparked by the desire to merge creativity with sustainability. What began as a personal experiment, soon evolved into a purpose-driven brand dedicated to redefining fashion through upcycling.

We create eco-friendly, one-of-a-kind upcycled bags, accessories and clothing from preloved garments and textiles at the end of their lifecycle. Guided by a zero-waste philosophy, every scrap of fabric is carefully stored and reused in secondary projects, ensuring nothing goes to waste.

Our strategy is to keep the process local: all the upcycled materials are sourced within Finland, and production is centralized in Helsinki. This approach reduces our carbon footprint, supports Finland’s circular economy, and guarantees transparency, quality, and ethical oversight at every step.

We consciously avoid using ultra-fast-fashion garments, staying true to our principles and refusing to contribute to exploitative or wasteful systems. Sustainability runs through everything we do, from our second-hand sewing machines and studio furniture to our minimal, recyclable packaging.

At Aza Ecotique, we believe that fashion should respect both people and the planet. Each piece we create tells a story of renewal, breathing new life into discarded textiles while contributing to a more circular and conscious future.

Name: ROUGE DESIGNS LTD
Description:

The "Everyday Elevated" Collection by DesignB London

This collection focuses on versatile pieces that can be effortlessly incorporated into daily wear, offering a touch of contemporary style and subtle statements. 
Our Collection Theme: "Modern Staples with a Twist".
DesignB London's strength is creating contemporary, accessible jewellery that elevates everyday looks. The emphasis is on versatile pieces with subtle details, whether it's a molten texture, a layered design, or a simple yet impactful pendant. 

The "Urban Edge" Collection by Faded Future

Bold, contemporary pieces perfect for elevating everyday street style, with an emphasis on versatile chains and eye-catching details.
Our Collection Theme: "Contemporary Street & Conscious Cool".
Faded Future embodies a blend of urban style with versatile designs. The collection is dominated by diverse chain types, often featuring natural or symbolic pendants, and a focus on stackable pieces in both gold and silver tones. It's about easy-to-wear jewellery that adds an edge without being overtly flashy.

The "Modern Minimalist Edge" Collection by Lost Souls

This collection embodies the sleek, slightly rebellious, and durable aesthetic that Lost Souls is known for. Stainless steel is the key material, offering a clean finish and longevity.
Our Collection Theme: "Modern Edge & Enduring Style".
Lost Souls focuses on durable, contemporary jewellery. The use of stainless steel ensures longevity, while the designs feature popular chain styles, subtle yet meaningful pendants, and versatile rings and earrings that embody a chic, urban aesthetic with a touch of timeless appeal.

Name: CALOR PRESS
Description:
Through the construction of the molds, we start from the raw material that is hot deformed, separated from the scrap by shearing to obtain a rough object, which depending on the needs can be finished with the recovery operations, at the base remains a craftsmanship that united high technology allows us to create objects of high quality, precision and attention to detail.
The brass moldings are high quality details resulting from a hot deformation, have a higher density than other processes and are free from defects.
Mass production helps to obtain a low cost of the accessory and is indispensable when specific design problems have to be solved, combining our know-how we are able to offer improved and less expensive items while maintaining high quality.
We also produce cold-formed articles and products by cold stamping of sheet metal and coining, performed by shearing and articles produced using automatic precision milling machines.
The milling machines are also used to quickly make prototypes to be tested before being put into production.
The manufacturing process is managed by specialized personnel with specific training courses for each type of work.

Name: Flechazo Perfume
Description:
Her zaman kokulara hassas bir ekip olarak, parfüm seçimlerinin kişinin kendi tenine uyumlu ve kendine has bir kokusu olmasına özen gösteriyoruz. 

Çünkü koku, insanların ilkel duygularından biri ve farkında olmasakta birini kokusuyla hatırlarız. Bu nedenle, insanların kendi karakterleriyle birlikte kendi kokularını birleştirmeye odaklanmak istedik. 

Sektörün en iyi yerlerinde eğitim alan ekibimizle birlikte, 2023 yılında bu serüvene başlamaya karar verdik.

Hazır mısın?
—-

As a team that is always sensitive to scents, we take care that perfume selections are compatible with one's own skin and have a unique scent.  

Because smell is one of the primitive feelings of people and we remember someone with their smell, even if we are not aware of it. 

That's why we wanted to focus on incorporating people's own scents along with their own character.  

We decided to start this adventure in 2023, together with our team, who received training in the best places in the industry. 

Are you ready?

Name: BREACANAUTE
Description:
Breacanaute | Legacy in Motion

Breacanaute is a cultural design house born from one radical idea: that tartan could leave Earth.

Our name fuses breacan — Gaelic for tartan, pattern, or speckled — with -naute, evoking exploration, travel, and myth. A Breacanaute is a Scottish astronaut, redefined by memory, motion, and material.

We began with the creation of the space tartan — VINCERE AD ASTRA — a textile code honouring Scottish heritage while looking unapologetically forward. From that, we designed the world’s first Tartan Spacesuit, a cultural prototype orbiting heritage, grounded in craft, and propelled by imagination.

 Breacanaute (TM) produces limited-run garments and symbolic objects, each piece a blend of artefact and declaration. Our work is for those who move with intent, wear identity lightly, and carry legacy into the unknown.

This is not just design.
It’s cultural technology.
It’s heritage reimagined.
It’s the first step on a longer journey — and we’re only just lifting off.

#VincereAdAstra | #LegacyInMotion | #Breacanaute

www.breacanaute.space

Name: Fabkik.upcycling
Description:
Obrigada, pelo seu interesse.
Sou Cecília Francisco, fundadora de Fabkik Upcycling.
Porque não sou indiferente à realidade ambiental em que vivemos, quis contribuir para a solução.
Mais do que uma apaixonada pelos têxteis e pela costura, a minha experiência em cooperação para o desenvolvimento e gestão de projetos, agrega valor ao que Fabkik Upcycling pretende ser conferindo-lhe uma visão mais estruturada para responder aos desafios atuais que se colocam às empresas, designadamente a sustentabilidade como elemento integrante da sua identidade e propósito da sua continuidade. 
Aprecio a criatividade e cultivo-a na forma como encaro a vida e desenho as minhas soluções. É com esse cunho que ofereço os serviços de Fabkik Upcycling. Os têxteis em fim de uso podem, se pensados de forma criativa e funcional, ser reaproveitados e convertidos em artigos que refletem o compromisso com a sustentabilidade, promovendo a economia circular. 
Valorizo as parcerias, a relação da empresa com a comunidade em que se insere, aportando benefícios mútuos e promovendo sinergias duradouras. 
Ao conhecer Fabkik Upcycling ficará ciente das potencialidades que o têxtil em fim de uso pode ter. Apresento soluções que podem passar pela definição de novas formas para a sua utilização, seja dentro ou fora da empresa, a criação de novos corporate gifts inovadores e úteis, ou a cedência dos têxteis à sua comunidade. Trabalhando sempre para que, quaisquer que sejam as opções definidas estas consolidem o contributo da sua empresa para as orientações ESG (ambiente, social e governança).
Contacte-me, diga que têxteis tem a sua empresa e Fabkik Upcycling empenhar-se-á em apresentar as melhores alternativas para transformar os seus têxteis conferindo-lhes um desígnio maior. 
Porque Fabkik parte da ideia de fabric/tecido e de kick-off/início, tudo pode ter um novo início de vida, inclusive os tecidos. 
Coloque-me esse desafio e ficará surpreendido até onde os têxteis podem levar a sua empresa.
Até breve.

Name: Martalía Jewelry
Description:
Martalía nace en 2008 de la unión entre Marta Lía Sánchez y Veronika Salomon, madre e hija, para crear un nuevo concepto de joyería de autor. La marca lleva el nombre de Marta Lía, directora creativa, diseñadora de joyas con formación en diseño textil y orfebrería, cuya técnica inicial consistía en tejer el metal, fusionando ambos mundos.

Veronika aporta la visión contemporánea, con formación en comunicación, marketing y gemología (GIA), además de estudios en joyería sostenible, impulsando la evolución de la marca hacia un modelo consciente e innovador.

La marca es sostenible desde su ADN: crea joyas hechas a mano, imperfectamente perfectas, usando plata reciclada, oro de economía circular y piedras naturales, además de materiales recuperados como seaglass, tetrapak, denim reciclado y desechos electrónicos (E-waste). 

Esta última línea obtuvo reconocimiento internacional, siendo Martalía la única marca ecuatoriana incluida en un libro de Promopress sobre referentes globales de slow jewelry.

Como parte de su compromiso ambiental, Martalía cuenta con certificación de Carbono Neutralidad.

Name: NNUNJI
Description:
------------ WE'RE ON A BREAK! -------------

NNUNJI is more than a brand—it’s a celebration of craftsmanship, creativity, and exclusivity. Born in Kenya and inspired by nature, our limited-edition handmade fashion accessories and giftware redefine individuality.

Since officially launching online in January 2018, NNUNJI has grown into a distinctive fashion house, offering four dynamic product categories: Jewelry, Headpieces, Clothing Accessories, and our signature Gift-a-Lady (GAL) Hampers.

Every NNUNJI piece tells a story. We craft our accessories using natural and upcycled materials—semi-precious gemstones, marble, shell, cow horn, hand-blown glass, and more—ensuring authenticity in every design. While some elements incorporate man-made materials, our commitment to originality remains unwavering.

At NNUNJI, mass production has no place. Our creations are one-of-a-kind limited edition, thoughtfully designed, and exclusively crafted. Even custom orders are fine-tuned to preserve individuality.

In September 2022, NNUNJI expanded into couture fashion (NnunjiCloset), officially launching the debut collection at the Kenya Fashion Awards. We are seamlessly blending handmade accessories with custom clothing to offer a full ensemble experience. Our designs span five distinct style genres:

Afro/Ethnic
Contemporary/Modern
Antique/Bohemian
Bridal/Formal
Costume/Statement

We stand for quality, exclusivity, and affordability, ensuring every piece is a reflection of refined artistry. Discover the NNUNJI difference. 

Wear art. Own uniqueness. Celebrate craftsmanship.

La bellezza sboccia dal cuore, seguendo le tendenze! 美自心绽，顺势潮流！J&E品牌于2003年创建于西班牙，经过二十余年的发展与壮大，如今的J&E公司是一家集设计、生产、销售和服务于一体的国际美容工艺品公司，在西班牙设有18000平方米的仓储转运中心。意大利分公司于2024年建仓，总仓储面积目前为5500平米，现采用全新独立SLOGAN“美丽，近在咫尺！”，开始正式运营。公司业务规模辐射欧洲与南美各主要国家；公司主营：中高端流行发饰/首饰/美容工具/手工配件/以及美业其他周边产品。

et Bruno, Designer génial du Cabinet C+B LEFEBVRE.

Le Bracelet ALPHONSE est en tout point unique !

Cette première collection est en lin, déclinée en 11 coloris profonds ou panachés en multiples combinaisons chromatiques. 

Les teintures sont 100% organiques !

La corde, unique, est confectionnée par les cordières et cordiers de la Corderie Palus, dernière grande corderie traditionnelle encore en activité en France et fraichement labellisée EPV (Entreprise du Patrimoine Vivant).
La corde est commise, encollée puis polie selon les techniques ancestrales de la Corderie.

Les fermoirs, exclusifs, sont en acier inox et existent de 3 modèles : le premier, usiné en Haute-Savoie, les deux suivants imprimés et polis à la main en Corrèze !

Et l'emballage ? Unique, comme le reste ! En fibre de cellulose recyclée en Creuse, il est imprimée, découpé et plié en Corrèze.

TOUT EST LA !!! Notre bijou sur le fil est engagé, naturel et local !!!
Un lien qui finalement, vous fera du bien.

NOTRE PHILOSOPHIE : LA PIERRE NE MENT PAS.
Nous revenons à la vérité de la matière. Pas de synthétique inutile, pas de fast-fashion. Nous travaillons des textiles "Heavyweight" (Coton Granit 400gsm et +) pour offrir une protection physique et mentale.
L'EXIGENCE :
• Sourcing Européen : Fabrication éthique et technique au Portugal (Partenaires certifiés luxe).
• Éditions Limitées : Nous produisons en séries numérotées ("Divisions") pour garantir l'exclusivité et éviter le gâchis.
• Fusion Art & Technique : Dirigé par Vincent Rustuel, le studio intègre l'esthétique du Collodion Humide (chimie photographique) au design textile.
ACTUELLEMENT :
Lancement de la DIVISION 01 "GENESIS".
Série strictement limitée à 50 exemplaires.

Name: 7Chakras.re
Description:
Les cristaux et les pierres précieuses ont depuis des millénaires une signification particulière pour de nombreuses cultures et civilisations anciennes.

En Inde, les bijoux confectionnés en cristaux et gemmes sont portés tant par les hommes que les femmes. Dans les temples, les divinités sont arborées de magnifiques colliers comme offrandes. Les gemmes font partie intégrante de la tradition astrologique védique de l’Inde en associant des pierres précieuses aux neuf planètes.

Les bijoux occupent également une place prépondérante dans l’Égypte ancienne. Le port des cristaux et pierres précieuses sous forme d’ornements est présent depuis plus de 5000 ans. Les bijoux avaient une valeur symbolique et sacrée. La turquoise du Sinaï est historiquement associé à son histoire. Sa couleur est le symbole de l’univers aquatique du Nil et représente la coiffure du dieu. Le Lapis-lazuli d’Afghanistan qui symbolise les yeux du Dieu recouvrait le sommet de la tête des momies pour les mettre en contact avec le monde céleste. Le cristal de roche des déserts posé sur le front guidait l’âme vers l’au-delà et l’Hématite sous forme de collier protégeait le repos du défunt .

Les Mayas d’Amérique centrale travaillaient le Jadélite, un type de Jade pour créer des masques funéraires en mosaïque. Sa couleur verte foncée rappelle la nature et sa fertilité. Elle représente l’âme divine et avait pour mission de leur assurer une vie éternelle après la mort.

En Chine, le Jade était aussi vénéré et sculpté sous forme de statuts, dragons et ornements pour protéger son porteur du mal et symbole de prestige et du pouvoir absolu.

Les cristaux et les pierres sont de nos jours toujours utilisés notamment en Lithothérapie. Cette pratique de guérison holistique et de bien être reflète les croyances et pratiques des cultures anciennes et repose sur des croyances relatives aux propriétés énergétiques des pierres, cristaux et minéraux.

Découvrez nos bijoux en pierres sur 7Chakras.re
MADE IN RÉUNION

Name: Bestsea Eyewear Designing and Craftsmanship Development
Description:
"Bestsea Eyewear traces its roots back to 2005, when it began as a small factory specializing in handcrafted natural horn glasses and wooden frames. With exceptional product quality, customized service that exceeded client expectations, and competitive pricing, the company quickly grew, seeing its business multiply in just a few years. The product line expanded to include metal frames, plastic eyewear, acetate glasses, titanium memory frames, and a full range of optical and sunglasses options. Alongside this growth, Bestsea upgraded its facilities and infrastructure, introducing advanced modern management practices, implementing an ERP system, and adopting automated production lines to enhance efficiency and quality.
By 2014, Bestsea Eyewear had become a modern eyewear design and production enterprise with full-range capabilities, certified by ISO, ISCC, FDA, and CE standards. Despite the passage of time, our core principles of prioritizing quality and customer service have remained unchanged. Our commitment is to deliver products with 100% customer satisfaction, ensuring an exceptional experience from start to finish, and earning a strong rate of repeat purchases. This dedication is what drives us forward and underpins our continuous improvement and innovation. Our vision is to become the first choice in custom eyewear for our clients.
Today, Bestsea Eyewear has grown into an integrated eyewear design, manufacturing, and sales group, with holdings in multiple independent factories. Our group spans specialized fields including optical research, aesthetic design, and advanced production processes, making us a comprehensive solution provider in the eyewear industry. We meet the unique needs of brand clients, distributors, and agents across sectors such as advanced optical research, luxury fashion, giftware, medical equipment, and more.
"

Name: Pavone Rossa
Description:
THE HANDCRAFTED SUNGLASSES & EYEWEAR ETHICAL COMPANY
Wearable Art: Born from Nature, Redifining Urban Fashion
PAVONE ROSSA is a Greek company that produces handcrafted and luxury wooden & more eyewear. Founded in 2018, it maintains its own showroom in the area of Chalandri. 
The Founder and Creative Director of PAVONE ROSSA, Marilena Michou, is characterized by her studies as a Mechanical Engineer at the Technical University, her innate love for woodworking that she inherited from her father and her adoration for fashion and the arts ever since she was a child. These were the determining factors that pushed her to create the handcrafted and luxury eyewear company, PAVONE ROSSA. Her everyday inspiration in creating and producing unique and innovative designs stems from nature, traveling and experiencing different cultures, as well as the modern urban style and way of life. Every season she designs with a lot of passion and love, exquisite and modern wooden art pieces that stand out in the Greek fashion industry and all around the world.
Our unique and handcrafted eyewear is made from high quality and environment friendly materials. The wooden sunglasses are produced from ethically sourced timber, mainly from walnut, that is resilient and able to accompany you to your everyday life for many years. Our acetate glasses are crafted from the highest quality and recycled pastes, but also wooden elements that are durable and suitable for every occasion. Even exceptional is the quality of our lenses, as we cooperate with world known companies.
Our handcrafted glasses are lightweight, comfortable and suit every face shape and the ability of customization makes them unique and suitable for every style and personality. PAVONE ROSSA is in the business of creating one of a kind and handcrafted eyewear, not in the faceless mass production. Create your own handcrafted pair of PAVONE ROSSA glasses and imprint your character in a unique accessory that will become a part of you.

Cette confédération des designers africains a pour objectif principal de porter la mode africaine au plus haut sommet de l'échiquier mondial par la mutualisation des forces et la convergence des intérêts communs: élever la culture africaine. Elle est composée de plusieurs pays comprenant chacun un gouverneur et plusieurs membres. Son président actuel et en exercice est SOULMAN BONFILS du Cameroun, par la même le fondateur de cette prestigieuse association qui fait déjà parler d'elle dans son continent et bientôt partout ailleurs dans le monde. GX African Designers, pour une Afrique Unie.

Name: Corbetta snc
Description: La nostra azienda produce da più di 50 anni perle e componenti in vetro e resina per bigiotteria, alta moda e ricamo, lampadari e oggettistica. Eseguiamo decorazioni a campione e conto terzi su ogni supporto. Perlatura e lustri veneziani sono i nostri fiori all'occhiello, eseguiti con metodi classici e artigianali ma con processi moderni. Coloriamo e decoriamo strass, conterie e perline, bottoni, cabochon, cristalli e componenti tipo Swarovski e Preciosa, oggettistica e prodotti promozionali con coating di altissima qualità. Nell'ultimo decennio abbiamo raffinato nuove tecniche di verniciatura per la preparazione di ogni tipo di supporto per la sublimazione, moderna tecnologia per l'applicazione di decorazioni e stampe a colori su oggetti tridimensionali di qualsiasi forma. Siamo inoltre in grado di verniciare e decorare oggetti di nostra produzione e in conto terzi con sfondi trasparenti, bianchi, perlati e ad effetto glitter. La sublimazione può essere eseguita su ogni tipo di materiale, previo pre-trattamento o senza pre-trattamento se il materiale lo consente. Eseguiamo anche lavori di campionatura e prototipia per aziende di alta moda. Il nostro laboratorio è equipaggiato con due macchine per sublimazione della ditta Sublitec con la quale prosegue una collaborazione decennale per migliorare e sviluppare questa  tecnologia su vetro e resine.

Name: Blonde et les Fringues
Description:
Blonde et les Fringues est une marque de vêtements féminins et d'accessoires textiles faits main, créée par Marie-Eve Galleteau en 2017. Chacune de nos pièces est dessinée, patronnée et cousue à la main, avec amour et passion, par Marie-Eve dans notre atelier à Rouillé (86) 

Blonde et les Fringues est une ode à la joie, à la couleur, aux motifs, mais aussi aux femmes et aux corps. Notre philosophie : oser ! Osez porter des pièces dont vous n'avez pas l'habitude, osez mélanger les motifs, les couleurs et les textures... osez être vous-même, peu importent votre âge, votre genre ou votre morphologie. 
Nous avons à coeur de vous aider à vous sentir bien et en confiance, s'habiller doit être une manière de s'amuser, mais aussi de s'assumer 

C'est pour cela que chaque vêtement est confectionné sur commande, du 34 au 46 ou au-delà de ces tailles sur prise de mensurations. N'oublions pas que c'est au vêtement de s'adapter au corps, pas l'inverse. 

Alors pour découvrir nos collections ainsi que nos accessoires adorés (coussins, trousses, sacs...), vous pouvez visiter notre boutique en ligne ou nous rendre directement visite dans notre boutique de créateur.ice.s - atelier "Un monde de Blonde" à Rouillé (86). 

À très vite 

Marie-Eve alias Blonde
Créatrice de Blonde et les Fringues

Here is a description of various fashion accessories:

Jewelry: Jewelry encompasses a wide range of adornments, including necklaces, earrings, bracelets, and rings, made from various materials such as precious metals, gemstones, or fashion jewelry. It adds a touch of elegance and glamour to any outfit.

Handbags and Purses: These functional accessories are not only for carrying essentials but also contribute to a person's style statement. They come in various shapes, sizes, and materials, from leather to canvas and embellished designs.

Scarves and Shawls: Scarves and shawls are versatile accessories that can be worn in numerous ways. They add color, texture, and warmth to outfits, making them ideal for both fashion and functionality.

Hats: Hats range from classic fedoras and sun hats to beanies and baseball caps. They not only provide protection from the elements but also add a fashionable twist to any ensemble.

Sunglasses: Sunglasses protect the eyes from harmful UV rays while also providing a stylish element. They come in various shapes and sizes to suit different face types and outfits.

Belts: Belts are practical for holding up pants or cinching a dress but are also a fashionable statement piece. They can be minimalistic or feature intricate buckles and designs.

Watches: Watches are functional timepieces that also double as stylish accessories. They come in various styles, from elegant and formal to sporty and casual.

Footwear: Shoes, boots, and sandals are essential fashion accessories that complete an outfit. They vary in style from sneakers and loafers to high heels and combat boots.

Gloves: Gloves not only provide warmth but also add sophisti

Name: AKNAS
Description:
AKNAS is the working name of AKNAS Watchbands & Trading Co., Ltd, a Thailand Bangkok-based, Thai-French, high-end manufacturing workshop specializing in exotic leathers, such as stingray leather ( galuchat / shagreen), crocodile, python leather and more.

Starting in 2001 with exclusively producing watchbands for Swiss and North-American luxury watchmakers, owners, and collectors, the small but very specialized facility was immediately recognized for offering the highest quality and widest color range of deep-dyed galuchat, also known as stingray leather or shagreen; together with an unparalleled level of workmanship for this extremely complex material. The other exotic leathers used by the workshop are python leather and crocodile leather.

In 2005, building on this initial success, the workshop started producing small exotic leather accessories for women using its unique know-how, continually improving through R&D, and became known for producing designs in galuchat (stingray leather/ shagreen ), until then deemed either impossible or lacking finesse.

Since 2007, AKNAS proposes OEM, ODM, and Unfinished services to its clientele of brands and designers from around the world. Historically bent on quality, the following years saw breakthrough "savoir-faire", manufacturing techniques such as “groove-stitching”, and the development of Men’s lines.

In 2011, in addition to its manufacturing services, the workshop also developed its own "galuchat" only retail brand, Atelier AKNAS, in Japan with its own collection.

Our accessories aren't just about style; they're about creating moments that matter. We take pride in the joy we bring to our customers' lives, as we witness the smiles our personalized jewelry brings to their faces and the faces of their loved ones.

Description:
Welcome to Fifth Object, where we celebrate the timeless beauty and natural elegance of linen fabric. As a premier fashion brand, we are dedicated to providing you with the finest linen garments, meticulously crafted to redefine your style and elevate your wardrobe.

Our journey began with a passion for sustainability and a love for the pure essence of linen. Linen, derived from the flax plant, is one of the oldest and most sustainable fabrics known to humankind. Its cultivation requires minimal water, and every part of the flax plant is used, making it an eco-friendly choice. Our commitment to the environment and sustainable fashion is at the core of our brand.

We believe that fashion should be a harmonious blend of comfort, sophistication, and environmental responsibility. Linen, with its unparalleled breath ability and softness, aligns perfectly with this philosophy. Whether you're strolling through bustling city streets, attending a summer soirée, or simply enjoying a leisurely afternoon, our linen garments will embrace you with a gentle caress, keeping you cool and fresh throughout the day.

At Fifth Object, we take pride in our meticulous craftsmanship and attention to detail. Our skilled artisans weave each garment with love and precision, ensuring the highest quality and a perfect fit. From our thoughtfully designed dresses, tops, and bottoms to our exquisite accessories, every piece embodies the essence of understated luxury.

Description:

Our core expertise lies in the meticulous production of leather jackets, coats, belts, bags, and wallets, complemented by a full range of high-quality denim wear, including shirts, jackets, and pants. We are more than just manufacturers; we are artisans dedicated to the integrity of our materials—from selecting the finest hides to weaving durable denim.

Our Core Differentiators:

A Legacy of Quality: Every stitch tells a story of family, dedication, and an unwavering commitment to durability and excellence.

Modern Style, Timeless Craft: We blend traditional techniques with modern silhouettes, ensuring our products are both stylish and built to last.

Proudly Pakistani Craftsmanship: We are a testament to the skilled artistry and manufacturing excellence found in Pakistan, offering our global partners a source of reliable, high-quality production.

We build lasting partnerships with brands and retailers worldwide who value transparency, quality, and the unique story behind the products they sell.

Discover the TK Denim Leather difference. Let's craft the future of fashion, together.

Name: Vertu Beyond Fashion
Description:
At Vertu, we believe in the power of fashion to transcend boundaries and celebrate diversity. As a clothing label, we strive to merge modest fashion with bold Western styles, drawing inspiration from cultures around the world. Our mission is to create unique designs that reflect the rich heritage of our global community while prioritizing sustainable practices.

We pride ourselves on blending vintage and modern elements, infusing traditional weaving techniques and Indian fashion with a contemporary twist. Our garments not only showcase the beauty of cultural traditions but also promote ethical and eco-friendly production methods.

We are committed to sustainability at every stage of our production process. From carefully sourcing eco-friendly fabrics to implementing fair trade practices, we aim to minimize our environmental footprint and promote positive social impact. By creating timeless pieces that endure beyond fleeting trends, we encourage conscious consumption and a more responsible approach to fashion.

Join us in our journey to redefine fashion and make a difference. Together, we can celebrate cultural diversity, foster sustainability, and inspire a more inclusive and conscious world through the art of clothing.

Name: Dewk Signature
Description:
Dewk Signature specializes in the creation of handcrafted African print bags and accessories, offering a unique blend of tradition and modernity in fashion.
 
What sets Dewk Signature apart is our unwavering commitment to attention to detail and the use of durable materials. We meticulously craft each piece to ensure it not only reflects the vibrancy of African culture but also stands the test of time. 

Our company was born from a passion for preserving and promoting African heritage through fashion. Our Founders, D.E.W.K discovered the beauty and significance of African print fabrics and decided to establish a brand that would share this beauty with the world. Starting as a small workshop, we have since evolved into a thriving business known for our unique African print bags and accessories. 

Our physical presence is rooted in Ghana, with a storefront in Sapeiman-Accra. While we welcome visitors to our store, we primarily operate online, extending our reach to customers worldwide.

Na Confort Pet, somos apaixonados pelo bem-estar dos animais de estimação. Especializados em acessórios para pets, oferecemos uma linha completa de produtos de alta qualidade para garantir a saúde, segurança e conforto dos seus companheiros de quatro patas.

Nossos Produtos:

- Roupas Pós-Cirúrgicas: Desenvolvidas para proporcionar conforto e proteção durante o período de recuperação, nossas roupas pós-cirúrgicas ajudam a evitar infecções e facilitam a cicatrização.
  
- Colares Elizabetanos: Fabricados com materiais duráveis e confortáveis, nossos colares elizabetanos impedem que os pets lambam ou mordam áreas feridas, promovendo uma recuperação mais rápida e segura.
  
- Focinheiras: Oferecemos focinheiras em diversos tamanhos e modelos, todas projetadas para garantir a segurança e o conforto dos animais durante passeios e visitas ao veterinário.
  
- Coleiras: Nossas coleiras são feitas com materiais resistentes e confortáveis, disponíveis em diferentes estilos e tamanhos para atender às necessidades de todos os pets.

Nosso Compromisso:

Na Confort Pet, nosso objetivo é fornecer produtos que façam a diferença na vida dos pets e de seus donos. Priorizamos a qualidade, segurança e inovação em todos os nossos acessórios, garantindo que cada produto atenda aos mais altos padrões do mercado.

Description:

Name: MFC
Description: MFC, originally known as Madison’s Fabulous Creations, was established in 2009 as a result of a granddaughter’s passion for jewelry/accessorizing supported by her grandmother’s encouragement through her passion for arts & crafts. Our business was also born out of the observation that there was a need for more affordable handcrafted jewelry along with a need for women of color to have an outlet for them to unapologetically tap into their stylistic auras. Furthermore, there was a lack of Black woman owned businesses within the jewelry industry dating back to when we were established as a hobby back in 2009.

Name: Sequins The House oF Fashion
Description:
‘Sequins’ embodies a perfect blend of style and simplicity. For inspiration, we delve into the treasure trove of India’s rich traditional designs and add a dash of modernity to make our designs exquisite, stylish and exclusive.

Ms. Lekha Gupta is a Rajasthan-based fashion designer. She completed her fashion designing course from the National Institute of Fashion Design and has the distinction of working with many reputable export houses. In her rich and eventful career, She has developed a deep appreciation for luxury, style and sophisticated tailoring. We believe in working- higher than your expectations- just to see a smile on your face.

Ms. Lekha, with her ingenious ideas and designs, hopes to give people the gift of our unique Indian culture through her skill and love of designing. Sequins displays a variety of designs- from frocks to sarees- all with an added sparkle of modernity. Comfortable to wear and easy on the pocket!

The clothes of the Indian culture had a distinctive taste of it all– comfortable, royal and affordable- something which is our country’s specialty. But, as the generations pass, the people are getting modern and started to wear shirts, jeans, pants and others- completely forgetting about the Indian style. And so, Sequins is trying to help people relive the time of sarees, dupattas, kurtas etc.

And so, we hope that you join us in our duty of bringing the joy of our beautiful Indian culture to everyone!

From wearables and accessories to asset tracking systems, we leverage NFC, RFID, and emerging chip technologies to create seamless connections between the physical and digital worlds. Our R&D focuses on turning bold ideas into real-world applications, helping businesses and people interact with tech in more meaningful, stylish, and efficient ways.

At Theprodx, “Product X” represents everything unique, rare, and next.

Description:

Joyas de Piedras Naturales Semipreciosas con significado:
-Cada cristal cuenta con su propia simbología. La piedra Turmalina y diversos tipos de Cuarzo en diferentes formas y colores, son los que se destacan entre los elegidos.

-Bijouterie atractiva de vanguardia y amuletos protectores de diseño tal como el ojo turco y la mano de la suerte, entre los principales.

-Amplia variedad de estampas vibrantes y coloridas para brindar alegría y energía positiva a los looks casuales del día a día. Ideal para distintos usos y lucir en todas las estaciones del año.
Accesorios de Pelo: 
-Comodidad y mucha onda en accesorios para el cabello tal como vinchas turbantes y gomitas de pelo-scrunchies.
 
Bio de su creadora:
-Bárbara es Licenciada en Comercialización de la Uade, experta en desarrollar marcas, lanzar productos al mercado y una gran apasionada de las nuevas tendencias. Barlina Style nace de la fusión de sus dos grandes pasiones: el Marketing y la Moda.

Each bag we create embodies the timeless connection between generations and reflects the unique personalities of those who carry them.

Founded in 2024, Prabha Line is dedicated to offering affordable, unique, and stylish bags designed to suit all your needs. Our collection features everything from the vibrant printed bag range to quirky, versatile designs, each crafted with care and attention to detail.

We pride ourselves on providing high-quality bags that are not only functional but also a reflection of creativity and individuality. Whether you're looking for something bold or practical, we have a bag to match your style.

Additionally, we specialize in bulk orders, offering customized solutions for businesses and organizations. With shipping available across India and Nepal, we ensure that our creative and high-quality designs reach a wider audience.

At Prabha Line, we’re all about helping you carry creativity everywhere you go.
