We source our bags from artisans in developing countries, who use traditional techniques and sustainable materials to create beautiful and functional pieces. We believe that by supporting these artisans, we are not only helping them to preserve their culture, but we are also helping to create a more sustainable future.

We are committed to providing our customers with a positive and enjoyable shopping experience.

We hope you will join us on our journey to celebrate the beauty and craftsmanship of handmade dairy and hemp thread bags from around the world.

Name: Nephtysa
Description:
Basée au cœur de Paris, Nephtysa incarne une marque de slow fashion au crochet s'inscrivant dans une démarche d'artisanat et de proximité. Créée dans le cadre d'une initiative entrepreneuriale par une étudiante, elle incarne un mariage le crochet et l'industrie de la mode contemporaine.

Après une année d'engagement intensif, de développement de compétences et de création minutieuse, cette initiative voit le jour en tant que défi personnel pour repousser les limites de l'apprentissage. Portée par la passion pour la mode et un désir de préserver l'essence de l'artisanat, Nepthysa vise à créer des pièces vestimentaires et des accessoires uniques au crochet, tout en privilégiant une approche durable de la mode.

Le lancement de Nepthysa s'est accompagné d'une présence active sur les réseaux sociaux, avec une communauté de plus de 10 000 abonnés qui partagent cette passion commune pour la créativité et l'originalité. La prochaine étape: le lancement du site e-commerce.

Name: MOIO LLC
Description: Our mission is simple; we seek to bridge the gap between Zimbabwean craftspeople and the global marketplace through the sale of beaded bracelets. The Covid-19 pandemic revealed the fragility of  Zimbabwean artisans' tourism-reliant businesses. With deep ties to Zimbabwe, we were in a position to expand artisans’ customer base to mitigate the effects of economic fluctuation. With profits, we've established a training program to give Zimbabwean women, who have faced barriers to workforce entry, entrepreneurial and vocational skills. To date, 14 women have completed this 3-month training program, become integral members of Moio's beading collective, and gained financial independence, and the ability to support themselves and their families.

Name: LM5 la marque du 5
Description:
Notre concept est né de l’envie de faire découvrir des artistes à travers leurs œuvres sur des accessoires de mode, foulards, bandeaux et bracelets bijoux. Ces œuvres sont signées et numérotées par
 l’artiste sur une cartonnette d’authentification qui sera scellée par un sceau en cire.

La série est limitée suivant le nombre de précommandes sur une durée de 15 à 30 jours. Ce nombre définira la série limitée. Il n’y aura pas d’autres séries signées par la suite. Le motif pourra à nouveau être édité, néanmoins il ne sera ni sérié, ni signé par l’artiste. Le prix de l'article durant le temps de la précommande est plus attractif. De plus, l'article est signé et numéroté par l’artiste.

Name: Adira Jewels
Description:
Welcome to Adira, where creativity meets craftsmanship! Our handmade beaded jewellery brand is a celebration of artistry and individuality, inspired by the beauty of nature and the richness of diverse cultures. Each piece is meticulously crafted by skilled artisans, making every creation a unique and exquisite work of art.
At Adira, we believe in the power of self-expression through wearable art. Our collections feature a stunning array of handcrafted jewellery pieces, blending traditional techniques with modern design elements. From intricately woven bracelets to delicately beaded necklaces, our creations reflect a harmonious fusion of timeless elegance and contemporary flair.
Quality is at the heart of everything we do. We source only the finest materials, including ethically-sourced gemstones, high-grade metals, and premium-quality beads. The attention to detail is evident in each piece, ensuring that every customer receives a durable and captivating treasure to cherish for years to come.
Our brand ethos is deeply rooted in sustainability and social responsibility. We are committed to supporting local artisans and preserving traditional craftsmanship, promoting fair trade practices and providing them with a platform to showcase their skills to the world. Moreover, we strive to minimize our environmental impact by using eco-friendly materials and packaging.
Whether you're looking for a statement piece to elevate your style or a heartfelt gift for a loved one, Adira has something for everyone. Our collections cater to a diverse range of tastes, from bohemian chic to sophisticated elegance, ensuring that you find the perfect piece to express your unique personality.
Indulge in the magic of our handmade beaded jewellery and embark on a journey of self-discovery and empowerment. Join us in celebrating the beauty of artisanship and the joy of wearing one-of-a-kind creations that tell a story of passion, craftsmanship, and boundless creativity.

Name: Yimage SG
Description:
Yimage SG is a Singapore-based boutique printing house specializing in bespoke apparel and custom fabric solutions. We bridge the gap between complex design concepts and high-quality physical production, serving everyone from independent creators and students to corporate clients.

Why Partner With Us?
Technical Expertise: We provide a consultative approach, reviewing design files and catching technical errors to ensure a perfect print every time.

Material Guidance: Our team offers expert advice on choosing the right fabrics—from waterproof and foldable materials to specialized translucent polyesters.

Speed & Flexibility: We are known for industry-leading lead times and a "can-do" spirit, handling urgent requests and small-batch orders with the same precision as large corporate runs.

No Minimum Stress: We remain a dedicated resource for small-scale projects and unique custom sizes that traditional manufacturers often decline.

Our Services
Custom Fabric Printing: Specialized dimensions for art installations and creative displays.

Bespoke Apparel: Professional corporate t-shirts, team wear, and custom garments.

Advanced Methods: High-fidelity heat transfers and expert color matching.

At Yimage, we combine professional technical support with a friendly, patient service to make the custom printing process seamless, affordable, and hassle-free.

Name: Octa Jewels
Description:
Octa Jewels is a pioneering Milan-based company at the forefront of the lab-grown diamond industry. We are committed to crafting exquisite diamonds that meet the highest standards of beauty and quality, all while prioritizing sustainability and ethical sourcing. Our dedication to innovation ensures that our diamonds not only rival but often surpass their mined counterparts in brilliance and purity.

At Octa Jewels, we specialize in creating high-end jewelry, fashion accessories, and fashion sub-assemblies, all featuring lab-grown diamonds produced through advanced Chemical Vapor Deposition (CVD) technology. This allows us to offer diamonds that are identical to mined diamonds in every way—optically, chemically, and physically—yet come with a lower environmental footprint.

Our offerings include:

Lab-Grown Diamond Jewelry: Finished and semi-finished pieces designed to suit every taste and style, offering luxury without compromise.

Fashion Products: Lab-grown diamonds incorporated into watches, bags, belts, bracelets, clasps, and other accessories, creating unique, stylish, and luxurious designs.

Loose Lab-Grown Diamonds: Available in all shapes, sizes, and customizable options to suit a variety of design and production needs.
By harnessing the power of cutting-edge technology, we also manufacture CVD machines, offering complete in-house solutions for lab-grown diamond production. This ensures that every diamond we produce meets the strictest quality standards while maintaining our commitment to ethical practices.

As the global demand for responsible luxury continues to grow, Octa Jewels is proud to be at the forefront of this shift, offering clients and partners the opportunity to integrate sustainability into their collections without sacrificing the timeless allure of diamonds. Brands like Pandora have already embraced lab-grown diamonds, and we invite others to join this movement, creating a future where luxury is not only beautiful but responsible.

Name: Cindy-Kay
Description:
We are an empowerment community selling leather sacchetto organizers and other unique items and donating 50% of our profits to fund 3 women's causes.

Cindy-Kay Sacchettos:
- Organize your handbag
- Protect you from pickpockets
- Make changing handbags easy
- Can be used as a clutch

We selected three causes that address social inequities including sex trafficking recovery, renovation of women’s shelters and legal aid for women in need.

For sex trafficking recovery, we support Foundation United in all their efforts and in particular their program that provides beautiful secure homes for recovery to trafficking survivors.

We will fund legal aid for women of divorce so that all women have the opportunity for stellar representation and support they deserve pre- and post-divorce.

We support women’s shelters so that women and children who find the strength and courage to leave their homes behind can stay in a welcoming, comforting place. We will work with Milwaukee Rescue Mission's Joy House.

Our community offers empowerment resources such as daily positivisms and a Super Powers newsletter. We break the year down into 12 areas of balance and provide a weekly newsletter addressing each area. This method allows people to achieve greater growth and life balance by focusing on one area at a time.

Il marchio Sikelia — che significa Sicilia in greco — nasce nel 2021, attraverso i suoi profumi vuole raccontare la mitologia e le leggende della Sicilia.
Il progetto, la formulazione dei profumi, i materiali utilizzati fanno parte di un’attenta selezione di artisti e artigiani siciliani.

Gli elementi che compongono le creazioni Sikelia non provengono da produzioni industriali, sono per la maggior parte realizzate a mano.
Ogni singolo tappo di profumo è prodotto manualmente da selezionati artigiani di Caltagirone e arricchito da una nappina di raso. Il logo e l’astuccio anche se in materiali differenti si ispirano alla ceramica, celebrando l’arte della maiolica siciliana in una chiave moderna.
Tutti i dettagli sono frutto di sapienti lavorazioni artigianali e fanno di ogni profumo Sikelia un pezzo unico.

Creatività, qualità, passione, storia sono i valori che ispirano il nostro lavoro.

Name: The Butler Sri Lanka
Description:
A one-stop shop for the styling needs of the contemporary gentleman, The Butler as it stands today is the culmination of a passion project which draws inspiration from british vogue and the style guides of icons such as Tom Ford and Antonio Centeno. An issue faced by many gentlemen of Sri Lanka is that they have no proper means to accessorize their attire. Thus, The Butler was born with the mission of bridging this gap in the menswear market of Sri Lanka.

Since its inception, The Butler has catered to a select group of clients who seek exclusivity when shopping for the latest fashion trends. Keeping customer service at the top of its priorities, The Butler has established a long list of loyal and discerning clientele.

Prior to the launch of a collection, extensive research is conducted on current local and global trends. The Butler accounts for elements such as colour families, designs and fabric, resulting in a collection of complementing tastes. Because of this, products from The Butler continue to be relevant in contemporary times.

A suit without some complementing accessories is incomplete. As suits are the attire of choice for many gents when it comes to special occasions, standing out and projecting one’s own individual style is important.

This is where The Butler shines – our strife to help gentlemen stylistically make their mark on the world around them has kept us going since our humble beginnings in 2018. As The Butler continues to innovate and add value to the wardrobes of gentlemen, our meticulous attention to detail and quality will never be marred.

Welcome to ITARA! 

ITARA means “LAMP“ and our mission is to help women in poverty move from dependence to financial independence. 

Our products are designed in Los Angeles and handmade in Rwanda. We have a beautiful Giftshop in Rwanda and sell online via our e-commerce website for customers in the United States, Canada and beyond. 

Please visit our website itarastudio.org to learn more about our mission, upcoming events, local vendors in your city/country selling our products or how you can be a part of this noble mission.

recipient names on labels, all of it!

Created for the sun-worshiping individual with a penchant for style and sophistication, each season offers thoughtfully-designed, premium products with the aim to bring style and joy to outdoor living.

[mɛzɔ͂ nikaː]

Description:
Eva Markor is a family-owned business with over 30 years of experience in crafting handmade fashion bags. Founded in Kilkis, Greece, we have been operating exclusively online for the past 5 years via www.evamarkor.com. With a passion for quality, aesthetics, and detail, we design unique bags that blend timeless elegance with modern flair.

 Our mission is to deliver high-quality pieces with a personal touch and a sense of authenticity.

Name: Ammyla
Description: Ammyla je malá slovenská rodinná firma, v ktorej vznikajú originálne a štýlové kabelky, batohy a tašky. Každý náš výrobok je vyrobený ručne, priamo v našej dielni a výhradne z našich vlastných návrhov a strihov. Používame kvalitné slovenské, české ale aj talianske a iné materiály. Väčšina našich produktov sa vyrába priamo pre vás až po vytvorení objednávky, preto je doba ich výroby a dodania trošku dlhšia ako obvykle. Vďaka tomu sú však svojim spôsobom jedinečné a pre svojho majiteľa unikátne.

Description:

We produce clothing & accessories for hair, 
face and body, self-care and aesthetic pleasure. 
molodo.me organic silk has unique quality
 and durability proved by certificates.

We aim for mindful consumption.
We donate to nature restoration.

Name: Brothers Clothing br
Description:
Desde o nosso nascimento em 2015, traçamos um objetivo claro: tornar-nos a referência em moda masculina no dinâmico segmento fast-fashion.

Iniciamos nossa jornada em Mato Grosso, conquistando rapidamente o reconhecimento na capital e em todo o estado. Ao longo de 7 anos, evoluímos para uma próspera rede em crescimento, agora com mais de 10 lojas e uma presença destacada em mais de 500 pontos de venda em todo o território nacional. A rede Brothers não é apenas uma marca; é um movimento que emprega mais de 70 colaboradores apaixonados, movimentando e influenciando todo o mercado de Moda Masculina por onde passa.

Nosso sucesso é alimentado por valores sólidos que permeiam nossa cultura, refletindo-se na criação de produtos de qualidade excepcional e no oferecimento de serviços com excelência. Nossa filosofia, expressa no lema PV.18:24 – "Existe um amigo mais chegado que um irmão", é o alicerce que nos impulsiona a ir além e estabelecer conexões duradouras com nossos clientes. Junte-se a nós nesta jornada emocionante, onde a moda encontra a excelência!

Name: Anat Collection
Description:
Anat Collection is a 30-year-old jewelry company based in Tel Aviv specializing in authentic, handmade jewelry. Our worldwide following includes exclusive boutiques, department stores, and mail-order catalogs in Japan, America, Australia, Russia, and all across Europe. Our jewelry is more than just an accessory - it's a uniquely designed piece with a soul that tells a beautiful story. 

Visit our boutique in Ramat-Gan for an intimate and personal experience. We want you to feel like a close friend, not just a customer. If you are unable to visit in-person, shop now on our website to find your dream piece!

Name: Ivyi Rose Creations
Description:
At Ivyi Rose Creations, we believe in the power of collaboration and are dedicated to supporting businesses of all sizes. Our passion lies in helping new startups bring their visions to life, providing expert guidance and support every step of the way—from the initial idea to a successful launch. Our goal is to see your business thrive in the ever-evolving fashion industry.

We offer a comprehensive range of services, including product development, design, manufacturing (CMT), and wholesale supply. Whether you're starting from scratch or looking to expand, we're here to turn your creative ideas into high-quality fashion products.

Name: NYRA Cosmetics
Description: Nyra is a natural products that offers exclusively and continually featured a variety of high-quality and affordable products. Check it out and start shopping today!!

Name: Feel Morys Global Ptd. Ltd.
Description:
Feel Morys Global (FMG) is a lifestyle sports-eyewear brand built on 30+ years of heritage from Korea’s trusted Morys Leports. We create eyewear that blends performance, lifestyle, and design — empowering runners, cyclists, and active city dwellers to move with style and confidence.

Our proprietary lens technologies — ImpactShield polycarbonate, ClarityPro polarized, and LightShift photochromic — deliver durability, clarity, and adaptive performance. Designed for both Asian and global fits, FMG combines Korean innovation with urban active culture.

Now expanding into the U.S., Canada, Australia, and Singapore, we connect with communities through D2C platforms, athlete collaborations, and city-based running events. Our vision: to make Urban Active Sports Eyewear accessible worldwide.

Name: Rendero
Description: Siamo un team di creativi, di base a Milano, dedicati a trasformare idee in render unici e immediati, con un focus particolare nel campo della moda. Ogni progetto riflette la nostra dedizione per l’eccellenza nel visual storytelling.

Name: Merkato Trade
Description:
Welcome to our e-commerce company, based in the heart of Ethiopia. We are a team of passionate individuals who are dedicated to providing you with a convenient and hassle-free online shopping experience.

Our mission is to revolutionize the way Ethiopians shop by making it easier for everyone to access quality products from the comfort of their own homes. We understand that traditional shopping methods can be time-consuming and often inconvenient, which is why we have created an online platform that is user-friendly and accessible to everyone.

At our company, we pride ourselves on offering a wide range of products at competitive prices. Whether you are looking for fashion items, electronics, home appliances, or groceries, we have got you covered. We work with reputable suppliers and brands to ensure that all our products are of the highest quality.

Name: Sashion
Description:
At Sashion, we see fashion as more than what you wear — it’s a voice, a choice, and a responsibility. 

Born with the belief that style can coexist with sustainability, Sashion is a movement that redefines modern living. We celebrate creativity, culture, and conscious choices — weaving together elegance with care for our planet.

Our journey began with a passion for responsible fashion, rooted in the idea that every product we create should carry a story of purpose, beauty, and positive impact. While we started with perfumes and versatile accessories, our vision extends far beyond — towards building a future where fashion leaves behind inspiration, not waste.

Sashion is about:
 Reimagining fashion with sustainability at its core
 Creating a community of mindful individuals who care for style and the planet
 Celebrating identity, culture, and freedom through innovative expressions

For us, independence means more than a day — it’s the freedom to choose better, live better, and impact better.

Sashion – Where Sustainability Becomes Style.

Name: Peachin India
Description:
We’re a small company based in New Delhi bringing you the latest trend of the best quality at the lowest possible prices. Our founders started this company from their home during the boring lockdown and it’s growing with the creative team working full-time and part-time contributing their blood and sweat to work towards the simple goal of bringing a smile to your face every time you open a package from Peachin’.

We believe the world would be a much more different place if every individual feels beautiful and confident with the way they are. Keeping up with the trend is what makes that happen. After all, what better purpose can there be to life than to spread happiness, and what better way for us to spread happiness than bringing a smile on your face every time you look at yourself in the mirror wearing amazing Peachin’ accessories.
Our hope is that you keep loving us the way you do and keep spreading the word about us to all your friends and family so that we can be more successful in making our vision become a reality.

Name: Busty Boob Tape Ltd
Description:
Busty Boob Tape, a new inclusive brand targeting bustier women, is revolutionizing wardrobe options with the launch of their groundbreaking range of 8 skin tones. Designed to empower women of all shapes and sizes, the brand aims to provide a wide range of options that allow women to wear whatever they want without restriction.

The fashion industry has long neglected the needs of bustier women, with limited options available in the market for outfits that really support heavier breasted women, meaning creative bra configurations or unsightly bra straps and bra backs showing. Busty Boob Tape is on a mission to change that by offering a wider, stronger boob tape that actually works, with a diverse range of 7 skin tones, ensuring that women can find the perfect match for their skin or outfit. This inclusive approach sets Busty Boob Tape apart from its competitors, as it recognizes the importance of representation and empowerment for bustier women.

Founder Tanya Samuel, an advocate for women, believes in the importance of women feeling comfortable in their skin. She states, 'Our goal is to provide women of all shapes and sizes with the freedom to wear whatever they prefer without limitation.' With this ethos, Busty Boob Tape aims to break down barriers and provide inclusive solutions that cater to the unique needs of bustier women.

In addition to offering a wide range of skin tones, Busty Boob Tape has developed a wider and stronger tape to provide more support for heavier set and larger breasted women. Extensive research and testing, including, but not limited to, a 5-hour bike ride in 33-degree sweltering heat, have been carried out to ensure the tape's durability and effectiveness. The result is Busty Boob Tape, a product that offers unparalleled support and ultimate boob freedom for bustier women. "We want to wear cute strappy summer dresses too without thick bra straps too".

The launch of Busty Boob Tape's 8 skin tones is just the beginning.

Name: Formosa Co,. Ltd/ChunCheng Co., Ltd.
Description:
Chuncheng Co., Ltd. brings 35 years of experience in leather goods production, specializing in belts, bags, wallets, and more. We excel in both large-scale production and small-batch customization, delivering tailored solutions to meet diverse needs.

Proud of our innovative design capabilities, we stay ahead of trends with stylish products that balance aesthetics and functionality, catering to Asian preferences. All our materials pass rigorous third-party tests for non-toxicity and colorfastness, ensuring safety and durability.

Partner with Chuncheng for quality, innovation, and dedicated service—your trusted choice for long-term success.

 With a commitment to pure craftsmanship, QUALIBELT offers exceptional products without unnecessary frills.

All materials are third-party tested for safety and durability, and the brand prioritizes sustainability with recyclable packaging. By blending Taiwanese craftsmanship with Japanese precision, QUALIBELT brings top-notch quality to international markets, with Japan being the first destination, offering belts crafted with care and attention to detail for the modern consumer.

Name: YA and YA
Description:
A label where extinct arts, culture and contemporary fashion collide to create exquisite needlework with the aim to exhibit India and her history to the world in a way that has never been seen before.
Our exclusive range of fashion accessories are wearable stories of the craftsmen from every corner of India.

Name: Whole Sale Pashmina
Description: We are Knitwear and Weaving company based in Kathmandu, we weaved and knit finest quality of clothing using natural fiber like cashmere, silk wool and more.

Name: Joint Well (HK) Limited
Description:
Founded in 1994, the Joint Well Group engages in designing and
manufacturing of high quality leatherware, including handbag
wallet, small leather accessories & belt.

Our production plant in Phnom Penh Cambodia has a production area of 10,000m2 and over 1,000 skilled workers. We are in full compliance with BFC (Better Factories Cambodia), HIGG and a number of internal quality certifications with our customers. 

Our goal is to present ourselves to customers as a factory that is not only attentive to quality but also with an ethical profile at the western standards level both as regards the production and the environment. We work regularly with LWG Gold rated suppliers to ensure our customers leather are sourced sustainably and responsibly.

For more details, please refer to our website or speak to one of our company representatives.

Name: Zeest Attire
Description: At Zeest Attire, we believe that clothing is more than just fabric stitched together; it's a statement, a reflection of your unique style and personality. Our passion lies in curating a collection that speaks to the modern, fashion-forward individual who isn't afraid to stand out.

Name: Capidema GmbH
Description:
Capidema is a globally active trading and manufacturing company offering a curated portfolio of high-quality lifestyle products. With a strong focus on premium brands, Capidema works with both proprietary and licensed trademarks to serve primarily large commercial clients.
Capidema stands for innovation, quality, and reliability. The dynamic brand strategy - built on direct partnerships and minimized intermediaries - enables competitive pricing and rapid integration of market trends. This flexibility ensures his clients gain access to trend-conscious products with strong value and appeal.
Capidema also supports his partners through tailored services, including custom product design and manufacturing - either under own labels or clients’ brands. The international orientation, adaptive business model, and strong partner network positions Capidema as a forward-looking, independant key player in a constantly evolving global market.
Capidema is continously expanding its footprint in Europe, South and North America, reinforcing its commitment to global growth and long-term success through excellence in concept, innovation, modernity, and service.
Capidema is your global partner for Lifestyle Products!

Name: KIKLOS Indumentaria
Description:
Hola soy Stephanie Teichelmann, diseñadora de moda chilena. Kiklos Indumentaria es una marca que creé el año 2010 poco después de finalizar mis estudios de diseño de moda en la escuela de DuocUC, Chile. La motivación surgió por querer dar soluciones innovadoras, funcionales y sostenibles a ciclistas urbanos apoyando también así a este gran movimiento que se estaba generando en aquella época. Todos los productos eran diseñados y fabricados en mi taller en la ciudad de Quilpué. 

El año 2019 viajé a España a realizar el Máster en Co-diseño de Moda y Sostenibilidad en la EASD en Valencia, lugar en donde me encuentro viviendo en la actualidad y retomando la marca. Ahora no solo me he enfocado en ciclistas urbanos sino que también en la creación de productos para disfrutar la vida activa en general desde los movimientos por la ciudad hasta la montaña. Siempre con un enfoque sostenible, a través de la reutilización de retales textiles como son sobrantes de fábricas y de producción, prendas y paracaídas en desuso, además la reutilización de materiales no textiles como son las cámaras de bicicleta.

Name: Dream's Beach
Description:
Charme e exclusividade em cada detalhe
 O melhor da moda praia!
 Acesse nosso site e confira nossos produtos

Name: OF&ARTE

Name: CHAMARENA
Description:
Bijoux upcyclés d’inspiration Andalouse garnis d’ornements aux couleurs éclatantes. Assemblage à la main dans mon atelier toulousain. 
La fusion du passé et du présent en un bijou inspiré de mes origines andalouses !

Name: ENKAR
Description:
In 2022 ENKAR was founded to showcase Indonesian ethnic jewelry including genuine Lombok pearls and various premium crystals. The authenticity of ENKAR is its consistency to make beautiful jewellery and accessories handmade only. 

ENKAR then got grand funds awarded by Indonesian Sport and Youth Ministry in 2023 - considered as the outstanding SME in Indonesia, ENKAR continously will explore the beauty of Indonesia many more.

This small business has made quite a big awareness on social media by cross-selling our products and to keep on relate with out costumers. To find out more about ENKAR, please visit Instagram @enkar_official.

Name: Trunkies Artistic Haven
Description:
Welcome to Trunkies Artistic Haven, where elegance meets confidence. We specialize in crafting unique, custom-made accessories that enhance your style for life's most cherished moments. From stunning bridal creations to exquisite beads and artful engagement wrapping, our designs are tailored to reflect your individuality and elevate your look.

Join us in celebrating creativity, craftsmanship, and timeless elegance. Discover your perfect accessory today—connect with us and make your special occasions truly unforgettable.

Name: Orlenaa.co
Description:
At Orlenaa.co, we believe beauty should be effortless, expressive, and accessible. We specialize in premium press-on nails and curated jewelry pieces designed to help you elevate your everyday look without the salon appointment or the price tag.

Whether you're going for soft elegance or bold glam, our collections are created to match your vibe, mood, and moments. Every set and piece is carefully crafted to ensure comfort, reusability, and style — making beauty feel personal, not complicated.

We’re proudly based in Pakistan and committed to empowering individuals with easy-to-wear, confidence-boosting accessories that reflect their unique style.

 Stick it. Style it. Shine in it.

Name: VanityEarringCo
Description: Vanity Earring is a thriving, vintage earring company, specializing in the repair and restoration of antique and retro earrings. I also expertly restore and repair vintage earrings using specialized techniques and craftsmanship in order to preserve their historical value.

Name: ViGGO Chic
Description:
Hola! Soy Mara diseñadora de indumentaria y textil, te presento mi proyecto de pañuelos de diseño, ideales para complementar y dar un toque ideal a tus outfits.
ViGGO chic se caracteriza por estar en cada detalle, brindar un producto con excelentes terminaciones y estampas unicas. ideales para lograr acompañar tu look de una manera muy original.

Name: MJF fashion group
Description:
M J F  is a creative hub founded in Milan.
We come up with strong and distinct brand identities based on research and creative innovation. 
In addition to our brands we can develop yours :-)

Name: Moda Essenziale
Description:
Calzature artigianali 100% Made in Italy, pensate per donne che desiderano unire eleganza, comfort e autenticità.
Fondato dalla personal stylist Sara Mallia, Moda Essenziale è un brand italiano che celebra l’essenza dello stile attraverso scarpe e accessori realizzati a mano, con materiali di alta qualità e una cura sartoriale per ogni dettaglio. 
Ogni collezione nasce con l’obiettivo di offrire prodotti versatili, raffinati e funzionali, pensati per accompagnare la donna contemporanea in ogni momento della sua giornata. 

Cosa ci distingue:
•	produzione artigianale italiana, con attenzione al comfort e alla vestibilità
•	design senza tempo, ispirato a uno stile essenziale e femminile
•	impegno verso una moda consapevole, che valorizza la qualità e la durata nel tempo
•	piccole produzioni curate in ogni dettaglio, per evitare sprechi, sovrapproduzione e iperconsumismo

Moda Essenziale è più di un marchio: è una filosofia che invita a riscoprire la bellezza delle cose ben fatte e a costruire un guardaroba che rifletta la propria identità, con consapevolezza e stile.

Name: Notchi
Description:
Welcome to Notchi, your go-to e-commerce platform for women's fashion accessories and a delightful array of gifts for all your joyous and unforgettable occasions. Our mission is to curate a seamless shopping experience, catering to the diverse tastes and preferences of our cherished customers.

At Notchi, we believe that every woman deserves to express herself through fashion, and our thoughtfully curated collection of accessories ensures just that. From statement jewelry to elegant scarves, trendy handbags to chic hats, we offer a wide range of products that complement any style, enhancing your unique personality with every choice.

But that's not all. We take immense pride in our handpicked selection of gifts that serve as the perfect tokens of love and appreciation for your loved ones. Whether it's a birthday celebration, anniversary, or any joyous occasion, our carefully crafted gift items are bound to bring smiles and warm sentiments to your special moments.

Our commitment to customer satisfaction is at the heart of everything we do. From a user-friendly website to efficient order processing and secure payment options, we strive to make your shopping experience with us as smooth and enjoyable as possible. Our dedicated support team is always ready to assist you, ensuring any query or concern is addressed promptly.

Embrace the essence of style and celebration with Notchi - where fashion meets emotions. Join us on this enchanting journey of self-expression, love, and gifting, and let us be a part of your cherished memories. Explore our exquisite collection today and discover a world of elegance, grace, and happiness at your fingertips.

Name: LA CASA ES TUYA
Description:
Dans l'ère de l'e-commerce, les métiers traditionnels et artisanaux connaissent un renouveau, insufflant une touche de modernité par l'intégration subtile des tendances et de la technologie dans cette ère post-industrialisée.
Dans l'ère actuelle, l'engouement pour l'artisanat est palpable. Face à la standardisation de la production industrielle, le public recherche exclusivité et émotion dans les pièces artisanales.
Notre vision chez LA CASA ES TUYA est de transcender les frontières de la maroquinerie marocaine en devenant une référence alliant habilement technologie et tradition.

Name: Galaxy Moulding
Description: We GALAXY MOULDING are manufacturers of high-quality polyester sheet buttons using state of the art Italian Technology, situated in Faridabad with an industry experience of over 3 decades. Our wide range of Buttons include sizes from 10L to 40L. We manufacture lead free, UV free, all test pass export quality buttons.

Description: Produzione montature per occhiale | Progettazione montature da occhiale in 3D | occhiali in stampa 3D | occhiali in metallo foto tranciato | occhiali in acetato fatti a mano per piccole produzioni

Name: AR Global Gems Vault LLP
Description:
Oroalma is a Jaipur-based jewellery brand blending traditional craftsmanship with contemporary design. We specialize in handcrafted jewellery using precious and semi-precious stones, offering both ready-to-wear collections and fully customised pieces.

With a commitment to quality, artistry, and individuality, Oroalma creates timeless jewellery that celebrates heritage while catering to modern tastes.

 Explore our collection or collaborate with us to create your dream jewellery: www.oroalma.com

 Johri Bazar, Jaipur

Name: ECOGRIFFE
Description: Vente en gros et au détail de tuques et accessoires d'hiver fabriqués au Québec. Fabrication de tuques personnalisées pour entreprises, cadeaux corporatifs, organisations ou équipes sportives.

Name: The House of Foxy
Description:
The House of Foxy celebrates the artistry of Portuguese craftsmanship, blending fair trade principles with a commitment to quality and sustainability. 
Each piece is designed and produced locally in Portugal using European-sourced materials, reflecting our dedication to ethical practices. 
The Foxy symbolizes more than style; it stands for conscious choices, respect for tradition, and a passion for creating accessories that tell a meaningful story.

Name: Optical Supply
Description: Optical Supply is a rapidly growing Canadian wholesaler specializing in optical frames, sunglasses, safety glasses, sport frames, and accessories, serving clients across Canada

Name: Sand One LLC
Description: Sand One is a fine art company based out of Los Angeles California

Name: Cryptdelart
Description: Our long-term goal is to have a virtual reality platform where people can shop wear and buy clothing online without the need to go to a physical shopping mall.

Name: Voga Clothing
Description: Voga Clothing is a premier clothing company specializing in crafting exclusive and sustainable women's fashion. Our collection features a curated range of leggings and pants designed to elevate style and comfort. With a focus on quality, innovation, and contemporary trends, Voga is everyone's go-to destination for chic and sophisticated wardrobe essentials. Discover the perfect fit for every occasion with Voga.

Name: All Fashion Tips
Description: Welcome to All Fashion Tips, your one-stop destination for all things fashion. We're passionate about helping you look and feel your best, no matter your budget or style. From the latest trends to timeless classics, we've got you covered.

Name: BRACLI
Description: Bracli is the exclusive lingerie brand behind the creation of the original pearl thong. We have been designing and manufacturing pearl lingerie since 1996. Lingerie, jewellery and pleasure united in unique garments.

Name: Genba Sale
Description: Genba, the ultimate destination for smart gadgets of unparalleled quality and exceptional prices.

Name: Final Aksesuar ve Düğme A.Ş.
Description:
Türkiye'nin En İyi ve En Güvenli Düğme Çözümlerini Sunuyoruz.

2005 yılında Yenibosna’da temelleri atılan Final Button kurulduğu günden bu yana ithalat ve ihracat sektöründe hızla büyümüş ve halen geniş kapsamlı faaliyetleri ile hedeflerini her geçen gün daha da yükselten bir firmadır. Kanada, Fas, Fransa ve Özbekistan’a doğrudan düğme ihracatı yapan Final Button, Türkiye’de tekstil sektörüyle ünlü birçok şehre düğme göndererek düğme sektöründeki liderliğini koruyor.

2012 yılında İkitelli’de 5 katlı bir tesiste düğme üretimi için büyük bir atılım yapan Final Düğme, bu fabrikaya ek olarak 2020 yılında Saraçlar Organize Sanayii’de ikinci fabrikasını kurmuştur. Müşterilerinin ihtiyaçları doğrultusunda yeni düğme modelleri ve yeni düğme renkleri ile kendini geliştirmeye devam eden Final Düğme, her zaman açık olan vizyonu ile kaliteli ve güvenilir hizmet anlayışından ödün vermeden sürekli üretimde bir dünya markası olmayı başarmıştır. değişim ve yenilik için.

Final Button, Mavi, Zara, Beymen, LCW Waikiki ve H&M gibi markalarla işbirliği içinde, kullandığı yüksek kaliteli malzeme segmenti, yüksek üretim kapasitesi ve son teknoloji ile müşterilerine her zaman en iyi kaliteyi sunmayı amaç edinmiştir.

Name: Diseño y Fabricacion de Herrajes
Description:
Desde nuestros comienzos como Industrias en Acero Plazola en 1968, hasta la evolución a Innovadora de Accesorios Peleteros en 1990, y finalmente a Diseño y Fabricación de Herrajes en 2013, nuestra historia es una de adaptación, innovación y pasión por el diseño.

Nuestro viaje comenzó en el corazón de México, donde aprendimos a forjar el acero con habilidad y precisión. Con el tiempo, nos hemos especializado en la creación de herrajes únicos para la industria del calzado, atendiendo a los más distinguidos diseñadores y fabricantes de calzado de nuestro país, que exportan su arte a Estados Unidos y Europa.

Nos hemos convertido en maestros de los acabados vintage, capturando la esencia del estilo vaquero que es tan querido en nuestro mercado. Pero, al igual que la moda, nunca nos quedamos quietos,  hemos ampliado nuestra gama para incluir acabados brillantes en oro, níquel y otros, reflejando las tendencias actuales y las demandas de nuestros clientes.

En Diseño y Fabricación de Herrajes, cada pieza que creamos es un testimonio de nuestra historia, nuestra habilidad y nuestra pasión por el diseño. Trabajamos mano a mano con los diseñadores para dar forma a sus visiones, creando piezas que son tanto funcionales como estéticamente impresionantes.

Aunque nuestra historia se remonta a más de medio siglo, mantenemos una chispa de juventud y energía en todo lo que hacemos. Nos esforzamos por estar a la vanguardia de las tendencias de diseño, siempre listos para adaptarnos y evolucionar con la moda.

Nos enorgullece ser parte de la historia de la moda en México, y estamos emocionados por lo que el futuro nos depara. Te invitamos a unirte a nosotros en este viaje, a medida que continuamos forjando, diseñando y creando para el mundo.

Oro Vegetal de Brasil works closely with local artisans and communities to ethically harvest and transform this extraordinary plant into exquisite pieces of jewerly.
The company offers a wide range of jewerly designs, including earings, necklaces, bracelets and rings.

Every piece of jewerly from Oro Vegetal de Brasil is not visually captivating but also represents a commitment to sustainability.
The company prioritizes fair trade pratices, providing fair wages and empowering local communities.

Whether its a gift for a loved one or a personal treasure, the biojewerly from Oro Vegetal de Brasil, allows individuals to wear a piece os sustaintable luxury, rooted in the enchanting culture of Brazil´s Jalapao region

Gilda Tonelli, con una tradizione familiare di lavorazione della pelle che risale ai primi anni del secolo scorso, è un brand leader del settore da anni. La famiglia Tonelli produsse i primi articoli in pelle in un piccolo laboratorio artigianale fino al 1979 quando, uniti dalla passione e dal talento per la pelletteria, fondarono una fabbrica artigianale per la produzione dei propri accessori.

Alla fine degli anni '80 i nostri prodotti, presentati nelle fiere di settore internazionali, ebbero successo in tutto il mondo.

Le nostre creazioni Gilda Tonelli sono tutt'oggi l'espressione di un design unico Made in Italy, combinato alla passione per le tecnologie innovative, la scelta accurata dei materiali e alla sapiente lavorazione manuale degli artigiani italiani che da sempre ci contraddistinguono!

Name: Revolución Urbana

Zapatos hechos en Colombia

Recuperamos llantas y neumáticos y los transformamos en zapatos livianos, impermeables y duraderos a través de una perfecta sinergia con el diseño, la innovación y el arte urbano.

En la parte que recubre el pie se remplazan pieles por el neumático y la llanta es usada para el desarrollo de la suela.

Esto lo logramos con la ayuda de zapateros expertos con más de 40 años de experiencia en el oficio. 

Durante el proceso, buscamos disminuir el impacto ambiental, cuidando cada uno de los recursos con los que disponemos para el desarrollo del producto.

Así le damos una nueva oportunidad de uso a un material que ya cumplió su propósito en una categoría bajo el proceso de la economía circular.

Name: Cinturificio Balzani Srl
Description:
For 50 years, we have been crafting belts, primarily working with international business clients. We have always ensured the high quality of Made in Italy and true artisanal craftsmanship!

Our passion for craftsmanship and quality is evident in the materials we carefully select for each creation and the attention to detail we have always placed in our work.

Our master leatherworkers handcraft high-quality belts for men and women, using certified, vegetable-tanned Tuscan leather. The belts are distinguished by their unique craftsmanship and personalized design.

For over half a century, the love and dedication of our family have driven the success of Cinturificio Balzani. Over time, the Balzani family has transformed passion into a recognized mark of quality, especially in Europe, creating a legacy of artisanal excellence.

From the artisanal production of belts in vegetable-tanned Tuscan leather, blending tradition and quality into every piece, to custom designs that allow for personalized belts, with attention to every detail.

We promote sustainability through natural processes, water-based products, and our Second-Life project, which repurposes leather scraps to create accessories like keychains and bracelets.

Additionally, we have always partnered with others to offer exclusive accessories such as custom buckles, using precious materials like mother-of-pearl.

Our consulting services guide clients through every step, ensuring that each accessory created reflects their distinct taste and style, from the initial concept to the final realization.

Description:
Kaushey Loom & Craft is a handcrafted jewelry startup by rural women in India. The brand was founded in 2017 by Nalini Srivastava, who wanted to create a sustainable and ethical jewelry brand that would empower women.
Kaushey Loom & Craft's jewelry is made using traditional Indian techniques and materials, such as beads, stones, and metal. The jewelry is designed by Nalini and her team, and is handcrafted by women in rural communities in India.
Kaushey Loom & Craft's mission is to "empower women through jewelry." The brand works with women's self-help groups in rural India, providing them with training and employment opportunities. 
Kaushey Loom & Craft's jewelry is available online and in select stores in India. 
Here are some of the things that make Kaushey Loom & Craft a unique and special brand:
•	It is a social enterprise that empowers women through jewelry.
•	It uses traditional Indian techniques and materials.
•	It is handcrafted by women in rural communities in India.
•	It is a sustainable and ethical brand.
If you are looking for beautiful, handcrafted jewelry that is made by women, Kaushey Loom & Craft is a great option. The brand's jewelry is stylish, affordable, and ethical. You can be sure that when you buy Kaushey Loom & Craft jewelry, you are supporting a good cause.

Name: Elty Buckleless Belt
Description:
Fly in ease, comfort and style. Elty, the buckleless belt, is the first truly comfortable belt and there is no metal so you can wear it through TSA. Men and women like how they look in a buckleless belt because there's no buckle to bulge under tops or jackets and Elty keeps your pants from sagging. 

You’ll look more put-together—no need to tug your pants up, they stay just where you want them. And none of the embarrassment of taking your belt on and putting it back on in security lines. Perfect for business traveler's or people who work in secure locations. 

Bathroom breaks are faster and  more hygienic too-no need to touch your belt in the bathroom. 


Elty keeps the back of your pants up. Stop showing a crack; bend over with confidence. Elty does not cross your button or zipper so it will not bind and you can take off your pants without touching your belt You can even leave Elty on your pants when you wash them. 

Imagine, no belt buckle to dig into your stomach plus Elty buckleless belt means no scratches on cars, guitars and more. Stops jeans and pants from slipping, sagging or showing your butt, without the discomfort of a buckle. 

Perfect for people who sit a lot like programmers,  coding specialists, data analysts, graphic designer and more. Great for professionals that want to look sharp but feel comfortable. If your job makes you travel in cars or airplanes you'll love the comfort of a buckleless belt. 

Elty are also great for anyone with limited dexterity, carpal tunnel, or an injury. Also great for people who do any activity where a belt buckle gets in the way. This ranges from plumbers to skateboarders, truck drivers to motor cyclists, horse back riders to flooring specialists. 

From desk jobs to construction work a belt without a buckle makes sense. Government workers often have to pass through security no metal Elty means they can  look good without having to take off a belt. Elty is essential for jobs require sitting or traveling.

Name: Metal Atelier S.a.s.
Description:
Metal Atelier è un'azienda che commercializza accessori metallici per il settore moda, prodotti su una filiera esclusivamente italiana. Crediamo nella sostenibilità e siamo convinti che per dare vita a questa parola si debbano, per prima cosa, proteggere e sviluppare le competenze per le quali il nostro paese è sempre stato famoso nel mondo. Abbiamo maturato un'esperienza di oltre 25 anni, producendo direttamente per i maggiori Brand del lusso europeo, dalla progettazione alla realizzazione. La nostra idea è quella di offrire un prodotto altamente competitivo in termini di qualità e prezzo, sviluppato su una rete di aziende italiane che ancora lavorano seguendo principi di artigianalità, ricerca, sviluppo e amore per le competenze.

Questa è la nostra realtà innovativa, capace di seguire i rapidi cambiamenti che il mercato del lusso ha avuto negli ultimi anni. Eseguiamo lavorazioni meccaniche su qualsiasi tipologia di metallo (ottone, zama, acciaio, alluminio, titanio), abbinate a molteplici finiture come galvanica, verniciatura, anodizzazione e PVD. Grazie a tecnologie innovative lavoriamo anche metalli "speciali" come le leghe di acciaio e il titanio. I nostri punti di forza sono: produzione locale, competenza tecnica, alta qualità del prodotto, velocità nelle consegne e versatilità.

Name: Looop Store
Description:
Looop – distinguished by the triple 'O' – represents the core stages of our bag creation process: 3D printing, coating, and chemical finishing. This unique approach not only sets us apart in the fashion industry but underscores our dedication to sustainable practices, combining cutting-edge technology with detailed craftsmanship in bag production.

Sometimes a bag is just a bag, but at Looop, we believe that a bag is more than an accessory – it's a reflection of your worldview. We're not just crafting bags; we're weaving experiences. Our journey began with our founders, each bearing over 15 years of heritage in knitting. Their dedication to the delicate intricacies of knitting and weaving is more than craftsmanship; it's a deep-rooted passion.

But it doesn't end there. We believe in sustainability, and 3D printing provides an unparalleled canvas for innovation. Our bags go beyond being eco-friendly; they're a declaration of conscious luxury.

Unlike traditional leather products, Looop offers an alternative that combines style and sustainability using 3D printed materials. We create bags that align with your values, respecting both the environment and animal welfare, and making luxury choices without compromise. Looop patterns aren't just designs; they're stories interwoven into the fabric of responsible style. When you carry a Looop, you're not just wearing a bag; you're embracing a unique feeling of style, conscience, and heritage.

Name: Cum Cura Fragrances
Description:
All these combinations are dictated by a single word: sensation. Sensation begets emotion; an emotion begets an action. This little equation was the starting point for Cum Cura, from Latin: "Made With Care." 

Continuous research is an integral and fundamental part of Cum Cura's DNA. In particular, research within the infinite world of Design, with the aim of giving new life and value to everyday objects, transforming them into very exclusive design products.

The same philosophy is used in the creation of eau de parfum intence fragrances. In this case, with the goal of bringing everyday moments to life through unique and sophisticated olfactory experiences.

Cum Cura studies and analyzes content and concepts from our daily lives to orient them to the future through design and new technologies as a tool for design innovation. 

Human creativity and technological research together open the door to endless possible combinations, to make new what is old, palpable what can only be imagined... 

EX FUTURE. CUM CURA.


La ricerca continua è parte integrante e fondamentale del DNA di Cum Cura. In particolare, la ricerca all’interno dell’infinito mondo del Design, con lo scopo di dare nuova vita e valore ad oggetti di uso quotidiano, trasformandoli in prodotti di design molto esclusivi.

La stessa filosofia viene utilizzata per la creazione di fragranze eau de parfum intence. In questo caso, con l’obiettivo di far vivere momenti di vita quotidiana attraverso esperienze olfattive uniche e ricercate.

Cum Cura studia e analizza contenuti e concetti provenienti dal nostro quotidiano, per orientarli al futuro, attraverso il design e le nuove tecnologie come strumento di innovazione progettuale. 

Creatività umana e ricerca tecnologica, insieme, aprono le porte a infinite possibili combinazioni, per rendere nuovo ciò che è vecchio, palpabile ciò che si può solo immaginare... 

EX FUTURO. CUM CURA.

Name: BiBir Shinduk - বিবির সিন্দুক
Description:
Welcome to Bibir Shinduk, your gateway to an exclusive collection of handcrafted jewelry and handloom Jamdani sarees. Driven by the ethos of "Unleash Your Inner Sparkle," we strive to infuse every creation with the richness of traditional ethnic design and the freshness of contemporary aesthetics.

Our product line boasts an array of carefully curated pieces, each one crafted by our experienced master craftsmen hailing from renowned jewelry villages such as Vakurta, Jhinaidah, and Tangail. We utilize brass metal for our jewelry, plating each piece with pure gold and silver to ensure long-lasting luster and color durability.

Our pride, however, lies in our Jamdani sarees. Jamdani is not just a product; it is a symbol of our heritage, a testament to the ancient artistry passed down through generations. Handwoven, light as a feather, our Jamdani sarees tell a unique story of Mughal patronage and timeless tradition. We source these sarees directly from the weavers of Rupgonj, ensuring the authenticity and quality of every piece.

Customer satisfaction is at the heart of Bibir Shinduk. We believe in crafting products that reflect the individuality and feminine core of every woman. Hence, we offer customization to meet your unique taste and style.

Through Bibir Shinduk, we aim to represent and promote our Bangladeshi heritage, blending it beautifully with modernity. Join us on this journey of celebrating tradition, fostering creativity, and embracing the empowerment of women.

Name: Rewave
Description:
Who we are.

We at ReWave see waste plastic differently. In a world where companies and consumers turn their backs on an ever growing waste problem, we see opportunity. We care passionately about creating a sustainable future for wildlife, people and environmental hygiene! That's why ReWave has worked harder than ever to reshape the way we manufacture and consume plastic products, by intercepting and recycling discarded fishing nets and rope from the North Atlantic Ocean, we are able to produce top-quality designer sunglasses using the materials at an affordable price.

Our Goal.

Restoring the purity and life in our oceans is our main area of focus. We believe that the waste plastic polluted across our oceans can be put to great use through sustainable manufacturing methods and consumerism. Across our network we have developed efficient recycling technologies, capable of turning recovered fishing nets into high-quality every day items. With a focus on sustainable sunglasses we hope to transform the fashion industry, redefining value for the people who really care about saving the planet. The maritime waste industry currently leaks over 7 million tonnes of plastic every year into the ocean between 10-20% is from fishing nets and rope. Our goal is simple, we wish to close the loop and intercept all plastic before it enters our oceans. We believe that with help from you, the community, we can continue to develop technology and find new innovative uses for waste plastic. Together, through better education and spending, we can achieve a circular economy.

Why should you choose ReWave?

We are finally giving you the chance to have a direct impact on fighting ocean plastic waste. Our products are guaranteed 100% sustainable, from the recycled design of the glasses to the biodegradable packaging, your mind can rest easy.

Description:
Mente Vazia Ateliê makes biojewels with reused wood for people to create their own style and feel good!

House beams, doors, bed frames, colored pencils and everything that we manage to reuse. We work with wood in its various forms and we are the first studio in Brazil to specialize in accessories made from discarded skate boards.

We also combine wood with other reusable materials, such as plastic cards, copper wire, aluminum, among others.

We unite traditional techniques and contemporary design to bring creativity and originality to our products.

We understand craftwork as a way to rescue practices that, in essence, are more careful with people and the planet. That's why we use it to promote the diversity of styles, self-esteem and sustainable fashion.


WHY MENTE VAZIA [EMPTY MIND]?

An empty mind makes room for creativity.
It brings lightness, energy and inspiration to our creation.

With an empty mind, we act with freedom to be who we are and our best version.

It is with this feeling that we produce. And this is what we want you to feel with our products.

Description:
Yidios Hakim is a women-founded enterprise that embodies a fusion of passion, culture, and opportunities, all expressed through the medium of fashion to produce distinctive pieces. Our core belief centers around the celebration of diversity, the establishment of ownership, and the promotion of inclusivity, as we strive to bring people together.

This remarkable journey began with a humble pair of tweezers, a thread, and a needle, fueled by a resolute drive to bridge cultural gaps, empower women, and make a social impact. We achieve this by collaborating with indigenous Wayuu communities, as well as individuals currently in the process of recovering from addiction or who have faced limitations on their personal freedom. These partnerships are formed with esteemed social foundations like Juntos Podemos from El Buen Pastor and Fundación Centro De Restauración Integral Hombres De Valor in Bogotá, Colombia.

Yidios Hakim stands as a testament to a family-driven entrepreneurship that skillfully transforms elements from diverse cultures into extraordinary fashion statements. Our product development process creates a ripple effect that positively impacts over 5 communities across the Middle East and Colombia. By crafting bags and straps that embrace the concept of mix and match, we encourage the exploration of creativity and cater to a variety of personalities.

Name: Koodai By Saras

Empowering Women Through Koodai

Welcome to Koodai, where tradition intertwines with modern style, and empowerment is woven into every knot. Rooted in the rich legacy of plastic wire weaving—a craft passed down through generations of Indian women—Koodai transforms a cherished hobby into a vibrant brand that celebrates both heritage and contemporary design.

Our Inspiration

In the quiet corners of homes, amidst daily rhythms, our inspiration flourishes. Weaving plastic koodais (baskets) is more than a craft; it's a cultural legacy cherished by women across India. At Koodai, we honor this traditional art form by infusing it with fresh perspectives, offering a range of contemporary designs that resonate with the dynamic lifestyles of today's women.

Name: RaGa Arts pvt.ltd
Description:
Welcome to Raga Arts - a company that celebrates the unique blend of technology and Indian culture in fashion and clothing.

At Raga Arts, we are passionate about bringing the traditional yet innovative sensibilities of Indian fashion to the world. Our team of designers and craftsmen use the latest technology to create contemporary and stylish clothing that is deeply rooted in the rich heritage and culture of India. We specialize in sarees, women’s clothing, and fashion accessories that are finely crafted with attention-to-detail and care.

We take pride in our commitment to ethical and sustainable fashion practices. We source the finest materials from around the world and work with skilled artisans and craftspeople who have inherited the long-standing knowledge and practices of our culture. Our designs are created with a strong sense of environmental responsibility, with the goal to reduce waste and carbon footprint.

As a company, we value diversity, equity, and inclusion. We believe that fashion should be empowering and accessible to everyone, regardless of their gender, race, ethnicity, or background. We are committed to promoting a culture of respect, kindness, and collaboration among our employees and customers.

Whether you are looking for a traditional Indian saree or a stylish yet comfortable piece of women’s clothing, Raga Arts has something for you. Our designs are unique, vibrant, and always fashion-forward. Join us as we embark on a journey to showcase the very best of Indian tradition and innovation in fashion.

Name: The Guitar Bag
Description:
The Guitar Bag is a registered trademark and
fashion company founded by Maria Jose Carral,
specialized in leather bags and accessories.
Its particular characteristic is that it is the first
and only brand that can attach guitar straps to the
bags of its collection, thanks to a specific button
that has been patented as a utility model.
This fastening button similar to the strap button
on guitars, the original closure, the simple design
and the possibility to customize the products,
make The Guitar Bag an exclusive brand.
In addition to the strap button, the bags feature
other details reminiscent of the world of music,
such as the plectrum-shaped logo, inserted in
the central part of the bag as a mechanical
fastener, also known as a key used to tune the
instrument.
The business project was born in 2017 and the
influence of rock music, which Maria José
listened to since she was a child, was crucial.
In fact, the designer looked at guitars as if they
were magical objects, so she tried to imitate her
idols by buying instrument straps and attaching
them to her bags.
This was her major inspiration to design, modify
the strap button and found the brand from
scratch.
Today The Guitar Bag has been selected as an
emerging brand to participate in Alta Roma, you
can find it in several Italian stores and has been
recognized by the ltalian and Spanish press.

Name: Marta NTM
Description: Immerse yourself in the allure of MNTM, a jewelry brand that transcends the ordinary, where each piece is not just an accessory but a celebration of freedom, individuality, and artistry. Handmade in Italy, MNTM is a symphony of elegance and rebellion, a brand that beckons you to explore, express yourself, and embrace the extraordinary. Guided by the principle of freedom, MNTM embarks on a relentless quest for uniqueness. Every handcrafted piece is a testament to individuality and artistry, a reflection of the wearer's bold spirit. What sets MNTM apart is the embrace of imperfections as an integral part of beauty, where each piece tells a story of authenticity and character. MNTM necklaces are meticulously crafted by skilled artisans, using vintage elements and adhering strictly to a plastic-free philosophy. Each necklace is a small work of art, uniquely exaggerated, echoing the eclectic and extravagant ethos that defines the brand. These creations aren't just necklaces; they are statements of unapologetic style. MNTM invites you to embrace the extraordinary in the everyday. Our creations are not just necklaces; they are manifestations of eclectic beauty, designed to be worn daily. Create your own style, choose the perfect accessory based on how you feel, and let MNTM be the canvas for expressing your unique self. In a world of mass production, MNTM stands as a testament to the human touch. Each piece is a collaboration between the artisan and the wearer, where the allure of individuality and the embrace of imperfections come together to create something truly exceptional. MNTM is not just jewelry; it's an extension of you. MNTM invites you to elevate your expression, to embrace freedom, and to adorn yourself in handcrafted elegance. Join us on a journey where every piece is a statement, and every necklace is a reflection of the extraordinary. This is MNTM where artistry meets individuality, and jewelry becomes a canvas for your unique story.

Name: Mariana Rosales Design Corp.
Description:
Mariana Rosales Design Corp es una firma pionera en diseño con un firme compromiso hacia la sostenibilidad, la innovación y la promoción del amor universal. Nuestra misión es impulsar la felicidad y el bienestar humano a través de productos y servicios de diseño excepcionales, empleando tecnologías sostenibles y materiales ecológicos.

Nacida de una preocupación sincera por el futuro de nuestro planeta, Mariana Rosales Design Corp se distingue por su enfoque integral que combina estética, funcionalidad y responsabilidad ecológica. Nuestro lema, 'EARTH-DESIGN-LOVE', refleja nuestra dedicación a la Tierra, nuestra pasión por el diseño y nuestro compromiso con la propagación del amor y la empatía.

Nos enorgullecemos de ser una empresa que respeta profundamente la vida y la biodiversidad. Cada producto en nuestro catálogo es testimonio de nuestra promesa ecológica, desarrollado con la menor huella ambiental posible. Además, fomentamos una cultura de diversidad, igualdad e inclusión, creando un espacio donde cada empleado y colaborador se siente valorado y empoderado.

En Mariana Rosales Design Corp, miramos hacia el futuro con la visión de ser líderes en Norteamérica en productos de diseño ecológico y de alta calidad. A través de nuestras prácticas comerciales, relaciones estratégicas y actividades de sensibilización, aspiramos a ser más que una marca: un movimiento que inspire un cambio positivo y duradero para nuestro planeta y sus habitantes.

Name: Inti Eyewear
Description:
En Inti Eyewear, somos pioneros en Ecuador en la elaboración de productos ópticos eco-amigables que te invitan a experimentar una reconexión con tus raíces, la naturaleza. Nos enorgullece ofrecer productos de la más alta calidad que rescatan la identidad ecuatoriana.

Los conceptos de sostenibilidad ambiental, calidad e innovación son la base de nuestros procesos de diseño y manufactura; estos aseguran que el acabado de todos nuestros productos sea impecable. Los armazones Inti Eyewear están diseñados siguiendo las últimas tendencias ópticas y de moda, con un enfoque especial en la ergonomía para garantizar que sean livianos, resistentes y cómodos. Además, nos comprometemos a utilizar materiales eco-amigables en su elaboración.

Las maderas que empleamos cuentan con certificación FSC, tienen una guía de procedencia, lo que garantiza su origen sostenible. Estas maderas han sido cuidadosamente seleccionadas para proporcionar comodidad, ligereza y durabilidad al usuario, al mismo tiempo que cuentan con un acabado hipoalergénico. Asimismo, nuestras piezas plásticas son fabricadas a partir de materiales reciclados como policarbonato (CD’s), bioplásticos derivados de fibras de té, bambú, trigo o nylon vegetal obtenido a partir de semillas de ricino.

En Inti Eyewear, encontramos nuestra principal inspiración en la identidad ecuatoriana. Por esta razón, nuestras colecciones y ediciones limitadas siempre reflejan una carga cultural e histórica de nuestro país. Trabajamos en estrecha colaboración con artistas, artesanos y diseñadores ecuatorianos para llevar a cabo nuestros procesos creativos y asegurarnos de que cada producto sea una verdadera expresión de nuestra herencia cultural.

Name: EOS UPCYCLING
Description:
¿Qué hacer con la ropa y los accesorios que ya no se usan? no los tires! En lugar de eso, reutilízalos, dales un nuevo propósito y ofrece una segunda vida a todos esos objetos que tienen un potencial excepcional. EOS encuentra piezas vintage de alta costura que están dañadas o pasadas de moda para transformarlas y darles una segunda vida.
Nuestros productos provienen de auténticas piezas de ropa de marcas de lujo, usadas o en desuso. Estas piezas son rediseñadas y transformadas en creaciones únicas. Los botones reciclados se convierten en collares, pendientes y pulseras.
Nuevas creaciones upcycling se presentan regularmente en nuestro sitio web. Por lo general, están disponibles muy pocos ejemplares, a menudo como piezas únicas, lo que hace que cada creación sea distinta y especial.

Así que, si alguna joya te gusta, no tardes demasiado en decidirte, porque puede desaparecer en cualquier momento!

Name: DANIÉ - Official brand
Description:
Il brand Danié Made in Sicily nasce come omaggio alla Sicilia. Ogni creazione rigorosamente realizzata a mano s’ispira all’Isola, ne riporta il carattere eccentrico, affascinante, forte, cogliendo ed esaltando quelle sfumature che rendono così speciale la nostra terra.
Oggetto icona del brand è la Coffa siciliana, in passato usata dai contadini come cesta o contenitore per il trasporto del foraggio degli animali o di strumenti per l’attività agricola e oggi trasformata in luxury bag per una donna decisa e caleidoscopica. La Coffa Danié Made in Sicily è creata usando la curina, la parte più tenera della palma nana siciliana, e poi impreziosita con tessuti e materiali tipici della Trinacria, le ceramiche di Caltagirone, ad esempio, i pizzi, le passamanerie, gli specchi, le rafie, le nappe e le nacchere. Così, nasce un’opera d’arte, unica, inimitabile: una borsa pensata non per portare, ma per essere portata, che emoziona al primo sguardo.
La collezione primavera/estate 2022 vede l’ingresso di un nuovo accessorio, il panaro, altro simbolo della memoria isolana, che Danié Made in Sicily veste con tessuti di scarto, perché tutto si reinventa e acquista nuova vita grazie alla creatività.
Una moda che guarda al passato, all’antica tradizione contadina dunque, ma con un’attenzione all’innovazione e alla sostenibilità ambientale.
La proposta del brand è completata dagli accessori moda: orecchini, cappelli, collane handmade diventano dettagli estrosi e originali che sanno dare personalità a ciascun outfit.
Prima di essere consegnata, ogni creazione è controllata minuziosamente e poi confezionata con cura: il packaging è completato da un certificato di autenticità dei materiali utilizzati e da un bigliettino che racconta la storia di Danié Made in Sicily.

Quần Tây ống rộng là biểu tượng của sự thanh lịch và sang trọng. Tại Maxxlook Shop, chúng tôi cung cấp những mẫu quần Tây ống rộng với chất liệu vượt trội và kiểu dáng đẹp mắt. Kết luận
Maxxlook Shop tự hào là địa chỉ uy tín cho những người yêu thời trang và đặc biệt quan tâm đến sự thoải mái. We hope to evolve into a luxury handmade brand by crafting each piece carefully with the best materials and innovating new stylish designs.

Sustainably is important to us, which is we started crocheting our unique bags from recycled T-shirt material otherwise known as T-shirt yarn. T-shirt yarn is made of used T-shirts, it is mostly made from factory leftover fabrics that are no longer usable for production. An important advantage of sticking with this special yarn is that it prevents those leftover textiles from going into landfills, it is a great eco-friendly option.

OUR MISSION:

Chiin Chilla first appeared on T-shirts and rapidly became a fashion icon in Shanghai, a mega-city in its creative prime. Our urban-inspired brand was a first of its kind there, and we continued to grow our collection, invent new patterns, and build a loyal fashion-forward community.

Operation Chiin Chilla is known for its prestigious fabrics and is forever inspired by Shanghai's traditional and Art Deco prints that are playfully interwoven into our designs. You might call it, Shanghai Couture.

After eight years in China, we expanded overseas to new headquarters in majestic Downtown Los Angeles, USA.

Name: Meta Mantrik Global
Description:
Whether it's through the heavy use of pesticides, the destruction of forests to make pastureland, cultivate cotton, or extract wood to make fibers for synthetic textiles, the fashion industry contributes significantly to land degradation. All of this leads to global warming and the continued loss of arable land, which endangers the existence and livelihood of rural communities all over the world.
Words like ethics and sustainability have become catchphrases in the search for apparel and accessories that have a lower environmental impact as more and more consumers become aware of the huge cost of the textile and fashion industries to the environment and humanity. In light of these worries, vegan clothing is becoming more popular.
However, joining vegan fashion also brings its challenges. With that in mind, we here at Meta Mantrik are trying our level best to find ethically produced pieces. We try our best to be as ethical as possible, however we are not anywhere close as we don’t own the land, factories, or transportation companies. Having said that we try to source the most ethical and choose to believe that our suppliers and manufacturers are complying. Meta Mantrik sets out to create a brand which is vegan, ethical and sustainable without compromising on style. Besides our range on Vegan sarees we also have handmade soaps, face masks, incense sticks, jewelry and brass items that are of premium quality, natural, eco-friendly, authentic, and exclusive.

La nostra realtà è costituita da diversi elementi, che operano in sinergia: 

1 - STUDIO GRAFICO: partendo dai file dei nostri clienti, o basandosi sulle loro indicazioni, disegna, progetta e realizza qualsiasi tipo di punzone, timbro, marchio e piastra in ottone o acciaio ricavati dal pieno.

2 - REPARTO INCISORIA: supportato da un sistema d'incisoria Cad-Cam e pilotato da personale esperto, è attualmente attrezzato con 9 centri di lavoro che, oltre a garantire la lavorazione contemporanea di più progetti, assicura l’elevata qualità del prodotto e la consegna nei termini richiesti.

3 - REPARTO FUSTELLE: nella nostra officina si costruiscono prodotti di taglio per pelle e cuoio, per tessuti sintetici-tecnici o elasticizzati, per feltro, gomma e altri materiali; adattando quindi la produzione a qualsiasi necessità di tranciatura nei settori della calzatura, pelletteria ed accessori, selleria, guarnizioni, interni per settore nautico/automobilistico, articoli rivestiti in pelle per arredamento ed altro ancora. 
Ottone, acciaio e acciaio inox per realizzare:
- Cliché (timbri)
- Impianti maschio-femmina
- Rulli + Stampi all over per cinture fino a mm 1250
- Piastre in ottone su base in alluminio per micro forature
- Piastre di tutti i tipi sino ad un formato massimo di mm.500x500
- Fustelle speciali in acciaio ricavate dal pieno
- Fustelle in lama h.30, h.20, tex (zigrinata per tessuti)
- Blocchetti BIBO cdr per forature multiple e per punta cintura
- Fustelle con estrattori a molla
- Ricavo modelli
- Ricavo modelli manuale
- Sviluppo modelli per calzature CAD CAM System

La consulenza che riusciamo ad assicurare prima dell’esecuzione di qualsiasi commessa è un elemento che ogni giorno accresce la nostra affidabilità nei riguardi di clienti storici e nuovi.

Description:
Zangar acknowledges that every piece of jewelry is a mix of elements of nature, developed in the skin of the Earth, extracted and mediated into a piece of art — a noble human labor spent on precious earthy material, shared with a resonating audience.

Zangar recognizes the cost of human use of material for nature. We try to do the less costly thing at every decision-making in the process of sourcing the material, making the artwork, and dealing with the waste.

Zangar believes in the connecting power of wearable art and meaningful sensory experience for everyday human users more than the market value of the precious metal that fluctuates daily.

Zangar regards human accessories as vehicles of aesthetic experience, designed for a long lasting series of temporary installations on human body to resonate beauty for feeling good on the face of Earth. 

Zangar design is tied to memories triggered by the flowing-around of information in different languages and forms. Our production involves tools, knowledge and raw material, sourced locally and from all over the map, for a piece of art to come together, made in the land of the Lenape, Brooklyn, New York.

Description:
Bridal Port - Crafting Timeless Memories

Welcome to Bridal Port, where craftsmanship meets love to create exquisite wedding accessories. Based in the heart of San Antonio, Texas, our journey begins in the enchanting landscapes of Turkey, where our workshop thrives in the art of creating high-quality, bespoke pieces that elevate every wedding celebration.

At Bridal Port, we believe in the power of meaningful details that turn weddings into timeless memories. With our roots deeply embedded in the rich tapestry of Turkish craftsmanship, we bring a touch of cultural elegance to every piece we create. Our workshop, nestled in the picturesque landscapes of Turkey, serves as the birthplace of intricate designs that reflect the artistry of centuries-old traditions.

 Quality, Passion, and Commitment

We take pride in our commitment to delivering unparalleled quality and craftsmanship. Each wedding accessory we produce is a testament to the passion and dedication of our artisans, who pour their expertise into every stitch, bead, and detail. Our team in San Antonio ensures that every piece meets the highest standards, embodying the essence of love and celebration.

 Bridging Continents, Connecting Hearts

With a seamless blend of Turkish artistry and Texan hospitality, Bridal Port is more than a workshop; it's a bridge connecting cultures and hearts. Whether you're searching for the perfect veil, headpiece, or accessory to complement your special day, we invite you to explore our collection, where tradition meets modern elegance.

 Our Vision: Elevating Your Wedding Experience

At Bridal Port, our vision extends beyond crafting accessories; it's about enhancing the entire wedding experience. We strive to be a part of your journey, contributing to the beauty and uniqueness of your celebration. Each piece tells a story, and we are honored to be a part of yours.
