Name: HAIR NICHE BY SHELLY
Description:
Natural human hair extensions have become a popular way for people to enhance their hair and achieve a desired look. As the name suggests, these hair extensions are made from 100% real human hair, providing a natural and seamless blend with the wearer's own hair. One company that specializes in natural human hair extensions is "Hair Niche by Shelly". Established in 2022, Hair Niche by Shelly has grown to become a leading provider of high-quality human hair extensions in the beauty industry.

Hair Niche by Shelly offers a wide variety of hair extensions, including Clip-in Extensions, Messy Buns, Single Clip Streaks, Volumizers, Clip-in Bangs, Hair Care products and more. All of the products are made from ethically sourced, 100% natural human hair that has not been chemically processed or treated with any harmful substances. In addition to their premium quality hair extensions, Hair Niche also offers a range of hair care products designed to maintain and extend the life of their hair extensions. From shampoos and conditioners to detanglers and serums, their hair care products are specially formulated to keep the hair looking healthy, shiny, and strong.

One of the key factors that sets Hair Niche apart from its competitors is their commitment to customer service. They offer a personalized experience to each of their clients, providing guidance on choosing the right type of hair extension and helping with installation and maintenance. Their team of experienced hair stylists is always available to answer questions and provide support throughout the hair extension process. Hair Niche's dedication to quality and customer service has earned them a loyal customer base and a reputation as a trusted provider of natural human hair extensions. They continue to innovate and expand their product offerings, ensuring that they remain at the forefront of the hair extension industry.

Name: Hanahou
Description:
A Hana Hou é muito mais do que uma marca de óculos de sol. Somos uma homenagem à tradição polinésia, os havaianos valorizam o que é especial e único. A frase "Hana Hou", que significa "mais uma vez", é usada quando algo é tão especial que merece ser apreciado novamente e novamente. É exatamente assim que nos sentimos sobre os shapes de skate que usamos para criar nossas armações. Eles são tão especiais que não merecem ser descartados - em vez disso, os transformamos em verdadeiras obras de arte que podem ser apreciadas "mais uma vez" como óculos de sol elegantes e sustentáveis. Junte-se a nós nesta missão de valorizar o especial e fazer a diferença no mundo - uma armação de cada vez.
Nossos óculos também possuem lentes polarizadas e proteção UV 400, garantindo a máxima proteção dos seus olhos contra os raios solares prejudiciais.

Name: pic cell brand
Description:
In order to bring together two distinct and appealing areas, two researchers, Inês Loureiro and Marisa Pereira created pic.cell brand. Pic.cell intends to select images obtained in laboratories, from the most diverse areas of research and use them in textile printing. 

    The improvement of technology in science, allowed the expansion and observation of structural and functional units of living organisms. Microscopes allow to overcome the human eye's resolution limit and enable researchers have access to the invisible side of nature. Many images acquired in laboratories are not used in scientific publications, they are simply archived. The aim is to make them visible and show that Nature has an indescribable beauty and complexity. Thus, in each collection, the images will be stylized creating attractive patterns and prints. The pic.cell brand, in addition to promote and disseminate in a fun way, the science made in Portugal, aims to bring science closer to the general public.

Name: AFROTHREADS
Description:
We’re a sister-owned company dedicated to culture, creativity and craftsmanship. We bring you the finest fabrics from Africa, their unique stories, and high quality, handmade products.

AFROTHREADS is based online and ships worldwide from Baltimore, Maryland USA. We are also carried by the following retail stores: BrownMill Company in Newark, New Jersey and The Shop Accra in Osu, Accra, Ghana. We pop-up at certain events from time to time—stay updated by visiting our website and joining our mailing at the bottom of the page. 

Our goal is to restore economic opportunities for African artisans, particularly textile manufacturers. We also encourage the following: slow, intentional fashion made with natural fibers; upcycling whenever possible; inclusive sizes; increased Black ownership within the textile and fashion industries; cultural appreciation and preservation; sustainable designs, and the use of technology.

We’re excited to connect with like-minded individuals here on LinkedIn

Name: The Girlfriends
Description:
The Girlfriends stands for women empowerment and the belief that we can accomplish anything we set our minds to. Together, we stand stronger, supporting and uplifting each other in all aspects of life. Our jewelry designs are inclusive, and contemporary, and find strength in femininity.

To ensure the highest quality, we source raw materials from the depths of Old Delhi through meticulous research and fieldwork. Each piece is made with the finest chains, charms, semi-precious stones, and crystals, all of which are handpicked and carefully crafted. Countless hours of hard work and attention to detail go into every creation, resulting in exquisite, one-of-a-kind pieces.

With the utmost confidence in our craftsmanship and dedication, we are excited to reach a larger audience and share our story. We want to provide a memorable experience to our customers, allowing them to embrace the best quality and designer jewelry. The Girlfriends is not just a brand; it is my love and passion. Every day, I wake up with a drive to create something new and beautiful for our audience.  

We aim to build an inclusive community where our audience could feel heard, empowered, and uplifted. We are proud to say that we have helped our clientele express their true sense of self through our pieces over the years. 

With our timeless and sustainable approach, we anticipate a future for fashion where the consumption of fast fashion is completely stopped.

Vastriaire derives its meaning from a Sanskrit word called ‘Vastra’ which means clothing and a French word ‘Vestiaire’ meaning the room, the fusion of Indian and French aesthetics has given rise to a style that beautifully honours the heritage of both the countries, with it’s commitment to craftsmanship, attention to detail, and a deep appreciation for the beauty of both cultures.
Our focus is to provide a luxury space for our designers to showcase their collection on a dedicated footwear platform and give the footwear industry the limelight it always deserved.

Name: RA* Officina Creativa
Description:
Creata nel 2011 RA* Officina Creativa è una boutique creativa nata per dare forma a idee e progetti unici, dove artigianalità, design e innovazione si intrecciano.

Situata a pochi passi da Venezia, in una terra ricca di storia e tradizione calzaturiera, RA* Officina Creativa è uno spazio dove ogni creazione racconta una storia, unendo una profonda conoscenza del settore a un’attenta ricerca di materiali e tecniche sostenibili.

I nostri servizi includono:

*Design di Calzature: Dallo sviluppo di concept creativi alla realizzazione di prototipi esclusivi, ogni modello è pensato per riflettere il connubio tra estetica, funzionalità e unicità.

*Consulenza Creativa e Sviluppo prodotto: Offriamo supporto su misura a brand e professionisti, trasformando idee in progetti concreti e distintivi.

*Ricerca Materiali e Innovazione: Scegliamo con cura materiali di alta qualità, privilegiando soluzioni sostenibili per rispondere alle esigenze di un mercato in continua evoluzione.

Con passione e un approccio sartoriale al design, RA* Officina Creativa si impegna a trasformare ogni progetto in un’opera unica, portando bellezza, energia e personalità nel mondo del fashion design.

Description:
Perusahaan Wanarona adalah perusahaan yang bergerak di bidang fashion khususnya aksesoris yang terbuat dari bahan ramah lingkungan dan hadir untuk menjawab permasalahan sampah yang belum terselesaikan dengan cara meningkatkan kepedulian masyarakat terhadap lingkungan melalui pembelian kerajinan tangan berupa manik-manik yang didesain secara handmade oleh kami dan menggunakan alat dan bahan ramah lingkungan yang berasal dari para vendor yang tergolong UMKM untuk sekaligus membantu usaha mereka. Kami menggabungkan lingkungan dan kreativitas untuk menciptakan berbagai produk yang memanjakan mata, namun tetap memberikan dampak bagi masyarakat.  

Bergerak di bidang lingkungan, Wanarona juga berkesempatan untuk berkolaborasi dengan komunitas-komunitas lingkungan untuk mengadakan workshop yang dapat lebih mendukung peningkatan kepedulian masyarakat terhadap lingkungan. Berjalannya perusahaan ini juga dapat mendukung tercapainya beberapa SDG, yaitu SDG 1 berupa pengentasan kemiskinan yang didukung oleh SDG 8 mengenai pekerjaan yang layak dan pertumbuhan ekonomi, serta karena konsep peduli lingkungan, hal ini akan sejalan dengan tercapainya SDG 12 mengenai konsumsi dan produksi yang bertanggung jawab serta SDG 13 mengenai keinginan untuk mengurangi dampak perubahan iklim.

Name: Milagros Bonasso
Description:
Hey everyone! Welcome to the world of Milagros Bonasso! I'm Milagros, the mind and hands behind this brand born out of love for craftsmanship and a passion for jewelry. 
So, what is Milagros Bonasso? 
Well, it's more than just an accessories brand; it's a piece of my heart and soul, crafted into every piece I make. Since 2017, I've been creating jewelry that makes you feel like a movie star, even if you're just going to the grocery store.
Before the pandemic, we focused on party accessories, but in 2020, we decided that every day deserves a little sparkle, and we launched our "daily" collection. And this is where my sister, Paz, comes in. She officially joined the family adventure and brought order, fresh ideas, and a structure that has helped us grow and flourish.

Everything at Milagros Bonasso is made with love, by hand, in Uruguay. 
Each piece is like a little miracle come true (and not just because it bears my name!). I draw inspiration from nature, my emotions, and the motto "more is more." That's why you'll find an explosion of colors, sparkle, and a variety that caters to all tastes and ages.

In short, we're here to make you feel beautiful, unique, and radiant, no matter what day it is or where you're going. Because at Milagros Bonasso, we believe that true beauty lies in feeling comfortable being yourself and shining your own light.

So, who's ready for a little Milagros Bonasso magic in their lives? Come check out our collection and let us help you shine even brighter!
Thank you for being part of this beautiful story!

Über uns

„Wir sind eine Kölner Manufaktur, die sich auf die Fertigung nachhaltiger Accessoires und Schmuckstücke in Deutschland spezialisiert. Mit unseren Produkten schaffen wir persönliche Lieblingsstücke, die ihre Träger lange Zeit begleiten.“
– Clara, Gründerin und Geschäftsführerin

Pikfine wurde 2011 von den beiden Schwestern Nora und Clara gegründet. Mit unserem Slow Fashion-Label bieten wir ein Produktangebot, das traditionelles Handwerk mit modernem Design verbindet und nachhaltig ausgerichtet ist. 

Unsere Gründerinnen sind auf dem Land aufgewachsen und haben bereits früh gelernt, unsere Umwelt wertzuschätzen und verantwortungsvoll mit ihr umzugehen. Unser Label steht seit der Gründung für umweltbewusste Accessoires, faire Produktion und Qualität made in Germany. Mit unseren Produkten wollen wir ein Angebot schaffen, das ehrliche Handwerkskunst in höchster Qualität mit Nachhaltigkeit und Transparenz vereint.

Name: YBM ZIPPERS
Description:
Introduction to YBM Zippers
History and Background

Zippers have become an integral component in the world of fashion and functionality, providing ease of use and secure closure for a multitude of products. Among the prominent names in the zipper industry, YBM (Yung Bae Manufacturing) has carved a niche for itself. Established in the late 20th century, YBM began as a small manufacturing company focused on producing high-quality zippers. Over the years, it has evolved into a leading global supplier, renowned for its innovative designs and commitment to quality.

Product Range and Innovation

YBM offers a diverse range of zipper types, including metal, nylon, and plastic zippers. Their product line is tailored to meet various industry needs, from apparel and accessories to heavy-duty applications such as luggage and outdoor gear. YBM is particularly recognized for its nylon zippers, which are lightweight yet durable, making them ideal for garments where comfort and performance are paramount.

Innovation is at the core of YBM’s philosophy. The company continually invests in research and development to enhance the functionality of its products. Name: Pattern Cutting Studio Ltd.
Description:
Out of an extensive experience as a high-end clothing manufacturer in London (Plus Samples Ltd.), with 20+ years under our belt, it has become clear that one major issue designers are facing is how to navigate the pattern cutting process.
It's not a secret that the development process is one of the most expensive parts of our business. Pattern cutting, toile making in particular, can be very costly, confusing and unpredictable.
As the Pattern Cutting Studio, we have made it our mission to share our high-end
professional expertise with new and established designers.
To help combat the challenges, we have found new ways to approach the
development process by making it more transparent and budget friendly. Upfront
costings and 3D rendering before any toiles are made are part of that process and are not only helping with making costings more predictable, but also are
highlighting issues before any physical stitching is done.
We approach our services with the understanding that the quality of the patterns
we produce directly affects the fit and flow of production. It is the vision of the
Pattern Cutting Studio to equip designers with a more streamlined, budget friendly process that will help make fashion production more sustainable, financially transparent and reliable.

Name: D STREET BELGIUM
Description:
" Lorsque j'ai eu l'opportunité de créer ma propre marque de streetwear, j'avais une vision claire : offrir des vêtements de qualité, accessibles et représentatifs de la culture urbaine contemporaine.

À l'âge de 19 ans, j'ai décidé de rassembler toutes mes économies et de rencontrer une équipe passionnée d'experts en mode et en design, avec une mission précise : créer une alternative authentique et moderne aux marques de streetwear traditionnelles.

C'est ainsi qu'est née D STREET, une maison de mode streetwear qui se distingue par son approche minimaliste et son engagement envers l'authenticité.

Chaque pièce est conçue avec soin pour refléter l'esprit de la rue, tout en offrant un confort optimal et une qualité irréprochable. Plutôt que de suivre les tendances passagères, nous avons décidé de les anticiper, en mettant l'accent sur des matériaux durables et des coupes intemporelles.

Notre mission ? Réinventer le streetwear en éliminant l'excès et en gardant uniquement l'essentiel : des vêtements qui parlent à ceux qui les portent, qui allient style, confort et respect des valeurs urbaines. Et tout cela, sans compromis. Aujourd’hui, D STREET est plus qu’une marque, c’est une communauté qui incarne l'authenticité, le respect de soi et de l’environnement. "

Bilal Dérard, Fondateur de D STREET

Name: Meclu
Description:
My goal is to help anyone who struggles with mental health and raise awareness and normalize conversations about it. It’s time to break the silence and change the narrative.

So why did I create a business surrounding the idea of mental health? I have suffered from chronic migraines since I was around the age of fifteen, getting about fifteen to twenty migraines a month, and didn’t realize for the longest time that it was stemming from severe anxiety. I overthink everything, I can get anxious from the simplest of things and am just an (emotional) twenty something year old doing my best at life. So, when I created this brand, I thought about what I wished already existed, resonated with me, and what I would genuinely purchase for myself. Thus, creating Meclu.

Name: Second Life
Description:
Second Life da oltre tre generazioni opera nel settore del second hand. L’attività inizia nei più famosi mercati specializzati nella compravendita di merce usata: dallo storico mercato di Resina all’ancor più antico di Porta Portese, veri e propri “luoghi di pellegrinaggio” per gli appassionati di collezionismo e riqualificazione dell’usato.
Nel 2001 il sapere maturato in anni di attività si trasforma in un progetto più strutturato, specializzato nella compravendita e selezione di accessoristica, con un focus sui prodotti di pelletteria, calzature e accessori moda. L’operato di Second Life si concentra sul recupero e il
successivo ricondizionamento di articoli di moda dismessi,
che tornano a nuova vita sul mercato con la qualifica di
“Regenerated Second Hand”.
Nella sua sede campana, in provincia di Benevento, ha
ottimizzato in 1000 mq tutti i cicli di lavorazione necessari
alle sue materie prime: dalla ricezione, alla selezione e
al trattamento che conduce al prodotto finito, sanificato,
riconfezionato ed etichettato.
Second Life si esprime non solo su tutto il territorio nazionale ma anche all’estero con attività di Import ed Export su scala globale interessando il mercato Europeo, Russo, Africano, Americano ed Asiatico.
Dare nuova vita agli articoli dismessi, lasciando inalterato il loro design originale, questo l’obiettivo finale delle operazioni che rispettano la cosiddetta regola “delle tre “R””: Riduci, Riusa, Ricicla.

El equipo de PRODISA FINISH trabaja permanentemente para cumplir los exigentes estándares de calidad y normativas vigentes presentes en los mercados, protegiendo el medio ambiente y aplicando rigurosamente el plan de sostenibilidad trazado.

"Cerchiamo una fusione armoniosa tra i nostri prodotti fatti a mano e le esigenze in continua evoluzione del mercato", afferma Gianluca Berni, proprietario e direttore creativo.
Linee pulite, forme classiche e attenzione ai dettagli definiscono l'estetica del brand, assicurando che ogni pezzo sia raffinato e distintivo. L'attenzione al design dell'azienda, abbinata a un rigoroso controllo di qualità, garantisce risultati straordinari ottenibili solo dai migliori artigiani.
Ci occupiamo dell'intero processo produttivo, dal disegno iniziale fino al controllo qualità e al confezionamento finale mediante elettrofusione, lavorazioni CNC, stampa 3D, protofusione e taglio laser.

Sempre guidata dalle mani esperte di Maria Maddalena, nel 1993 la Jolly Manifatture si trasforma in SNC ed entrano in società con la madre anche il figlio Stefano e la figlia Valeria.

Un nuovo e importante passo avanti viene fatto nel 2004 quando viene costituita la Jolly Manifatture Srl guidata dai tre soci attuali: Stefano, Valeria e Paola.

Nonostante il passare degli anni, l’anima della Jolly è rimasta immutata e ancora oggi si occupa della façon per marchi prestigiosi, in particolare del capo spalla, prodotto sul quale punta maggiormente.

La produzione è esclusivamente conto terzi e i materiali lavorati appartengono a marchi che rappresentano l’eccellenza del “Made in Italy” ed a brand del lusso a livello internazionale che dettano lo stile e la moda nel mondo.

Name: Ethnickapda
Description:
Maitri Pandya – Founder of ETHNIC-KAPDA
Born and raised in Kutch, the heart of India's rich textile heritage, I grew up surrounded by intricate embroidery, vibrant fabrics, and the renowned mirror work of my hometown. This cultural upbringing laid the foundation for my passion for traditional craftsmanship. I later moved to Vadodara, where I pursued my graduation in IT engineering from Parul Institute, setting the stage for a corporate career that spanned over 13 years.
Throughout my journey in sales and marketing across diverse industries—including Information Technology, Education, and Industrial Automation—I felt something was missing. Working behind a desk and advancing someone else's vision left me feeling unseen and without a true purpose.
In July 2021, I answered my calling and founded ETHNIC-KAPDA, a brand born from my love for traditional ethnic clothing and the desire to bring my Kutch heritage to life. I envisioned a brand that serves women at its core, celebrating our cultural roots through beautifully crafted accessories while empowering women through community-building and leadership.
For me, traditions are more than just beliefs or practices passed down; they are living stories that connect generations. ETHNIC-KAPDA allows me to preserve and promote the rich cultural legacy of Kutch while creating a platform for women to express themselves.
I am a firm believer that it's never too late to reinvent yourself. After more than a decade in the corporate world, I transformed my experiences and passion into a brand that is not only a business but a movement to uplift women. I am dedicated to building a community, inspiring leadership, and empowering women to reach unprecedented heights.

Name: MADAME MELON
Description:
Découvrez notre histoire, nos engagements et nos artisans pour apprendre à mieux nous connaître.

Madame Melon a été fondé par Melody, une passionnée de voyages et d’artisanat. Après des études en textile à Paris, elle s’est passionnée pour les traditions et savoir-faire qu’elle découvrait au fil de ses nombreux voyages en Amérique Latine, Afrique et Asie, et elle a tout de suite su qu’elle devait les ramener dans sa valise pour les faire découvrir au plus grand nombre.
Pendant ses voyages, Madame Melon a appris à créer des pièces uniques auprès d’artisans locaux, et à transposer des techniques de fabrication ancestrales et inconnues dans ses bijoux et accessoires.

Madame Melon sélectionne aussi des pièces coups de cœur, des bijoux, vêtements, accessoires de mode qui racontent une histoire…celle de son artisan, celle de sa culture. 

Nous souhaitons préserver des valeurs comme la sauvegarde des traditions ancestrales, l’indépendance des artisanes, la protection de l’environnement et la lutte contre l’esclavage.

Nous voyageons à la recherche du savoir faire textile des artisans du monde entier pour créer des pièces uniques qui allient l’esthétique à l’éthique.


Nous valorisons aussi le travail des artisans du monde entier en créant des pièces uniques chargées d’histoire.
Pour nous, l’éthique est plus qu’une étiquette, c’est notre façon de nous comporter.

Nous avons décidé d’être honnête et transparent avec nos artisans et nos clients à propos de notre processus.

Tous nos produits sont uniques et viennent de différents pays du monde. Ils sont fabriqués localement à la main par nos artisans qui représentent des familles entières et qui ont transmis leurs compétences pendant de génération
Madame Melon est une marque de slow fashion qui tient à cœur de respecter les traditions, le travail humain et la planète. Nous promouvons une mode raisonnée, qui met en valeur les savoir-faire du monde entier et donne la parole à des communautés artisanes éloignées.

Name: RE/JEKT PROJECT / / /
Description:
RE/JEKT PROJECT /
is an international design collective based in London, Copenhagen, Berlin, and Delhi. Conceived as a response to the environmental crisis and the industry's creative stagnation, it merges Nordic design principles with Indian leather craftsmanship to create future classics from discarded materials. 

Co-founded by award-winning Danish designer Jens Laugesen, who has shown his eponymous brand in London, Paris, and Copenhagen Fashion Week, and Indian leather manufacturer Hitesh Sachdev of DRISHTI Lifestyle (producer for Marni, Diesel, Donna Karan, Karl Lagerfeld), REJEKT PROJECT offers a creative solution to industry waste. Fusing conceptual clarity with artisanal integrity, each piece is made from deadstock leather and surplus materials sourced across India, transformed into refined garments, bags, and accessories through sustainable processes.

RE/JEKT PROJECT 
rejects the linear cycle of overproduction and embraces circular thinking. Its collections are produced in limited drops, designed to be genderless, adaptable, and long-lasting. Signature silhouettes—bikers, chore jackets, utility bags—are developed using upcycled components, unexpected material combinations, and slow construction methods. Each garment is a reconstruction: part archive, part prototype, part manifesto.

RE/JEKT PROJECT proposes a new kind of democratic luxury: ethical, modular, transparent, and deeply human at a democratic, accessible price point for garments to last that are rooted in material consciousness and craft awareness, 

RE/JEKT PROJECT 
It is not just another brand. It’s also a wearable manifesto of unifit garments made for all, and a global movement shaping conscious change through design, building a future built from what others leave behind.

RE/JECT PROJECT

LONDON / COPENHAGEN / BERLIN / DELHI

NORDIC DESIGN / INDIAN CRAFT / FUTURE CLASSICS

www.rejektproject.com
IG @rejectproject

Name: cleverbelt Gürtelsystem
Description:
Das genial einfache Gürtelsystem Made in Germany

Unser innovatives cleverbelt Gürtelsystem besteht aus einer Gürtelschnalle und einem passenden (Wende)Band, welche innerhalb Sekunden immer wieder neu miteinander kombiniert werden können. Es hält bombenfest und ist extrem komfortabel durch seine nur 3mm flache, ergonomisch geformte Schnalle. Dein cleverbelt hat keine ausleiernden Löcher (eins davon immer zu eng, eins immer zu weit!) und auch kein hässlich abstehendes Bandende. Er passt immer perfekt auf den Millimeter - egal wie üppig deine letzte Mahlzeit ausfiel. Zusammen mit dem 2-seitigen cleverbelt Wendeband ergeben sich hunderte Kombinationsmöglichkeiten. Da ist mindestens eine dabei, die deine Freunde so richtig neidisch macht!

Versprochen: Dein neuer cleverbelt ist der mit Abstand bequemste Gürtel auf dem Markt. Auch du wirst ihn lieben!

PS: Haben wir schon unsere 30 Jahre Garantie auf deinen cleverbelt erwähnt?

Name: Ethix
Description:
Fast fashion is destroying the world and harming people. We are rebuilding the production and creation cycle and restoring the community.

Lucky for us, we dream big. Ethix is our newborn project but we see no limits to where it can go and how much of a positive change it can create. The fusions between fashion and sustainability, art and responsibility, have no rules and we can invent and experiment once and again. 





We want to work with others (probably you reading this) to create visibility and opportunity for those less privileged and for those who have something to say about it.

 



 

Are you an artist or a maker?

Are you a brand or part of a company/organisation?

Get in touch and let's see what we can do together.  Let's co-create and co-change the world.

Name: 3D ETİKET VE TEKSTİL AKSESUARLARI
Description:
1980 yılında %100 öz sermaye ile kurulan Şirketimiz, sektörüne getirdiği yeniliklerle, sektörün genişlemesini sağlamış; jakron, yakma etiket, hologram ve lenticular etiket sektörlerini etiket ve tekstil pazarına kazandırmıştır. Türkiye'de ilk jakron ithalini gerçekleştirmiş, ilk slikon kauçuk etiket teknolojisini uzak doğudan getirerek üretimini sağlamıştır.

                      Kurulduğu ilk günden bu yana ar-ge faaliyetlerine aralıksız devam eden Şirketimiz ülkemize getirdiği teknolojiler ve pazara sağladığı yenilikçi ürünlerle etiketin pazarına yeni sektörler kazandırmıştır.
1997 yılında Türkiye'nin ilk hologram üretimini gerçekleştiren Şirketimiz,2006 yılında 3D Etiket ve Aksesuar Ticaret Sanayi Ltd Şti adını alarak, günümüzde de büyümesini öz sermaye ile gerçekleştirmeye devam etmektedir.

                       28 yıldır başta etiket olmak üzere hem genel hem de markaya özel aksesuarlar üreten 3D Etiket bugün, 1000 m2lik ileri teknolojideki donanımlı tesisi ile yenilikçi ve kaliteli hizmet anlayışıyla çalışmaktadır.

                       Sektöründe sahip olduğu pazar payı ile, tekstil ve konfeksiyon (spor giyim, jeans, bay-bayan iç giyim...) ev araç ve gereçleri, promosyon ürünleri, otomotiv ve yeme içme sektörleri için hem yerli hem de yabancı pazarlara üretim yapmaktadır.

Name: deLona Exclusive Upcycling
Description:
proyecto de economía circular, concretamente de Upcycling (reciclaje creativo). El upcycling consiste en aprovechar materiales reciclables para crear productos que tienen un mayor valor que el que tenía el material original. O, lo que es lo mismo: transformar residuos en objetos de valor.


Nuestro concepto de moda sostenible consiste en la recuperación de materiales destinados a la basura, al haber terminado su vida útil para la cual estaban diseñados, pero que en realidad pueden durar mucho más, dándoles otro uso.

Recuperamos lonas publicitarias para hacer puffs y artículos de decoración, balones de baloncesto y rugby para realizar bolsos. También se planea fabricar gorras, cinturones, carteras y distintos complementos a partir de estos materiales.

Name: Dongguan Kangsheng Hardware Factory
Description:
Dongguan Kangsheng Hardware was founded in 2003, The company has two modern factories with a total area of more than 14,000 square meters, more than 150 employees and a monthly production capacity of more than 5 million products.  Is a comprehensive enterprise integrating R&D, production, electroplating, sales and after-sales service.

Over the years, the company has continuously invested in advanced production equipment and introduced senior engineers. From product research and development, mold set-up, die-casting, fine grinding, professional polishing, accurate assembly, eco-friendly electroplating, strict quality inspection to packaging, each link has professional technical and quality personnel to maintain the highest quality standards.

The company has an advanced and perfect production ERP management system and a complete set of hardware detection and experimental equipment, and each production process is displayed in real time to ensure that orders are completed on time and product quality meets customer requirements.

The company has sequentially obtained prestigious certifications including ISO9001:2015, SGS, BV, TÜV, and others. Products comply with environmental standards set by the US, the EU, and international norms, and raw materials have obtained global recycling standard certification.

Do not forget your innovative mind, bearing in mind the mission, Dongguan Kangsheng is practicing its ingenious promise every step forward. 

The company's products cover high-end handbags and luggage hardware accessories, leather hardware accessories, clothing, shoes and hats hardware accessories, metal gifts, handicrafts and other fields.

Dongguan Kangsheng, with its excellent product quality, reasonable price and perfect after-sales service, has exported its products to more than 100 countries and regions around the world, and has been well-received and highly regarded by customers at home and abroad.

Name: MJH international
Description:
Welkom bij MJH - Uw bron voor stijlvolle bag fashion, schitterende sieraden en hoogwaardig linnen & textiel. Bij MJH hechten we veel waarde aan transparantie en het opbouwen van duurzame werkrelaties in de vorm van partnerschappen.

Onze transparantie is een hoeksteen van ons bedrijf. We geloven dat open communicatie met onze klanten en partners essentieel is voor het bouwen van wederzijds vertrouwen. We streven ernaar om onze klanten volledig op de hoogte te houden gedurende het hele proces, van ontwikkeling tot levering.

Duurzaamheid is voor ons niet alleen van toepassing op producten, maar ook op de relaties die we opbouwen. We zien onze klanten als partners en streven naar langdurige samenwerkingen gebaseerd op gedeelde waarden en visie. Het creëren van echte partnerschappen betekent dat we niet alleen zakelijke transacties uitvoeren, maar ook samen groeien en succes behalen.

Bij MJH combineren we deze waarden van transparantie en duurzame partnerschappen met ons vermogen om succesvolle collecties te ontwikkelen voor grote internationale merken. We zetten ons in voor ethisch verantwoorde productie en duurzaamheid in al onze activiteiten.

Laten we samen de toekomst vormgeven en streven naar een betere, duurzamere wereld, gebaseerd op transparantie en duurzame partnerschappen. Als u geïnteresseerd bent in wat MJH voor uw merk kan betekenen en wilt ontdekken hoe we samen kunnen groeien, nodig ik u uit om direct contact met ons op te nemen.

Con más de 3 años de experiencia multidisciplinaria en el sector de la moda, ofrezco una gama de servicios freelance especializados para marcas y empresas que buscan calidad, creatividad y soluciones integrales para el desarrollo de sus colecciones. A continuación, te presento los servicios que proporciono:

Diseño de Estampados Posicionales y Rapports: Creación de diseños únicos y personalizados para tus colecciones, adaptados a las tendencias actuales y alineados con la identidad de tu marca.

Diseño de Moda: Desarrollo de colecciones, estampados, fichas técnicas y dirección creativa, combinando tendencias actuales con enfoques innovadores y sostenibles.

Desarrollo de Producto: Desde la concepción del diseño hasta la producción, integrando tecnología de impresión 3D y herramientas como CLO3D para crear prototipos realistas y viables.

Marketing y Estrategia de Marca: Creación de estrategias comerciales que unen la creatividad con el análisis de mercado, ayudando a las marcas a crecer y posicionarse de manera efectiva.

Diseño Editorial: Desarrollo de proyectos editoriales, revistas digitales y contenido visual para marcas de moda, aportando una comunicación visual que cautiva y conecta con el público.

Mi enfoque es ofrecer un servicio integral, con soluciones personalizadas que combinan creatividad, análisis de tendencias y estrategias comerciales, para impulsar el crecimiento y la rentabilidad de tu marca. Si buscas proyectos innovadores, colaborativos y orientados al futuro de la moda, estoy lista para ayudarte.

Name: Khmer Creations
Description:
Khmer Creations began in 2007 with a vision to develop a creative business that would tangibly benefit Cambodian women and their communities. What started as therapeutic jewelry making workshops in shelters for sex trafficked women quickly became a business creating long-term employment opportunities.


We now provide skills training and secure employment to young women who have previously been working in exploitative jobs (including the sex trade and unregulated factories) and those who are at-risk of entering these industries due to difficulties in accessing education and employment opportunities.


Buying jewelry and accessories is one of life’s little pleasures. But it can also bring change and opportunity for the women who make it. Every product is made with love and makes a difference in the lives of our artisans and their families.

Name: Nordic Monk
Description:
At Nordic Monk, we fuse Scandinavian minimalism with modern functionality to deliver premium eyewear and sunglasses. Designed in Norway and exclusively available for the Indian market, our collections are crafted to meet the demands of urban professionals and trendsetters in Pune, Wakad, Hinjewadi, Baner, and across Maharashtra.
Our philosophy is simple: great design transcends borders. Inspired by timeless Nordic aesthetics, our eyewear is built on high-quality, lightweight materials. We ensure superior comfort, lasting durability, and full UV protection—all essential for the fast-paced lifestyle of modern India. Every frame is a blend of artistry and engineering, offering a refined look that works equally well in a boardroom or a weekend getaway.
Our product range is versatile and inclusive—designed to suit everyone from young trendsetters to seasoned professionals, and even families. Whether you are seeking sophisticated eyewear for work or stylish sunglasses for leisure, Nordic Monk delivers a perfect fusion of global design and local sensibilities.
We invite you to join us in redefining eyewear fashion across India. Explore our innovative products that combine the best of Scandinavian craftsmanship with pragmatic design tailored for the modern Indian lifestyle.

Connect with us to learn more about our vision, premium quality, and how we’re setting new standards for eyewear in India.

Name: Deep Green
Description:
In the heart of India, where every thread tells a story and every hand carries the wisdom of generations, our brand was born—not in a factory, but in the quiet rhythm of looms, the vibrant chatter of artisans.
We saw a gap. Between heritage and everyday wear. Between beautiful craftsmanship and daily affordability. Between ethical choices and fashion that fits real life. Hence, we embarked on the journey to build a bridge.
Our mission in Deep Green is simple yet powerful: To bring handcrafted Indian ethnic wear into our everyday life—consciously and affordably.
We have partnered with skilled artisans across India who still weave by hand, print by wooden blocks, dye with natural colours and stitch with soul. Our designs are inspired by India’s rich textile legacy, but reimagined for modern comfort—breathable fabrics, clean cuts, and silhouettes that move with you from home to work with utmost ease.
We believe ethical fashion shouldn't be a luxury and mindfulness isn’t just what we wear, it’s how we live. 

Welcome to a wardrobe that’s mindful, handcrafted, affordable and truly Indian.

At Revona Paris, we believe that fashion is an art form, and every creation tells a story. We are a boutique brand specializing in exquisite fashion designs that embody sophistication, elegance, and timeless beauty. With an unwavering passion for craftsmanship and attention to detail, we strive to redefine luxury in the world of fashion.

Our brand draws inspiration from the vibrant streets of Paris, the city renowned for its unparalleled style and impeccable taste. Just like the city itself, Revona Paris exudes an air of sophistication, with each design capturing the essence of Parisian allure.

At the heart of our brand lies our dedication to the art of fashion creation. We meticulously handcraft each garment, ensuring impeccable quality and fit. From the initial sketch to the final stitch, every detail is carefully considered and executed with precision. Our team of skilled artisans and fashion experts bring their expertise and passion to each piece, resulting in creations that are truly exceptional.

Revona Paris embraces the fusion of classic and contemporary styles. We celebrate the timeless elegance of traditional fashion while infusing it with modern elements, creating a harmonious blend that resonates with individuals seeking unique and captivating designs. Our collections feature a range of exquisite dresses, tailored suits, glamorous evening wear, and chic accessories, each one crafted to make a statement and leave a lasting impression.

We take great pride in using only the finest materials sourced from around the world. Luxurious fabrics, intricate lacework, and delicate embellishments come together to create garments that exude refinement and opulence. Our commitment to quality is unwavering, ensuring that each Revona Paris creation is a symbol of exceptional craftsmanship and enduring style.

Revona Paris is more than just a fashion brand; it is a reflection of our belief in empowering

The Ayooba is a sustainable fashion-tech and lifestyle brand grounded in African heritage, emotional wellness, and conscious living. We are building a global ecosystem that connects individuals to meaningful fashion experiences, wellness practices, and cultural storytelling, both digitally and in real-world spaces.

Our mission is to bridge the gap between fast fashion and slow fashion by leveraging technology and research to reduce the industry’s environmental impact while preserving cultural integrity.

We believe this is not a journey to walk alone. True change is collaborative. While we can go far individually, together we can transform the future of fashion.

To us, fashion is more than style, it’s about identity, origins, and purpose. Through innovation, community, and cultural depth, we are reimagining fashion as a medium for reconnection, healing, and empowerment.

Join us in shaping the future of sustainable fashion with soul.

Name: NAAL Norge
Description:
Founded in 2020 by Tone and Marin, NAAL emerged as a response to a world in lockdown. Amidst global uncertainty, the duo sensed a void in the market for a water bottle that transcended mere utility.

Uniting Marin’s savvy in product development with Tone’s nuanced understanding of aesthetics, NAAL was born. The bottle is an exquisite blend of timeless elegance and contemporary flair, offering modular components that invite you to impart your own unique touch.

The name NAAL draws inspiration from the Norwegian term for “nål,” a word that also evokes the idea of an ornament, brooch or jewel. This linguistic choice is far from accidental; it encapsulates the essence of the brand’s vision.

To own a NAAL bottle is to possess an accessory as expressive and individualistic as a piece of fine jewelry.

Name: Drodel Fashion Private Limited
Description:
Welcome to Drodel Fashion! We are a platform dedicated to connecting and empowering fashion designers, models, enthusiasts, and professionals.

Our mission is to foster a vibrant and supportive community where fashion designers can showcase their talent, exchange ideas, collaborate on projects, and stay up-to-date with the latest industry trends. We believe in the power of collaboration and aim to create a space where designers can network, learn, and grow together.
Whether you are an established fashion designer, an aspiring designer, or someone who simply appreciates the art of fashion, our community is the perfect place for you. Here, you can showcase your designs, receive feedback, and gain inspiration from fellow members.

At the Drodel Fashion, you will find a rich array of resources, including articles, interviews, and tutorials, covering a wide range of topics such as design techniques, fabric selection, sustainable fashion, and industry news. We aim to provide valuable insights and knowledge to help you stay informed and navigate the dynamic world of fashion.

Additionally, we regularly organize contests, workshops, and events to provide opportunities for designers to showcase their skills and connect with industry professionals. Through these initiatives, we strive to create a supportive and inclusive environment that celebrates the diversity and creativity of fashion.

We value the unique perspectives and contributions of every member and promote a culture of respect and collaboration. We encourage constructive discussions, sharing of ideas, and creating meaningful connections within our community.

Join us today and become a part of the vibrant Drodel Fashion community. Together, let's inspire, innovate, and shape the future of fashion.

Name: Klubb
Description:
Klubb is a prominent metaverse clothing brand and creative body. We specialize in digital couture, catering to a wide range of metaverse platforms, we enable our customers to express their authentic selves in the digital world.

With well over 100,000 units sold in the metaverse platform SecondLife, we have become a trusted destination for fashionable virtual attire. On the social mobile platform Zepeto, we have successfully sold more than 12,000 digital clothing items within a 6-month launch period. Additionally, our free Sims clothing content alone has been downloaded over 50,000 times, and our GTA content has garnered significant attention and impressions.

Beyond our product offerings, Klubb provides creative solutions for brands, including metaverse collaborations and 3D rendering services. We collaborate with brands to establish meaningful connections within virtual realms and offer visually striking experiences through 3D rendering.

We recognize the metaverse as a dynamic space for self-expression, creativity, and connection. Our mission is to empower individuals and brands alike by delivering high-quality digital couture, innovative creative solutions, and unforgettable experiences. Join us as we shape the future of the metaverse together.

Con una filiera produttiva 100% interna, offriamo massima flessibilità e controllo qualitativo: dalla progettazione alla realizzazione, ogni passaggio è curato per garantire unicità e performance sartoriale.

Description:
The Eyes of the Soul

In every pair of sunglasses, we discover the window to the soul, where flashes of light reveal wordless stories. In every gaze, in every reflection, we find the essence of the world.

The Dance of Light

We dance to the rhythm of the sun's rays, weaving a rainbow of colors across the canvas of the sky. In our lenses, we capture the ephemeral dance of light, turning every moment into a visual masterpiece.

We Are Verses of Style

Every pair of glasses is an ode to elegance, a symphony of style that awakens the senses. With every design, with every detail, we create beauty to adorn the faces of the world.

The Freedom to Be

In the gleam of the sun, we find the freedom to be who we are, without masks or pretensions. With our sunglasses, we celebrate authenticity, inviting every soul to shine with its own light.

The Journey of the Horizon

We sail through the seas of life, pursuing the golden horizon where the sun merges with the ocean. In every adventure, in every landscape, we carry with us the clear vision and the beauty of eternal moments.

Under the Sun, We Are One

In the shade of our sunglasses, we find the unity of hearts and the communion of spirits. We are beauty in motion, guided by the sunlight and the rhythm of the universe.

Name: Kent Stetson Handbags
Description:
Our handbags are sure to spark fun conversations.

In 2003, after an exhibition of my computer-generated art failed to result in any sales, I cut the pieces up and sewed them in to bags. They sold immediately. We now have a global following of collectors. Each piece is made in our atelier in Rhode Island. I still sew and sign each piece.

The pieces are produced to order, making each one specially for the recipient.  There are nearly 50 steps in making each of our signature bags, in a process that has been refined over the past 20+ years. 

Art can happen in unexpected places, and a dressy outing accented with one of our pieces can often be an opportunity to make new friends.

For any inquiries, please contact info@kentstetson.com.

Name: Miss Balanta
Description:
Miss Balanta is a brand that was born out of a desire to celebrate Afro-Colombian culture and empower women through fashion in 2013. I was inspired by my mother to create turbans that showcase the beauty and versatility of Afro-Colombian heritage.

Today, Miss Balanta is a conscious brand that is dedicated to empowering women through its powerful accessories. Our products are designed to make women feel beautiful, proud, and independent, no matter their background or life circumstances.

In addition to our commitment to fashion and culture, we are also dedicated to supporting cancer patients during their difficult journey. We provide therapeutic hair pieces to those experiencing hair loss, offering a small but important measure of comfort and support during a challenging time.

At Miss Balanta, we believe that fashion can be a force for good, a political act and we are proud to be a part of a growing movement of conscious brands that are committed to making a positive impact in the world.

ZYVIO CONNECT Private Limited is a Pakistan-based technology and lifestyle company founded by Ameer Hamza Alvi  with a vision to redefine the way people connect with technology through fashionable, innovative, and lifestyle-driven tech accessories.

Innovation – bringing forward unique designs and advanced tech solutions.

Quality & Durability – ensuring products meet international standards with long-lasting performance.

Description:
Benvenuti nel mondo distintivo di Gugje e Gusiele, parte di Valentina Marchiol. Siamo leader nell'arte della maglieria artigianale e nella produzione di accessori per l'abbigliamento. Il nostro focus è chiaro: elevare il 'made in Italy' a un nuovo standard, con materiali naturali come cotone, lana, alpaca e ramiè.

La nostra forza risiede nell'equilibrio tra tradizione e innovazione. Ogni capo è un tributo all'artigianato italiano e un passo verso un futuro sostenibile. Siamo alla ricerca di partner di classe, boutique e negozi desiderosi di offrire ai loro clienti pezzi unici e sostenibili.

Siamo determinati a plasmare un settore che coniuga l'artigianalità con una coscienza ecologica. Seguici per scoprire le nostre creazioni e le storie che si celano dietro ogni capo. Insieme, stiamo creando un futuro in cui l'artigianato eccellente si fonde con una produzione consapevole. Benvenuti nel nostro mondo artigiano.

Name: Dynemic Metal
Description:
Dynemic Metals was established in 1999 with the launch of our manufacturing plant in Karachi, Pakistan. As pioneers in the industry, we were proud to be the first company in Pakistan to manufacture snap buttons locally, setting a benchmark for innovation and quality in the garment accessory market.

Over the years, we expanded our product portfolio to include a wide range of high-quality metal accessories, such as buttons, buckles, rivets, eyelets, studs, alloy products, and more. Our dedication to excellence and customer satisfaction quickly earned us recognition and trust within the local market.

As we continued to grow and evolve, we embraced modernization and collaborated with leading Chinese factories to enhance our capabilities. This strategic partnership allows us to offer premium-quality products that meet international standards, all while ensuring economical pricing and on-time delivery. Today, Dynemic Metals is synonymous with reliability, innovation, and superior craftsmanship in the garment accessory industry.

Name: Snuggle Buckle
Description:
TRAVELING WITH KIDS IS HARD ENOUGH.
Snuggle Buckle makes it a little easier.

WHAT EXACTLY IS THE SNUGGLE BUCKLE?
Great question!

The Snuggle Buckle is a must-have for airplane travel with curious toddlers and fidgety flyers. Playing with the buckles, especially during take off and landing, can pose a serious safety risk to little ones, so the Snuggle Buckle was created with safety in mind!  

The padded, whimsical covers are designed to fit around airplane seat belts to keep little fingers away from the spring-loaded buckle and all the germs in those hard-to-reach areas. The tabs on each Snuggle Buckle are perfect for attaching favorite toys, snack cups, pacifiers, and anything else you want to keep off the airplane floor.



Flying with little ones is hard enough--give yourself a little peace of mind by making sure your fidgety flyer stays in their seat, and away from germs.

Name: Samantha MacKay Designs
Description:
I started knitting when I was 5 years old, after watching my mom hand knit hundreds of intarsia sweaters for orders each year. After begging my mom to let me learn, the very first item I made was a very mis-shaped Barbie(TM) Blanket! Despite being quite young, I fell in love with knitting and all the joy it gave me to make things with my hands.

Over the years, I continued to knit as a hobby, making my first (wearable) sweater at age of 10 and designing my first pattern in my early teens. When I went away to university, I found it very difficult to find the time (or money) to fit in knitting, but once I graduated I dove in full force and quickly picked up where I left off. Since that time, I have had the amazing opportunity to teach knitting at my Local Yarn Store, provide private lessons, take advanced knitting classes through Olds College and Vogue Knitting Live and just recently, started designing my own pieces. I really love sharing my knitting passion with others, and whether that’s through participating in group chats, helping out newer knitters or sharing a design, it brings me much joy to be part of the process.

I can’t wait to see what you think of my designs and more importantly, engage in great conversations about your knitting. Happy Knitting Everyone! <3

Chez Coatepeq, chaque pièce est imprégnée de la richesse de l'Amérique Latine, de ses légendes et de la magie de cette terre. Nous concevons nos bijoux et vêtements artisanaux avec l'objectif de vous offrir un confort exceptionnel tout en ajoutant une touche authentique de style à votre quotidien.

Nous sommes engagés à créer des bijoux et des vêtements durables, fusionnant la beauté intemporelle de l'Amérique Latine avec notre vision éco-responsable.

Ainsi, nous plaçons nos clients au cœur de notre mission, offrant des produits d'une qualité exceptionnelle et un service personnalisé.

En tant que partie intégrante de notre engagement communautaire, une partie de nos profits est dédiée à soutenir les peuples de l'Amérique Latine à travers des dons.

Rejoignez la communauté Coatepeq pour une expérience unique, où la passion, la qualité et l'authenticité se rencontrent pour créer des bijoux et vêtements qui racontent une histoire.

Aqui, cada peça é um capítulo dessa história encantada.
Cada linha carrega cuidado, cada corte traz intenção, cada detalhe revela emoção.
Acreditamos na moda que fala com o coração. Moda que transforma, que acolhe, que faz sonhar. Moda que veste pessoas que vivem com intensidade e sensibilidade, como personagens de uma história que só elas poderiam escrever.
Criamos com técnica, mas também com alma. Com a precisão de quem aprendeu fazendo, e a paixão de quem nunca deixou de sonhar.
Não vendemos só roupas. Entregamos emoção, presença, poder e poesia.
Aras Nancy é um sonho de princesa costurado à mão.
É moda com alma.
É amor que se veste.

Os sonhos podem se tornar realidade

Currently, The Après Edit offers a curated collection of hats and totes that embody the perfect mix of functionality and flair. Each piece is crafted with care, designed to elevate any outfit—whether you’re at après-ski or sipping espresso in the city. Wit
Currently, The Aprés Edit offers a curated collection of hats and totes that embody the perfect mix of functionality and flair. Each piece is crafted with care, designed to elevate any outfit—whether you’re at après-ski or sipping espresso in the city. With sleek designs that channel European sophistication and playful energy, these accessories are more than just staples—they're a statement.

Coming soon: We are expanding our collection to include t-shirts, sweatshirts, and stickers—all designed with the same elevated approach to street style and mountain living. Think cozy yet bold, versatile enough to take you from alpine mornings to urban nights, capturing the essence of The Aprés Edit’s chic yet laid-back vibe.

Our mission is to fuse the best of both worlds: the adventurous spirit of the mountains and the effortless cool of the city. At The Aprés Edit, it’s not just about what you wear, but how you live—boldly, intentionally, and always in style.

Follow us on this journey as we build a brand that embraces the intersection of adventure, elegance, and everyday living. Whether you’re hitting the slopes, strolling the streets, or hanging out at your favorite après spot, The Aprés Edit is here to outfit your life with elevated essentials that speak to both your wild and refined sides.

Name: Dragons Chain ( Offiziell )
Description:
Seit 2011 erschaffe ich unter meinem Label Dragons Chain (eingetragene EU-Marke seit 2013) exklusive Bühnenkostüme und einzigartige Outfits aus Scalemaille & Chainmaille. Mit über 13 Jahren Erfahrung (Stand: April 2025) als selbständiger Designer liegt mein Herzblut in Unikaten, die auf der Bühne, vor der Kamera oder bei Events unvergesslich wirken.

Als Pionier in diesem Nischenbereich habe ich meine Techniken durch intensives Selbststudium und jahrelange Praxis perfektioniert. Meine Arbeit zeichnet sich durch hochwertige Materialien (Aluminium Scales, Edelstahl, Leder etc.) und präzise Handwerkskunst aus, die außergewöhnliche Langlebigkeit garantiert.

Das Besondere: Jedes Stück ist eine Investition in dauerhafte Exklusivität. Mein einzigartiger Service umfasst die nachträgliche Anpassung Ihres Outfits an neue Wünsche oder Maße – für Perfektion, die ein Leben lang hält.

Ich arbeite weltweit mit Künstlern, Produktionen, Fotografen, Modellen & Privatkunden zusammen und realisiere Visionen für Bühne, Video, Fotoshootings oder Events – von einzelnen Accessoires & Applikationen bis hin zu kompletten Couture-Roben.

Entdecken Sie meine Arbeiten auf meinen Online-Kanälen: **Facebook** (Dragons.Chain - über 50.000 Fans!), **Instagram** (dragons_chain) & **Pinterest** (Dragons_Chain - 1500+ Bilder).

Sie suchen ein außergewöhnliches Outfit mit Charakter & Beständigkeit oder haben eine Idee für ein spannendes Projekt? Ich bin offen für interessante Anfragen und Kooperationen. Kontaktieren Sie mich gerne hier auf LinkedIn oder über meine Kanäle!

Name: Pak Ladies Hand Bag
Description:
A ladies handbag is a small to medium-sized bag typically carried by women to hold personal items such as a wallet, phone, keys, makeup, and other essentials. It is usually made of leather, fabric, or synthetic materials and comes in a wide range of styles, designs, and colors to match different outfits and occasions.

Some common styles of ladies handbags include tote bags, shoulder bags, crossbody bags, clutch bags, and backpacks. Tote bags are large and roomy, making them ideal for carrying a lot of items. Shoulder bags have a longer strap and are worn over the shoulder, while crossbody bags have a longer strap that is worn across the body.

Clutch bags are small and often used for evening events or formal occasions, while backpacks are more casual and designed for hands-free convenience.

Ladies handbags also come with a variety of features, such as multiple compartments, zippers, and closures, as well as different types of handles and straps. Overall, a ladies handbag is a functional and fashionable accessory that adds style and convenience to a woman's daily life.

Arewa Fashion Week (AFW) is dedicated to empowering fashion designers to refine their craft, embrace individuality, and showcase their unique talents. Our event promises to deliver an immersive experience, introducing innovative elements to engage the audience and foster a deeper connection with the fashion community.

As a locally produced event in Kaduna state, AFW is committed to promoting fashion awareness and appreciation among both younger and older generations. By providing a platform for local designers to shine, we aim to elevate the fashion industry in the Northern region of Nigeria.

As the premier fashion event in the North, AFW’s objective is to launch and nurture designers’ skills, enabling them to achieve commercial success. Our impact will extend beyond the region, inspiring similar events globally, particularly in areas with AFW expat communities.

AFW serves as a catalyst to attract local and international investors, encouraging them to support locally made designs from Kaduna and the Northern region. Join us in celebrating the richness of Northern Nigerian fashion and culture, as we strive to make a lasting impact on the fashion industry.

Name: Paesi Bassi by MY
Description:
PAESI BASSI by MY is opgericht in november 2023 met de bedoeling om allerlei leuke items te ontwikkelen, voornamelijk op het gebied van fashion. Het eerste idee is inmiddels uitgewerkt en verschijnt binnenkort op de markt. We gaan in december 2023 namelijk onze zelfgemaakte sjaals introduceren. Het gaat hier om heerlijke knusse warme sjaals, waarvoor de stoffen zorgvuldig zijn uitgekozen en gecombineerd. Hoogwaardige stoffen, omdat we de mensen die onze sjaals willen kopen, een goed product willen leveren waar ze nog jaren plezier van hebben. Met deze sjaals mag de winter “streng” zijn, want ze geven ontzettend veel warmte en voelen ook nog eens heerlijk zacht aan. 
Wij hebben ervoor gekozen om van iedere combinatie maar een paar sjaals (soms zelfs maar één) te maken, omdat we exclusief willen blijven. Sommige sjaals zijn “opgepimpt”, maar ook hierin hebben we een bewuste keuze gemaakt om dat vooral niet bij iedere sjaal te doen, omdat wij van mening zijn dat onze sjaals dat niet nodig hebben. En daarbij: “eenvoud siert de mens” en “less is more”.
De bedrijfsnaam Paesi Bassi by MY vindt zijn herkomst in Italië, want Paesi Bassi betekent “Nederland” in het Italiaans. De letters MY staan voor de namen van de schoondochter/schoonmoeder, Mandy en Yvette. Die twee dames zijn de grondleggers van dit idee en hebben, met hulp van de oma van de familie, de sjaals gemaakt. Wij vonden het mooi om die twee namen terug te laten komen in het logo van dit bedrijf. 
Willen jullie ook een mooie sjaal van “Paesi Bassi by MY” om jullie garderobe aan te vullen? Kom dan op 16 en 17 december 2023 naar de kerstmarkt in Vught, Boslaan 49, locatie ’t IJM (de IJzeren Man), om onze collectie te bewonderen. 
Neem alvast een kijkje in ons fotoboek om te zien wat we zoal gemaakt hebben. 

Liefs team Paessi Bassi by MY

Description:
The Guy Shop is a celebration of masculinity, style and confidence. It’s a return to a simpler time when goods were crafted from natural materials and manual labour. Our products have been designed to instill a feeling of pride and ownership that will
last forever. To reinforce this feeling, we offer a free personalization service allowing you to customize your product with your initials, making it uniquely yours. The raw materials used in the creation of our products have been curated from around the globe. From South Africa, to France, to Italy and the Ukraine, we do our best to ensure that all materials are ethically sourced. At the end of the day, all our leather goods are handcrafted and hand stitched in Canada. We are proud of our work, and we stand by it.

We thank you so much for stopping by and we hope you find an accessory that suits your style.

Name: Cook Street Sourcing
Description:
A Cook Street Sourcing é uma empresa especializada em sourcing estratégico, desenvolvimento de fornecedores e importação para marcas de moda, calçados, bolsas e acessórios.

Conectamos marcas latino-americanas às melhores fábricas certificadas da Ásia, com um modelo que vai muito além de “comprar na China”: estruturamos cadeias de fornecimento confiáveis, rastreáveis e financeiramente eficientes, alinhadas aos padrões exigidos por marcas premium e grupos internacionais.

Nosso diferencial está em unir engenharia de produto, controle de qualidade europeu (BSCI) e inteligência de custos, garantindo que nossos clientes tenham produtos de alto padrão, com margem saudável, previsibilidade de entrega e risco reduzido.

Atuamos desde a seleção técnica do fornecedor, passando por desenvolvimento de amostras, auditorias de fábrica, inspeções de qualidade e gestão do embarque, até a entrega final — sempre com transparência, rastreabilidade e governança.

A Cook Street existe para resolver o maior problema da importação:

transformar fornecedores globais em parceiros confiáveis de longo prazo.

Se sua marca precisa de escala, custo competitivo e padrão internacional, nós estruturamos o caminho.

You dream it, we source it!

Name: CASEDOIT
Description:
Casedoit, iPhone kullanıcılarına özel, yüksek kaliteli ve baskılı kılıflar sunarak, teknolojiyi sanatla buluşturma misyonuyla 2022 yılında kuruldu. Girişimimizin temelinde, mobil teknolojinin sadece günlük ihtiyaçları karşılayan bir araç olmanın ötesinde, kullanıcıların kişisel zevklerini ve stilini yansıtan bir sanat eserine dönüşebileceği inancı yatmaktadır. Bu vizyon, modern teknolojiyi benzersiz bir estetikle birleştirmeyi amaçlayan kurucularımızın yaratıcı zekâsından doğdu.

Casedoit olarak misyonumuz, teknolojiyi herkes için daha erişilebilir, kişiselleştirilebilir ve estetik hale getirmektir. Mobil aksesuar sektöründe sürdürülebilirlik, inovasyon ve mükemmeliyetçilik ile lider olmayı vizyon ediniyoruz. Bu yolda, ürünlerimizle kullanıcılarımızın günlük yaşamına sanat ve renk katmayı, onların teknolojiyi daha kişisel ve anlamlı bir şekilde deneyimlemelerini sağlamayı hedefliyoruz.

Yüksek kaliteli, baskılı iPhone kılıflarımız, sektörde benzersiz bir niş oluşturarak, teknolojiyi sanatsal bir ifade biçimi olarak sunmaktadır. Her bir kılıf, dayanıklılık, estetik ve kullanıcı dostu tasarımı bir araya getirerek, cihazınızı korurken tarzınızı da ön plana çıkarır. Casedoit ürün yelpazesi, minimalistten ekstravagant tasarımlara kadar geniş bir çeşitlilik sunar. Her bir ürün, kullanıcıların kendilerini ifade etmeleri için özenle seçilmiş desenler ve renklerle tasarlanmıştır.

Yenilikçilik, sürdürülebilirlik, müşteri odaklılık ve kalite bizim temel değerlerimizdir. Bu değerler, her bir kararımızda ve ürettiğimiz her bir üründe kendini gösterir. Casedoit olarak, piyasaya sürdüğümüz her ürünle sektöre yön verme ve pazarda kalıcı değerler oluşturma arzusundayız. Çalışanlarımız, bu değerler çerçevesinde hareket eder ve her gün daha iyiye ulaşmak için çaba gösterir.

Name: LUVMI jewels
Description:
LUVMI is a brand of handmade jewelry, made with surplus cellulose acetate, a natural fiber, coming entirely from production leftovers. 

Cellulose acetate is often incorrectly called 'plastic' but it has a much nobler and natural origin as it is a plant-based, non-petroleum product derived from wood pulp and cotton. It is sustainable, non allergenic and virtually eternal, while also biodegradable. This is the material used by luxury fashion houses for manufacturing some of their accessories like costume jewelry and eyewear. Those offcuts or surplus, instead of being disposed of, are upcycled and used for each and every LUVMI jewels. 
I am very proud of giving this material a second life while creating contemporary accessories, entirely sustainable, that help elevate one's style. 

Inspired by the bold shapes of architecture, art and design as well as the accidental astonishing beauty of nature, each LUVMI jewel is completely made by hand in Italy.

Name: senzamarca
Description:
senzamarca è il progetto di Wanna Granatelli che nasce nel 2020 durante un periodo di profonda trasformazione interiore e globale.

Riflette attorno al concetto di moda come _non necessità_ e privazione.



_Senza_ è la parola chiave, è il brand value.



_Senza_ è la forza che attiva un percorso che non segue le stagionalità, ma vive attorno alla responsabilità come il recupero dei materiali altamente impattanti e di un recupero emotivo.



Il nylon è la materia prima.



I tessuti tecnici, difficilmente smaltibili e che personalmente va a recuperare da eccedenze produttive, sono il punto di partenza di un lavoro che  incomincia dalle mani della designer per evolversi e dare forma a senzamarca.



“La seconda possibilità data ai tessuti è la stessa  che possiamo e dobbiamo darci anche noi”.



Un know how, il suo, chiamato a ricreare riutilizzando, per dare vita ad un prodotto che non segue le regole del mercato, ma quelle dell’etica.



Lo standard a cui tende senzamarca  è l’emotività: il disegno è a mano libera, senza l’ausilio di programmi al computer o cartamodelli, perché ogni borsa deve essere diversa dalle altre e comporre il mosaico di una collezione sempre in divenire e mai conclusa. 



Nasce tutto sul suo tavolo, “una alla volta” senza una strategia produttiva e senza l’ansia di dover presentare in maniera incalzante una novità.



“La stessa borsa, realizzata nera, non ha la stessa funzione né la stessa energia se realizzata rossa”.



Ogni volta è sempre una volta nuova. 



“Cambiare si può e si deve ma non è necessario cambiare-tutto ogni volta”.

 

“Si può cambiare restando sempre se stessi”.





senzamarca è senza genere, senza filtri, senza stagione e senza logo.



senzamarca è senza confini.

Name: funky loop
Description:
Pensé comme un laboratoire d'expérimentation autour de la maille, je me ré-approprie les artisanats du crochet et du tricot à travers la création de pièces faites de fils recyclés et de seconde main. Tout est produit à la main, dans mon atelier niçois en édition très (très) limitée, voir unique ou sur commande. 

C’est aussi un lieu de partage pour s’expérimenter à l’expression créative avec des workshops d’initiation au crochet et au raccommodage créatif de vêtements (visible mending) pour offrir le pouvoir de fabriquer ses propres pièces et apprendre à réparer les trous de nos vêtements préférés pour les garder toute la vie !

Entre nous, funky loop est née d’une conversation inattendue avec ma grand-mère, au cours de laquelle j'apprends qu’elle a tricoté et crocheté toute sa vie sans jamais m'en parler alors que je suis passionnée depuis 6 ans déjà. Comme une forme de protestation contre la perte de valeur de l’artisanat français, funky loop a été pour moi une évidence pour pouvoir partager ma passion et proposer des alternatives à notre consommation.

Name: Rooted Official
Description:
Welcome to Rooted Official, a slow fashion brand specializing in exquisitely handcrafted handbags. At Rooted Official, we believe in the beauty of simplicity, timeless elegance, multifunctional options and sustainable practices.With a deep passion for creating high-quality accessories in natural materials, we strive to redefine the concept of luxury by offering handbags that are visually captivating and ethically produced. Each bag is meticulously handcrafted by our team, the skilled artisans who pour their expertise and love for craftsmanship into every stitch.
Sustainability is at the core of our brand philosophy. We prioritize using eco-friendly materials sourced from responsible suppliers in Sri Lanka, ensuring that our handbags have a minimal impact on the environment. We carefully select natural, durable, and ethically-sourced materials, such as organic cotton, off-cut leather, and recycled fabrics, to create pieces that stand the test of time.
Our commitment to slow fashion goes beyond materials. We embrace a production process that values quality over quantity, encouraging mindful consumption and reducing waste. By producing in limited quantities, we strive to create cherished handbags for years to come, rather than contributing to the disposable fashion culture.
Each handbag in our collection reflects the minimalist Danish design aesthetic, characterized by clean lines, functional details, and understated elegance. Our designs are carefully thought out to cater to modern human needs, combining practicality with a touch of sophistication. Whether it's a classic tote, a versatile crossbody, or an elegant clutch, our handbags effortlessly blend style and functionality.
Rooted Official believes in building a community that shares our values. We aspire to inspire conscious consumers who appreciate the art of slow fashion and seek meaningful connections with their belongings. Join us on this journey as we redefine the fashion industry, one handbag at a time.

Name: Mijon Designer Apparel
Description:
Ever since I was 14 years old, I've been drawn to the dazzling world of pageants. The stage, the glamour, and the opportunity to express oneself captivated me from the very beginning. But that wasn't the only passion stirring within me. I've always had an insatiable love for art and design, constantly seeking avenues to explore my creativity.

As fate would have it, my two passions collided, paving the way for an exciting adventure in designing pageant and evening dresses. I can't begin to express the joy and fulfilment I have when crafting beautiful gowns that merge elegance, style, and individuality.

Nestled in the vibrant South Africa, I've had the incredible privilege of working closely with extraordinary clients, witnessing their transformation and helping them radiate confidence when they step into one of my designs. It's been a true honour to contribute to their dreams and aspirations.

Now, as I look to step onto the international stage, my heart brims with excitement. The prospect of sharing my designs with a global audience fills me with an indescribable sense of inspiration and anticipation. I can't wait to bring a touch of my South African flair to the wider world.

When I sit down to design a dress, it's not just about creating a garment; it's about infusing a piece of art with personality and soul. Each stitch, each fabric choice, and every little detail is meticulously chosen to embody the unique story and spirit of the wearer.

Beyond the glitz and glamour, my greatest reward comes from witnessing the confidence and radiance that emanates from someone when they step into a dress that truly reflects their essence. It's a privilege to be part of those transformative moments, and it's what fuels my passion each and every day.

So whether you're a pageant contestant seeking a gown that will make you shine, a fashion enthusiast with an eye for the extraordinary, or an individual searching for that one-of-a-kind dress for a special occasion, I invite you to join me on this incredible journey.

Together, let's unlock the beauty and magic that lies within the realm of pageant and evening dresses. I can't wait to embark on this creative adventure with you.

Name: Textum s.r.l.
Description:
Textum produces tricot bags as well as all the accessories, knitted-crochet-macramé, such as scarves, plaids, shawls of the highest quality through a network of heritage artisans who have been collaborating with us for over twenty years. 

Founded by Felice Napolitano, Textum carries forward the prestigious heritage of “LeApiOperaie” - his previous project, a brand synonymous with unparalleled savoir-faire that collaborated with the world’s most iconic luxury Maisons for decades.

For many years, the LeApiOperaie brand has been recognised for its great experience and savoir-faire in crochet and macramé, representing the richness of Italian craftsmanship around the world. 

Innovating with the spirit of time, at the beginning of 2022, a new chapter begun for Felice with the launch of Textum, with a deeper dedication on handmade products. 

The soul of Textum lives between two of Italy’s most extraordinary textile regions:
Prato, Tuscany: the world’s capital of novelty yarns. This is where we hand-pick the finest, most innovative raw materials.
Salento, Puglia: the "land of Baroque," where our production comes to life. In our Lequile (Lecce) workshop, local artisans transform yarn into art, honouring a century-old tradition.

The defining characteristic of Textum is the firm belief in the power of “Bespoke”. 
Our foundational pillars are: 
A Creative Laboratory: dedicated to development on new designs and prototypes, as well as final bag assembly

Name: Le Plan B
Description:
Le Plan B significa plano B em francês. Quando Michele Albuquerque pensou em empreender, se lembrou de um bistrô que costumava frequentar, em Lyon, com este nome: um local pequeno, mas sofisticado, arborizado, aconchegante, e com um cardápio delicioso que costuma variar durante o ano. Le Plan B tinha um aroma agradável e era acolhedor, assim como a maioria dos “planos Bs” que abraçamos e que nos salvam tantas vezes. Foi neste lugar, tomando vinho e comendo falafel, um bolinho frito de grão-de-bico e bem temperado originário do Oriente Médio, que Michele começou a esboçar uma possibilidade de abrir o próprio negócio.
É comum as pessoas terem um plano B na vida, sobretudo, as mulheres, que são mais precavidas e estão sempre à frente dos fatos. O plano B de Michele, que era abrir um negócio, se tornou o plano A e, quem diria, ela se encontrou como empresária. 
Um plano B pode ser um trabalho, um compromisso, um encontro, um namorado, uma roupa…e pode surpreender. Quantas mulheres não viram seu plano reserva ocuparem o espaço principal?
Uma lingerie bonita e sensual também pode ser um plano B e se tornar um plano A. Imagine a seguinte situação: uma mulher se veste toda linda para sair com alguém, mas sem saber o que pode acontecer. É a história do “vou me arrumar porque vai que…”! Adivinha? Ela tem uma noite maravilhosa. Quando chega em casa, se olha no espelho e percebe o quão feminina e poderosa é. A partir daí, decide cuidar mais de si mesma, vestir-se para si, e não mais só para alguém ou para algum evento em especial. Ela passa a ser seu plano A, afinal, muitas mulheres acabam esquecendo de se colocar em sua lista de prioridades. Resultado: esta mulher estará sempre confiante, com autoestima elevada e pronta para tudo.
A Le Plan B recebeu este nome porque representa a vida de muitas mulheres: fortes, batalhadoras,  trabalhadoras, mães, estudantes, empreendedoras, e que se viram nos 30 para ajeitar tudo com toda a criatividade, delicadeza, inteligência e amor que ex

Name: Validir
Description:
At Validir, we revolutionize luxury product authentication with "Luxury Product Chip Tagging." Our mission is to empower collectors, designers, manufacturers, and consumers by ensuring the authenticity and value of their high-end assets.

Our Solution: Imagine purchasing a rare collectible and doubting its authenticity. Validir eliminates these concerns with our innovative, unclonable Near Field Communication (NFC) technology. Each product receives a unique electronic fingerprint, verified through military-grade encryption.

How It Works: Consumers use mobile phones to scan the embedded NFC chip to authenticate products. Validir's system verifies the chip's code, confirming authenticity. We integrate digital assets backed by verified products, using blockchain to track provenance and enhance security.

Market Impact: Counterfeit products cause billions in lost sales annually. Sophisticated counterfeiting makes it difficult to distinguish genuine items from fakes. Validir bridges this gap, providing a solution that authenticates products and preserves their unique identity.

Why Validir Stands Out: Unlike existing solutions that face issues like cloning and high costs, Validir offers a unique approach. We provide mutual authentication, verifying both the chip and its data. Our user-friendly, real-time solution, accessible via a mobile app, revolutionizes the shopping experience for high-end goods.

Future Outlook: As counterfeiting continues to rise, brands seek robust solutions to protect their revenue and reputation. Validir offers a secure ecosystem for authenticating and trading physical products and digital representations, ensuring brand integrity and asset value.

Join Us: Discover how Validir is transforming luxury product authentication. Set an appointment with us today for a product demo and experience the future of authenticity verification.
