Name: Soumaya Beauduin
Description:
Soumaya Beauduin is a fashion company that brings together innovation, elegance, and sustainability. Our mission is to empower women to express their style and confidence through our high-quality scarves, designed and manufactured with the utmost care and attention to detail.

At Soumaya Beauduin, we specialize in designing and producing Coulissés, a versatile and stylish accessory that can be worn in multiple ways, from hijab to turban to scarf. Our Coulissés feature an innovative fastening system that ensures both comfort and durability, with an anti-slip mechanism that holds the material in place. And because we believe in making responsible choices for the environment and local industry, we use high-end raw materials, that are ethically sourced and produced.

Our wide range of Coulissés caters to women of all styles, ages, and lifestyles. Whether you're looking for a classic black hijab for a formal event, a vibrant turban for a day out, or a cozy scarf for the winter months, we've got you covered. Our exceptional craftsmanship and commitment to innovation enable us to offer our customers superior-quality products that meet their diverse needs and preferences.

But Soumaya Beauduin is more than just a fashion brand. We're a community of women who value self-expression, sustainability, and social responsibility. We believe in creating a positive impact on our environment and society, and we strive to do so through every aspect of our business, from sourcing our materials to supporting local artisans and suppliers.

If you're a woman who values quality, style, and sustainability, or if you're a partner or investor who shares our vision, we invite you to join our community and discover the Soumaya Beauduin experience. Follow our LinkedIn page to stay updated on our latest products, events, and initiatives, and to connect with like-minded individuals who share your passion for fashion and sustainability.

Name: Dorangi Label
Description:
Dorangi Label was started by two friends who shared a deep love for fashion, color, and individuality. Dorangi—meaning "two-colored"—is a reflection of the vibrant bond behind it. Every piece we create is a mix of colors, vibrance, and love, crafted thoughtfully to celebrate uniqueness.

The idea for Dorangi was born when we noticed a gap in the market for customizable short kurtis. There were plenty of options, but none that truly understood the need for individuality in everyday ethnic wear. We believed that fashion shouldn’t just be about trends, but about you—your fit, your comfort, and your expression.

We decided to create garments that feel as good as they look. From soft cottons to hand-embroidered details, every Dorangi piece is made to move with you, breathe with you, and fit you—not the other way around. With a strong focus on customization and comfort, we promise each piece is stitched to match the unique measurements and style preferences of our customers.

Our prints are rooted in Indian heritage, blended with modern silhouettes—bringing together the best of both worlds. From street-style kurtis to Indo-western blends, we aim to revive traditional textiles while making them relevant for today’s generation.

At Dorangi, we’re building a world where pairing jhumkas with backless kurtis feels effortless, and where you can show your skin without boundaries—because fashion should celebrate who you are.

Name: Ciao Creation
Description: In 2017, Ciao Creation was founded by Four Brothers CO., LTD., a factory manufacturing metal buttons, buckles, rivets, nailheads and other metal accessories for the clothing, footwear, leather goods, uniform industries since 1976. With the growing popularity of handmade crafts, people love to make their own projects to express personalized characteristics. However, we noticed that no matter if using leather, paper or fabric DIY crafts, few makers use shiny metal nailheads or accessories as decoration. The main reason is that there is no easy and handy tool for makers and hobbyists to use in the market! In fact, nailheads (prong studs) are widely used on shoes, bags or denim but applied by auto machines in the fashion industry. We saw great potential in this niche market and established the brand now known as Ciao Creation. Ciao Creation expands product lines of not only hobby nailhead application tools but also handmade craft kits for makers and hobbyists. Enriched by various fascinating materials such as Leather, Cardstock, Fabric, Denim, Vegan washable paper or Plastic Material, makers can add our shiny and high quality studs to brighten their unique projects. Our goal is to popularize the application of metal nailheads and accessories in the handmade crafts market.

Hago auténticamente lo que amo porque tengo el convencimiento de que es la manera de conmover, comunicar y ofrecer algo sustancial a los demás.

Name: International Biotech Fashion Alliance
Description:
We are the global body for those involved in the production, manufacture, design and retail of biotech fashion. 

Our vision is a world where the evidence-based benefits of biotech materials in fashion are fully realised and fully understood so that its positive impact can be maximised.

The fashion industry is one of the largest in the world, employing tens of millions of people, yet uses precious natural resources whilst is a major source of pollution and waste. We believe that the development and use of such technology heralds a progressive alternative to the use of animal or plastics-based materials in fashion, significantly shortening and improving supply chains and delivering significant benefits to the physical and natural environments, making the world a better place.

The use of such materials creates new design possibilities for fashion and luxury brands, while accruing benefits across the supply chain and, ultimately, to the consumer.

With offices in Brussels and London, we speak for and represent the sector in the media and with governments, regulators, investors, brands and retailers. We deliver a range of services and welcome potential new members. Contact us info@i-bfa.com

Description: The Ukrainian sustainable brand STARCHAK was founded in Lviv in 2019 by designer Maria Starchak. STARCHAK values individuality, which the designer interprets as “a person who has fully realized themselves.” Ukrainian and international stars like Jamala, Yuliya Sanina, and Frank Peter Wilde wear STARCHAK, and the brand has been featured in top publications like Vogue, ELLE, and L’Officiel.

Name: Rodamon Marca & Moda
Description:
Rodamon Marca & Moda es una empresa líder en la industria de la moda desde 1994, especializada en la creación y producción de complementos y elementos de marca de alta calidad. Nuestro objetivo principal es ofrecer soluciones integrales y personalizadas a los negocios de moda, garantizando siempre productos que cumplan con los más altos estándares de calidad y diseño.

Contamos con un departamento de diseño propio, y con un equipo de profesionales altamente capacitados y apasionados por la moda, que trabajan en estrecha colaboración con nuestros clientes para asesorarles y guiarles en el diseño más adecuado para su proyecto. Nuestro enfoque personalizado asegura que cada cliente reciba la atención y el apoyo que merece desde la primera llamada.

En Rodamon Marca & Moda, nos enorgullecemos de ofrecer una amplia variedad de servicios, incluyendo la producción de etiquetas textiles impresas y tejidas, así como packaging para e-commerce y demás elementos. Trabajamos junto a nuestros clientes para elegir la mejor solución que se adapte a sus necesidades específicas.

Si estás buscando una empresa que cubra todas las necesidades de tu negocio en el ámbito de la moda, la has encontrado! En Rodamon Marca & Moda, te ayudaremos a alcanzar tus objetivos y a hacer que tu marca destaque en el mercado. Con nuestra experiencia, creatividad y dedicación, estamos listos para convertirnos en tu socio estratégico y llevar tu negocio al siguiente nivel. Contáctanos hoy y descubre todo lo que podemos hacer por ti!

Name: APUA
Description:
APUA - The Heritage Of Marble. 
From the depths of the Apuan Alps, where Michelangelo once found his inspiration, APUA is born: a brand that transforms marble into unique, wearable accessories. No longer just a material for temples and sculptures, marble today becomes a symbol of creative revolution, eternal beauty, and identity.

Each APUA creation is the result of a perfect balance between art and innovation, myth and future. The “Apuane” – Eva, Matilde, Cleopatra – are not mere handbags, but living tributes to legendary women, handcrafted in Italy using 100% recycled marble and the finest leathers. Every piece is one of a kind, sculpted from the marble’s unrepeatable veins and fully customizable: from the model and leather color to the marble selection itself.

In a world where everything can be replicated, we choose uniqueness. In a sector that chases trends, we celebrate time.

APUA is authentic Made in Italy. It is excellence in craftsmanship. It is a sustainable approach. But above all, it is the telling of a new story through the most ancient material of all.
For those who believe that luxury is culture, spirit, and memory. For those who choose to wear a piece of legend.

piece is a unique work of art, crafted with care and attention to detail. Handcrafted Treasures

At NINE5, we believe that the best things in life are handmade - that's why we've dedicated ourselves to creating unique, handcrafted treasures that are as beautiful as they are meaningful. From our elegant dresses and stylish bags to our traditional pottery minarets and handwoven prayer mats, each piece in our collection is a testament to the timeless art of craftsmanship.

But we don't stop there. We're also committed to modern design and innovation, ensuring that each item we produce is not only beautiful but also functional, versatile, and on-trend. Whether you're looking for a unique accessory to complete your outfit or a decorative piece to add a touch of culture to your home, NINE5 has something special just for you. And with a focus on quality, sustainability, and cultural significance, you can be sure that each purchase you make is not only a beautiful addition to your life but also a responsible choice for the world.

Name: Sergio Morini srl
Description:
La nostra società prende il nome dal suo fondatore, Sergio Morini che, agli inizi degli anni
60, si specializza nella produzione di Cerniere per borse.
Nel corso dei decenni, abbiamo compreso che il futuro del lusso risiede non solo nella
produzione del grezzo, ma nella cura meticolosa della rifinitura e dell’assemblaggio.Questa
visione ha guidato la nostra evoluzione: ad oggi siamo un riferimento nella lavorazione di
accessori per alta moda che opera esclusivamente conto terzi.

La nostra azienda è organizzata in tre aree cruciali per la realizzazione di accessori di lusso:

OFFICINA: il nostro reparto oﬃcina è attrezzato con macchinari eﬃcienti per garantire lavorazioni di qualità.

MONTAGGIO: Il reparto Montaggio è strutturato con attrezzature e utensili che
garantiscono velocità e precisione nelle lavorazioni grezze e galvanizzate.

STRASSATURA: Ogni particolare è reso unico dall’applicazione di strass e pietre dure per
le quali utilizziamo esclusivamente materiali di alta qualità, colle bi-componenti con catalisi
a forno. L’applicazione di pietre o strass e’ fatta a mano, pezzo per pezzo, utilizzando
tecniche che garantiscono perfezione e lucentezza che durano nel tempo.

Name: LePatrí
Description:
LePatrí é uma marca pernambucana, da cidade de Moreno. Voltada à produção de moda e calçados.
Inicialmente atuava como revenda em agosto de 2018 e se chamava Patrícia Modas, mas o espírito de crescimento e expansão exigia um nome característico e único. Em novembro de 2018 foi idealizado o nome LePatrí (A Patrícia), que teve como inspiração a sócia do empreendimento Patrícia Belmiro. Patrícia é um nome muito comum no Brasil, tem o significado de "nobre" ou "pessoa nobre". Em outubro de 2020 foi iniciado o processo de registro da marca no INPI e em maio de 2022 a marca foi ativa. Vários projetos estão em curso para o ano de 2022 e próximos anos. A meta é  em 10 anos atingir todo território nacional é o projeto do Seo Jailton Silva. Também foi incorporado ao empreendimento em plena pandemia a loja Baguncinha localizada em Bonança-PE, mas que teve o nome alterado para LePatrí. 
Foi um investimento bem diferente que exigiu bastante esforço, mas que vem dado muito certo e com projeto de expansão.  A LePatrí é uma marca criada para você Brasileiro e Brasileira que acredita nos sonhos e na superação das dificuldades, pois a base é o amor.

Name: BLACKÑANDU
Description:
Under the creative direction of its founder, the industrial designer Catalina Guzman, Blackñandu designs and produces, in its own workshop in Buenos Aires, unique and handmade pieces that offer a new vision of the existing market of handbags and backpacks.  

Its name is a fusion of words that define the essence of the enterprise. 
BLACK is aluminium, is international, is the city, is industrial, is innovation. 
ÑANDU is leather, it is national, it is countryside, it is craftsmanship, it is tradition. 

Based on this concept of fusing urban life with the qualities of nature, Blackñandu selects for its production, noble materials that are natural, such as vegetable tanned cowhide, combined with avant-garde and sustainable materials such as aluminium composite, recovered from architectural works.

The result of this blend are accessories with a high degree of design inspired by modern architecture, handmade with ecological awareness, obtaining unique, sustainable, high quality and timeless objects

Name: INKED CAPS HARMONY
Description:
Chez Inked Caps Harmony, nous sommes un atelier nuptial français dédié à la création de pièces textiles brodées pour le mariage.

Nous concevons des créations artisanales pensées pour accompagner les moments fondateurs d’une union.
La broderie occupe une place centrale dans notre démarche : un geste lent et précis, porteur de symboles, qui inscrit chaque pièce dans le temps et dans la mémoire.
Chaque création est réalisée à la main en France, à partir de textiles soigneusement sélectionnés tels que la soie, le lin, la laine et le coton.

Le voile de mariée brodé est la pièce signature de l’atelier.
Il est imaginé comme un élément central de la silhouette, conçu pour dialoguer avec la robe, le lieu et l’histoire du couple. Autour de cette création emblématique, l’atelier développe un ensemble de pièces textiles nuptiales brodées, destinées à créer une harmonie globale.

l Notre univers l

 Mariage
Création de voiles de mariée brodés, accessoires brodés pour le marié, pièces pour les témoins et le cortège, linge de table brodé et trousseau. Des créations pensées comme des éléments symboliques, durables et porteurs de sens.

 Savoir-faire & sur-mesure
Chaque projet est brodé et réalisé en série limitée ou sur mesure, dans le respect du temps nécessaire à la fabrication artisanale et à l’exigence des finitions.

 Collaborations professionnelles
Nous accompagnons des professionnels du mariage et de l’art de vivre (lieux de réception, domaines, créateurs, maisons) souhaitant développer des pièces textiles brodées ou des créations exclusives en cohérence avec leur univers.

 Notre ambition
Créer des textiles nuptiaux brodés, élégants, intemporels et incarnés, destinés à être portés, utilisés, conservés et parfois transmis.

 Pour toute collaboration ou demande d’information, contactez-nous via LinkedIn ou par mail : info@inkedcapsharmony.com

Name: Waste Knot Co
Description:
A staggering 25% of textiles are wasted as leftovers from production each year (Fashion Revolution, 2020). That's millions of tons of waste. Every. Year. Just from unused material that never even makes it into garments.

Waste Knot's founder, Taylor, had a goal to address this problem, by challenging what it means to produce waste. We only use fabric scraps from other designers, turning what would be waste into something new and beautiful - giving it new life. Nature inherently doesn't have waste streams like we do in our society. Every "waste" product is a valuable resource to another system. It's how fallen leaves rot and become soil, to grow new trees.

So what if we thought about our own systems this way? Using all of our waste, to the best of our ability. Having a truly circular system, just like nature. Waste Knot scrunchies won't solve the world's global textile waste crisis - but we're doing our part to show one way we can challenge the linear system of take → make → waste. For the health of our ecosystems and our communities.

It's not waste til it's wasted.

Qui tutto parla di pelli. E gli insegnamenti che si tramandano da padre in figlio, da generazione in generazione, diventano un po’ uno stile di vita. Qualcosa di tuo che puoi solo prendere o lasciare.

Description:
Alamastr meets the needs of those seeking an alternative to standard industrial eyewear.

Choosing our glasses means investing not just in an accessory, but in an experience: unprecedented comfort, a style that truly represents you, and a tangible commitment to a more sustainable future.

Discover the difference of eyewear made to measure, fully customizable, and crafted with materials that respect both the planet and your uniqueness.

Each pair of Alamastr glasses is the result of a fully manual process.

It all begins with a questionnaire designed to outline your personal profile including personality, style, needs, and anatomical features.

Based on this information, we design a model tailored to your preferences. Once the shape and material are defined, we use a CNC machine to precisely cut the base structure.

The result is a semi-finished frame that is then carefully refined by hand, through entirely manual, artisanal processes  transforming the raw form into a unique and sophisticated style piece.

To make your glasses even more personal and meaningful, you can choose additional customizations, such as laser engravings on the temples  featuring a name, a phrase, or a personal design.

Name: GEB Wallets
Description:
Bienvenidos a Geb Wallets! Somos Facundo y Gonzalo, dos hermanos apasionados por la elegancia y la comodidad que decidimos unir fuerzas para ofrecerte el complemento perfecto en tu vida diaria. Nuestra empresa familiar se encuentra en la hermosa ciudad de Campana, en la provincia de Buenos Aires, Argentina.

Desde siempre, soñamos con emprender juntos y construir un negocio que nos permitiera disfrutar lo que hacemos cada día. Teníamos claro que queríamos brindar un producto diferencial, algo útil y práctico para las personas en su rutina diaria. Fue así como nació la idea de sumergirnos en el mundo de las billeteras.

En Geb Wallets, nos enorgullecemos de presentar productos que van más allá de lo convencional. Nuestras billeteras están diseñadas con un tarjetero deslizante y cuentan con un sistema de seguridad de vanguardia que protege tus tarjetas de la tecnología de identificación por radiofrecuencia (RFID). Así, puedes tener la tranquilidad de que tus tarjetas estarán seguras frente a posibles robos y estafas.

La elección del nombre "Geb" no fue casual, representa nuestros segundos nombres y nuestro apellido familiar: Gabriel, Emanuel y Bermudez. Es un símbolo de nuestro enfoque en lo familiar y de la conexión que valoramos con nuestros clientes. Crecer y aprender en esta trayectoria empresarial es fundamental para nosotros, y por eso, tus comentarios y opiniones son de gran importancia. Siempre estaremos aquí para ayudarte, ya que tu satisfacción es nuestra prioridad en el camino de crecimiento como empresa.

Nos alegra ser parte de tu vida diaria, brindándote productos que combinan estilo y funcionalidad. En Geb Wallets, nos comprometemos con la calidad, el diseño y la seguridad, para que lleves tus pertenencias con total confianza. Te invitamos a explorar nuestra colección de billeteras para hombre y descubrir la elegancia que podemos ofrecerte. Gracias por confiar en nosotros y ser parte de nuestra familia Geb Wallets!

Name: D Smoke | دیـ اسموک
Description:
Dsmoke was founded in August 2024 as a personal brand with a clear mission: to elevate the smoking experience by offering a premium platform specializing in rare, authentic, and thoughtfully curated smoking products. The journey of Dsmoke began with a simple yet powerful realization — there was a noticeable lack of awareness, accessibility, and diversity in the market for high-quality smoking accessories, especially those that are unique, original, or innovative. This gap in the market, especially for premium and niche items, motivated the creation of Dsmoke.

One of the primary driving forces behind the brand is our commitment to providing authentic, high-quality products that meet the expectations of our discerning customers. We understand the growing demand for sophisticated smoking accessories, from Zippo lighters to IQOS devices, pipes, premium cigars, and artisan smoking tools, and we strive to bridge the gap by offering only the best. At Dsmoke, we are dedicated to providing our customers with the finest selection of products that bring together tradition, craftsmanship, and modern innovation.

As a personal brand, Dsmoke reflects my own passion for timeless, elegant design and top-tier craftsmanship. It’s not just a store; it’s a curated experience where each product tells a unique story. Every item we offer is handpicked, with a focus on quality and artistry, ensuring that it enhances the smoking experience.

We also recognize the importance of raising awareness and educating consumers about the smoking culture, whether it’s through modern alternatives like heat-not-burn technology or exploring the history and craftsmanship behind a hand-carved pipe. Dsmoke isn’t just about selling products; it’s about sharing a story, an experience, and a lifestyle that reflects sophistication, individuality, and a love for the art of smoking.

From the first flick to the last puff — Dsmoke is with you every step of the way.

Med fokus på eksperimentering, forskning og kontinuerlig innovasjon, vil klesmerket fortsette å skape nye unike produkter. Jeg setter funksjonalitet, kvalitet og design høyt på prioriteringslisten når jeg designer.
 
Alle print er håndmalt eller tegnet her på Kirkenær.

𝗕Æ𝗥𝗘𝗞𝗥𝗔𝗙𝗧
Som klesprodusent er det mitt ansvar å vedkjenne at ingen nye klær er 100% bærekraftige. Det er derfor avgjørende at jeg klarer å lage klær på mest mulig bærekraftig måte. Det er et diffust begrep – men det betyr rett og slett at det vi bruker av jordens ressurser til klesproduksjon i størst mulig grad skal kunne erstattes, og at det ikke skal gjøre skade. 80% av klimafotavtrykket til et klesplagg kommer fra produksjon.

Jeg må derfor velge råmaterialer og produksjonsprosesser med mindre miljøbelastning, men samtidig designe plagg som kan brukes mange ganger over lang tid – og som enkelt kan resirkuleres ved veis ende.
 
Lopi Studio velger kun naturlige råmaterialer som ull og silke. Disse materialene har høy kvalitet og kan med fordel resirkuleres og brukes på nytt i nye plagg eller materialer. 

𝗠𝗨𝗟𝗘𝗦𝗜𝗡𝗚𝗙𝗥𝗜 𝗨𝗟𝗟
I Lopi Studio tolererer ikke uetisk og inhuman behandling av dyr, og jeg kjøper kun mulesingfri ull. Disse omhandler gårdsdrift, transport av dyr, sikkerhet, bærekraft og generell velferd. 

Jeg tar sterk avstand fra mulesing, et smertefullt inngrep som skal forhindre at fluelarver setter seg i huden på merinosauen. Metoden er i bruk i Australia. Jeg kjøper kun sertifisert mulesingfri merinoull, og hovedsakelig fra Sør Afrika som ikke praktiserer mulesing.

Human outfits reflect his or her personal choice, time, traditional and more the surroundings where she or he lives.

Some are okay with t-shirt and jeans, and that makes them complete. As a woman, it is advisable you understand your body shape, have consciousness of what you wear, and how it makes you feel.

Name: Cherry PaoPao
Description:
Cherry PaoPao is a love brand that transforms feelings into handcrafted 
jewelry, charms that carry stories, emotions, and memories. 

Paola, Founder of Cherry PaoPao shares her memories through her existing collections. From necklaces to keychains, bag charms, and more, each piece represents a specific era, a personal story or a shared experience. Every charm is more than just the final touch of your outfit, it’s a tiny time capsule from the 90’s to the dreams, nightmares and present day, created to spark connection, conversation, and joy, emotions, love, and so on.

We don’t just sell jewelry, we create with you. But mostly, your memories.

Cherry PaoPao invites you into a world where emotions are welcome and stories are celebrated. Where you can learn so much more about one another, hear things you didn’t know before, but mostly, be there for each other, at that precise moment.

We offer fully customized creations that bring your memories to life, through colors, textures, charms and symbols that truly mean something to you. We also give a second life to existing beads and pearls, honoring their past and weaving them into new stories, simply yours.

At Cherry PaoPao, we listen, we laugh, we cry, we share a moment, together.
It’s a safe space where your story matters, where being yourself is enough, and where each charm holds a memory worth sharing.

Nossa missão é produzir acessórios alegres e delicados, diferenciados, exclusivos, com ótima qualidade e que reflita o seu estilo. Para isso, estamos sempre focados na criatividade, inovação e principalmente na satisfação do cliente, isso faz a gente melhorar todos os dias e levar o melhor até você.

Falando em satisfação, sabemos que comprar online pode deixar muita gente insegura, mas aqui na boholela você pode ficar tranquilo.
